Text: होता होता राहीलेला निवडणूक मारो मर्ज़ीभई
translated_text: The election that was held was a draw, Marjibhai.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it discusses elections but lacks any strong emotional words.

Text: एकवेळ मला काही देउ नका । पण शानपट्टी देऊन मला जाऊ नका ॥
translated_text: Don't give me anything at once. But don't leave me without giving me a reward.
Justification: The phrase "शानपट्टी देऊन मला जाऊ नका" (don’t let me go without dignity) expresses frustration, leading to anger.

Text: आता हे वसुली करणारे वित्तमंत्र्यांना फायनांस विषयात बोलणार….कमाल आहे बुवा तुमची!
translated_text: Now these collectors will talk to the Finance Minister about finance...you are amazing!
Justification: The phrase "कमाल आहे बुवा तुमची!" (Amazing, you guys!) suggests sarcasm, but it can be interpreted as joyful mockery.

Text: म्हणून सांगतो पाव खा पण भाव खाऊ नका...
translated_text: That's why I say eat bread but don't eat the price...
Justification: The phrase "भाव खाऊ नका" (don't show off) is advisory and does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: तुझी तेवढी तरी लायकी आहे का भात्या
translated_text: Are you even worth that much, Bhatia?
Justification: The phrase "लायकी आहे का?" (Are you even capable?) questions someone’s worth, which can evoke surprise.

Text: अक्कल नको पाजळू तुझी, हिंदू सणं डोळ्यात खूपतात का तुझ्या ?
translated_text: Don't let your common sense fool you, do Hindu festivals get in your eyes?
Justification: The phrase "डोळ्यात खूपतात" (does it hurt your eyes?) suggests frustration, leading to anger.

Text: हा जो शिवसेनेच्या विरोधात खेळ खेळत आहात याचा परिणाम भोगावे लागणार आहेत
translated_text: The game you are playing against Shiv Sena will have consequences.
Justification: The phrase "परिणाम भोगावे लागणार आहेत" (will face consequences) is a warning, indicating anger.

Text: खरच हा पक्षच धर्मद्रोही आहे .
translated_text: This party is truly anti-religious.
Justification: The term "धर्मद्रोही" (anti-religious) has a strong negative connotation, showing disgust.

Text: या चोंग्याला बाळासाहेब आणि त्यांचे नेमके विचार माहित आहेत का ??
translated_text: Does this idiot even know Balasaheb’s exact thoughts?
Justification: The word "चोंग्या" (idiot) is an insult, and the questioning tone conveys anger.

Text: नामर्द बोलतो आहेस, स्वतः कडे बोट आहेत ते बघा
translated_text: You are speaking like a coward, look at yourself first.
Justification: The word "नामर्द" (coward) is an insult, making this disgust-driven.

Text: फैजाबाद ही निर्लज्ज पणाचा कळस आहे... असुरी प्रवृत्ती आहे ती
translated_text: Faizabad is the peak of shamelessness… It is a demonic tendency.
Justification: The words "निर्लज्ज पणाचा कळस" (peak of shamelessness) and "असुरी प्रवृत्ती" (demonic tendency) strongly indicate disgust.

Text: तुला शिवसैनिकांनी चांगल हाणला होतो त्यामुळे तू बोलतोयस
translated_text: You were beaten up by Shiv Sainiks, that's why you're talking.
Justification: Though it refers to violence, it is presented as a factual statement.

Text: उद्धटरावांनी आता मशालीनेच स्वतःच्या वडिलांचा पक्ष जाळायला काढला आहे.
translated_text: Uddhatrao has now used the torch to burn his own father's party.
Justification: The imagery of burning one's father's party expresses strong anger.

Text: माय दिवाळी फराळ चाखुन कंटाळा आला सुद्धा
translated_text: I'm tired of tasting my Diwali snacks.
Justification: Expresses dislike and weariness toward food, showing disgust.

Text: हिंदू पोरींना हिंदू मुलगे मिळत नाहीत का? भिकार करीना कपूर बघ
translated_text: Don't Hindu girls get Hindu boys? Look at the beggar Kareena Kapoor.
Justification: The use of "भिकार" (beggar) and judgmental tone convey disgust.

Text: हे विरोधक म्हणजे एकमेकांचे पाय खेचणारे खेकडे आहेत
translated_text: These opponents are crabs pulling each other's legs.
Justification: A metaphor without strong emotional intensity.

Text: मोदीजींचे हे पूर्णपणे चुकीचे आहे. मनीष सिसोदिया यांना अटक
translated_text: This is completely wrong of Modiji. Manish Sisodia arrested.
Justification: "पूर्णपणे चुकीचे" (completely wrong) conveys disapproval and disgust.

Text: निर्लज्ज सदा सुखी! आपल्या बंगल्याच नामकरण केले काय! बाबासाहेबांची मातोश्री!
translated_text: Shameless, always happy! Did you name your bungalow! Babasaheb's mother!
Justification: The word "निर्लज्ज" (shameless) conveys anger and criticism, indicating a strong negative sentiment.

Text: पूर्वी पाऊस पडावा म्हणून बेडकांची लग्न लावली जायची. आता त्याचा घटस्फोट घेयची वेळ आली आहे
translated_text: In the past, frogs were married to make it rain. Now it's time to divorce them.
Justification: The sentence is metaphorical and does not express any strong emotions.

Text: देशाचा गृहमंत्री एक आरोपी असताना देशाचे अजून काय हाल होणार भामट्या...
translated_text: What else will happen to the country when the Home Minister of the country is an accused, you idiot...
Justification: The phrase "भामट्या" (idiot) and accusing the Home Minister indicates strong disgust.

Text: हा म्हणजे तरंगणारी विष्ठा य
translated_text: This is floating feces.
Justification: Comparing someone to "floating feces" is highly derogatory, expressing disgust.

Text: जनावरं ही त्रस्त आहेत रामराज्यात.
translated_text: Animals are suffering in the kingdom of Ram.
Justification: The phrase expresses suffering, indicating sadness.

Text: पण असं कुणी परीक्षा आली की पळ काढत का?
translated_text: But does anyone run away when the exam comes?
Justification: The question is rhetorical and does not express strong emotion.

Text: भंगारा,पहाटेचे शपथविधी चालते का?
translated_text: Bhangara, is the swearing-in ceremony going on in the morning?
Justification: A simple question without emotional intensity.

Text: अच्छा म्हणजे मुरलीन काम केलेली नाही अस नाही , त्याने पैसे खाल्लेत असय
translated_text: Well, it's not that Murlin hasn't done any work, he's just been eating money.
Justification: The sentence hints at corruption but does not display a strong emotional tone.

Text: अवघड आहे ही
translated_text: This is difficult.
Justification: A factual statement without emotional weight.

Text: भाजपाला टार्गेट करत, नेटकऱ्यांनी बाळासाहेबांच्या नावावरून शिंदे गटाला केले ट्रोल –
translated_text: Targeting BJP, netizens trolled Shinde group in Balasaheb's name –
Justification: A factual statement without emotional intensity.

Text: मा.सत्यजित कदम ह्यांना उमेदवारी देऊन त्यांना कायमचे घरी बसावलत...हे कितपत योग्य आहे ओ साहेब....
translated_text: Giving nomination to Hon. Satyajit Kadam and making him stay at home forever...how right is this, sir...?
Justification: The question is rhetorical but does not express a strong emotion.

Text: भंगार आहे हा भंगार ,महाराष्ट्र ला लागलेली ही एक मोठी किड आहेत.
translated_text: This is junk, this is junk, this is a big pest that has infected Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "मोठी किड" (big pest) indicates disgust.

Text: : लागवड घटल्याने यंदा कांद्याचे होणार वांधे !
translated_text: : There will be a shortage of onions this year due to reduced planting!
Justification: A factual statement without emotional intensity.

Text: या भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्याला पैसे भेटलेत म्हणून भुंकतोय
translated_text: This barking dog is barking because he got money.
Justification: The phrase "भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्याला" (barking dog) is derogatory but does not strongly express emotion.

Text: श्रमाला किंमत नाही. आणि अशा व्यक्तीने खिल्ली उडवावी जी स्वतः परिचारिका होती
translated_text: Labor has no price. And to be ridiculed by someone who was a nurse herself
Justification: Expresses resentment towards someone’s attitude, conveying disgust.

Text: सुप्रीम कोर्टाने दिवसभर वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती. सकाळीच निकाल देऊन मोकळं व्हायचं होत.
translated_text: There was no need for the Supreme Court to waste time all day. It wanted to give its verdict in the morning and be free.
Justification: The statement critiques a process but does not strongly express emotion.

Text: तिला बँकेत नोकरी करयाची होती पण...', रस्ता सोडून घरात घुसलेल्या ट्रकने तरुणीस चिरडले
translated_text: She wanted to work in a bank but...', A young woman was crushed by a truck that left the road and entered a house.
Justification: The phrase "तरुणीस चिरडले" (crushed young woman) conveys fear and tragedy.

Text: गद्दारांच्या जिवावर मजा मारत आहेत
translated_text: They are making fun of the lives of traitors.
Justification: Calling someone a traitor and ridiculing them conveys disgust.

Text: पळून लय भारी गेलता हा संदीप
translated_text: This Sandeep ran away.
Justification: The sentence does not contain strong emotions.

Text: मग कोर्टात कशाला झक मारायला युक्तिवाद करतात का
translated_text: Then why do they argue in court?
Justification: The statement is rhetorical and lacks strong emotion.

Text: जेव्हा मन साथ सोडत तेव्हा माणूस हरतो आणि मरतो
translated_text: When the mind leaves, a person loses and dies.
Justification: The statement is philosophical and does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: साल्या आमच्यामुळे लोक प्रतिनिधी झालास आम्हला किंमत नाही
translated_text: Salya, you became a representative of the people because of us, we don't value you.
Justification: The use of "साल्या" and the accusatory tone indicate anger.

Text: तुम्हीच विचार करा स्वायत्त संस्था विश्र्वास ठेवण्या लायक राहिलेत का.....
translated_text: Think for yourself whether autonomous institutions are worthy of trust.
Justification: It questions trust but does not express strong emotion.

Text: स्वतःच्या ठुगना खाली पाणी आले का लोक सुशिक्षित होतात.
translated_text: People become educated because of their own deceit.
Justification: The sentence makes an observation but lacks strong emotion.

Text: पप्पुचा चोखून चोखून तुझ डोक फिरले आहे
translated_text: Your head is spinning after sucking on Pappu's dick.
Justification: The sentence is vulgar but does not indicate a specific emotional category.

Text: कामाला तर लाग म्हणावं बाबा.. कुठे स्व बाळासाहेब आणि कुठे हे.. अवघड आहे सर्व..!!
translated_text: Let's get to work, Baba.. Where is Balasaheb and where is this.. Everything is difficult..!!
Justification: The phrase "अवघड आहे सर्व" (everything is difficult) suggests uncertainty and fear.

Text: अरे हे कुठं नायजेरियाला पोहचले भारत जोडण्या अगोदर इथं पाकिस्तान, बांगलादेश राहूनच गेले
translated_text: Oh, where did this reach Nigeria? Before joining India, it had to stay in Pakistan and Bangladesh.
Justification: The sentence makes a geographical comparison but does not carry strong emotion.

Text: तुमच्या सारखा स्वाभिमान गहाण नाही ठेवला त्यांनी
translated_text: They didn't sacrifice their self-respect like you did.
Justification: The sentence is critical but does not express strong emotion.

Text: आपल्यालाच सांगावे लागणार….. आणि आता लोकांनाही यांची खेळी लक्षात येऊ लागलीय.
translated_text: We have to tell them… and now people are starting to notice their tricks.
Justification: This is an observational statement, without strong emotions.

Text: फुले शाहू आंबेडकरांच्या महाराष्ट्रामध्ये लहानग्यांना शिक्षणासाठी आंदोलन करावं लागणं हे लाजिरवाणे आहे.
translated_text: It is shameful that children in Phule Shahu Ambedkar's Maharashtra have to agitate for education.
Justification: The word "लाजिरवाणे" (shameful) expresses strong discontent and disgust.

Text: काही महीन्यातचं बाळासाहेबाची शिवसेना आणी भाजपा सरकारची उतरती कळा दिसायला लागली.. हे प्रभु
translated_text: Within a few months, the decline of Balasaheb's Shiv Sena and BJP government began to be seen.. Oh Lord.
Justification: The phrase expresses concern and disappointment, leading to sadness.

Text: जळ जळ तय,सहन होत नाही अन् सांगताही येत नाही कुरेशी सर
translated_text: It's so hot, I can't stand it and I can't even tell you, Qureshi Sir.
Justification: The phrase expresses frustration and disgust.

Text: पण डॉलर च्या तुलनेत रुपया खाली येतोय .. त्याचं काय
translated_text: But the rupee is falling against the dollar.. what about that?
Justification: An economic observation without emotional intensity, making it neutral.

Text: ही गोष्ट घरात सांगायच विसरले होते वाटत
translated_text: I think I forgot to mention this at home.
Justification: A simple statement without emotional intensity.

Text: अंधेरीत विधानसभेची उप निवडणूक आहे. जनतेला मूर्ख बनविण्याचे उद्योग चालू आहे.
translated_text: There is a by-election for the assembly in Andheri. There is an attempt to fool the people.
Justification: The sentence states an event and makes an allegation but lacks strong emotional words. The phrase "मूर्ख बनविण्याचे" (fooling people) suggests mild criticism but does not evoke a strong emotional reaction.

Text: “उद्धव ठाकरे हताश, अकर्तृत्ववान, अहंकारी”, भाजपा आमदाराचा टोला; म्हणाले, “घरात बसणाऱ्यांना…”
translated_text: “Uddhav Thackeray is desperate, incompetent, arrogant”, BJP MLA says; said, “Those who stay at home…”
Justification: The words "हताश" (desperate), "अकर्तृत्ववान" (incompetent), "अहंकारी" (arrogant) are strong criticisms, making "Disgust" an appropriate emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात हल्ली चाललेल्या गल्लिच्च राजकारणाबद्दल खालील समर्पक दंतकथा लागु होते.
translated_text: The following apt anecdote applies to the current political turmoil in Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "गल्लिच्च राजकारण" (petty politics) is slightly critical, but the sentence is mostly descriptive, justifying a "Neutral" label.

Text: होय मान्य, स्पर्धेचा युगात माणूस देशात आणि समाजात काय चालू आहे हे विसरत आहे
translated_text: Yes, I agree, in this era of competition, people are forgetting what is going on in the country and society.
Justification: The phrase "विसरत आहे" (forgetting) indicates concern but lacks strong emotion.

Text: ढुंगण दांडा काय ती भाषा आणि काय ते ढोंग आणि कस ते पळणे
translated_text: What kind of language is that, what kind of pretense is that, and how can you run away?
Justification: The phrase "ढोंग" (pretense) suggests mild criticism but does not evoke strong emotion.

Text: सध्या वरचे वर ढग फुटी होती आहे पुण्यात
translated_text: There are clouds overhead in Pune right now.
Justification: The sentence is a factual weather report with no emotional charge.

Text: देवतांचे विडंबन करतो; पण त्याविषयी कठोर कारवाई मात्र होत नाही.
translated_text: They mock the gods, but no strict action is taken against them.
Justification: The word विडंबन (mocking) indicates an act of disrespect toward deities, evoking disgust.

Text: शिवसेनेला मशाल म्हणजे माकडाच्या हाती कोलीत दुसऱ्याचं घर जाळता जाळता स्वतःच सुद्धा
translated_text: Shiv Sena is a torch in the hands of a monkey, burning down other people's houses while burning down their own.
Justification: The phrase माकडाच्या हाती कोलीत (a torch in a monkey’s hand) implies recklessness, leading to a sense of disgust.

Text: ही आणि दानवे काहीही बोलतात
translated_text: What does this and Danve say?
Justification: No strong emotional words are present; it is a neutral statement.

Text: प्रशासन हे फक्त लोकांची गैरसोय करण्यासाठी आहे
translated_text: The administration is only there to inconvenience the people.
Justification: The statement criticizes administration but lacks strong emotional language, making it neutral.

Text: “शिवसेनेला सहानुभूती मिळतेय हा भ्रम आहे!”- राज ठाकरे यांचे मनसैनिकांसमोर प्रतिपादन…
translated_text: “It is an illusion that Shiv Sena is getting sympathy!” – Raj Thackeray’s statement to the Mansainiks…
Justification: It presents an opinion without strong emotional words, keeping it neutral.

Text: म्हणून तर कमळी ला शिव्या देतो आम्ही नीच लोक आहेत सगळे तुझ्या सारखे
translated_text: That's why I curse Kamali. We are all lowly people like you.
Justification: The phrase शिव्या देतो (curse/abuse) expresses hatred, leading to disgust.

Text: ज्या काळात कॉंग्रेस सत्तेत होता त्यावेळी होते. संघर्ष करायची वेळ आल्यावर पळून गेले
translated_text: It was during the time when Congress was in power. When it was time to fight, they fled.
Justification: The statement presents an observation without strong emotional words, keeping it neutral.

Text: कोणालाही जनतेशी काही देणं घेणं नाही...... कुठे गेली लोकशाही.....ही तर नुसती मनमानी
translated_text: No one has anything to do with the people...... Where has democracy gone..... This is just arbitrariness.
Justification: The phrase नुसती मनमानी (pure dictatorship) expresses frustration with governance, indicating anger.

Text: फडनवीस उद्धव साहेबा पर्यंत ठीक आहे, बाळासाहेबाचा नाद नका करू..
translated_text: Fadnavis is fine up to Uddhav Saheb, don't make fun of Balasaheb..
Justification: The statement warns but lacks strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: बुडाला अंगार लागली का?
translated_text: Did Buda catch fire?
Justification: The phrase is metaphorical, but it lacks strong emotional weight.

Text: अभिनयासाठी मौनी रॉयने शिक्षण अर्धवट सोडून गाठली होती मुंबई…
translated_text: Mouni Roy had left her studies halfway and reached Mumbai to pursue acting...
Justification: A factual statement with no strong emotions.

Text: अल्पवयीन मुलीवर अत्याचार करून गर्भवती केल्याप्रकरणी नराधमास वर्षे सक्तमजुरी
translated_text: Man sentenced to years of hard labor for raping and impregnating minor girl.
Justification: The word अत्याचार (atrocity) and नराधम (monster) indicate strong moral repulsion, leading to disgust.

Text: ढुंगण सगळ्यांना असतं पण लाथा आणि दांडा खाणारे तुमचं एकच असतं
translated_text: Everyone has a butt, but you're the only one who can take kicks and sticks.
Justification: The phrase लाथा आणि दांडा खाणारे (taking kicks and sticks) implies humiliation, evoking disgust.

Text: असे पन भाजपाचा पराभव होणारच आहे
translated_text: This is how BJP is bound to be defeated.
Justification: A political prediction without strong emotion.

Text: राजीनामा द्या आणि निघा इथून महाराष्ट्रातून
translated_text: Resign and leave Maharashtra.
Justification: A demand but without strong emotional charge.

Text: काय हाय का नाही. नुसतच.
translated_text: Why not? Just kidding.
Justification: A short phrase without strong emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात घाण येणार आहे ! म्हणून लोक नाकाला रुमाल लावणार आहे
translated_text: There is going to be dirt in Maharashtra! That's why people are going to put handkerchiefs on their noses.
Justification: The phrase घाण येणार (dirt is coming) metaphorically expresses disgust.

Text: अबब! स्कूल बसमध्ये हा कोठून आला अजगर? व्हिडिओ पाहून कुणाचाही थरकाप उडेल
translated_text: Wow! Where did this python come from in the school bus? Anyone will be shocked to see the video
Justification: The exclamation "अबब!" (Oh wow!) and "थरकाप उडेल" (will be shocked) are clear indicators of a surprised reaction.

Text: सत्तेचा माज आहे सत्ताधाऱ्यांना!
translated_text: The rulers are obsessed with power!
Justification: सत्तेचा माज (arrogance of power) is a strong phrase reflecting anger and frustration with authority.

Text: हा खरोखरच मोठा घोटाळा आहे, यावर कडक कारवाई झाली पाहिजे
translated_text: This is really a big scam, strict action should be taken against this.
Justification: मोठा घोटाळा (big scam) and "कडक कारवाई" (strict action) reflect disgust towards corruption or misdeed.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे रडके नाहीत. बाळासाहेबांसोबत गद्दारी केली फावड्याने.
translated_text: There are no crybabies like you. You betrayed Balasaheb with a shovel.
Justification: गद्दारी (betrayal) and "फावड्याने" (with a shovel) show intense aggression and blame, indicating anger.

Text: हे लाईक करायला तुमच्या आयटी सेल ला तरी कामाला लावा. तासात फक्त लाईक?
translated_text: At least get your IT cell to work on this. Just likes in an hour?
Justification: Sarcastic but light in tone, without emotional intensity — remains neutral.

Text: निषेध, रौत साहेबांचा फोटो का नाही...?
translated_text: Protest, why is there no photo of Raut Saheb...?
Justification: का नाही...? (why not...?) after naming a person implies an element of unexpectedness or surprise.

Text: त्रास दिला नाही म्हणून तर ही वेळ आलीये.... वेळीच वेसण घालायला पाहिजे होती...
translated_text: Since I didn't bother you, now is the time... I should have put on the veil on time...
Justification: Reflective tone, but lacks strong emotion, hence neutral.

Text: येडझव्या जवांना सोबत करतो लायकी आहे का तुझी
translated_text: Are you worthy of accompanying the twelve barleys?
Justification: The odd expression lacks a clear emotional tone, hence neutral.

Text: स्वतःवर शेकलं की हे बरं आठवतं तुम्हाला
translated_text: You remember this well when you were angry with yourself.
Justification: The sarcastic tone and "शेकलं" (when scolded/criticized) convey blame and frustration.

Text: म्हणजे उद्धव ठाकरे व्हिजनरी नव्हते, राऊतलाच जास्त मुलाखती द्यायचे
translated_text: So Uddhav Thackeray was not a visionary, Raut used to give more interviews.
Justification: Mild criticism using "व्हिजनरी नव्हते", but overall it maintains a neutral tone.

Text: इकडे घामाघूम झालो आम्ही इतकं कडाक्याच ऊन आहे
translated_text: We're sweating here, it's so hot.
Justification: "घामाघूम" and exaggeration about heat show light humor and joy.

Text: पुण्याची दुर्दशा यांच्यामुळे कशी झाली आहे, हे सध्याच्या पावसातून दिसून येत आहे ढिसाळ कारभार
translated_text: The current rains are showing how Pune's plight is due to their lax governance.
Justification: The phrase "ढिसाळ कारभार" (lax governance) is critical but fact-based.

Text: जसे इतके दिवस अंधभक्त मिंधे ची धुणी धूत आहेत
translated_text: Just as blind devotees have been washing Mindhe's clothes for so long
Justification: Use of "अंधभक्त" is critical, but tone remains mockingly neutral.

Text: अरे संडास छाप तुमची सत्ता असून असे घडते याचा अर्थ काय चाटू
translated_text: Oh, you bastard, what does it mean that this happens when you have power?
Justification: Words like "संडास छाप" (toilet-grade) and "चाटू" (sycophant) indicate insult and strong anger.

Text: मुर्ख भक्त कशाचे पण समर्थन करतील सांगता येत नाही.
translated_text: There's no telling what foolish devotees will support.
Justification: Use of "मुर्ख भक्त" (foolish devotees) is sarcastic but not emotionally intense.

Text: आता चा एवढा सन्मान होतो
translated_text: I feel so honored now.
Justification: "सन्मान" (honor) clearly reflects positive recognition and joy.

Text: असतात काही घरच्या अड़चनी सतत विचिरात पडलेला मुलगा प्रेमात पडलेल्या नसतो...
translated_text: There are some boys who are constantly worried about family problems and are not in love...
Justification: A personal, empathetic reflection with no intense emotion.

Text: बे हा बहोतच नकली माणूस आहे गा... साला रिअल शाळेत तर जायच होत...
translated_text: Hey, this guy is such a fake guy... He should have gone to a real school...
Justification: "नकली माणूस" (fake person) and mocking tone show contempt, indicating disgust.

Text: सत्य आहे हे.. फेकू तडीपार पासून शेंणखाऊ भक्तान पर्यंत ही परंमपरा अखंड आहे.!
translated_text: This is true.. from Feku Tadipar to Shenkhau devotees, this tradition is unbroken.!
Justification: The usage of "फेकू" (liar) and "शेंणखाऊ" (dung-eater) are derogatory, expressing strong anger and disdain.

Text: वाघळ्या गोळीबार ला जरा...
translated_text: Can you elaborate...
Justification: No emotional word here; the sentence is inquisitive.

Text: हा नाही बोलू शकनार..!!
translated_text: This is not something...
Justification: Exclamatory tone and force imply frustration, aligning with anger.

Text: स्वतःच्याच राज्यात मातृभाषेत...
translated_text: First CM to ask...
Justification: Commentary without emotionally provocative words.

Text: फाटल्या वर पळवून जाने...
translated_text: Running away...
Justification: "फाटल्या" (when afraid or beaten) denotes a strong emotional context—anger or insult.

Text: तुमच्या सारखे पन्नास खोके वाले...
translated_text: Traitors like you...
Justification: The phrase "पन्नास खोके" (50 boxes) is sarcastically surprising—unexpected action.

Text: शास्त्रात लिहीलंय... वंशच बदलत आहेत...
translated_text: Lineage change...
Justification: Reflective tone, no strong emotional vocabulary.

Text: देण्यापेक्षा घर आणि संडास बांध आधी.
translated_text: Build a house and a toilet first before giving.
Justification: The sentence offers critical but practical advice without strong emotion, so it is neutral.

Text: गद्दारांचे राजकारण म्हणजे.. ची "तलवार" भाजपाची "ढाल" अन् खोक्यांची "उलाढाल".!
translated_text: The politics of traitors is... the "sword" of BJP, the "shield" of BJP and the "turnover" of the boxes.!
Justification: A metaphorical statement lacking strong sentiment, so classified as neutral.

Text: हा सामंतांच्या संगतीचा परिणाम का? ते दिवसेंदिवस कमी कोकणी होत आहेत
translated_text: Is this a result of association with feudal lords? They are becoming less Konkani day by day
Justification: Neutral reflection on identity without overt emotion.

Text: वाहतुकीचा दंड का लावला जातो त्या हेतूचीच खिल्ली उडवण्यासारखं आहे हे....
translated_text: This is a mockery of the very purpose of imposing traffic fines...
Justification: The phrase 'खिल्ली उडवण्यासारखं' shows contempt, hence disgust.

Text: भगर खाताय… सावधान! जणांना विषबाधा.. कुठे आला प्रकार उघडकीस… वाचा
translated_text: Eating bhagar... Be careful! People are getting poisoned.. Where did the incident come to light... Read
Justification: Health warning implies danger and fear.

Text: लै बेकार नको नको करून टाकलं आहे याने
translated_text: This has made it useless.
Justification: The sentence contains unpleasant or offensive language that leads to disgust.

Text: आता मशाल घ्या अगरबत्ती उदबती घ्या तुमची लंका जळतच राहणार
translated_text: Now take a torch, take incense, your Lanka will continue to burn.
Justification: The sentence contains strong or accusatory language that expresses anger.

Text: ह्या राष्ट्रवादीच्या लोकाना काही दिवसानी लष्कराच्या भाकऱ्या भाजण्याचे काम नक्की मिळणार…
translated_text: These NCP people will definitely get the job of baking bread for the army in a few days...
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: सरकारचा “पैसा” पक्षाचं “मार्केटिंग” हा बजेट कोण देणार??
translated_text: Who will provide the government's "money" and the party's "marketing" budget?
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: ज्याला भारत देशात भीती वाटते त्या सर्व हरामखोराना देशभक्ती दाखवावी लागेल
translated_text: All the scoundrels who are feared in India will have to show patriotism.
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: आपण आता पंचायत समिती कडे लक्ष द्यावं,, नाहीतर हा रोजगार सुद्धा हातचा निघून जाईल,,,
translated_text: We should now pay attention to the Panchayat Samiti, otherwise this employment will also go away,,,
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: आदर्श तर साहेब च आहे सगळ्या कपटी राजकारणाचे, तुम्ही मूळ कारण आहे शिवसेना संपवायचे
translated_text: Sir, you are the ideal of all hypocritical politics, you are the root cause of ending Shiv Sena.
Justification: The phrase 'कपटी राजकारणाचे' (hypocritical politics) and blame conveys strong disapproval and disgust.

Text: कुणी कुणाचा अपमान करावा हे महानगरपालिका नाही ठरवत
translated_text: The Municipal Corporation does not decide who should insult whom.
Justification: Factual statement about authority; no emotional content, hence neutral.

Text: ...असे आदेश बाळासाहेबांचे असायचे. आणि आता तुमची हिंमत नाही स्पष्टपणे सांगण्याची. शेम.. शेम् !
translated_text: ...Such orders used to be from Balasaheb. And now you don't have the courage to say it clearly. Shame.. Shame!
Justification: The use of 'शेम शेम' and mocking tone express contempt and disgust.

Text: पुण्यावरून मुंबईला जाणाऱ्या कंटेंनरचा खंडाळा बोरघाटात ब्रेक फेल झाला होता.
translated_text: The brakes of a container going from Pune to Mumbai failed at Khandala Borghat.
Justification: News-like factual report; categorized as neutral.

Text: भयंकर! कोरोनाच्या नव्या व्हेरिएंटने जगभरात खळबळ; शास्त्रज्ञांनी व्यक्त केली 'ही' मोठी भीती
translated_text: Horrible! New variant of Corona has created a stir worldwide; Scientists expressed 'this' great fear
Justification: भयंकर' and 'भीती' explicitly signal fear.

Text: आणि हे भिकारी एका महिलेसाठी पोटनिवडणूक मागे घेतत म्हणे.. आयोध्याजी.
translated_text: And these beggars are withdrawing the by-election for a woman.. Ayodhyaji.
Justification: Sarcastic and critical, but no strong emotional cues; neutral.

Text: या दोन चिवसेने मुळे महाराष्ट्रात भरपूर गोधळ झालाय.
translated_text: These two incidents have caused a lot of confusion in Maharashtra.
Justification: Though critical, it reports a situation without emotional intensity.

Text: गिरणीतला डबा घेऊन या आजी. हा विषय झेपणार नाही तुम्हाला
translated_text: Bring the mill box, Grandma. This topic won't work for you.
Justification: Sarcastic but mild; lacks emotional intensity.

Text: हे असले कार्टून आपल्याला लाभले हे आपलंच दुर्भाग्य म्हणावं लागेल
translated_text: It is our own misfortune that we have such cartoons.
Justification: दुर्भाग्य (misfortune) clearly shows a tone of disappointment and sadness.

Text: इथे बरेच फेक हॅन्डल पंचवीस तिशीतच वारलेले आहेत.. भविष्यात कधीतरी शरीराने मरतील इतकंच..!!
translated_text: Many fake handles here are dead at twenty-five or thirty.. They will die physically at some point in the future..!!
Justification: The metaphor of early mental death conveys existential sadness.

Text: भाजपा ला मत म्हणजे स्त्रियांवरील होणारे अत्याचाऱ्यला मत....
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for atrocities on women....
Justification: अत्याचार (atrocities) carries a heavy moral charge, conveying disgust.

Text: : ठाकरे गटासमोर आणखी एक पेच, ऋतुजा लटकेंची उमेदवारी धोक्यात?
translated_text: : Another dilemma for the Thackeray group, is Rituja Latke's candidacy in danger?
Justification: Factual reporting about political issue; no strong emotion.

Text: राजीनामा लटकवला म्हणजे चांगलीच फाटली म्हणायची....
translated_text: If you put your resignation on hold, you're pretty much screwed....
Justification: फाटली (messed up) in crude slang expresses anger and frustration.

Text: मूर्ख ते आहेत का तुम्ही
translated_text: Are you stupid?
Justification: मूर्ख in questioning tone evokes disbelief and surprise.

Text: तू उपऱ्या आहे तेव्हा भडव्या तू कोणत्या पक्षात होता ते सांग
translated_text: Tell me, Bhadvya, which party were you on when you were a stranger?
Justification: Though abusive, the sentence is interrogative without strong emotional charge.

Text: ही बाई शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे ह्यांचं हिंदुत्व सांगणार आणि झाकणझुले तिची वाह वाह करणार
translated_text: This woman will talk about Shiv Sena's Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray's Hindutva and the people will praise her with their eyes closed.
Justification: The dismissive tone and imagery express strong disapproval and disgust.

Text: लई जळली का? राणे भक्त
translated_text: Did the candle burn? A devotee of Rane
Justification: Taunting tone, but lacks emotional depth; neutral.

Text: लाळ चाटायचं बंद करा कमीत कमी महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्याकर्ता तरी
translated_text: Stop licking your lips, at least for the good of Maharashtra.
Justification: लाळ चाटणे is symbolic of flattery; used here with contempt, evoking disgust.

Text: ते अक्कल नावाचं बक्कल तुमाला नाही ना म्हणून. रुपयावर एक ट्विट करावं लागत.
translated_text: You don't have that kind of common sense, do you? You have to tweet about the rupee.
Justification: अक्कल नावाचं बक्कल mocks intelligence and evokes disgust.

Text: एक उमदा मराठी नाट्य कलावंत आणि चित्रपट अभिनेता आज महाराष्ट्राने हरवला
translated_text: Maharashtra lost a great Marathi theatre artist and film actor today.
Justification: हरवला (lost) and reverent tone reflect sadness and respect.

Text: त्यांचे नाव घेतल्याशिवाय अन्न पण गोड लागत नाही का सतरंजी छाप प्रवक्ते लोकांना
translated_text: Doesn't the food taste sweet without mentioning their name? Satranji Print spokesperson asks people
Justification: Sarcastic but lacks emotional force.

Text: हे कोर्टाला कळायला नको ? नको तो शहाणपना सांगताना ??
translated_text: Shouldn't the court know this? Shouldn't he be telling the truth?
Justification: Frustrated tone with rhetorical questioning expresses anger.

Text: ह्या बाळाला हेच रमेश वाळुंज च्या वेळी नव्हते सुचले का
translated_text: Did you realize that this baby didn't have this during Ramesh Walunj's time?
Justification: Questioning past behavior with surprise.

Text: वागले म्हणजे भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्या पेक्षा कमी किंमत असलेला माणूस
translated_text: A man who behaves is worth less than a barking dog.
Justification: Animal insult comparison conveys deep contempt; disgust.

Text: भातखळकर साहेब गद्दारांना बोलल्यावर भाजपला का लागावं? गद्दारांशी नातं काय?
translated_text: Why should Bhatkhalkar join BJP when he talks about traitors? What is his relationship with traitors?
Justification: गद्दारांशी नातं (relationship with traitors) used to express disgust.

Text: वेडा झाला आहे हा भातखळकर
translated_text: This rice farmer has gone crazy.
Justification: वेडा झाला (gone mad) indicates disbelief or surprise.

Text: स्वतःच्या स्वार्थासाठी दुसऱ्याचे घर बोलणारा प्राणी म्हणजे माणूस..
translated_text: A human being is an animal that speaks of another's house for his own selfish interests.
Justification: Philosophical tone lacking emotional outburst; neutral.

Text: ह्याला लवकर काढल पाहिजे खुप घाण करतो हा.
translated_text: This needs to be removed soon, it's making a lot of mess.
Justification: खुप घाण करतो (makes a lot of mess) implies strong disapproval and disgust.

Text: शिंदाची नजर बघा लालची पण सत्तेची हाव लोभ दिसतय फोटो स्पष्ट होते चित्र
translated_text: Look at Shinda's eyes, greedy but lust for power is visible, the photo is clear.
Justification: लालची (greedy) shows criticism, but tone remains descriptive.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी नातवासह लुटला धूलिवंदनाचा आनंद
translated_text: Chief Minister along with his grandson enjoyed the joy of Dhuli Vandana
Justification: आनंद (joy) and festive context express happiness.

Text: अजिबात नाही,
translated_text: Not at all,
Justification: Too short to infer emotion; neutral.

Text: या कमी दाबाच्या पट्टयाची व्याप्ती भलतीच आहे, पॅरिस मध्येही पाऊस.!!
translated_text: The extent of this low pressure area is amazing, it's raining even in Paris!!
Justification: पाऊस and excitement about Paris rain reflect joy.

Text: बुजगावणं करून ठेवलंय
translated_text: It has been kept in a state of confusion.
Justification: Descriptive and emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: वर्षे झालं मुंबईत हुजरेगिरी सेनेची सत्ता असून, ही आयोध्या काय झोपली होती कां?
translated_text: It's been years since the Hujregiri Sena was in power in Mumbai, but was Ayodhya sleeping?
Justification: Political questioning; lacks emotional depth.

Text: आता भायखळा भाजी मंडईच्या लुःखा टप्पोरी, हफ्टाखोर आम्हाला शिकवणार का
translated_text: Now, will the Lukha Tappori and Haftakhor of Byculla vegetable market teach us?
Justification: लुःखा टप्पोरी is mocking, but tone is dismissive—neutral.

Text: फालतू माणूस आहे तो तुषार भोसले
translated_text: Tushar Bhosale is a useless person.
Justification: Insulting, but phrased plainly; emotionally neutral.

Text: जळली का तुझी. दिल्लीतल्या बापाची पण जळली असेलच.
translated_text: Are you burned? Your father in Delhi must have been burned too.
Justification: जळली (burned) sarcastically implies jealousy or surprise.

Text: तुमच्या बुद्धीची कीव करावी तेवढी कमी आहे
translated_text: Your intelligence is so low that it is hard to envy it.
Justification: Sarcastic, yet emotionally flat—neutral.

Text: लटके यांना उमेदवारी साठी तसेच राजीनाम्यासाठी लटकवत ठेवलं आहे.!
translated_text: Latke is being kept hanging for both candidacy and resignation!
Justification: लटकवत ठेवलं (kept hanging) conveys frustration and anger.

Text: बेरोजगारी, महागाई, भ्रष्टाचार यावर पण एखादा महोत्सव साजरा करा...
translated_text: Celebrate a festival on unemployment, inflation, corruption...
Justification: The sarcastic use of "महोत्सव साजरा करा" (celebrate a festival) shows disgust at issues.

Text: आजकाल फेमस होण्यासाठी लोकं कमरेची सोडून देतात ही त्यातलीच
translated_text: This is one of the reasons why people give up their waists to become famous these days.
Justification: फेमस होण्यासाठी (to become famous) is stated without strong emotion, thus neutral.

Text: उमेदवारी दुसऱ्या व्यक्ती ला का दिली नाही..? पती पेक्षा पक्ष महत्वाचा का...?
translated_text: Why wasn't the candidacy given to another person? Why is the party more important than the husband?
Justification: उमेदवारी (candidacy) questioned in a surprised, incredulous tone.

Text: व्यापारी, उद्योजक आणि व्यावसायिकांनो, सावधान! जीएसटी विभागाने दिला हा गंभीर इशारा
translated_text: Traders, entrepreneurs and businessmen, be careful! GST department has given this serious warning
Justification: गंभीर इशारा (serious warning) signals fear or caution.

Text: साडेतीन जिल्ह्याच्या बाहेर कधी पडले का?
translated_text: Have you ever been outside the three and a half districts?
Justification: Use of sarcasm in "साडेतीन जिल्हे" doesn't carry emotion — neutral.

Text: मुक्ताफळं ऐका‌ आता. झाले का समाधान की आता नेसूचं सोडून देताय?
translated_text: Listen now for free. Are you satisfied that you are leaving Nesu now?
Justification: मुक्ताफळं (free advice) is sarcastic, but lacks emotional intensity — neutral.

Text: ह्यांना ह्याचा पोरगं ऐकत नाही आणि हे आम्हाला बाळासाहेबांचे विचार सांगणार ...
translated_text: This guy doesn't listen to them and he will tell us Balasaheb's thoughts...
Justification: Hypocrisy exposed by "पोरगं ऐकत नाही" creates moral disgust.

Text: लोकमत आता लोकांच कुठ राहिल ते तर सत्ता पक्ष च्या मागे मागे फिरत आहे
translated_text: Lokmat is now following the ruling party, not the people.
Justification: Political critique but tone remains neutral and observational.

Text: शिवसेना ही हिंदुह्रदयसम्राट बाळासाहेबांची आहे तुमच फक्त बाळासाहेब च आहे खोके
translated_text: Shiv Sena belongs to Balasaheb, the king of Hindu hearts. You are only Balasaheb's.
Justification: खोके (suitcases) is a dig, but the sentence doesn’t express strong emotion — neutral.

Text: बेरोजगारीची भीती किती आहे, आम्हाला विचारू नका. मी आजारी असतानाही पुस्तके उघडून वाचली आहेत.
translated_text: Don't ask us how much fear there is of unemployment. I have opened books and read them even when I was sick.
Justification: The phrase "भीती किती आहे" (how much fear there is) expresses clear anxiety — fear.

Text: हे पालथे घडे आहेत!! कांही होणार नाही.
translated_text: These are all fake!! Nothing will happen.
Justification: पालथे घडे (empty vessels) and exasperation reflect anger.

Text: आता तु पण बंद पाडणार
translated_text: Now you will also close it.
Justification: Straightforward statement — neutral.

Text: हा दाखवुन लोकांनाकाय मुर्ख बनवतात साहेब शेवटी बोलुन गेलेत नीच प्रवृत्ती आहे म्हणुन
translated_text: Why are you making people fools by showing this? Sir, you finally spoke up and said that you have a low tendency.
Justification: मुर्ख बनवतात (make fools) and "नीच प्रवृत्ती" (low tendency) express anger.

Text: कसलं काय एवढी महगाई करून ठेवलीय सण आला काय आणि गेला काय .
translated_text: What is it that has made it so expensive? Has the festival come and gone?
Justification: सण आला काय आणि गेला काय expresses disbelief — surprise.

Text: काय त्या फेक व्हिडीओ काय तो फेक पुरस्कार सगळं आहे
translated_text: What are those fake videos and all those fake awards?
Justification: Use of "फेक" repeatedly implies disbelief — surprise.

Text: “गेले त्यांच्यामुळे शिवसेना संपली नाही तर त्यांना गाडून शिवसेना पुढे गेली”
translated_text: Shiv Sena did not end because of those who left, but by burying them, Shiv Sena moved forward
Justification: Metaphorical, but calmly stated — neutral.

Text: तुम्ही खरोखरच आहात.. हे वेळोवेळी सिध्द करत आहात.
translated_text: You are truly... proving this time and time again.
Justification: The acknowledgment and admiration reflect joy.

Text: माझी शहरातल्या लोकांना नम्र विनंती आहे कृपया पाणी जपून वापरा उभ्या महाराष्ट्रात दुष्काळ आहे
translated_text: My humble request to the people of the city is to please use water wisely as there is a drought in Maharashtra.
Justification: A polite request without emotional charge — neutral.

Text: डेप्युटी मिनिस्टर ला काहीच नाही
translated_text: The Deputy Minister has nothing.
Justification: Straightforward statement — emotionally neutral.

Text: म्हणजे देशात गरिबी वाढत नसून, आदानी जास्त श्रीमंत होत आहे
translated_text: This means that poverty is not increasing in the country, but the people are getting richer.
Justification: Critique without strong emotion — neutral.

Text: श्रीखंड तरी स्वताचा आहे की तो सुद्धा चोरूनच आणला आहे.  गद्दार ने
translated_text: Is Shrikhand his own or has he stolen it too? The traitor
Justification: Insulting with accusation of theft and betrayal — anger.

Text: मग ढोकळा विकायला जातो का गुजरात ला गुलामा
translated_text: So, is Ghulama going to Gujarat to sell dhokla?
Justification: Satirical and regional, but not emotionally intense — neutral.

Text: भल्या भल्या ला जमले नाही आणि ही आणीन होय
translated_text: I couldn't do it well and I'll bring this.
Justification: Plain commentary — neutral.

Text: हा टाळ्या वाजवायला आला का महिलेच्या वतीने हाय हाय
translated_text: Did he come to clap on behalf of the woman? Hi hi
Justification: Satirical but not emotionally intense — neutral.

Text: खरंच गुढघ्यात असते का शेणकिड्यांची?
translated_text: Are there really dung beetles in the barn?
Justification: Rhetorical, absurd imagery suggests surprise.

Text: ईडीचं सरकार घाबरट असून राज्याच्या जनतेसाठी नाही तर गुजरातसाठी काम करतं" नाना पटोले
translated_text: ED government is scared and works for Gujarat, not for the people of the state, Nana Patole
Justification: Quoted criticism — neutral.

Text: ऊद्धव ठाकरे हे कुत्सित व कोत्या मनोवृत्तिचे व्यक्तिमत्व आहे
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray is a personality with a nasty and mean attitude.
Justification: कुत्सित and "कोत्या" directly express disgust.

Text: पासून भारतात लोकशाही हा निव्वळ भ्रम ठरला आहे.
translated_text: Democracy has been a mere illusion in India since then.
Justification: Political opinion expressed flatly — neutral.

Text: मूळात दुसऱ्या धर्माच्या कार्यक्रमात जावेच कशाला? आम्ही येतो का मशिदीत?
translated_text: Why should we go to another religion's event in the first place? Do we come to the mosque?
Justification: Religious hostility shows disgust.

Text: रवी किशन यांची कोट्यवधींची फसवणूक; बिल्डरने 'असा' दिला धोका, नेमकं काय घडलं?
translated_text: Ravi Kishan cheated of crores; The builder gave such a threat, what exactly happened?
Justification: नेमकं काय घडलं? — curiosity with shock — surprise.

Text: लोक सुद्धा नाहीत नीट....आणि काय ते नियोजन
translated_text: Even the people are not well....and what is the plan?
Justification: Casual complaint, not emotionally intense — neutral.

Text: तुझ्यातून कोणत्या तरी पार्टी ला बांधील असल्याचा वास येतोय हा सडक्या पणा सोड राज्या
translated_text: You smell of being tied to some party. Leave this pathetic attitude, Rajya.
Justification: सडक्या पणा clearly shows disgust.

Text: काहीतरी कमकाम करा रे. किती फिरता, गुवाहटी फिरून आला तरी मन काही भरत नाही.
translated_text: Do something stupid. No matter how much you travel, even after visiting Guwahati, your mind is not satisfied.
Justification: Sarcastic and critical — neutral.

Text: म्हणजे न्यायपालिका विकली आहे हे दिसत आहे खालील ट्विट वरून
translated_text: This means that the judiciary has been sold, as can be seen from the following tweet.
Justification: न्यायपालिका विकली आहे is a serious allegation, but stated matter-of-fact — neutral.

Text: सुविचार पोस्ट करणे का बंद केलावं?? बोचले का? स्वतःला!!
translated_text: Why should we stop posting good thoughts?? Are you offended? Yourself!!
Justification: बोचले का? directly conveys irritation and accusatory tone — anger.

Text: गल्ली ते दिल्ली सरकार पण हे लोक यांच्या अपयशच खापर दुसऱ्यावर फोडणार
translated_text: From the streets to the Delhi government, these people will blame their failures on others.
Justification: अपयशच खापर दुसऱ्यावर फोडणार shows blame but stated neutrally.

Text: यांचे आदर्शच माफिवीर तर हे काय लढाई करणार!
translated_text: If their ideal is a compassionate hero, what kind of fight will they have?
Justification: Use of "माफिवीर" is mocking but not emotional — neutral.

Text: आमचा इंग्लिश माध्यमावर बहिष्कार आहे.
translated_text: We are boycotting English medium.
Justification: बहिष्कार expresses stance, not sentiment — neutral.

Text: निवडणूक नजरे समोर ठेवून हे चालू आहे. तरी भाजप हरणार
translated_text: This is being done with an eye on the elections. Even so, BJP will lose.
Justification: "तरी भाजप हरणार" indicates a prediction stated plainly, without emotional tilt.

Text: अरे म आगोदर काय झालं होत, पराभव पहिला आणि दांगीला पाय लावून पळले
translated_text: Oh my, what happened before? I was defeated and ran away with my feet in the mud.
Justification: "अरे म" and "पाय लावून पळले" reflect shock or disbelief — surprise.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील असा एक नेता आहे ते पक्ष सुपारी घेऊन चालवतात
translated_text: There is such a leader in Maharashtra who runs his party with betel nut.
Justification: "सुपारी घेऊन चालवतात" is critical but not emotionally charged — neutral.

Text: तुला शिव्या श्राप खाल्ल्यावर चरमसुख मिळते का?
translated_text: Do you get extreme pleasure from swearing and cursing?
Justification: "शिव्या श्राप" implies strong revulsion — disgust.

Text: सत्तेवर असताना आई आठवल्या नाहीत.. आता आठवली
translated_text: Didn't remember your mother when in power, now suddenly do.
Justification: Plain statement without emotion — neutral.

Text: खोटा बोला पण रेटून बोला ही भाजपची नीती
translated_text: Tell lies but confidently — BJP’s policy.
Justification: "खोटा बोला" is critique without emotional intensity — neutral.

Text: हा चोर... जामिनावर बाहेर.... हा फुले विकणारा....
translated_text: This thief... out on bail... this flower seller...
Justification: The word "चोर" and sarcastic tone show anger.

Text: ज्याला करायचे आहे पाप त्याला मध्ये नोकरी मिळेल आपोआप ..
translated_text: Sinners get jobs easily...
Justification: "पाप" as a concept isn’t emotionally expressive — neutral.

Text: आमदार/खासदार/नगरसेवक खरेदी साठी पैसे आहेत सरकार कडे... पण गोरगरीब जनतेच्या मुलांच्या शिक्षणासाठी नाही.
translated_text: Govt has money to buy politicians, but not for poor children's education.
Justification: "खरेदी साठी पैसे आहेत" is a criticism, not emotional in tone.

Text: आणि त्या वर्तमान पत्रातील फेकूच्या बातम्या
translated_text: And the fake news in that newspaper
Justification: "फेकूच्या बातम्या" is a critique of media, but stated plainly.

Text: हा लै मोठा पेच प्रसंग तयार झाला राव।।। ला तोंड द्यावे लागणार आहे राव.।।
translated_text: A big dilemma has formed, Rao will have to face it.
Justification: "पेच प्रसंग" denotes a tricky situation without emotional intensity.

Text: च्या चमच्यानो इकडे ही लक्ष असूद्या..
translated_text: Hey stooges, look here too.
Justification: The use of "चमच्यानो" is derogatory but not emotionally intense.

Text: अरेरे बसायला पण बोलावलं नाही ह्याचं दुःख झालं भावींना
translated_text: Oh my, not even invited to sit — they felt hurt.
Justification: "दुःख झालं" directly indicates sadness due to exclusion.

Text: अस म्हणत ऊधव साठी संजय जेल ची हवा खात आहे
translated_text: Saying this, Sanjay is breathing jail air for Uddhav.
Justification: "जेल ची हवा खात आहे" implies disgust for blindly supporting someone.

Text: हिं संस्कृती सोलापूर च्या भारत भालके यांच्या पोटनिवडणुकी वेळी झोपली होती का
translated_text: Was Hindu culture asleep during Bharat Bhalke's by-election?
Justification: "झोपली होती का" questions but neutrally.

Text: हो स्वीकारनार... सज्जन माणसाला त्रास देताना जनता पाहत आहे
translated_text: Yes, I accept... public sees a gentleman being harassed.
Justification: "त्रास देताना" and "सज्जन माणसाला" evoke injustice, hence disgust.

Text: जल ही जीवन जनजागृती भाजपा पश्चिम दक्षिण मंडळ अकोला
translated_text: Water is life awareness by BJP Akola division.
Justification: Informational — no emotional polarity.

Text: आणि भाजपला मत म्हणजे देश तोडणाऱ्या शक्तींना मत. बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना फोडणाऱ्या कपटी पक्षाला मत.
translated_text: A vote for BJP is a vote for divisive forces — disgust at betrayal.
Justification: "देश तोडणाऱ्या" and "कपटी पक्ष" evoke disgust.

Text: भाऊ दल्लुकर. कमी आवाजात भटी भुंकने हेच त्याचा धंदा. पगार मात्र फिक्स आहे बरं.
translated_text: Dallukar barks in low voice — that's his job. Fixed salary though.
Justification: Satirical but stated plainly — neutral.

Text: गद्दारी मध्ये जनतेशी केली जेव्हा जनतेने बहुमत दिले पण मुख्यमंत्री पदासाठी विरोधकांसोबत गेले
translated_text: Betrayal was done to the people when the people gave them a majority but they went with the opposition for the post of Chief Minister.
Justification: "गद्दारी" implies betrayal against the mandate of the people

Text: आज तर माघार ही पराभवाची व नामुष्कीची आहे
translated_text: Today, retreat is a sign of defeat and disgrace.
Justification: "पराभवाची व नामुष्कीची" reflects a tone of disappointment

Text: ये भाऊ बंद करून टाक हा शो
translated_text: Yeh bro stop this show
Justification: "बंद करून टाक" is a direct command delivered in an angry tone

Text: रिल्स बनवण्यासाठी चांगला मोबाईल हवा, म्हणून टीकटॉक स्टारचं धक्कादायक कृत्य!
translated_text: TikTok star's shocking move because he needs a good mobile phone to make reels!
Justification: "धक्कादायक कृत्य" reveals shock at a surprising act

Text: चार पाच वेळा तोंडावर आपटून नंतर शिवसेनेच्या जिवावर आमदार झाले आहेत हे.
translated_text: They have become MLAs at the expense of Shiv Sena after being slapped in the face four or five times.
Justification: "तोंडावर आपटून" shows political struggle but no emotion

Text: नैनीताल नको अतीवृष्टीगृस्त शेतकर्यांच्या बांधावर गेलाअसता तर.......
translated_text: If you had gone to Nainital, the farmers' dams would not have been affected by excessive rainfall.......
Justification: "अतीवृष्टीगृस्त शेतकर्यांच्या बांधावर" is issue-focused

Text: अशा वायफळ लोकांच्या नादी लागुन आपले तोंड का खराब करायचे.
translated_text: Why spoil your face by listening to such vain people?
Justification: "वायफळ लोकांच्या नादी" implies contempt

Text: आजुन पण सांगतो हे हलक्यात घेण्या जोगत हत्त्यार नाहिये....!
translated_text: I'll tell you from now on, this is not a murder to be taken lightly...!
Justification: "हलक्यात घेण्या जोगत नाहीये" suggests seriousness and warning

Text: मी त्यांना ओळखत नव्हतो, पण त्यांना पोट धरून बघून दम लागतो.
translated_text: I didn't know them, but it was breathtaking to see them holding their stomachs.
Justification: "पोट धरून बघून" implies laughter or amusement

Text: आणि त्या पॉर्न स्टार प्रथमेश चे काका च आता काय होणार
translated_text: And what will happen to that porn star Prathamesh's uncle now?
Justification: "पॉर्न स्टार" is mentioned in passing without emotional context

Text: आमचा आवाज सांगतो, बोलतो....... गर्दी जमवणे म्हणजे हिंदुत्व नाही..... हे गद्दार आहे
translated_text: Our voice speaks, we speak....... Gathering crowds is not Hindutva..... This is a traitor
Justification: "हे गद्दार आहे" reflects condemnation

Text: छातीवर दगड ठेवून बळेच दिलेला मान आणि तो ही कॅमेरा समोर असल्यामुळे.
translated_text: The strong neck with a stone on his chest, and that's because he's in front of the camera.
Justification: "कॅमेरा समोर" implies performance but not emotion

Text: कोण पिसाळलं आहे ते दिसत आहे मूर्ख भक्तिण...
translated_text: It looks like someone is being crushed, you stupid devotee...
Justification: "मूर्ख भक्तिण" is used with contempt

Text: सर्वात अमीर हि आसक्ती असल्यामुळे गरीब असतो. भाऊ समजले का
translated_text: The richest person is poor because of attachment. Brother, do you understand?
Justification: "आसक्ती" reflects a philosophical view

Text: भूतदया बाळगा, पण इतरांना धोकादायक ठरेल, असा हस्तक्षेप जैवसाखळीत योग्य नाही.
translated_text: Be kind, but any intervention that would be dangerous to others is not appropriate in the biosphere.
Justification: "हस्तक्षेप जैवसाखळीत" is a logical caution

Text: सर मराठी पत्रकार ना लय माझ आला आहे यांचा पहले माझ उतरवा प्लीज
translated_text: Sir, please take me down first, Marathi journalist, I have come to the right place.
Justification: "लय माझ आला आहे" is colloquial expression

Text: तुला आई ची जान आहे का ? तुझ्याने लिहीन होत का ते बघ आधी,बिनडोक
translated_text: Do you have a mother's life? See if you can write first, you idiot.
Justification: "बिनडोक" is an insult reflecting anger

Text: खूप आवश्यकता आहे साहेब याची ,कारण शेतकरी खचला आहे या परतीच्या पावसामुळे
translated_text: This is very necessary, sir, because the farmers are exhausted due to the recent rains.
Justification: "शेतकरी खचला आहे" is factual

Text: तो बांगर जसा आज पाय लावून पळाला तशी गत ह्याची होईल असे वाटते
translated_text: I think that fate will be the same for this guy who ran away on foot today.
Justification: "पाय लावून पळाला" is metaphorical for evasion

Text: हा डांगरा भाऊ वेडा झालाय या वयात कितीही भूक भावड्या काही फरक पडत नाही
translated_text: This poor brother has gone crazy. At this age, no matter how hungry he is, it doesn't matter.
Justification: "डांगरा भाऊ वेडा" expresses ridicule or disgust

Text: एकाचे दोन झाले की क्रीएटीव्हीटी कमी होते असं भाऊ सांगत होते....
translated_text: My brother used to say that when one becomes two, creativity decreases...
Justification: "क्रीएटीव्हीटी कमी" is a general statement

Text: बाई सारखं बोलणारा विरोधकांना नामर्द म्हणतोस लोकांना तुच माणसांत वाटत नाही
translated_text: You call opponents who talk like women cowards, people don't consider you a human being.
Justification: "नामर्द" and "माणसांत वाटत नाही" express contempt

Text: भाजपने पंढरपूर का लढवले? अंधेरी मधे पराभव आणि त्यामुळे...लोकांना सत्य माहीत आहे.
translated_text: Why did BJP contest Pandharpur? People know the truth due to Andheri defeat.
Justification: "सत्य माहीत आहे" reflects explanation

Text: त्यांच्याबरोबर तुलना करून तुम्ही कुत्र्याचा आपमन करतय अस वाटतं नाही का??
translated_text: Don't you feel like you're disrespecting dogs by comparing them?
Justification: "कुत्र्याचा आपमन" indicates moral disgust

Text: तुम्ही कोण ठरवणारे मुंबई, महाराष्ट्रतील भाषा ही हिंदी आहे.
translated_text: Who are you to decide? Mumbai’s language is Hindi.
Justification: "ठरवणारे" reflects challenge but not emotion

Text: म्हणजे? तथ्य काहीही असो तुमच्या मना सारखा निर्णय देणे आवश्यक आहे असेच का??
translated_text: Regardless of facts, must the decision always favor your side?
Justification: "तथ्य काहीही असो" reflects logical tone

Text: तुम्हाला उद्धवसाहेबांनी लायकी पेक्षा जास्त दिलंय हे विसरून आज भुंकयाला लागलीत तुम्ही.
translated_text: You are complaining today, forgetting that Uddhav Saheb has given you more than you deserve.
Justification: "भुंकयाला लागलीत" suggests uncontrolled criticism

Text: डॉ. बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांनी दिलेल्या प्रतिज्ञांवरून भाजप आणि आपमध्ये वाद का सुरू आहे?
translated_text: Why is there a dispute between BJP and AAP over the promises made by Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar?
Justification: "वाद का सुरू" is informational

Text: अशी धमकी देते म्हणजे तुम्ही देव झालात की काय...
translated_text: If you threaten like this, then you have become a god or something...
Justification: "अशी धमकी" indicates irritation

Text: हे... एकतर्फी / पक्षपाती... तथाकथित पत्रकार हे ... सिद्ध केले.... ब्लॉक करून !
translated_text: This... one-sided/biased... so-called journalist... proved it... by blocking!
Justification: "पक्षपाती" and "ब्लॉक" imply unjust bias

Text: माईकी नी मस्करी केली होती
translated_text: Mikey was joking.
Justification: "मस्करी" is playful and neutral

Text: आली मी अवसेच्या भयाण राती..
translated_text: I came on a terrible night of despair..
Justification: "भयाण राती" expresses fear

Text: अांगात नाय बळ अाण काड्या करून पळ ईती..छोटा_छञी
translated_text: There is no strength in the body and it is easy to escape with sticks..small_foot
Justification: "बळ" indicates helplessness

Text: अंध भक्त येतील आता भूंकायला
translated_text: Blind devotees will come to bark now.
Justification: "भूंकायला" implies sarcastic observation

Text: हे अंधारात तीर मारावेत ते भक्तांनीच
translated_text: Only devotees should shoot these arrows in the darkness.
Justification: "अंधारात तीर मारावेत" symbolizes blind speculation

Text: पूर्वी पासून गद्दार होता हा. .. नरेश
translated_text: This was a traitor from the beginning... Naresh
Justification: "गद्दार" strongly conveys betrayal

Text: हा इकडचा ना तिकडचा ह्याची हकालपट्टी अजून का होत नाही
translated_text: Why hasn't he been expelled yet?
Justification: "हकालपट्टी" expresses disbelief

Text: म्हणजे चहा पिऊन तरतरी येईल, तिला मारायला आणि मला मार खायला
translated_text: So, after drinking tea, he will come and beat her and beat me.
Justification: "मारायला आणि मला मार खायला" expresses personal fear of violence.

Text: ला जाहिरनाम्यात स्काय बस व रिंग रोड बनवणार होते, अजून दिसले नाहीत.
translated_text: The manifesto said sky bus and ring road were to be built, but not seen yet.
Justification: "जाहिरनाम्यात...दिसले नाहीत" implies broken promises.

Text: मागच्या अडीच वर्षांमध्ये बनवलेले रस्ते काढून नेले का तुमच्या सायेबाने?
translated_text: Did your boss remove the roads built in the last 2.5 years?
Justification: "रस्ते काढून नेले" implies sarcastic blame.

Text: खर्या शत्रू पेक्षा छुपा मित्र जास्त धोकादायक असतो हे भाजपा ने लक्षात ठेवावे.
translated_text: A secret friend is more dangerous than a real enemy — BJP should note.
Justification: "छुपा मित्र जास्त धोकादायक" implies hidden threats.

Text: पूर्ण देश आहे अंधभक्त है एकटे दीड शहाणे
translated_text: Whole country is blind, only one and a half wise people.
Justification: "अंधभक्त" reflects political sarcasm.

Text: नाही बा हे असल काय जमत आपल्याला
translated_text: No, bro, what's wrong with you?
Justification: "नाही बा" implies something unexpected.

Text: दुसरं काम तरी काय आहे तुमच्या कडे ?
translated_text: What other work do you have?
Justification: Sarcastic rhetorical question.

Text: कोर्टाने सांगितलं कोण रडतंय ते. घाण राजकारण चालू आहे हे पण नमूद केलं.
translated_text: Court pointed out who’s crying. Mentioned dirty politics.
Justification: "घाण राजकारण" indicates political disgust.

Text: हा, चं बा चालला होता लोकसभा मिळवायला.
translated_text: This, the guy was trying to win the Lok Sabha.
Justification: "चं बा चालला होता" reflects an observational neutral stance on political ambition

Text: हा, अशी, तेव्हाही, त्याची मोकळी असलेली बोटं घालायचा म्हणूनंच तेव्हाच्या शिवसैनिकांनी चापाटला होता
translated_text: Even then, the Shiv Sainiks had slapped him just to show off his free fingers.
Justification: "चापाटला होता" denotes a past factual event with no added emotion

Text: मोदी सरकारला फिकीर नाही देशाची वाढतेय संख्या सुशिक्षित बेरोजगारांची!
translated_text: The Modi government is not worried about the increasing number of educated unemployed people in the country!
Justification: "फिकीर नाही" is a critique reflecting governmental negligence

Text: खालुन पेटली तर अवघड आहे मग सगळ्यांचे
translated_text: If it burns from below, it's difficult for everyone.
Justification: "खालुन पेटली" is a metaphor for collective consequence

Text: पंढरपूर मध्ये कुठे गेली होती संस्कृती
translated_text: Where did civilization go in Pandharpur?
Justification: "संस्कृती" is referenced to question public behavior

Text: म्हणजे खोके संपत नाहीत तोव्हर च पेन्शन लागू केली म्हणायचं का खोके एकदम ओक्के
translated_text: So the boxes are not empty, so why would you say that pension has been implemented? The boxes are completely empty.
Justification: "खोके" repeated symbolically without sentiment

Text: असा डेंजर पाऊस पाहिला नसेल, सगळे एकाच ठिकाणी...
translated_text: I've never seen such dangerous rain, all in one place...
Justification: "असा डेंजर पाऊस" reflects fear due to natural intensity

Text: सर्व भाज्यांचे भाव वाढले आहे सुप्रभात
translated_text: The prices of all vegetables have increased. Good morning.
Justification: "भाव वाढले" is a neutral statement of fact

Text: वांद्रे रेल्वे स्थानकाजवळील जीर्ण स्कायवॉक कोसळला, पण…
translated_text: A dilapidated skywalk near Bandra railway station collapsed, but...
Justification: "स्कायवॉक कोसळला" implies fear from infrastructure collapse

Text: काय धुतल्या तांदळासारखी आहे का... असली भ्रष्टाचारी तर तिथेच आहेत ना रे
translated_text: Is it like washed rice... The real corrupt people are there, right?
Justification: "असली भ्रष्टाचारी" conveys disdain for perceived corruption

Text: आजपर्यंत हा चाय बिस्कुट निवडणूक आयोग भाजपची बी टीम म्हणून बोंबलत होता..
translated_text: Till today, this tea biscuit Election Commission was being bombarded as the BJP's B team.
Justification: "बी टीम" suggests frustration over alleged bias

Text: अख्या जगाला माहित आहे तू अंगठा चोख
translated_text: The whole world knows you suck my thumb.
Justification: "अंगठा चोख" is used insultingly to convey disgust

Text: यांना किंमत द्यायची नाही. हे मंदसैनिक आहेत
translated_text: They don't want to pay the price. These are slow soldiers.
Justification: "मंदसैनिक" is sarcastic but without strong emotional charge

Text: डोळे आलेत का? हिंदू, जात शब्द कोठे आहेत?
translated_text: Are your eyes open? Where are the words Hindu and caste?
Justification: "डोळे आलेत का" is rhetorical and skeptical

Text: हे आतच का घडते तुमचं काही तरी खेळ असणार
translated_text: Why is this happening inside? You must be playing some kind of game.
Justification: "खेळ असणार" implies suspicion and surprise

Text: तुमच्या आणि त्यांच्या भांडणात नागाला का बदनाम करताय ठाकरे
translated_text: Why are you defaming Naga in your fight with them?
Justification: "नागाला का बदनाम" expresses rhetorical surprise

Text: सांगा ना मग मैदानात येऊन निवडणूक लढायला एवढी फाटते का ????
translated_text: Tell me, is it so hard to come out and contest elections????
Justification: "एवढी फाटते का" reflects defeatism and frustration

Text: नाही.... भाजप चा गुलाम झालेल्या गद्दार सेनेला पाडा
translated_text: No.... Destroy the traitor army that has become a slave of BJP.
Justification: "गद्दार सेनेला" expresses political disgust

Text: ‘पडेल ती किंमत देऊन भाजपने शिवसेना फोडली’; जयंत पाटलांचा आरोप
translated_text: BJP broke Shiv Sena by paying whatever price it had to pay'; Jayant Patil's allegations
Justification: "किंमत देऊन फोडली" reflects political anger

Text: सत्तेसाठी काहिहि करणारे राजकारणी. तुमचा अंत भयंकर असणार आहे.
translated_text: Politicians who will do anything for power. Your end is going to be terrible.
Justification: "अंत भयंकर" is a grim projection, evoking sadness.

Text: शिल्लक शेणीकानो जास्त खुश होऊ ना.. भविष्यात ऋतुजा लटके सुद्धा शिंदे गटातच सामील होणार..
translated_text: The remaining farmers will be more happy.. In the future, Rituja Latke will also join the Shinde group..
Justification: "सामील होणार" is political speculation, no emotion.

Text: काँग्रेसचे आले ना ? मग तू का नाचतोयस छक्क्या ?
translated_text: Congress has come, right? Then why are you dancing, sixes?
Justification: "तू का नाचतोयस" conveys surprise at behavior.

Text: राजीनामा देऊन निवडणूकीला सामोरे जा म्हणजे लोक लायकी दाखवतील
translated_text: Resign and face the election so that people will show their worth.
Justification: Suggestive and challenging, but not emotionally intense.

Text: आवलादच घान आहे ही
translated_text: This is a shame.
Justification: "घान आहे" clearly expresses revulsion.

Text: पंतप्रधानांच्या हस्ते महाराष्ट्रात खऱ्या अर्थाने रोजगार मेला आहे.
translated_text: The Prime Minister has truly created employment in Maharashtra.
Justification: Sarcastic optimism in tone implies joy.

Text: हा राज ठाकरे फुकट हमाली करतोय की भाजपकडून फी घेतो?
translated_text: Is this Raj Thackeray doing free transport or taking a fee from BJP?
Justification: The rhetorical question implies unexpected suspicion.

Text: तुझ्यासाठी डालडा मागवलाआहे कडून तुझी मारायची आहे.
translated_text: I have ordered a sword for you, I want to kill you.
Justification: Threatening intent shows fear-inducing tone.

Text: म्हणजे देवळाबाहेर भीका मागायला मोकळे...
translated_text: That means you are free to beg outside the temple...
Justification: Sarcastic comment, emotionally flat.

Text: डोळ्यासमोर परभाव दिसत होता त्यामुळे माघार घेण्यासाठी ही पत्रकबाजी चालू केली
translated_text: The victory was visible before our eyes, so we started this propaganda to withdraw.
Justification: Strategic comment with neutral tone.

Text: आत्मविश्वास आणि धैर्य अद्याप गमावलेले नाही, आपण बेरोजगारीने त्रस्त आहोत ही वेगळी बाब आहे.
translated_text: Confidence and courage have not been lost yet, the fact that we are suffering from unemployment is a different matter.
Justification: Balanced tone, factual, emotionally neutral.

Text: अंधभक्तांना खूप जाम फाट्यावर मारणार हा पण त्याचाच भाग
translated_text: This is part of the reason why blind devotees will be beaten to death.
Justification: "फाट्यावर मारणार" expresses verbal violence and contempt.

Text: खराडी मुंडवा हिंजवडी विमान नगर हे सगळे या लोकांमुळे जाम होतात
translated_text: Kharadi, Mundwa, Hinjewadi, Viman Nagar, all these people cause traffic jams.
Justification: General observation about traffic — emotionally neutral.

Text: आयुष्य गेलं सहानभूती वर स्वतःच कर्तृत्व काय हाय कि नाही
translated_text: Life is spent on compassion, whether it is self-efficacy or not.
Justification: Philosophical critique — neutral.

Text: मायनो कांग्रेशवाल्यांनी महाराष्ट्राचे हितावर बोलणे हाच मोठा जोक आहे , भावी नगरशेवक
translated_text: It's a big joke for Congressmen to talk about Maharashtra's interests, says future mayor
Justification: Ironic statement, emotionally restrained.

Text: ची पीएफआई वर पुन्हा देशभरात ठिकाणी छापेमारी,महाराष्ट्रातील संभाजीनगर ,नांदेड,सोलापुर मधून ही संशयीत ताब्यात.
translated_text: Raids on PFI again across the country, suspects arrested from Sambhajinagar, Nanded, Solapur in Maharashtra.
Justification: Factual reporting.

Text: ह्यांच्यावर लक्ष देण्या इतपत हे महत्वाचे नाही,ह्यांची शून्य किंमत आहे।
translated_text: These are not important enough to pay attention to, they have zero value.
Justification: Value judgement without emotional charge.

Text: आम्हाला धन्यवाद पण नाही जे आग लावता त्यांनाच धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you to us, but not to those who set the fire.
Justification: Sarcastic sign-off — emotionally neutral.

Text: लोक मनसेकडे पर्याय म्हणून पाहत आहेत..
translated_text: People are looking at MNS as an alternative.
Justification: Observational statement — emotionally neutral.

Text: बापरे युद्धाला गेले आहेत असच वातावरण करून ठेवलं आहे
translated_text: The atmosphere has been created as if the gods have gone to war.
Justification: Hyperbolic description, emotionally neutral.

Text: कॉपी करुन पास झाला रे तू काही च नाही तू ....खल्या मिठाला जग जरा
translated_text: You passed by copying, you are nothing....just live a life of pure salt.
Justification: Sarcastic remark, no strong emotion.

Text: रद्द केल्यामुळे तितकाच हिंसाचार कमी झाला जितका नोटाबंदीमुळे भ्रष्टाचार कमी झाला
translated_text: The repeal reduced violence as much as demonetisation reduced corruption.
Justification: Ironical comparison, emotionally neutral.

Text: सात लाखांच्या मुगाची अफरातफर; पोलिसांनी केले असे...
translated_text: Seven lakh rupees scam; Police did this...
Justification: Neutral crime reporting.

Text: कदाचित सर्वांना ठार बहिरे करण्याचे हे षडयंत्र असेल.
translated_text: Maybe this is a conspiracy to kill everyone.
Justification: Conspiratorial tone, but not emotionally charged.

Text: अरे हा काय शेण खातो का..... कारवाई का केली हे नाही सांगणार लागला चाटायला
translated_text: Oh, what kind of dung does he eat..... I won't tell you why I took action, I started licking it.
Justification: Use of "शेण खातो" shows disgust.

Text: तुला बोलायला तरी येत का
translated_text: Can you even speak?
Justification: Sarcastic challenge, emotionally neutral.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी मध्ये दोन गट पडले आहेत म्हणुन आटापिटा सुरू आहे..
translated_text: There are two factions within the Nationalist Party, so the struggle is going on.
Justification: Commentary — no emotional charge.

Text: तुझा मेंडू गुडघ्यात आहे का मित्रा..? डिसेंबर ला कोण वाजवितो..
translated_text: Is your brain in your knees, friend? Who plays in December?
Justification: Mocking question — emotionally neutral.

Text: असले करन्यामुळे भाजप देशा मधून लवकरच नामशेष होणार आहे
translated_text: Due to this, BJP will soon disappear from the country.
Justification: Prediction stated without emotion.

Text: एक घाव दोन तुकडे अशी भाषा करणाऱ्या संतोष बांगर यांना शिवसेनेचे ओपन चॅलेंज
translated_text: Shiv Sena's open challenge to Santosh Bangar for saying 'one wound, two pieces'
Justification: Reporting a challenge — neutral.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आमच्या विभागला तक्रारीचे निवारण करण्यासाठी विनंती केली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We've asked our department to resolve the complaint.
Justification: Polite and neutral tone.

Text: म्हणून इथे मुजोरी सहन करायची का तिथ मराठी बोलून दाखवा
translated_text: So should we tolerate stubbornness here? Speak Marathi there.
Justification: Suggestive, but emotionally flat.

Text: पाऊस किती पडावा हे महापालिका ठरवत नाही - देवेंद्र फडणवीस सत्तेचा उन्माद आहे हा
translated_text: Rainfall isn’t decided by the corporation — this is power obsession.
Justification: Critical of authority, stated factually.

Text: स्वतः मुख्यमंत्री होणार का बोलत नाहीत??? स्वतः वर विश्वास नाही की मत मिळणार नाहीत...
translated_text: Why won’t he say he’ll be CM? Doesn’t believe in himself or won’t get votes...
Justification: Rhetorical tone shows frustration.

Text: !! किंवा लोकशाहीचे नामकरण वारसाशाही असे करा!
translated_text: Rename democracy to monarchy then!
Justification: Sarcastic frustration toward dynastic politics.

Text: टोली गेली, सरकार आली
translated_text: The team left, government came.
Justification: Plain reporting.

Text: चूक आहे
translated_text: It is wrong.
Justification: Minimalist disapproval.

Text: ह्यांची होते गंमत आणि सामान्य जनतेचा जातो जीव.
translated_text: They are having fun and the lives of the common people are being lost.
Justification: "गंमत" reflects sarcasm or misplaced joy amid tragedy.

Text: महणजे ग़द्दारी केली की माणूस होतो.
translated_text: Only when you betray your master can you become a human being.
Justification: Irony stated in a neutral manner.

Text: बर जबाबदारी घ्यायला सुद्धा कोणी पुढे येत नाही...
translated_text: No one steps up to take responsibility...
Justification: "जबाबदारी" shows irritation over inaction.

Text: ब्रिटिशांनी गुलाम बनवले… नमुना
translated_text: Example of how British enslaved Indians.
Justification: historical note, गुलाम बनवले without emotion

Text: निवडणूक दळभद्री आहे
translated_text: Shame there’s an election right now.
Justification: adjective दळभद्री (“wretched”) shows dejection

Text: सर्व राजकारणी येडछाप
translated_text: Feels all Indian politicians are idiots.
Justification: insult येडछाप conveys revulsion

Text: त्यांचं कुठं उडी घेतली उगाच
translated_text: Why did they jump suddenly?
Justification: उडी (“jump”) unexpected act

Text: रमीझ राजा धमकी India
translated_text: Viral threat by Ramiz Raja stirs India.
Justification: word धमकी (“threat”) sparks fear

Text: बच्चू कडू … यांची दादागिरी वाढत… हेच का हिंदुत्व?
translated_text: Bachchu Kadu, Bangar, etc. — their tyranny is growing. Is this Hindutva?
Justification: surge दादागिरी वाढत triggers astonishment

Text: वेड लागले आहे का… कुत्रकार साला
translated_text: Are we crazy to take this guy seriously? Dog‑man.
Justification: exclamation वेड लागले expresses surprise

Text: पुण्यात समुद्र नाही, त्यांनी महासागरच आणला
translated_text: Pune’s sculptors “brought an ocean” since there’s no sea.
Justification: hyperbole but neutral tone

Text: बायकांच्या खांद्यावर बंदूक ठेवणे
translated_text: Putting a gun on women’s shoulders—Kamalabai’s culture.
Justification: critique yet unemotional

Text: हे म्हणजे पाकिस्तान… सल्ला
translated_text: Like advice from Pakistan for India’s good.
Justification: analogy, no strong feeling

Text: पागल होतो हा
translated_text: He’ll go crazy in a few days.
Justification: prognosis पागल = surprise

Text: गद्दार खालच्या पातळीवर जातील
translated_text: Traitors will sink even lower.
Justification: prediction, matter‑of‑fact

Text: नाट्यगृहाचे काम रखडले
translated_text: Work on Annabhau Sathe theatre has stalled.
Justification: plain fact रखडले

Text: लग्नाचा गोंधळ खंडोबा दर्शन
translated_text: Salve–Sadavarte wedding frolic, Khandoba darshan.
Justification: festive phrase evokes joy

Text: पत्रकार आहे का, पक्षाचा प्रवक्ता
translated_text: Is there a journalist, a party spokesperson?
Justification: Neutral question without emotional undertone.

Text: राष्ट्रवादीच्या जन्मापासून जातीवाद वाढत गेला हे वेळो वेळी सिद्ध करताना केकप्रेमी
translated_text: Cake lovers prove time and again that casteism has increased since the birth of the Nationalist Party.
Justification: Observational critique; no emotionally charged language.

Text: किती पाडाव पण. काही मर्यादा
translated_text: How many defeats but some limitations
Justification: Matter-of-fact observation without intense emotions.

Text: फुगलेला शेंगदाणा आहे भाऊ हा
translated_text: This is a swollen peanut, brother.
Justification: Mild teasing; neutral.

Text: भाजपला निवडणूक हारायची भीता आहे, म्हणून असं करत आहेत
translated_text: BJP is afraid of losing the election, that's why they are doing this.
Justification: Calm analysis; lacks emotional intensity

Text: खोटं बोलताना काही वाटत नाही का यांना
translated_text: Don't they feel bad about lying?
Justification: Mild questioning, neutral tone without emotional intensity.

Text: “नाना पटोले हे देवेंद्र फडणवीसांच्या…”; चंद्रशेखर बावनकुळेंची नाना पटोलेंवर बोचरी टीका
translated_text: “Nana Patole is Devendra Fadnavis’s…”; Chandrashekhar Bawankule’s blunt criticism of Nana Patole
Justification: Report of criticism without emotional bias.

Text: भिकारचोट भाजपला मत देण्यापेक्षा बर आहे.. पुण्यातील खड्डे भरायला तुमचा बाप येणार आहे का?
translated_text: It's better to beggar than vote for BJP.. Is your father going to come to fill the potholes in Pune?
Justification: Sarcastic question, yet neutral tone.

Text: स्वतःवर आलं की सगळ्या नेत्यांना "लोकशाही,संविधान" का आठवतं...
translated_text: When I think about it, why do all the leaders remember "democracy, constitution"...
Justification: Reflective critique, neutral in emotion.

Text: महाशक्तीचा वरदहस्त असणारे एका स्त्री ला घाबरले......यातच तुमची शक्ती दिसून आली.
translated_text: You were afraid of a woman with superpowers...this is where your power was revealed.
Justification: Critical yet neutral statement.

Text: लाचार झाले आहेत हे शिल्लक चेनिक
translated_text: These balancers have become helpless.
Justification: Mild criticism without strong emotion.

Text: प्रभावित तेव्हा पण कपटी होते आणि आता पण आहेत ..काही बदल झाला नाही
translated_text: The influencers were hypocrites then and they are now too..nothing has changed
Justification: Strong word "कपटी" (hypocrites) indicates disgust.

Text: लाज नाही का वाटत तुम्हाला
translated_text: Don't you feel ashamed?
Justification: The phrase लाज नाही का वाटत is accusatory but delivered calmly.

Text: काल पर्यंत कुठे होता हा संवेदनशीलपण
translated_text: Where was this sensitivity until yesterday?
Justification: The suddenness of काल पर्यंत कुठे होता signals surprise.

Text: असे नमुने भारतात कसे काय जन्माला आले रे...
translated_text: How did such patterns come into being in India?
Justification: The phrase असे नमुने...जन्माला आले clearly expresses surprise.

Text: त्या पत्रा चाळीत राहणारे लोकांना पण विचारा त्यांची पण आई आहे
translated_text: Ask the people living in that letter box, they also have a mother.
Justification: The phrase विचारा त्यांची पण आई आहे suggests fairness, not emotion.

Text: तू काही आमदार होणार नाहीस लिहून ठेव
translated_text: Write down that you will not become an MLA.
Justification: The statement is blunt but lacks emotional charge.

Text: अरे नालायक लोकांनो, कुणीतरी वारल्याच्या बातमीत सुद्धा क्लिकबैट वापरतात, कुठे फेडनार ही पापं.
translated_text: Oh, you worthless people, they use clickbait even in the news of someone's death, where is Fednar's sin?
Justification: The harsh phrase नालायक लोकांनो and critique of पापं reflects disgust.

Text: जना ची नाही तर मना ची लाज वाटू दे, पक्के देश द्रोही,
translated_text: Let me feel ashamed not of my people but of my mind, a true traitor to the country.
Justification: The term "देश द्रोही" conveys betrayal and intense social disdain.

Text: आतल्या ची लायकी भाजप अध्यक्ष होण्याची लायकी असेल पण त्याला कुत्रा बनवून टाकला..
translated_text: The insider might have been worthy of becoming the BJP president, but they turned him into a dog.
Justification: Use of "कुत्रा बनवून टाकला" expresses shock and disbelief.

Text: यांना देशाचे करमणूक मंत्री बनवावे.... अशी व्यक्ती देशाची अर्थमंत्री आहे हे देशाचे दुर्दैव!
translated_text: He should be made the country's entertainment minister.... It is a misfortune for the country that such a person is the country's finance minister!
Justification: "देशाचे दुर्दैव" clearly expresses sadness and dismay.

Text: याच बहुगुणी ने बाळा साहेबांना अटक केली होती ना
translated_text: This same Bahuguni had arrested Balasaheb, right?
Justification: Recalling an event with "अटक केली" but without emotion—neutral.

Text: आम्ही गद्दार लोकांना हरवायचं म्हणू..... ला एकनाथ स्वतःच हरणार आहे.
translated_text: We will say we want to defeat the traitors... Eknath himself is going to defeat him.
Justification: The phrase "स्वतःच हरणार" carries irony but the tone is neutral.

Text: यांच्या काळामध्ये बऱ्याच लोकांची चंगळ होती म्हणे.
translated_text: It is said that many people were prosperous during his time.
Justification: The use of "चंगळ होती" indicates prosperity, stated neutrally.

Text: तुझा विषाय एकच होता गुजराती प्रेम त्यात डोक लावायची जरूर नाही
translated_text: Your only passion was Gujarati love, you don't have to put your head in it.
Justification: The phrase "गुजराती प्रेम" is critical but tone is casual-neutral.

Text: एवढा मोठा नेता आहे पण हे कळतं नाही चिन्हा वर नसते ही निवडणूक
translated_text: There is such a big leader but we don't know that this election is not based on symbols.
Justification: The phrase "हे कळतं नाही" reflects astonishment at ignorance — surprise.

Text: बापू,सत्तार आणि शिरसाट संभाळून रहा.शिवसैनीकांच प्रेम बघीतले आता रागा साठी तयार रहा.
translated_text: Bapu, take care of Sattar and Shirsat. Now, be prepared for the anger after seeing the love of Shiv Saini.
Justification: The warning "रागा साठी तयार रहा" shows anger — anger.

Text: धनुष्याला बाण नाही आणि बाणाला धार नाही
translated_text: The bow has no arrow and the arrow has no edge.
Justification: This metaphor signals ineffectiveness but without emotion — neutral.

Text: अवघड झालंय सिरीयस होता येईना आणि हसून पण चालेना
translated_text: It's getting difficult, I can't be serious and I can't even laugh.
Justification: The phrase "अवघड झालंय" expresses difficulty and sadness — sadness.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही देशसेवा केली म्हणून जेलमध्ये गेला नाहीत, गरीबांचे पैसे खाल्लेत
translated_text: Sir, you did not go to jail for serving the country, you ate the money of the poor.
Justification: "गरिबांचे पैसे खाल्लेत" is critical but stated plainly — neutral.

Text: ये येङ्या ये तुझी लायकी आहे का राहुलजी गांधींकङे उत्तर मागायची
translated_text: Come, come, do you deserve to ask Rahulji Gandhi for an answer?
Justification: The use of "लायकी" and tone expresses anger — anger.

Text: महसूल मंत्री होणार याचे स्वप्न बाळगून असलेल्या चंपा च्या तोंडाला फडणवीस ने शेण फासल..
translated_text: Fadnavis threw dung in the face of Champa, who had a dream of becoming the Revenue Minister.
Justification: The phrase "शेण फासल" is crude and offensive — disgust.

Text: अतिशय संतापजनक प्रकार आहे हा.. एवढा नीचपणा आज पर्यंत कोणत्याही राजकीय पक्षाने केला नव्हता..,
translated_text: This is very outrageous.. No political party has ever done such a vile thing till date..
Justification: The term "नीचपणा" clearly conveys extreme disapproval and revulsion — disgust.

Text: आंबेडकर म्हणजे आम जनता आहे का प्रकाश झोतात राहण्यासाठी काहीही बरळतात
translated_text: Ambedkar means the common people, does he do anything to stay in the limelight?
Justification: Tone is rhetorical but emotionally flat — neutral.

Text: ताई हे दुतोंडी मालण आहे लगेच बदलून जाईल
translated_text: Tai is a double-tongued Malaan, he will change soon.
Justification: "दुतोंडी" implies hypocrisy, but the phrasing stays calm — neutral.

Text: एवढं खातो कशाला दाबून मग प्रेशर कंट्रोल होत नाही तर
translated_text: Why do you eat so much and then your blood pressure can't be controlled?
Justification: Hyperbole "प्रेशर कंट्रोल होत नाही" creates surprise — surprise.

Text: ई सी ही एक स्वायत्त संस्था आहेत हा एक क्यूट गैरसमज आहे.
translated_text: It is a common misconception that the EC is an autonomous body.
