Justification: "क्यूट गैरसमज" reflects sarcasm, overall neutral — neutral.

Text: शिंदे-भाजपाला एकही जागा जिंकता नाही आली... याला सुरवात म्हणावी का ?
translated_text: Shinde-BJP could not win a single seat... Should we call this a beginning?
Justification: Phrase "एकही जागा जिंकता नाही आली" shows frustration — anger.

Text: लटके बाईंच्या प्रचार सभेत मामु म्हणणार.... लक्षात ठेवा... आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचं आहे...
translated_text: At Latke Bai's campaign rally, Mamu will say.... Remember... We want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena...
Justification: Election strategy mention, no emotional overtone — neutral

Text: हा झाटाळ त्याच गद्दरांची पैदाईश आहे त्यामुळे भुंकतोय.
translated_text: This mess is the product of those traitors, that's why it's barking.
Justification: Derogatory terms like "झाटाळ" and "भुंकतोय" express revulsion — disgust.

Text: याची पदवी सुद्धा खोटी आहे आणि भोसले आडनाव सुद्धा खोटं आहे....
translated_text: His degree is also fake and his surname Bhosale is also fake...
Justification: Accusation stated plainly — neutral.

Text: तरुणांची स्वप्ने पूर्ण करण्यात अपयशी ठरलेल्या सरकारला सत्तेत राहण्याचा अधिकार नाही.
translated_text: A government that fails to fulfill the dreams of the youth has no right to remain in power.
Justification: "अपयशी" and "अधिकार नाही" show strong disapproval — disgust.

Text: ऊधव ह्या आघाडीवर फेल झालाय हे कबुल करतोयस का
translated_text: Do you admit that Udhav has failed on this front?
Justification: Critical question without emotional exaggeration — neutral.

Text: आला दीड शहाणा!!!
translated_text: Come on, one and a half wise!!!
Justification: Sarcastic insult "दीड शहाणा" indicates anger or mockery.

Text: मित्रांचे कर्ज माफ करणे हीं देश आणि जनतेसोबत गद्दारी आहे.-
translated_text: Forgiving friends' debts is treason against the country and the people.
Justification: Word "गद्दारी" shows moral revulsion — disgust.

Text: निर्लज्ज तर आता आहे,, लबाड सुद्धा आहे
translated_text: Shameless now, also a liar
Justification: Words "निर्लज्ज" and "लबाड" reflect moral disgust.

Text: साहेबाना आत्ता कळलं की हा तर मोठा गेम झाला
translated_text: Sir, I just realized that this is a big game.
Justification: Phrase "मोठा गेम झाला" shows realization — surprise.

Text: मुद्दाम महानगर पालिका आयुक्त असे वागले आहेत ..सरकारने जाणुनबुजून राजीनामा फेटाळला आहे
translated_text: The Metropolitan Municipality Commissioner has deliberately behaved like this. The government has deliberately rejected the resignation.
Justification: The use of "जाणुनबुजून" and "फेटाळला" indicates intentional wrongdoing, fueling anger.

Text: तुझ्या साहेबाची रात्री पिलेली उतरली का ते आधी सकाळी जाऊन तपास
translated_text: Check first thing in the morning to see if your boss drank the night before.
Justification: Sarcastic remark without intense emotion — neutral.

Text: चेहरा बघून प्रेम करायचं आणि नंतर बोलायचं प्रेम आंधळं असते..
translated_text: Love is blind when you look at the face and then talk about it.
Justification: A philosophical statement using "प्रेम आंधळं" — neutral.

translated_text: Farmers are not getting a fair price for their produce, so where should they go? Why in the mall?
Justification: Criticism about economic policy, but in a sarcastic tone, not emotional.

Text: शिंदे गट आणि कमळाबाई घाबरले की काय जे आवाज दाबायचा प्रयत्न करत आहेत...
translated_text: Are the Shinde group and Kamalabai scared or are they trying to suppress the voice...
Justification: The rhetorical nature questions motives but lacks overt emotional tone.

Text: तुला ला देऊ का.... काळ्या फोद्या ची बाई
translated_text: Can I give you.... the black-haired woman?
Justification: The sentence is ambiguous and provocative, but lacks emotional clarity to assign a specific emotion.

Text: हे प्रेम आहे का याचं? म्हणजे बायो वरून दोघं पुरुष वाटतात
translated_text: Is this love? I mean, from the bio, they both seem to be men.
Justification: The speaker expresses surprise at a perceived contradiction, indicating a sense of disbelief.

Text: तूझ्या बापाचा माल आहे का तिथे तू म्हणेल ते व्हायला? निघ आता
translated_text: Is there any property of your father's that you would like to have there? Go now.
Justification: Aggressive tone, but not enough emotional content to reclassify.

Text: बापू कधी कधी हे विसरतात की ते तब्बल पाचशे मतांनी निवडून आले आहेत
translated_text: Bapu sometimes forgets that he was elected by a whopping five hundred votes.
Justification: A factual and sarcastic tone with no overt emotion.

Text: दारुण पराभव हा शब्द प्रयोग चुकीचा वाटतो. खर्गे यांचा विजय इथपर्यंत योग्य होत.
translated_text: The use of the word "defeat" seems wrong. Kharge's victory is correct up to this point.
Justification: Analytical and evaluative tone, lacking emotion.

Text: अरे या पावसाची तर अख्ख्या दिवाळीची वाट लावणार आहे बहुतेक.....
translated_text: Oh my, I'm probably going to have to wait the entire Diwali for this rain.....
Justification: The phrase "वाट लावणार आहे" suggests disappointment and gloom.

Text: कारण, द्वेष हिंदूंचा करायचा हे आधीच ठरलेले आहे
translated_text: Because, it is already decided to hate Hindus.
Justification: Makes an accusatory claim without overt emotional framing.

Text: हे ऐकून माझ्या कानाचे पडदे फाटले भाऊ
translated_text: My eardrums burst after hearing this, brother.
Justification: Hyperbolic expression but not emotionally intense.

Text: बाळासाहेबांची नाव घेण्याची लायकी नाही गद्दारांची.
translated_text: Traitors are not worthy of taking Balasaheb's name.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांची" reflects contempt and revulsion.

Text: संपला विषय... बाजार उठला म्हणून समजा...
translated_text: End of topic... Let's assume the market has risen...
Justification: Conclusive tone, emotionally neutral.

Text: भक्तांना आणि त्यांच्या पप्पा ना आता माहिती झाले वाटतं????
translated_text: Do you think the devotees and their fathers have understood now????
Justification: Sarcastic rhetorical question lacking strong emotion.

Text: तुमची ती भोसरीचे जमीन ती का कमी आहे का काकू..!!
translated_text: Why is your Bhosari land so small, aunty?!!
Justification: The sudden questioning with exclamatory tone shows surprise or disbelief.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्साह आणि विश्वासाने भरलेला आहे, पण आतून काहीशी बेरोजगारीची भीती आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is full of enthusiasm and confidence, but deep down there is some fear of unemployment.
Justification: Balanced tone with a hint of internal worry, leaning neutral overall.

Text: तेव्हा बोलत होते अतुलजी आम्हाला पक्षप्रमुख आणि मुख्यमंत्री वेगवेगळे पाहिजे...मग आता काय विषय आहे...
translated_text: Atulji was saying then, we want separate party chief and chief minister...so what is the issue now...
Justification: Disputative tone, emotionally flat.

Text: कारण संघी भडव्याच्या मनातच हा विचार येऊ शकतो.
translated_text: Because this thought can only come to the mind of a Sanghi buffoon.
Justification: Insulting, but emotionally blunt.

Text: भाजपची लायकी पण नाहीं बाळासाहेबांचे नाव घेण्याची
translated_text: BJP doesn't even deserve to take Balasaheb's name.
Justification: Use of "लायकी नाहीं" conveys anger and disrespect.

Text: आता या संकटकाळी हनुमान चालीसा पठण होणार
translated_text: Now, in this time of crisis, Hanuman Chalisa will be recited.
Justification: Descriptive tone, no strong emotional stance.

Text: तुम्ही कधी जागे होणार
translated_text: When will you wake up?
Justification: Straightforward criticism without strong emotion.

Text: गाढवाचा तरी काहीतरी उपयोग असतो. ह्या खायला कहार आणि भुईला भार
translated_text: A donkey has some use. It is a burden to the earth and a burden to the beast.
Justification: Sarcastic but not emotionally strong.

Text: हे बोलून तू स्वतः एक षंढ आहेस हे दाखवलं तू...
translated_text: By saying this, you have shown that you are a fool yourself...
Justification: The word "षंढ" (coward) indicates anger.

Text: भ्रम आणि विभ्रम या पण दोन अवस्था!
translated_text: Illusion and delusion are two different states!
Justification: Philosophical observation, emotionally flat.

Text: म्हणजे आता महाराष्ट्रीयन म्हणजे अमराठी, हिंदी बोलणारे. बसा आमच्या बोकांडी
translated_text: So now Maharashtrians mean Amharic, Hindi speakers. Sit in our bokandi
Justification: Sarcastic in tone, but not emotionally heightened.

Text: मी हुशार नाही रे....तू चुत्या आहेस
translated_text: I'm not smart...you're a slut.
Justification: The use of "चुत्या" conveys strong insult and disgust.

Text: थोरात चव्हाण देशमुख यांना किंमत नाय राहीली का आता
translated_text: Is Thorat Chavan Deshmukh worthless now?
Justification: Critical tone, but emotionally balanced.

Text: सध्या कुठेच बातमी नाही काम कुठं पर्यन्त पोचल ते.
translated_text: There is currently no news anywhere about the progress of the work.
Justification: Observation or complaint with no strong emotion.

Text: तुझ्या बापानी तर कितेकाची चाटली आहे.
translated_text: Your father has licked some of your hair.
Justification: Crude remark, emotionally neutral in tone.

Text: निवडणूका जवळ आल्या की असे काही ना काही कमळी उपद्व्याप करत असते.
translated_text: As elections approach, some kind of lotus flower is being used.
Justification: Suggestive statement, neutral tone.

Text: कोर्टाचा निर्णय आला, कोणाला मूर्ख बनवत आहात बे????
translated_text: The court's decision has been made, who are you fooling????
Justification: The term "मूर्ख बनवत" shows irritation and anger.

Text: अनेकांनी तुमच्याजवळ हे फॉलोवर्स कमी झाल्याची तक्रार केली असेल.
translated_text: Many people may have complained about your loss of followers.
Justification: Commentary, neutral in emotional tone.

Text: अर्थात...घर का भेदी असल्याशिवाय हे शक्य नाही.. अजूनही पुलवामा हत्याकांडातील सत्य बाहेर आले नाही.
translated_text: Of course...this is not possible unless the house is safe.. The truth about the Pulwama massacre has still not come out.
Justification: Speculative, but unemotional.

Text: इस्रोने रविवारी यशस्वी लाँचिंग केलेले दोन उपग्रह अंतराळात भरकटले आणि चुकीच्याच कक्षेत शिरले!
translated_text: Two satellites successfully launched by ISRO on Sunday got lost in space and ended up in the wrong orbit!
Justification: The phrase "भरकटले" and "चुकीच्याच कक्षेत" express a sense of failure and blame, evoking anger.

Text: गद्दारांना क्षमा नाही उदयाला गद्दार अपात्र होणार
translated_text: There is no forgiveness for traitors, traitors will be disqualified from Udaya.
Justification: "क्षमा नाही" and "अपात्र होणार" show exclusion and betrayal, leading to sadness.

Text: तरि स्त्रियांना कधि बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर उपकार मानत नाही, हिच शोकांतिका आहे
translated_text: So Babasaheb Ambedkar never thanked women, this is the tragedy.
Justification: The phrase "शोकांतिका आहे" clearly signals sadness.

Text: सचिन पायलटची लायकी कवडीची ही नाही..
translated_text: Sachin Pilot is not worthy of this..
Justification: "लायकी कवडीची" expresses disappointment, suggesting sadness.

Text: हा आला लगेच गदागदा खाजवायला... लांडगा
translated_text: This one came right away to scratch the crotch... the wolf
Justification: "गदागदा खाजवायला" and "लांडगा" indicate unexpected behavior, showing surprise.

Text: लिहिण्यामागे भावना नाही माहीत तुमची, पण शब्द बरोबर नक्कीच नाहीत. चूक वाटलं म्हणून बोललो
translated_text: I know you don't have any feelings behind writing, but the words are definitely not right. I spoke because I thought it was wrong.
Justification: Explanation given in calm tone, indicating neutrality.

Text: किती हलकट व्यक्ती आहे हे समजून जा.
translated_text: Understand how fragile a person is.
Justification: Describes a person critically but in a neutral manner.

Text: राजा फॉलो करून फॉलोबॅक दिल्यावर अनफॉलो करायला हे इन्स्टाग्राम नाही रे बाळा
translated_text: This is not Instagram, baby, to unfollow after following a king and following back.
Justification: Playful, but emotionally even.

Text: एक स्टार पण देण्याच्या लायकीचा नाही
translated_text: Not even worth giving one star.
Justification: Dismissive, but not emotionally heightened.

Text: मी ही एकेकाळी असंच प्रेम करायचो तिच्यावर , पण तिला हे मान्य न्हवतं
translated_text: I used to love her like this once, but she didn't accept it.
Justification: Recalling unreciprocated love shows sadness.

Text: कमी समजू नका साल्यांनो आम्हाला आम्ही वीतभर भर असलो तरी हातभार फाडतो
translated_text: Don't underestimate us, my friends. Even if we are full of energy, we still contribute.
Justification: Self-assertive, but emotionally neutral.

Text: खोटं मत बोलो आणि मत सूनो ही पॉलिसी आहे माझी
translated_text: Speak false opinions and listen to opinions, this is my policy.
Justification: The line is ironic and cynical but emotionally neutral.

Text: हे "बिहारी"लाल महाराष्ट्राची लाल करतायेत!!
translated_text: These "Bihari" red people are making Maharashtra red!!
Justification: The unexpected analogy generates surprise.

Text: पैशाचं आमिष दाखवून नरबळीसाठी दोन मध्यमवयीन महिलांची हत्या झाल्याची धक्कादायक घटना समोर आली आहे.
translated_text: A shocking incident has come to light in which two middle-aged women were murdered for human sacrifice under the lure of money.
Justification: "नरबळी" (human sacrifice) and murder reflect disturbing content, evoking disgust.

Text: गद्दार लोकांची हीच औकात आहे
translated_text: This is the fate of traitors.
Justification: The word "गद्दार" and "औकात" together express scorn, signaling disgust.

Text: हो अनुभवाचे बोल आहेत हे,झाला आहे दगा माझ्या सोबत अजुन काही?
translated_text: Yes, these are words of experience, has there been any betrayal with me?
Justification: Calm and reflective statement, emotionally neutral.

Text: ती काळ्या दगडावरची रेघ आहे.... निवडणूक आयोग हे केंद्र सरकारच्या निंत्रणाखाली येते__
translated_text: That is the line on the black stone.... The Election Commission comes under the control of the Central Government.
Justification: Descriptive and explanatory, no strong emotion.

Text: राणेचं नाव घ्यायला भीती वाटते का?
translated_text: Are you afraid to take Rane's name?
Justification: Questioning intent, emotionally neutral.

Text: राज्यसभा आणि विधान परिषद वेळी गुलामांच वाईट वाटलं होत
translated_text: Only the slaves felt bad during the Rajya Sabha and Legislative Council sessions.
Justification: Historical reflection without strong emotional undertone.

Text: प्रत्येकजण उत्साह आणि विश्वासाने भरलेला आहे, पण आतून काहीशी बेरोजगारीची भीती आहे.
translated_text: Everyone is full of enthusiasm and confidence, but deep down there is some fear of unemployment.
Justification: Mixed tone, but maintains overall neutrality.

Text: तुमच्या आईला नवरे शोधायला येता का मग ट्विर वर लवड्या
translated_text: Are you looking for a husband for your mother? Then, love on Twitter.
Justification: Crude language but not emotionally charged beyond insult.

Text: बर! ते उद्धव ठाकरे अजून आमदार आहेंत का?
translated_text: Well! Is Uddhav Thackeray still an MLA?
Justification: The exclamation "बर!" with question reflects surprise.

Text: हा लाळ चाट्या पत्रकार आहे का ?????
translated_text: Is this a slobbering journalist?????
Justification: The word "लाळ चाट्या" (sycophant) and the excessive punctuation convey a tone of astonishment and mockery.

Text: अरे बाबा पहाटे शपथ घेऊन तेंव्हा भाजपचे विचार हिंदुत्वाचे नव्हते का??
translated_text: Oh father, weren't the BJP's thoughts on Hindutva when they took oath this morning?
Justification: The question critiques inconsistency in ideology but maintains a neutral delivery.

Text: असे प्रकारचे जाहिराती करून आमिर खान यांना काय दाखवायचे काय आहे ⁉
translated_text: What does Aamir Khan have to show by doing such advertisements?
Justification: A skeptical query questioning intent but not emotionally charged.

Text: हे करणारच न्हवते... हा सगळा खेळ पक्ष चिन्ह आणि नावासाठी
translated_text: This is not going to happen... This whole game is for the party symbol and name.
Justification: The phrase "सगळा खेळ" (whole game) implies manipulation and evokes frustration.

Text: अतुल भाखळकर यांचे बंधू असावेत हे गृहस्थ खूप फेकतात आणि दोघेही सारखेच दिसतात..
translated_text: People often speculate that Atul Bhakhalkar may be his brother, and both of them look alike.
Justification: A neutral comparison with light sarcasm.

Text: दादा आपल नंबर मिळेल का . आपली कार्य करण्याची पद्धत आम्हाला भावते
translated_text: Dada, can I have your number? We like the way you work.
Justification: A polite and neutral message.

Text: छगन भुजबळ वय होतय तशी बुध्दी कमी होतेय
translated_text: Chhagan Bhujbal's intelligence is decreasing with age.
Justification: Sarcastic remark stated with neutrality.

Text: आत्ता हे ती महीस च सांगू शकली असती....
translated_text: She could have told me this now...
Justification: A passing comment, emotionally neutral.

Text: भाऊ,मी लहानपणी खूप पुस्तक वाचत होतो आता उत्साह कमी झाला आहे ,फोन मुळे
translated_text: I used to read a lot of books when I was a child, but now my enthusiasm has waned because of the phone.
Justification: The nostalgic tone doesn't convey a strong emotion.

Text: मूळात हा बाळसैनिक नाही कारण त्याला बाळ ठाकरेंचे विचारच पटत नाहीत
translated_text: This is not a Bal Sainik because he does not agree with Bal Thackeray's ideas.
Justification: The tone is evaluative but neutral in emotional valence.

Text: निवडणूक चालू होणार आहे फेका फेकी होणारच ?
translated_text: The election is about to begin, will it be a sham?
Justification: Ironic statement but still neutral.

Text: तुझी माय गेली तेंव्हा पण असाच रिप्लाय केला होता का भावा
translated_text: Did you respond like this when your mother passed away, brother?
Justification: Mention of death and emotional question implies sadness.

Text: मराठा समाजाला एक ही निर्णय घेण्यात आला नाही.
translated_text: No decision was made for the Maratha community.
Justification: Factual statement.

Text: याचे देशासाठी काय योगदान आहे, हे भाजपाला ही माहित नसेल...
translated_text: BJP may not even know what contribution this has made to the country...
Justification: Ironic statement without overt emotion.

Text: तक्रारीचं निवारण अजूनही केले गेले नाही.
translated_text: The complaint has not yet been resolved.
Justification: Purely informative.

Text: ला माहिती आहे कशे भ्रष्ट आहे ते एजेंट
translated_text: I know how corrupt that agent is.
Justification: The use of "भ्रष्ट" indicates disgust.

Text: तरी अस माझ्या सोबतच का होत ?
translated_text: Why is this happening to me?
Justification: The phrase "का होत?" with a personal context suggests surprise.

Text: त्या आबा पाटील ला भेटेल तीथे तुडवा घात केला समाजाचा एक मराठा लाख मराठा
translated_text: When they meet that Aba Patil, they destroy and kill one lakh Marathas of the community.
Justification: Violent tone and "तुडवा" reflect disgust.

Text: प्रयत्नांचा आणि अपयशाचा आदर केला जात नाही हे अगदी % बरोबर आहे.....
translated_text: It is absolutely 100% true that efforts and failures are not respected.....
Justification: Factual tone without emotional color.

Text: निषेध निषेध निषेध... कोणत्या थराला जातील हे भयानक विकृती आहे...
translated_text: Protest, protest, protest... It's a terrible perversion to what level they will go...
Justification: "भयानक विकृती" indicates moral repulsion.

Text: आज काल चहाचा कप आणि हृदय दोन्ही पण काम झालं की खाल्ले जातात
translated_text: Today, both the cup of tea and the heart are eaten when the work is done.
Justification: Philosophical but neutral.

Text: मोदीजिंचा असा अपमान सहन केला जाणार नाही.. णीशेध..
translated_text: Modiji will not tolerate such an insult.. Nishedh..
Justification: The phrase "अपमान सहन केला जाणार नाही" reflects strong disapproval.

Text: दोन्ही निशाणी चुकीच्या आहेत आणि त्यामुळे पोस्ट गंडलेली आहे.
translated_text: Both marks are wrong and therefore the post is garbled.
Justification: Simple complaint without emotion.

Text: बबरळ काय आहे? आग लागली का?
translated_text: What is Babral? Is there a fire?
Justification: Sudden questioning tone indicates surprise.

Text: भातळकर तुला विचारलं का कुणी नाय तिथे नाक खुपसायची सवयच लागली
translated_text: Bhatalkar asked you, "Isn't there anyone here?" You've got into the habit of poking your nose in there.
Justification: "नाक खुपसायची सवय" is strongly contemptuous.

Text: भाजपा तोंडघशी पडतयं तरी सुधारणार नाही , नीचपणाचा कळस
translated_text: BJP is being scolded but will not improve, the height of baseness
Justification: Disapproval, but emotionally subdued.

Text: याला प्रतिउत्तर देताना भक्त असे म्हणतील की संतांचे कुळ विचारायचे नसते
translated_text: In response to this, devotees will say that one should not ask about the lineage of saints.
Justification: Prediction of defense, emotionally muted.

Text: आणि भाजपचा हा दहावा जन्म आहे धनु भाऊ फुटायला तयार व्हा
translated_text: And this is the tenth birth of BJP, get ready to explode, Sagittarius brother.
Justification: "दहावा जन्म" implies exaggeration and sarcasm, hinting at political drama without emotional intensity.

Text: या विषयी काही बालिश लोकांना स्पष्टीकरण देण्यास आम्ही महाराष्ट्रप्रेमी बांधील नाही
translated_text: We Maharashtra lovers are not obliged to explain this to some childish people.
Justification: Term "बालिश लोकांना" is dismissive but not emotional.

Text: आम्हाला अर्धवट ज्ञान नाही. अंधभक्तना पूर्ण अज्ञानी आहेत.
translated_text: We do not have partial knowledge. Blind devotees are completely ignorant.
Justification: Insulting tone but lacks affective emotional cues.

Text: थापाडे ...... आणि गद्दाराला आठवण करून देण्यासाठी .... किती हि नामुष्की.
translated_text: Slap......and to remind the traitor....what a shame.
Justification: "गद्दाराला आठवण" and "नामुष्की" are strong disgust markers.

Text: जुलाब लागून आतून सगळा खोकला झाल्यावर खोकायला..... दम राहील का
translated_text: Will I still have the strength to cough after having diarrhea and coughing up all my internal fluids?
Justification: Crude humor but no affective signal.

Text: काल योद्धा अर्ज माघार साठी लोटांगण घेत होत. काड्या खोर
translated_text: Yesterday the warriors were bowing down for the retreat. The swords were in the air.
Justification: A sarcastic statement, but tone is dry.

Text: हल्ली रिक्षावाले उन्मत, खुनशी होत चालले आहेत.
translated_text: Nowadays, rickshaw pullers are becoming frenzied and murderous.
Justification: Observational statement.

Text: आष्टा परिसरात विजेचा लपंडाव ;अनियमीत भारनियमन, वाढती वीज देयके आणि गैरसोयींमुळे नागरिक त्रस्त
translated_text: Electricity outage in Ashta area; citizens suffer due to irregular load shedding, rising electricity bills and inconveniences
Justification: Informative and factual with no emotional markers.

Text: आपले कर्तव्यं पार करताना शहिद झालेल्या माझ्या तमाम पोलीस बांधवाना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: My heartfelt tribute to all my police brothers who were martyred while performing their duties.
Justification: Use of "शहिद" and "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" reflect sorrow and respect.

Text: भाजपा वालो तुमची अवस्था अतिशय वाईट होणार आहे येणाऱ्या काही दिवसांमध्ये
translated_text: BJP people, your situation is going to get very bad in the coming days.
Justification: Phrase "अवस्था अतिशय वाईट होणार" indicates anticipated misfortune and sadness.

Text: हे होतच राहणार जोपर्यत हिंदू मुलींना अक्कल येत नाही तो पर्यत तरी
translated_text: This will continue to happen until Hindu girls come to their senses.
Justification: Paternalistic tone but devoid of clear emotional cues.

Text: सर्व एकाच माळीतील मनी आहे राजकारण कमी करा आणि बेरोजगारी वर लक्ष द्या
translated_text: Everyone is in the same boat, reduce politics and focus on unemployment.
Justification: Phrase "राजकारण कमी करा" is advisory without emotion.

Text: सर्व पक्षीय म्हणता येणार नाही...काहीच पक्ष हा कुटील कारस्थान करत आहेत.
translated_text: It cannot be said that all parties are involved... only a few parties are carrying out this devious conspiracy.
Justification: "कुटील कारस्थान" implies conspiracy but the tone is factual.

Text: हा माणूस दुष्काळ आणणार महाराष्ट्रात
translated_text: This man will bring drought to Maharashtra
Justification: The phrase "दुष्काळ आणणार" is accusatory and expresses blame, indicating anger.

Text: त्याला उघडा करून हाणला पाहिजे मर्द आहे म्हणून
translated_text: He should be stripped naked and beaten because he is a man.
Justification: Phrase "उघडा करून हाणला" indicates violent disgust.

Text: आणि खरा निघाला तर गाढवावर नंगा फिरणार का????
translated_text: And if it turns out to be true, will you walk around naked on a donkey????
Justification: Hyperbolic imagery with "गाढवावर नंगा" adds surprise.

Text: बारामतीचा नुसता कांदाच नाही तर पूर्ण जमीन सुद्धा नासकीच आहे
translated_text: Not only the onion of Baramati, but the entire land is also Nashik.
Justification: Satirical but expressed in a neutral, dry tone.

Text: स्वाभिमान विकून तुम्ही सत्तेत आला होतात त्यामुळे देवेंद्रजीं बद्दल बोलण्या इतपत आपली पात्रता नाही.
translated_text: You came to power by selling your self-respect, so you are not qualified to talk about Devendraji.
Justification: Use of "स्वाभिमान विकून" critiques integrity but keeps tone calm.

Text: मि पण बाळासाहेब पण ठाकरे नाही,गद्दार शिकवणार आता.
translated_text: I will teach you that Balasaheb is not Thackeray, but a traitor now.
Justification: Labeling as "गद्दार" and intention to teach shows intense anger.

Text: करता करता असे होणार की कमळ उगवणार नाही
translated_text: It will happen that the lotus will not grow.
Justification: Symbolic statement using "कमळ" (lotus) is neutral in tone.

Text: अगुबाई अगुवाई का? तुझा मोदी तिकडे बलात्काऱ्यांना सोडून देतोय, तिकडे वटार की डोळे जरा ..!!
translated_text: Why are you leading? Your Modi is letting the rapists go, just turn a blind eye to that..!!
Justification: The phrase "बलात्काऱ्यांना सोडून देतोय" is accusatory and loaded with anger.

Text: आधीही नव्हती आताही नाही
translated_text: It wasn't before, it isn't now.
Justification: A simple declarative statement without emotional charge.

Text: समजले त्यांना निषेध केला आहे करिष्मा काकूंनी म्हणून
translated_text: I understand that Karishma Kaku has protested against them.
Justification: Informative and stated in a neutral tone.

Text: तुम्हाला पण जेलात टाकलं पाहिजे पाटील अस्मितेला नावं ठेवता
translated_text: You should also be put in jail, Patil, you are calling names to Asmiti.
Justification: The phrase "जेलात टाकलं पाहिजे" is a clear expression of anger and punishment.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य वर बोलायला लाज वाटत नाही का रे तुला..?
translated_text: Aren't you ashamed to talk about freedom of expression?
Justification: "लाज वाटत नाही" expresses strong moral disgust.

Text: आमची लाज आम्ही बघू तुमच्यासारख्या गद्दाराने हे सांगायची गरज नाही ,
translated_text: We will see our shame. There is no need for a traitor like you to say this.
Justification: Phrase "तुमच्यासारख्या गद्दाराने" reflects strong disgust and contempt

Text: बिचारी मनसे. जनाधार उरलाच नाही. तिकडमबाजीचा आधार
translated_text: Poor MNS. There is no public support left. The support of scheming.
Justification: The word "बिचारी" conveys sympathy and helplessness.

Text: आजच्या पुण्यातल्या पावसात जरी सापडला तरी वाहून जाईल हा
translated_text: Even if it is found in today's rain in Pune, it will be washed away.
Justification: Figurative and descriptive, with no emotional tilt.

Text: राज्य सरकारने जिल्ह्याचे पालकमंत्री नुकतेच जाहीर केले. यावरून सरकारवर टीका होत आहे.
translated_text: The state government recently announced the guardian minister of the district. The government is facing criticism for this.
Justification: The phrase "टीका होत आहे" implies public dissatisfaction.

Text: निसर्गाचं काही कळेना, बेक्कार गरम होतंय आणि सोबत पाऊसही पडतोय.
translated_text: Nature is unpredictable, it's getting unbearably hot and raining at the same time.
Justification: Commentary on weather with neutral tone.

Text: माती तर खाल्लीच होती... आता शे....!!
translated_text: The soil had already been eaten... Now....!!
Justification: The abrupt end and ellipsis imply surprise or shock.

Text: अरे तुझ्याकडे कोण लक्ष तरी देतय का, कश्याला उगच बोंबलत असतोस या
translated_text: Hey, is anyone paying attention to you? Why are you always shouting like this?
Justification: "उगच बोंबलत" and questioning tone show disbelief and surprise.

Text: बरोबर. मात्र विदर्भाच्या दुरावस्थेला वैदर्भीय जनताच कारणीभूत आहे.
translated_text: True. However, the people of Vidarbha are responsible for the remoteness of Vidarbha.
Justification: Blame placed with a matter-of-fact tone.

Text: आणि टरबुज हे खुनशी, कपटी, कारस्थानी राजनीतीचे प्रातिनिधिक स्वरूप आहे
translated_text: And watermelon is a representative form of murderous, deceitful, and scheming politics.
Justification: Symbolic and critical, but tone stays calm.

Text: विभक्त झालेल्या वकील सुनेने नातीला भेटू दिले नाही, आजोबांची आत्महत्या
translated_text: Divorced lawyer's daughter-in-law did not allow him to meet his granddaughter, grandfather commits suicide
Justification: Tragic event explicitly conveying sadness.

Text: "चुकीचं केलं देवसेना त्या गद्दार सुतार ला वर्षावर नाही बाहेर चौकात कानफडायच होतं जनतेसमोर."
translated_text: Devasena did wrong. That traitor carpenter should have been punished in front of the people, not in the streets.
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" and "कानफडायच" reflects public anger.

Text: निर्लझ साल्याना आताच ठोकल् पाहिजे मग सुधरतील हे नीच
translated_text: Shameless Salyan should be beaten now, then these vile people will improve.
Justification: "ठोकल् पाहिजे", "नीच" reflect intense disgust.

Text: लवकरच रस्त्यानं दगडं मारत फिरताना दिसणार हे महाशय...
translated_text: Soon this gentleman will be seen walking around throwing stones on the road...
Justification: "दगडं मारत" expresses disgust toward behavior.

Text: जेवढं एडवीनाच्या लेहळुच तेवढं तरी नक्कीच असु शकतो समजल का सन-डासा.
translated_text: It can certainly be as much as Edwina's writings, you know, Sun-Dasa.
Justification: Wordplay without strong emotional tone.

Text: आज शेतकऱ्यांना प्रोत्साहन चे पन्नास हजार मिळाले तुम्ही बसले होते हलवत फाइल
translated_text: Today farmers received fifty thousand as incentive, you were sitting moving files.
Justification: Factual comparison; no overt emotion.

Text: गद्दार ते गद्दारच
translated_text: A traitor is always a traitor
Justification: Repetition of "गद्दार" expresses anger.

Text: ती कशी का पळेना... पळवनारे नीच
translated_text: The abductors are vile
Justification: Use of "नीच" denotes disgust.

Text: अजून इथेच अडकली आहेस का... गोदी मीडिया
translated_text: Still stuck here? Know Godi media?
Justification: Surprised tone with "अजून अडकली".

Text: गुंजन... रुमालाने गळा दाबून खून
translated_text: Gunjan strangled to death with handkerchief
Justification: Tragic incident showing sadness.

Text: तोंड बघा किती अशक्तपणा आला आहे
translated_text: See how weak your face is
Justification: "अशक्तपणा" used with disgust.

Text: सत्ता आली... साहेब मुली पळवायला मोकळे
translated_text: In power, boss free to abduct girls
Justification: Shocking implication, but stated plainly.

Text: पिंट्याचा सन्मान की चिडवणूक?
translated_text: Pintya honored or teased?
Justification: "चिडवत" indicates anger.

Text: सत्तर वर्षं मतापेढीचं राजकारण करणाऱ्या सरकारचा पोलिसांवर दबाव होता म्हणून ते निष्क्रिय झाले होते!
translated_text: The police had become inactive because the government was under pressure from vote-bank politics!
Justification: The term "मतापेढीचं राजकारण" conveys political frustration.

Text: हे साले कधीच सुधारणार नाही हरामखोर
translated_text: This guy will never get better, you bastard
Justification: "हरामखोर" is a slur that clearly expresses disgust.

Text: हा प्रकार करून शिंदे गटाने व ने स्वतः च्या पायावर धोंडा मारून घेतलाय का??
translated_text: Did Shinde group shoot itself in the foot by doing this?
Justification: The phrase "पायावर धोंडा मारून" is critical but neutral.

Text: आपण अजून ही जागे नाही झालो तर भगवान भी नही बचा सकता.
translated_text: If we are not awake yet, even God cannot save us.
Justification: The phrase "भगवान भी नही बचा सकता" implies hopelessness.

Text: का रे राणे, ट्विटस डिलीट करतोयस... सेलनी झापला वाटत तुला.
translated_text: Why are you deleting tweets, Rane? Seems you're afraid.
Justification: The phrase "ट्विटस डिलीट" reflects surprise and hesitation.

Text: किती वैफल्यग्रस्त, दुसऱ्यांचे आई - वडीलाला हिसकावून, आपल्या अनिष्टेचा राजकारण करायचे
translated_text: Snatching parents of others to politicize your misfortune.
Justification: The word "हिसकावून" implies aggression and frustration.

Text: जनतेच्या पाठीत खंजीर खुपसणे हे चांगले शिकले आहे काकांकडुन
translated_text: Learned well how to stab in the back from uncle.
Justification: The phrase "खंजीर खुपसणे" directly conveys betrayal and disgust.

Text: महाभरती कधी होणार आहे ,,,,लवकर म्हणजे आणखी किती दिवस
translated_text: When will Mahabharti happen, how many more days?
Justification: The word "लवकर" is temporal and non-emotional.

Text: राजस्थान या कांग्रेसशासित प्रदेश होता तो मिडिया विधवा विलाप करती
translated_text: Media would cry if it were Congress-ruled Rajasthan.
Justification: The phrase "विधवा विलाप" evokes emotional mourning.

Text: गेलेत तरी दिल्ली च्या मनाविरुद्ध पान तरी हलणार आहे का
translated_text: Even if you go, will you act against Delhi’s will?
Justification: The phrase "दिल्ली च्या मनाविरुद्ध" hints at control but not emotional.

Text: ठाकऱ्यांच्याच मोट्या चोळायच्या होत्या तर पहिले काय वाईट होते कमळाबाईसाठी
translated_text: If Thackeray's own money was to be taken, what was the harm in the first place for Kamalabai?
Justification: The phrase "मोट्या चोळायच्या" implies mockery but is contextually neutral.

Text: तुझ्या सारखी समजते का त्यांना दाखवल गाजर की तिथे जायला
translated_text: Do you think they'll go there if you show them the carrot?
Justification: The word "गाजर" refers metaphorically to manipulation but neutrally.

Text: हे काय जनतेला मुर्ख समजतात का?
translated_text: Do they think the public is stupid?
Justification: The word "मुर्ख" directly implies disgust towards perceived foolishness.

Text: सुंभ जळाला पण मराठी माणसाला कमी लेखण्याचा पिळ तसाच आहे
translated_text: Even if the wick is burnt, Marathi people are still underestimated.
Justification: The phrase "कमी लेखण्याचा" indicates slight but neutral in tone.

Text: कमी बोल रे तु तिथे होता का? प्रकरण काय?
translated_text: Speak less, were you there? What's the matter?
Justification: The phrase "कमी बोल" shows command, but not strong emotion.

Text: इथे काय सामान्य माणूस च कर भरणार का?
translated_text: Will a common man pay taxes here?
Justification: The phrase "सामान्य माणूस" reflects concern but is emotionally flat.

Text: तुम्ही करू नका पण असे कायपण बोलू नका
translated_text: Don’t say anything like that.
Justification: The phrase "कायपण बोलू नका" suggests strong disapproval.

Text: तुम्हालाच तीचा त्रास होणार!
translated_text: You’ll be the one who gets hurt!
Justification: The word "त्रास" conveys frustration and blame.

Text: रिप्लाय बघून मन भरल...
translated_text: My heart is full after reading the reply.
Justification: The phrase "मन भरल" reflects joy and satisfaction.

Text: हुकुमशाही आत्महत्या करते
translated_text: Dictatorship ends in suicide.
Justification: The word "हुकुमशाही" is critical, yet calmly stated.

Text: भाजप कडून किती खोके पोहचले
translated_text: How many boxes arrived from BJP?
Justification: The slang "खोके" refers to bribery, triggering surprise.

Text: आम्हाला हे नेतृत्व नको म्हणून बंड करण्याच्या तयारीत
translated_text: We are preparing to rebel because we don't want this leadership.
Justification: The term "बंड" implies disagreement without strong emotional charge.

Text: सदानकदा आपल्याला कोणीतरी उपेक्षेने मारून राहिले आहे, हे मराठी अस्मिता जपण्याचे मुख्य द्योतक आहे.
translated_text: The fact that someone has always ignored us is the main indicator of preserving Marathi identity.
Justification: The phrase "उपेक्षेने मारून" is reflective and ideologically neutral.

Text: नुसता पराभव नाही तर डिपॉझिट सुद्धा जप्त होणार म्हणून माघार
translated_text: Not only will they lose, but they will also forfeit their deposit, so they withdraw.
Justification: The term "जप्त" indicates loss but is stated in a neutral tone.

Text: न्यायालयात पराभव झाला तेंव्हाच यांचा पराभव झाला होता.. आता बिनविरोधच सोंग करत आहेत..
translated_text: They were defeated when they were defeated in court.. Now they are pretending to be unopposed..
Justification: The word "सोंग" implies fake behavior, leading to disgust.

Text: दिनो मोरया जय तुझ्या बापाची नजायज अवलाद आहे का
translated_text: Are you an illegitimate child of your father, Dino Morya?
Justification: The term "नजायज" is offensive but used as a factual insult without emotion classification.

Text: कोटी सोडा राजकारण्यांना कशाला हवी पेंशन? राजकारण ही काय नोकरी आहे का?
translated_text: Why should politicians get pensions? Is politics a job?
Justification: The phrase "पेंशन" is questioned critically but remains neutral.

Text: कोरोना संकटात राज्या ऐवजी केंद्र सरकारच्या निधीमधे देणगी देणारे भुरटे हे बोलत आहेत...
translated_text: Donating to central fund instead of state during Corona crisis...
Justification: The term "भुरटे" implies criticism, but tone remains factual.

Text: राज यांनी आपली गमावली आहे. अयोध्या दौरा आणि भाजपा वरची टीका बंध करून.
translated_text: Raj lost his momentum after stopping the Ayodhya tour and BJP criticism.
Justification: The word "गमावली" shows loss but not emotional emphasis.

Text: हे सगळे समर्थकांना संभ्रमात टाकणारे आहे.
translated_text: This confuses supporters.
Justification: The word "संभ्रमात" indicates confusion, tone is neutral.

Text: अतिशय पावसानं भात शेती सडली आहे कशाला स्वतः ची इज्जत सडवता.
translated_text: Rice fields are rotten, why ruin your dignity?
Justification: The word "इज्जत सडवता" shows disgust.

Text: ते अजित दादांना गृहमंत्री पद का नाही दिलं पात्रता नव्हती का ?
translated_text: Why wasn't Ajit Dada given Home Minister post?
Justification: The word "पात्रता" questions qualification, showing surprise.

Text: तुम्ही कसे खेळता याची तुम्हाला लाज वाटते का?
translated_text: Are you ashamed of how you play?
Justification: The word "लाज" (ashamed) reflects disapproval or disgust.

Text: होता म्हणजे ? गेला की काय ?
translated_text: Was it? Did it go or what?
Justification: The phrase "गेला की काय" is a surprised expression.

Text: पण मुली शोधतांना त्रास होतो नंतर हे अत्यंत वेदनादायक असतं
translated_text: Searching for girls later becomes painful
Justification: The word "वेदनादायक" (painful) conveys sadness.

Text: आधी लुटायचा मस्त आणि हे नाटक करायची.
translated_text: First robbed happily, then played this drama
Justification: The phrase "नाटक करायची" implies pretension, used flatly.

Text: अर्थ गणित हे तुझ्या डोक्या बाहेरच आहे!
translated_text: Arithmetic is out of your understanding!
Justification: The phrase "डोक्या बाहेर" implies confusion, but is neutrally stated.

Text: हे अत्यंत दुर्दैवी आहे. विद्यार्थ्यांना न्याय मिळाला पाहिजे.
translated_text: This is very unfortunate. Students deserve justice.
Justification: "दुर्दैवी" reflects deep sadness.

Text: गृहमंत्री काय उपटताय का कोणाच्या भात्या
translated_text: Whose rice is the Home Minister uprooting?
Justification: "उपटताय" used in rhetorical tone, neutral.

Text: नितेश राणे नाही हा, हा नितेश थापा आहे.
translated_text: Not Nitesh Rane, this is Nitesh Thapa
Justification: "थापा" reflects name-based wordplay, neutral.

Text: आयुष्य पुन्हा पुन्हा मिळत नाही... आयुष्याची किंमत...
translated_text: Life isn’t repeated. People don’t value it.
Justification: "किंमत" implies life’s neglected value.

Text: नुसते ट्रोलिंग म्हणजे राजकारण नाही रे .
translated_text: Trolling isn’t politics
Justification: "ट्रोलिंग" criticizes behavior, but neutrally.

Text: तुम्ही विझलेले दिवे परत का फडफडताय
translated_text: Why are you rekindling the extinguished lights?
Justification: "विझलेले दिवे" symbolizes something past unexpectedly revived.

Text: ज्याचे पळून गेले तो सल्ले देणार का...
translated_text: Will the one who ran away give advice?
Justification: "पळून गेले" used critically but flatly.

Text: सेनेमध्ये असताना कधी यांना अभिवादन केले का
translated_text: Did they ever salute when in Sena?
Justification: "अभिवादन" used in rhetorical neutrality.

Text: मग मी काही वेगळं बोललो का?
translated_text: Did I say anything different?
Justification: "वेगळं बोललो" rhetorical but neutral.

Text: त्याची गरज नाही पडणार हे सरकार कोसळणार
translated_text: No need, this government will fall
Justification: "कोसळणार" predicts collapse with sorrow.

Text: आनलेत का इथेही मधात हींदु?
translated_text: Did Hindus meddle here too?
Justification: "मधात" used rhetorically but flat.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार पुन्हा चव्हाट्यावर... ढेकणांच काहीतरी करा
translated_text: Corruption exposed again, do something about the pests.
Justification: "ढेकणांच" is pejorative for incompetents.

Text: येवधा पुळका मागल्या वर्षात येत न्हवता
translated_text: Such sentiment wasn't seen last year
Justification: "पुळका" implies fake sentiment, neutral.

Text: माघार घ्यायची होती मग उमेदवार पळवण्याचा प्रयत्न का केला?
translated_text: Why try to run candidate if withdrawing?
Justification: "कपटी" expresses betrayal and anger.

Text: म्हणून एवढा भ्रष्टाचार आहे
translated_text: That's why there is so much corruption.
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचार" directly signals disgust at the system.

Text: साहेबांबद्दल अस बोलताना लाज नाही वाटत का
translated_text: No shame talking like this about elder?
Justification: "लाज" signals moral disgust.

Text: मुर्जीचि भुर्जी होणार म्हणून घेतली माघार
translated_text: Withdrew fearing defeat.
Justification: "भुर्जी" as metaphor, neutral sarcasm.

Text: त्यांनी बाप काढला होता काल
translated_text: He lost his father yesterday.
Justification: "बाप काढला" represents personal loss.

Text: दरवर्षीच होतं, तुम्ही काय नवीन केलं
translated_text: This happens every year. What's new?
Justification: "खिशातून दिले" is rhetorical neutrality.

Text: असल्या गटार तोंड्या वाचाळ प्रवक्त्या
translated_text: Mouthy spokespersons
Justification: "गटार तोंड्या" is insult expressing disgust.

Text: शिंदे कडून व्हीजन ची अपेक्षा करणं म्हणजे अतिच
translated_text: Expecting vision is too much.
Justification: "अतिच" conveys excess, flatly.

Text: नवं चिन्ह मिळालं खरं पण उद्धव ठाकरेंची डोकेदुखी वाढली!
translated_text: It's true they got a new symbol, but Thackeray's headache increased!
Justification: "डोकेदुखी" reveals surprise or worry due to new developments.

Text: हा निखिल वागल्या तर कम्युनिस्ट निघाला
translated_text: Nikhil turned out to be a communist.
Justification: "कम्युनिस्ट" is a labeling term, neutrally stated.

Text: हा डोक्यातला अंधार आहे
translated_text: This is the darkness in the head.
Justification: "अंधार" used as metaphor for ignorance.

Text: भाजपच्या पायाखालची जमीन सरकली
translated_text: Ground beneath BJP’s feet shifted.
Justification: "जमीन सरकली" implies change in power dynamics.

Text: हे लाॅजीक जबरदस्त आहे
translated_text: This logic is overwhelming.
Justification: "लाॅजीक" is emphasized neutrally.

Text: हिंमतच नाय होत तिकडे जायची
translated_text: No courage to go there.
Justification: "हिंमतच नाय" expresses timidness neutrally.

Text: इंदोरला दोनदा जाणं झालं
translated_text: Went to Indore twice.
Justification: Factual, neutral.

Text: कोणता शब्द चुकीचा आहे सांगता का जरा?
translated_text: Could you please tell me which word is wrong?
Justification: The sentence is an inquiry without emotional tone.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंचे गर्वहरण केले
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray’s pride was taken away.
Justification: The word "गर्वहरण" (robbed of pride) conveys strong disgust.

Text: तुझी लायकी नाही
translated_text: You don’t deserve it.
Justification: The word "लायकी" is an insult implying anger.

Text: आग लावायचा विचार
translated_text: Thinking about setting fire?
Justification: "आग लावायचा" is a surprising metaphor.

Text: सोज्वळ अन उद्धव?
translated_text: Sojwal and Uddhav?
Justification: "सोज्वळ" and question tone show incredulous surprise.

Text: सरकारने लोकभावना समजुन घ्यावी
translated_text: Government should understand public sentiment.
Justification: "लोकभावना" is civic but not emotionally charged.

Text: गेली वर्षे का नाही घेतली
translated_text: Why not taken last year?
Justification: The questioning tone and "का नाही" shows irritation.

Text: शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना कोटी कोटी नमन
translated_text: Salute to martyrs.
Justification: "हुतात्म्यांना" evokes sadness and reverence.

Text: या भडव्याला शेतातल काही माहिती तरी आहे का ?
translated_text: Does this fool have any knowledge of the field?
Justification: The word "भडव्याला" conveys strong insult and anger.

Text: येड्याचा बाजार अन खूळ्याची जत्रा हा प्रकार चालू आहे महाराष्ट्रात.
translated_text: The Yedacha Bazaar and Khulachi Jatra are ongoing in Maharashtra.
Justification: "येड्याचा बाजार" is satirical but contextually neutral.

Text: चकमक होते तेव्हा अंगाला दुखापत होतेच
translated_text: Collisions always cause bodily harm.
Justification: "अंगाला दुखापत" refers to physical injury neutrally.

Text: भीती वाटायला लागली आहे भाऊ
translated_text: Starting to feel scared, brother.
Justification: The word "भीती" directly conveys fear.

Text: मावळच्या जनतेने तुम्हाला जागा दाखवली
translated_text: The people of Maval showed your place.
Justification: "जागा दाखवली" is assertive but neutral.

Text: किती पण खोटं बोलायचं का
translated_text: Why lie so much?
Justification: "खोटं बोलायचं" reflects frustration and anger.

Text: एकाच शाळेचे विद्यार्थी दिसतात
translated_text: Look like students of same school.
Justification: "विद्यार्थी" — casual metaphor with neutral tone.

Text: ते कुत्रेही मोठ्या साहेबांचे वफादार होते.. वडापाव सारखे गद्दार नव्हते
translated_text: Even the dogs were loyal... not traitors like Vadapav.
Justification: The phrase "वडापाव सारखे गद्दार" implies insult but remains politically neutral.

Text: जातीवाद पण आहे थरूर मध्ये
translated_text: There is casteism in Tharoor too.
Justification: The word "जातीवाद" conveys a claim but stays factually neutral.

Text: आज पासून परत भक्तांवर लक्ष केंद्रीत करणार
translated_text: Will focus on devotees again from today.
Justification: The term "भक्तांवर लक्ष" implies strategy, neutral in tone.

Text: नाटक करूनही सहानुभूती नाही मिळणार
translated_text: Even after acting, sympathy won't be gained.
Justification: A neutral statement as it observes a fact without strong emotion.

Text: हा बुआ येडा आहे.
translated_text: This guy is crazy.
Justification: The word "येड़ा" (crazy) is used casually and does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: अर्धवट ग्रुपचा नेता आहे हा
translated_text: He is the leader of an incomplete group.
Justification: The phrase "अर्धवट" (incomplete) is slightly mocking but lacks strong sentiment.

Text: खरंय पण जनतेतला हा राग मतांमध्ये करायला पाहिजे सेने ने
translated_text: True, but the Sena should channel this anger among the people into votes.
Justification: The word "राग" conveys a strong emotion of anger.

Text: हे सगळे येणार का लग्नाला
translated_text: Will all of these people come to the wedding?
Justification: The word "लग्नाला" is situationally neutral.

Text: कोण नाही बोललं का?
translated_text: Who said no?
Justification: The question "कोण नाही बोललं" shows mild surprise.

Text: आधी योजना आणली आणि नंतर प्रचार करताय
translated_text: First come up with a plan and then promote it.
Justification: The word "प्रचार" indicates a neutral political statement.

Text: हो आता देवा च्या भरवशावरच जगाच.
translated_text: Now we must live with God’s trust.
Justification: The word "भरवशावर" expresses faith, leaning neutral.

Text: इतभराच हातभर होण्याच्या अगोदर ईलाज केलेला बरं नव्ह का
translated_text: Treatment should have been done earlier.
Justification: The word "ईलाज" is clinical and neutral.

Text: राष्ट्रवादीच्या सिलॅबस आणि अजेंडा वरच ऊबाठा सेने मध्ये काम करत
translated_text: Working in Sena on NCP’s agenda.
Justification: The phrase "अजेंडा वरच" is factual and neutral.

Text: नागपूरकराणा विचार येत आहे... कोणता पाऊस आहे हा
translated_text: Nagpurkarana is thinking — what kind of rain is this?
Justification: The phrase "पाऊस आहे हा" questions weather conditions neutrally.

Text: केसगळती का होते? जाणून घ्या कारणं आणि उपाय!
translated_text: Why does hair fall happen? Know causes and solutions!
Justification: "का होते?" expresses curiosity and surprise.

Text: अमोल साहेब रुमण्याचा प्रसाद नाही मनायच रूमण्याचा हाबाडा मानायच आणि तो अमी देणार
translated_text: Not to celebrate Rumna’s prasad, but accept the dhabaad, says Ami.
Justification: "रूमण्याचा हाबाडा" is a colloquial expression with no strong emotion.

Text: बाहेरच्या लोकांनी शिव्या दिल्यावर चालतील का?
translated_text: Will it work if outsiders curse?
Justification: "शिव्या दिल्यावर" is situational and framed as a question.

Text: का तुम्हाला काही अडचण आहे का
translated_text: Do you have any problem?
Justification: "अडचण" is mentioned hypothetically.

Text: सत्तेपेक्षा लोकसेवेला महत्व देणारे म्हणजे देवेंद्रजी
translated_text: Devendraji values public service over power.
Justification: "लोकसेवेला महत्व" shows principle, not emotion.

Text: नोव्हेंबरपासून दूध स्विकारले जाणार नाही....
translated_text: Milk won’t be accepted from November.
Justification: "स्विकारले जाणार नाही" suggests a loss.

Text: कुठून आणला होता रात्रीचा माल
translated_text: Where did you get the dinner goods from?
Justification: "रात्रीचा माल" is an inquiry, emotionally flat.

Text: चांगल काम करा म्हणजे ची गरज भासणार नाही.
translated_text: Do a good job and you won't need it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic advice ("चांगल काम करा") without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगल काम करा" (do a good job) indicates a suggestion rather than expressing any particular emotion.

Text: मि एक कट्टर राजनीतिविरोधक आहे पन आता उद्धव ठाकरे सोबत आहे ।
translated_text: I am a staunch political opponent, but now I am with Uddhav Thackeray.
Justification: The sentence expresses a shift in allegiance. While the person identifies as a "कट्टर राजनीतिविरोधक" (staunch political opponent), suggesting potential negative sentiment towards politics in general, the phrase "आता उद्धव ठाकरे सोबत आहे" (now I am with Uddhav Thackeray) indicates a current state of support, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे माझ्यावर नाराज नाही होणार ते....!! असंच ना.....??
translated_text: So he won't be angry with me....!! Isn't that right...??
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and seeks confirmation, mitigating any strong sentiment. While the underlying emotion is "anger" (presumably related to the potential anger of the person being discussed), the phrase "नाराज नाही होणार ते....!! असंच ना.....??" (naraz nahi honar te....!! asach na...?? - won't be angry with me...!! Isn't that right...??) indicates a desire to avoid anger and seeks reassurance, leading to a neutral sentiment score.

Text: बुडीत खोल जाते पण बिनधारेची तलवार! साहेबाला विचार हवं तर!
translated_text: The sword goes deep into the depths, but it is an edgeless sword! If you want to think, sir!
Justification: The assigned disgust stems from the phrase "बिनधारेची तलवार" (bindharechi talwar), meaning "edgeless sword." This implies ineffectiveness and uselessness, evoking a feeling of disgust.

Text: वर्ष जुन्या गाड्या रस्त्यावर बंद केल्या तरी गर्दी कमी होईल
translated_text: Even if old cars are banned from the roads, the crowd will decrease.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical scenario and its potential outcome (reducing crowd) without strong positive or negative language. The neutral sentiment is driven by the overall tone of the sentence, lacking explicit positive or negative indicators; the phrase "वर्ष जुन्या गाड्या रस्त्यावर बंद केल्या तरी गर्दी कमी होईल" (even if old cars are banned from the roads, the crowd will decrease) simply proposes a solution and its potential impact.

Text: ऊस पण आहे का सरांचा
translated_text: Do you have sugarcane too, sir?
Justification: The sentence is a polite question. The Marathi words "पण" (pan) meaning "also" and "सरांचा" (sarancha) meaning "sir's" (respectful form) indicate a neutral and polite inquiry.

Text: तुमचे नाव चोरमरे का पडले असेल याचा मी विचार करतोय...
translated_text: I'm wondering why you might have been named Chormare...
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and mild surprise due to the unusual nature of the surname "चोरमरे" (Chormare) and the speaker's expressed contemplation, "विचार करतोय..." (vichar kartoy... - I'm wondering...). The surname itself, implying "thief-killer" or related concept, is what elicits the emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना जेल मध्ये पाठवणाऱ्या लोकांसमोर हा मिंधा उदो बाळ झुकला
translated_text: This humble boy bowed down before the people who sent Balasaheb to jail.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is disgust due to the word "मिंधा" (mindha), which translates to "humble" or "submissive" but carries a heavily sarcastic and derogatory connotation in this context, implying weakness and lack of spine.

Text: तुमच्या तक्रारींचे काय होते ते बघू   ऑक्टोबर   दिवसांवर आहे
translated_text: Let's see what happens to your complaints. It's October.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly expresses a statement of intent ("बघू") to look into the complaints and a factual mention of the month ("ऑक्टोबर"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment conveyed.

Text: मुळात पाकिस्तान हा देश नाही हा एक विचार आहे त्यांच्या साठी
translated_text: Basically, Pakistan is not a country, it's an idea for them.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a factual or opinion-based perspective without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "एक विचार आहे" (ek vichar aahe) - "it's an idea" contributes to the neutrality by presenting a concept rather than an evaluation.

Text: दक्षिण अफ्रिका नव्हे ही तर ‘क्षीण’अफ्रिका
translated_text: This is not South Africa, but 'weak' Africa.
Justification: The Marathi word "क्षीण" (ksheen), meaning weak, while potentially negative in other contexts, doesn't evoke a strong positive or negative sentiment here. It's used more descriptively than emotively, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: माझ्यापेक्षा वयाने आणि अनुभवाने मोठे असाल तुम्ही म्हणून आदराने सर म्हणालो.
translated_text: I respectfully addressed you as "Sir," as you are older and more experienced than me.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the Marathi phrase "आदराने सर म्हणालो" (adraane sar mhanalo), meaning "I respectfully addressed you as Sir," indicates politeness and respect without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. The other words, regarding the addressee being older and more experienced, provide context but do not influence the neutral sentiment.

Text: ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते तेच म्हणत असतात महाराष्ट्राची ही संस्कृती नाही
translated_text: Only those who have their hands full of wounds say this is not the culture of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a statement about a particular group's perspective ("ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते तेच म्हणत असतात"), without expressing positive or negative emotion. The Marathi phrase "ज्यांची हातभर फाटलेली असते" describes a group (those with wounds), but doesn't inherently carry sentiment.

Text: भुसे साहेब दुसरी कडे गर्दी जमावता नाही येत का शिंदे साहेबांना,
translated_text: Bhuse Saheb, can't Shinde Saheb gather a crowd on the other side?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question or statement about the ability of Shinde Saheb to gather a crowd, and is therefore neutral. No specific word or phrase conveys any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: मी देव मानत नाही
translated_text: I don't believe in God.
Justification: The sentence expresses disbelief ("मानत नाही") in God, which is a factual statement rather than an expression of positive or negative sentiment. The neutral sentiment is due to the phrase "मानत नाही" (don't believe), which simply indicates a lack of belief without conveying any particular emotion.

Text: ती पण अशीच होती.
translated_text: She was like that too.
Justification: The sentence "ती पण अशीच होती" expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact or observation. There are no words indicating positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "अशीच होती" (ashich hoti - was like that) is descriptive and doesn't carry any inherent emotional charge.

Text: सही पकडे है... हे भटखळकर, चित्रा वाघ यांच्या पोस्टवर पण येऊ द्या
translated_text: Got it... Hey Bhatkhalkar, let's also come to Chitra Wagh's post
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it mainly consists of factual statements ("सही पकडे है", "हे भटखळकर", "चित्रा वाघ यांच्या पोस्टवर पण येऊ द्या"). There is no explicit expression of positive or negative feeling. The phrase "सही पकडे है" (Got it) is observational and does not inherently carry a strong sentiment.

Text: त्यांना उत्तर पोहचले आहे. नवीन चिन्हाच्या शोधात आहेत ते.
translated_text: They have reached the answer. They are looking for a new symbol.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual update ("उत्तर पोहचले आहे" - the answer has reached) and a statement of action ("नवीन चिन्हाच्या शोधात आहेत ते" - they are looking for a new symbol) without any explicit emotional cues. The phrases are descriptive and informational, not expressing any positivity, negativity, or specific emotion.

Text: मंत्रीला माहीत नाही का ? महापालिका आता राज्यशासन चालवत आहे मुदत संपल्यामुळे ?
translated_text: Doesn't the minister know? The municipal corporation is now running the state government because its term has expired?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is primarily a factual inquiry. The phrase "माहीत नाही का ?" (Doesn't know?) indicates a question rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. While potentially hinting at criticism, it is delivered as a question, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: जाणार पण नाही त्यापुढे..,
translated_text: I will go but not further than that..,
Justification: The sentence expresses a limited commitment with "जाणार पण नाही" (jaNaar paN naahi), indicating a lack of strong feeling and thus a neutral sentiment.

Text: ला माहित तरी होत का...की ते होणार आहेत..??
translated_text: Did you even know...that they were going to happen..??
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the rhetorical question and implied lack of awareness, indicated by "ला माहित तरी होत का...की" (la mahit tari hot ka...ki), which translates to "Did you even know...that".

Text: विषय आहे महागाईचा आणि आपण काय बोलताय. सामान्य जनता यात होरपळून निघत आहे.
translated_text: The topic is inflation and what we are talking about. The common people are getting scared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about inflation and its impact on people. While there's a hint of concern, it lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सामान्य जनता यात होरपळून निघत आहे" (the common people are getting scared) describes a situation, but doesn't explicitly convey a sentiment beyond a neutral observation.

Text: हा ये करलो पेहले....
translated_text: This is what I did...
Justification: The sentence "हा ये करलो पेहले...." is largely neutral because it's a simple statement of fact. The Marathi portion "हा" (yes/this) and the Hindi/Marathi hybrid "करलो पेहले" (did this before) doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: # टाकणारच होते  पण म्हटलं जाऊदे.
translated_text: # I was going to post this but let me say it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "जाऊदे" (jaude), which implies letting something go or dismissing it, suggesting a lack of strong positive or negative feeling. While the initial part suggests an intention to post, the "jaude" indicates a change of mind or acceptance, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: हा माझा आहे का
translated_text: Is this mine?
Justification: The sentence "हा माझा आहे का" is a simple question of ownership, lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: तुझ्याकडे तुझा फोटो आहे का खरा तो लाव ना
translated_text: Do you have a photo of yourself? Post it.
Justification: The sentence is a simple request and lacks any emotionally charged words. It translates to "Do you have your photo? Post it." No specific Marathi word or phrase indicates positive, negative, or emotional sentiment.

Text: गद्दारी करताना आपल्याला ते समजले नाही का आता लोकांना शहाणपण नका शिकवू
translated_text: Didn't we understand that when we betrayed them? Now let's not teach people wisdom.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while the sentence expresses betrayal ("गद्दारी") and a dismissive tone ("शहाणपण नका शिकवू"), it's delivered in a questioning, almost resigned manner, lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The overall impact is more of a statement of fact and implied criticism rather than a display of strong emotion.

Text: आधी होणार आहे कि नाही याची ग्यारंटी नाही
translated_text: There is no guarantee that it will happen first.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and lack of assurance, indicated by the phrase "ग्यारंटी नाही" (guarantee nahi - no guarantee), leading to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a factual absence of guarantee without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्या घुघंट घालतात .. दोन्ही सारखेच नाही का वाटत तुम्हाला ?
translated_text: They wear a ghughanta.. Don't you think both are the same?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly describes an action ("घुघंट घालतात" - wear ghughanta) and poses a question about similarity ("सारखेच नाही का वाटत" - don't you think both are the same?) without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: हिंदुत्ववादी सरकार नवरात्री मधे दारूची दुकाने बंद ठेवणार आहे का ?
translated_text: Will the Hindutva government keep liquor shops closed during Navratri?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a potential policy decision ("दारूची दुकाने बंद ठेवणार आहे का?") and does not contain overtly positive or negative language, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री शिंदे यांची पंतप्रधानांकडे पत्राद्वारे 'ही' मागणी
translated_text: Chief Minister Shinde's 'this' demand in a letter to the Prime Minister
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: Chief Minister Shinde made a 'this' demand ('ही मागणी') to the Prime Minister through a letter. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the action itself. The phrase "ही मागणी" is a general reference to a demand, and without further context, does not express any specific sentiment.

Text: ही जेन्ट्स हुडी आहे
translated_text: This is a gents hoodie.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("ही जेन्ट्स हुडी आहे" - This is a gents hoodie) with no inherently positive or negative connotations. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase present that expresses any sentiment or emotion.

Text: बाई तुम्ही तुम्हाचे बघा तुम्हाला का मिर्ची लागते
translated_text: Woman, look at yourself, why do you need chili?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "तुम्हाला का मिर्ची लागते" (tumhala ka mirchi lagte), while potentially confrontational, is a common idiom meaning "why are you so bothered?" or "why are you feeling the heat?". It doesn't necessarily convey strong positive or negative sentiment on its own without further context.

Text: तात्या सर काय म्हणती ही बघा जरा...
translated_text: See what Tatya sir says...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply an observation or a request to observe what "Tatya sir" is saying. The phrase "काय म्हणती ही बघा जरा..." (kay mhanti hi bagha zara...), meaning "see what he says," is a neutral request for information.

Text: वेगवान गोलंदाज पॅट कमिन्स हा ऑस्ट्रेलियाचा नवा एकदिवसीय कर्णधार असणार आहे.
translated_text: Fast bowler Pat Cummins will be Australia's new ODI captain.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative opinions. The sentence "वेगवान गोलंदाज पॅट कमिन्स हा ऑस्ट्रेलियाचा नवा एकदिवसीय कर्णधार असणार आहे" contains factual information about Pat Cummins becoming Australia's ODI captain, with no sentiment expressed.

Text: जेव्हा सम्राट अशोक होते तेव्हा एक ही मुस्लिमच ची हिम्मत झाली नाही.
translated_text: When Emperor Ashoka was king, not a single Muslim dared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a historical observation without explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जेव्हा सम्राट अशोक होते तेव्हा एक ही मुस्लिमच ची हिम्मत झाली नाही" simply states a lack of Muslim daring during Ashoka's reign, lacking emotional inflection. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: हा महाराष्ट्र आहे आमचा , गुजरात नाही . गुजरात ला जायचं
translated_text: This is our Maharashtra, not Gujarat. I want to go to Gujarat.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of belonging and a desire to travel, with no inherently positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हा महाराष्ट्र आहे आमचा" (this is our Maharashtra) simply states affiliation.

Text: म्हणून मी घरातून अजुन बाहेर नाही आलो....
translated_text: So I haven't left the house yet...
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("म्हणून मी घरातून अजुन बाहेर नाही आलो...") without any explicit emotional indicators. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is justified as there are no words or phrases conveying positivity, negativity, joy, sadness, anger, or any other identifiable emotion. The phrase "बाहेर नाही आलो" (haven't left) simply describes an action not taken, rather than expressing a feeling about it.

Text: तरीही मालकाकडे सुरक्षा मागितली होती...आणि आता तर ब्लॅक बेल्ट!
translated_text: Still, I asked the owner for protection...and now I have a black belt!
Justification: The phrase "आणि आता तर ब्लॅक बेल्ट!" ("and now I have a black belt!") expresses surprise because it implies an unexpected positive development after initially seeking protection, indicating a newfound self-sufficiency. The "आता तर" (now, even) emphasizes this unexpectedness.

Text: सुप्रीम लिडर मोदीजी पण या लोकांना घाबरतात मग शिंदे कुठं लागलं...
translated_text: Supreme Leader Modiji is also afraid of these people, so where is Shinde?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a rhetorical question ("शिंदे कुठं लागलं...") implying a comparison and questioning someone's standing, without exhibiting explicitly positive or negative feelings. There's no inherently positive or negative word, making it sentimentally neutral.

Text: आज नवरात्रीचा पहिला दिवस, अशी करा देवी शैलपुत्रीची पूजा
translated_text: Today is the first day of Navratri, worship Goddess Shailputri like this
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about the start of Navratri and a suggestion on how to worship. There are no inherently positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "आज नवरात्रीचा पहिला दिवस" (aaj navratricha pahila diwas - today is the first day of Navratri) is a statement of fact.

Text: आमच्या येथील सार्वजनिक शौचालयं साफ होत नाहीत वेळेवर.. प्रयत्न केला तर बरं होईल
translated_text: Our public toilets here are not cleaned on time.. It would be better if we tried.
Justification: The phrase "साफ होत नाहीत" (saaf hot nahit - are not cleaned) indicates a negative state, contributing to the disgust emotion as it describes an unpleasant situation.

Text: तास कष्ट करून हा फोटो मिळाला.. भाया, आर्थिक मदत अपेक्षित आहे
translated_text: I got this photo after hours of hard work.. Brother, financial help is expected.
Justification: The phrase "तास कष्ट करून" (taas kasht karun - after hours of hard work) suggests effort and subsequent achievement, potentially linked to the joy emotion, though the overall sentiment is neutral as the request for help balances this out.

Text: होय असे बऱ्याचदा होते
translated_text: Yes, that often happens.
Justification: The sentence expresses a common occurrence without strong positive or negative connotations. The phrase "होय असे बऱ्याचदा होते" simply acknowledges a frequent event and doesn't carry any significant sentiment or emotional weight, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: ही पण रिझवी कॉलेज ला गेलेली का....
translated_text: Did she also go to Rizvi College?...
Justification: The sentence "ही पण रिझवी कॉलेज ला गेलेली का...." is neutral because it is simply a question, lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases. The question word "का" (ka - meaning "why" or in this case, used to form a question) doesn't inherently carry any sentiment.

Text: आता तुम्हीच साहेबांचा अपमान करायला लागल्यावर कसं होणार
translated_text: Now what will happen when you start insulting the boss?
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the phrase "अपमान करायला लागल्यावर कसं होणार" (apman karayla laglyavar kasa honar), which conveys a sense of dismay and disapproval regarding the disrespect towards the boss. The implication of negative consequences further reinforces the disgust emotion and a neutral sentiment.

Text: आता महाविद्यालयेच ठरवणार अभ्यासक्रम; ची सुधारित नियमांना मंजुरी
translated_text: Now colleges will decide the curriculum; revised rules approved
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a change in college regulations ("आता महाविद्यालयेच ठरवणार अभ्यासक्रम; ची सुधारित नियमांना मंजुरी"), lacking any emotionally charged or subjective language, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुला पण वेदु    चे   कधी होणार यावर फोकस कर
translated_text: Focus on when Vedu will be yours too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or direction ("फोकस कर" - focus) without inherently positive or negative connotations, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: या छळातूनच नव्या क्रांतीच्या ठिणग्या उडतील; सेनेच्या ढाण्या वाघाचे आईला कोठडीतून पत्र
translated_text: This torture will spark a new revolution; Army's Dhana Wagh's letter to his mother from custody
Justification: "छळातून" (chhalatun), meaning "from torture," evokes disgust due to the implication of suffering and injustice, contributing to the negative emotional response. The sentence lacks a clear positive or negative leaning when considering overall sentiment, yielding a value of 0.0

Text: कपिवा हेअर केअर ज्यूस वापरकर्त्यांची केसगळती कमी करण्यास कशी मदत करते ते इथे वाचा.
translated_text: Read here how Kapiva Hair Care Juice helps users reduce hair loss.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply informative and descriptive, stating a fact that one can read about the Kapiva Hair Care Juice. The phrase "कशी मदत करते ते इथे वाचा" (kashi madat karte te ithe vacha - read here how it helps) is a neutral statement prompting the reader to find out more, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाजप मध्ये घराणेशाही नाही बर बर का....
translated_text: There is no dynasty in BJP, why not...
Justification: The phrase "बर बर का...." ("bar bar ka....") indicates mild affirmation or a rhetorical question, neutralizing any potential sentiment.

Text: नंबर या बारकोड
translated_text: Number or barcode
Justification: The sentence simply lists options ("Number or barcode"), and lacks any emotional or opinionated language. The neutral sentiment is driven by the absence of any sentiment-bearing Marathi words or phrases; "नंबर" (number), "या" (or), and "बारकोड" (barcode) are all objective terms.

Text: आमचा लोकशाहीवर विश्वास आहे, याचे कारण आमच्या सर्वांच्या हातात विकासाची मशाल आहे
translated_text: We believe in democracy because we all have the torch of development in our hands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a belief in democracy and the idea of collective progress ("विकासाची मशाल आहे"), which is factual and aspirational, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe, meaning "believe in") indicates a statement of belief, which, in this context, does not inherently carry a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे कळण्यासाठी माणसात थोडीतरी प्रगल्भता असावी लागते
translated_text: One needs to have some depth to understand this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a requirement of maturity or understanding without overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "प्रगल्भता असावी लागते" (pragalbhata asavi lagate - needs to have depth/maturity) indicates a necessary quality for comprehension, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: जर्मनीच्या शांतीदुतांचे निवेदन जाहीर कराल का? म्हणजे जनतेला सुध्दा दिसेल.
translated_text: Will you make the statement of the German peace envoys public? So that the public can see it too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple request for information. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase; it simply asks "जर्मनीच्या शांतीदुतांचे निवेदन जाहीर कराल का?" (Will you make the statement of the German peace envoys public?).

Text: तुमच्या करता तो सेटलमेंट चा वारसा असतो म्हणे खरं आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it true that you say it is a legacy of settlement?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and uncertain tone conveyed by "म्हणे खरं आहे का ?" which translates to "is it true?". This indicates a query or a report of hearsay rather than a statement of fact or feeling.

Text: : टीम इंडियाला मिळणार नवा उपकर्णधार, रोहितच्या जागी हा खेळाडू करणार नेतृत्व
translated_text: : Team India will get a new vice-captain, this player will lead in place of Rohit
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event, "टीम इंडियाला मिळणार नवा उपकर्णधार" (Team India will get a new vice-captain), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: दडपशाही विरूद्ध सर्वपक्षानी एकत्र येणे क्रमपात्र आहे
translated_text: It is imperative for all parties to unite against oppression.
Justification: The sentence expresses a necessary action against oppression, focusing on unity ("एकत्र येणे") rather than expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विरुद्ध दडपशाही" (against oppression) describes the context, but the sentence itself is a statement of necessity and action, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही का हवा आणि देता
translated_text: Why do you want and give?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral question ("तुम्ही का हवा आणि देता?"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed within the Marathi words themselves.

Text: आता खरी बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना ढाल तलवारीने लढणार
translated_text: Now the real Balasaheb's Shiv Sena will fight with its shield and sword.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about how the Shiv Sena intends to fight, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. No specific Marathi word indicates strong sentiment.

Text: प्रो कबड्डी लीग नवव्या हंगामाच्या तारखा जाहीर, या तीन शहरांमध्ये होणार सामने
translated_text: Pro Kabaddi League ninth season dates announced, matches will be held in these three cities
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply announces the Pro Kabaddi League's dates and locations. There's no inherently positive or negative wording; it's factual information. The phrase "तारखा जाहीर" (tarakha jahir - dates announced) is a neutral statement of fact.

Text: ताई सुरेश भटांची कविता आहे.
translated_text: It is a poem by Tai Suresh Bhat.
Justification: The sentence is a simple statement of fact. There are no words or phrases that express positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is merely identifying the authorship of a poem; therefore the sentiment is neutral. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase that pushes the sentiment in any direction.

Text: दुपारी गल्लीत चर्चा सुरु असतांना मी हेच मत व्यक्त केले होते…
translated_text: I expressed this opinion this afternoon when the discussion was going on in the street...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of emotionally charged words. The Marathi phrase "चर्चा सुरु असतांना" (charcha suru astanna - discussion was going on) simply describes a situation without indicating any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आणि ही तू पण ऑर्डर करू शकते
translated_text: And you can order this too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement about ordering something. The word "ऑर्डर करू शकते" (order karu shakte) indicates a possibility or capability, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: कोणत्याही परिस्थितीत ही गोष्ट विसरायची नाही...!

Text: स्वातंत्र्यवीर सावरकर म्हणत असत की ,हिंदू धर्म परिवर्तन म्हणजे राष्ट्र परिवर्तन

Text: जादू करतात असे वाटायचे

Text: च्या विलीनिकारणावर बोलेल काय हा गुण वर्ते

Text: दादा, जो हिंदी भाषिक नाही तो हिंदू नाही असा म्हणायचं आहे का तुम्हाला?

(asa mhanaych ahe ka tumhala?) indicating a query or request for confirmation, contributes to the neutral sentiment. There is no explicit emotional language in this query.

Text: क्रांती शॉ, उषा नायर आणि इतर कार्यकर्ते उपस्थित होते.

Text: सर ना माहिती आहे त्यांना सांगा टॅग करायला

(Why are these camels growing here?) and "खरकटे उचलायची सवय झालीये" (accustomed to lifting heavy loads) which indicate disbelief rather than explicit negativity or positivity.

translated_text: I will not accept the shield in play, but the sword.

Text: नवरा मिठीत मावण्याजोगा नाही म्हणून मुठीत ठेवण्याचा एक केविलवाणा प्रयत्न दिसतोय या बाईसाहेबांचा.

Text: गुरुवारच्या मंत्रिमंडळ बैठकीत घेण्यात आले हे महत्त्वाचे निर्णय

Text: याचा जन्म होणे हे पण निसर्गात प्रदूषणाचे एक मुख्य कारण आहे.....

Text: उल्हास बापट आहेत ?
translated_text: Is Ulhas Bapat?

Text: ताई प्रवक्ता म्हणा... हे प्रवक्या काय आहे

Text: पहायला जाणारा मुलगा म्हणजे नागपुर ह  दोघींनाही पसंत करतो
translated_text: The boy who is going to see is Nagpur, he likes both of them.

Text: तंत्रज्ञानाचा वापर विकासासाठी करणे म्हणजे खरी प्रगती आणि

Text: ( / ) ही जाण आहे बाबासाहेबांनी केलेल्या उपकारांची आणि बाळासाहेबांवर असलेल्या निष्ठेची.
translated_text: ( / ) This is the knowledge of the favors done by Babasaheb and the loyalty towards Balasaheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of recognition ("जाण") of favors and loyalty, which are neutral in sentiment. Text: हो  मुलींचा ब्रेक अप होत नाही ...त्या ब्रेक अप करतात
translated_text: Yes, girls don't break up...they break up.

Text: मध्य पवारांची सात हिंदुत्व बळकट करण्यासाठी होती काय,,,,

The phrase "काय" (kay), meaning "what/is it?", contributes to the questioning tone, indicating uncertainty and preventing any strong sentiment. While "हिंदुत्व बळकट करण्यासाठी" (Hindutva balakat karnyasathi) refers to strengthening Hindutva, the question format avoids endorsing or opposing it, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: नशीब आहे या सगळ्या लोकांचं आपल नाही तस काहीच

Text: पंढरपूर का नाही यात, तिथे उमेदवार पडला हेही सांगाव....

Text: अंधेरी पूर्वची पोटनिवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार..!
translated_text: Andheri East by-election will be held unopposed..!
Justification: While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the emotion of anger likely stems from the phrase "बिनविरोध होणार..!", which translates to "will be unopposed!". This implies a lack of democratic process and potential suppression of opposition, which can evoke anger. Even though not inherently negative, the implication in this specific context raises concerns and triggers anger in those who might see it as anti-democratic.

Text: ये दोर ही एसा हे
translated_text: This is the rope
Justification: The sentence "ये दोर ही एसा हे" is neutral as it simply states a fact ("This is the rope") without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The entire phrase contributes to this neutrality; there isn't a single word triggering a specific sentiment.

Text: गौतम बुद्ध हेसुद्धा स्वतः शाकाहारी होते व त्यांनी शाकाहार पुरस्कृत केला.
translated_text: Gautam Buddha himself was a vegetarian and advocated vegetarianism.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual claim about Gautam Buddha's vegetarianism and advocacy for it. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the Marathi phrasing "गौतम बुद्ध हेसुद्धा स्वतः शाकाहारी होते व त्यांनी शाकाहार पुरस्कृत केला."

Text: कर्मवीरांच्या विचारांचा प्रसार करण्यासाठी अधिक जोमाने प्रयत्न करू या...
translated_text: Let us strive more vigorously to spread the thoughts of Karmaveer...
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("प्रयत्न करू या") to spread thoughts, which is inherently neutral, lacking positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोणते मराठी पर्याय होते हे पण टाका.
translated_text: Also include which Marathi options were available.
