Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply requests information ("टाका" - taka, include/add) without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: …..आणि उलगडला किशोर कुमार यांच्या संगीतमय गायन प्रवास
translated_text: …..and Kishore Kumar's musical journey unfolded
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes the unfolding of a musical journey. The phrase "उलगडला ... गायन प्रवास" (ulagadala...gaayan pravas) which means "unfolded...singing journey" is a descriptive statement without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: तू तोवर शेरवा चा झुरका मार, काहीच नाय होणार
translated_text: You just hit Sherwa, nothing will happen.
Justification: The sentence uses "काहीच नाय होणार" (kahich nay honar), meaning "nothing will happen," which implies a neutral or reassuring sentiment and lacks strong emotional indicators.

Text: शेणक्यांना समजलं पाहिजे ठाकरे संपत्ती जमा करत आहेत आणि हे जेलमध्ये.
translated_text: The Shenaks should understand that Thackeray is accumulating wealth and this is in jail.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact or an observation about Thackeray's alleged actions ("ठाकरे संपत्ती जमा करत आहेत") and his current situation ("हे जेलमध्ये"), without explicitly conveying positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, sentiment is neutral.

Text: मंत्रिमंडळात पालक मंत्री आहेत पण अद्याप पनीर मंत्री का नाहीत? ~ अदू बाळ.
translated_text: There is a parent minister in the cabinet but why is there no cheese minister yet? ~ Adu Bal.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the humorous and rhetorical nature of the question "पनीर मंत्री का नाहीत?" (paneer mantri ka nahit? - why is there no cheese minister?), which doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: मग आता, आता ठाकरे पंतप्रधान झाल्या शिवाय रहात नाहीत
translated_text: So now, now Thackeray can't stay without becoming the Prime Minister.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a statement of expectation or inevitability ("राहतात नाहीत"), without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "राहतात नाहीत" (rahataat naahit) expresses a lack of alternative, implying an expected outcome, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: पेन मधील शाई संपली होती
translated_text: The pen had run out of ink.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement ("पेन मधील शाई संपली होती" - the pen had run out of ink). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment score. The phrase "शाई संपली होती" (ink had run out) simply describes a state and doesn't evoke any particular emotion.

Text: पक्षात खूप वजन आहे साहेबाच
translated_text: You have a lot of weight in the party, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes the subject's influence ("वजन आहे") within the party, without expressing positive or negative feelings. "वजन आहे" (vajan aahe - has weight/influence) indicates a position of power but doesn't convey any particular emotion.

Text: अंबाबाई देवीच्या 'पेड ई पास'ला विरोध करणाऱ्या याचिकेवर आज दुपारी सुनावणी होणार आहे.
translated_text: The petition opposing Ambabai Devi's 'paid e-pass' will be heard this afternoon.
Justification: The sentence reports a neutral fact: a hearing is scheduled. The phrase "विरोध करणाऱ्या याचिकेवर" (virodh karnarya yachikevar - petition opposing) indicates opposition but the sentence is simply stating a fact about the petition, not expressing an opinion. Therefore it's neutral.

Text: ज्यांच्यात निर्णय घेण्याची ताकद असते ते नशिबाला सुद्धा मुठीत ठेवू शकतात..
translated_text: Those who have the power to make decisions can also control fate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general truth about decision-making power and control over fate, lacking specific emotional cues. The overall tone is neutral and factual, without positive or negative connotations. No specific word or phrase suggests a particular sentiment or emotion. The statement feels like a proverb or general observation, thus neutral.

Text: बाळासाहेब शिवसेना .. आहे . .
translated_text: Balasaheb Shiv Sena.. is..
Justification: The sentence "बाळासाहेब शिवसेना .. आहे . ." lacks any sentiment indicators. It's a statement of fact or incomplete thought. There are no specific Marathi words or phrases contributing to a positive, negative, or neutral emotional charge. The phrase is simply stating "Balasaheb Shiv Sena is".

Text: ज्या व्यक्तीला आपल्या चुका लवकर समजतात...तो व्यक्ती तितक्याच लवकर यशस्वी होतो...
translated_text: The person who quickly realizes his mistakes... that person succeeds just as quickly...
Justification: The sentence focuses on self-awareness and success, lacking overt positive or negative emotional cues. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase directly indicating a strong positive or negative sentiment; the sentence states a general observation about personal growth.

Text: हा पेपर आहे? कुठे न्यूज स्टँड तर दिसला नाही?
translated_text: Is this a paper? I didn't see a newsstand anywhere?
Justification: The phrase "कुठे न्यूज स्टँड तर दिसला नाही?" (Kuthe news stand tar disla nahi?) indicates a surprise or lack of expectation due to not seeing a newsstand, resulting in a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: तुम्हाला पण मानायला पाहिजे थेट साहेबांच्या विरोधी भूमिका
translated_text: You should also accept the position of being directly opposed to the boss.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact/observation without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "तुम्हाला पण मानायला पाहिजे" (tumhala pan manayla pahije) translates to "you should also accept" which is a statement of suggestion or observation, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: खराब रस्त्यांमुळे झालेल्या कोणत्याही जीवघेण्या किंवा गंभीर अपघातासाठी अधिकाऱ्यांना जबाबदार धरणार !
translated_text: Officials will be held responsible for any fatal or serious accidents caused by bad roads!
Justification: The sentence expresses anger because of the phrase "जबाबदार धरणार !" (jababdār dharaṇār!), which translates to "will be held responsible!" and conveys a strong sense of holding someone accountable due to a negative situation.

Text: तुम्ही त्या वेळेस कुठे होता आणि शांत का होता
translated_text: Where were you at that time and why were you quiet?
Justification: The neutral sentiment and surprise emotion are driven by the question "शांत का होता" (shant ka hota) - "why were you quiet?". This phrase implies an unexpected silence, which generates the element of surprise and lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जे पांडुरंग भक्त संत सावता माळी हे कोणत्या धर्मात जन्माला आले हे यांना विचारावे
translated_text: We should ask Saint Savata Mali, a devotee of Pandurang, in which religion he was born.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("विचारावे") about a historical figure's religious origin, without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "जे पांडुरंग भक्त संत सावता माळी" simply identifies the subject of the question.

Text: सर्व सामन्याचे नेतृत्व आदरणीय भाऊ
translated_text: All the matches were led by respected brothers.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence primarily describes a situation using respectful language ("आदरणीय" - aadarneey - respected) but lacks any overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: हे तर आगोदरच माहीती होतं त्यात काय नवीन आहे
translated_text: This was already known, what's new in it?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the phrase "काय नवीन आहे" (kay navin aahe), meaning "what's new?", expresses a lack of novelty and hints at an expectation of something different, thus suggesting surprise at the lack thereof.

Text: एक राहील कि भाऊ अच्छे दिन येणार होतेकी
translated_text: One thing remains, brother, that good days would come.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sense of unresolved expectation regarding "अच्छे दिन येणार होतेकी" (achhe din yenar hote ki) - "good days would come", indicating a neutral sentiment as it reflects a past unfulfilled promise rather than present positivity or negativity.

Text: यांना का नाही पळवला तिथल्या लोकांनी. बाकी कसे इतरांच्या गाडीच्या मागे धावतात मारायला!
translated_text: Why didn't the people there chase them away? How come they run after other people's cars to kill them!
Justification: The phrase "बाकी कसे इतरांच्या गाडीच्या मागे धावतात मारायला!" expressing surprise and disapproval at the difference in behavior towards the subject compared to others, heavily contributes to the neutral sentiment due to the ambiguous nature of the statement.

Text: प्रत्येक विचार म्हणजे एक कारण आहे ,आणि प्रत्येक परिस्थिती एक परिणाम.
translated_text: Every thought is a cause, and every situation is a consequence.
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral statement about causality. There are no sentiment-laden words or phrases. The Marathi words "प्रत्येक विचार" (every thought), "प्रत्येक परिस्थिती" (every situation), "कारण" (cause), and "परिणाम" (consequence) are all factual and descriptive, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: केंद्र सरकारच्या या ‘विचारा’मुळे मुस्लीम/ख्रिस्ती दलितांनाही ‘आरक्षण’ मिळणार का?
translated_text: Will this 'idea' of the central government also give 'reservation' to Muslim/Christian Dalits?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the question "मिळणार का?" (milnar ka?) which inquires about a potential outcome without expressing positive or negative feelings. The word "विचारा" (vichara) meaning 'idea' is presented in quotes, suggesting potential skepticism or distance but not strong enough to elicit a positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: जायचं आहे मला एकदा कधी योग येतो दत्त महाराजांनाच माहित
translated_text: I want to go, only Datta Maharaj knows when I will get to yoga.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire and acknowledges uncertainty, with "दत्त महाराजांनाच माहित" (only Datta Maharaj knows) conveying a neutral acceptance of the unknown.

Text: हा पण माझाच पिझ्झा आहे होते न सर्व आजच करणार आहे का?
translated_text: This is my pizza too, aren't you going to make it all today?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question about the pizza preparation timeline ("आजच करणार आहे का?"), lacking overtly positive or negative indicators.

Text: लोकांना विचारा म्हणजे समजेल
translated_text: Ask people and they will understand.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply suggests an action (asking people) with a predictable outcome (understanding). The Marathi phrase "लोकांना विचारा म्हणजे समजेल" expresses a factual statement without any emotional charge.

Text: जय गोपीनाथ दिनदर्शिका
translated_text: Jai Gopinath Calendar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the phrase "जय गोपीनाथ दिनदर्शिका" (Jai Gopinath Calendar) is simply a title and doesn't express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: वो काम सरदार पटेलजी पेहले कर लेते तो ये बुरे दीन देखणे नाहीं मिळते
translated_text: If Sardar Patel ji had done that work, it would have been worse, worse, worse, worse
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the hypothetical and retrospective nature of the sentence. While implying a negative outcome ("बुरे दीन देखणे नाहीं मिलते" - would not have seen bad days), it doesn't directly express positive or negative sentiment; it states a past hypothetical scenario.

Text: मनसैनिक नाही मंदसैनिक
translated_text: Not a soldier of the mind, a soldier of the mind
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a contrast ("नाही" - not) without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "मनसैनिक नाही मंदसैनिक" simply states an opposition, with no sentiment loaded in the specific wordings themselves.

Text: तुझे खरे बाप ठाकरे आणि पवार आहेत का?
translated_text: Are your real fathers Thackeray and Pawar?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question ("आहेत का?") that questions someone's parentage ("खरे बाप"). While potentially provocative depending on context and tone, the literal wording itself doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment. It simply asks for information.

Text: जागतिक पातळीवर म्हणजे साडे तीन जिल्हे
translated_text: Globally, that means three and a half districts.
Justification: The sentence is purely factual and descriptive, mentioning a global scale in relation to "साडे तीन जिल्हे" (three and a half districts), which lacks any sentiment or emotional charge.

Text: कधी न बघीतलेले चेहरे कोणाक पण उचलुन घेवन येतास काय रे
translated_text: Can you pick up faces that you have never seen before?
Justification: The sentence is a question that, while potentially carrying a hidden negative intention, does not express any explicit sentiment. The phrase "कधी न बघीतलेले चेहरे" (kadhi na baghitlele chehare - faces that you have never seen before) simply describes unfamiliar faces, and the remaining sentence poses a question without expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ...तर मी आयुष्यात कधीही काम करणार नाही : सलमान खान
translated_text: ...then I will never work in my life: Salman Khan
Justification: The neutral sentiment and sadness emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "कधीही काम करणार नाही" (kadhihi kaam karnar nahi), meaning "never work," which implies a sense of hopelessness or finality associated with a negative future outcome.

Text: ...तर रॉयल्टी द्यावी लागेल, या बाळासाहेबांची एकनाथ शिंदे गटाकडे अजब मागणी
translated_text: ...then royalty will have to be paid, this is Balasaheb's strange demand to the Eknath Shinde group
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about a demand without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "अजब मागणी" (ajab maagani - strange demand) describes the nature of the demand but does not inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पुणे साठी का.
translated_text: Why for Pune?
Justification: The phrase "का" (ka), meaning "why," expresses a neutral inquiry, lacking positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बायकोची आणि नवजात बाळाची अंत्ययात्रा त्याने वाजतगाजत काढली, कारण…
translated_text: He conducted the funeral procession of his wife and newborn baby with great fanfare, because...
Justification: The sentence describes a tragic event ("बायकोची आणि नवजात बाळाची अंत्ययात्रा" - funeral procession of wife and newborn baby) presented in a matter-of-fact tone without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment, and left incomplete. The phrase "वाजतगाजत काढली" (conducted with great fanfare) could be interpreted ironically or sarcastically but its actual purpose and implications are not clear within the context, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: दोनचं मिनटं पहात होतो. त्यात त्यांनी मोदीला पण मागे टाकलं.
translated_text: I was watching the second minute. He even surpassed Modi in it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes an observation ("दोनचं मिनटं पहात होतो") and a comparison ("मोदीला पण मागे टाकलं") without expressing positive or negative sentiment. Neither phrase carries emotional weight.

Text: कुत्र्या तुला भुंकन्याशिवाय काही काम नाही का..?
translated_text: Don't you dogs have anything to do but bark?
Justification: The sentence contains the word "कुत्र्या" (kutrya - dogs), used in a derogatory way, but the overall tone isn't strongly negative, and lacks explicit emotional expression, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आई भवानी ही फक्त मराठयांची आहे, तिचा कळस मराठ्याच्या रक्ताने भिजलेला आहे. .
translated_text: Mother Bhavani belongs only to the Marathas, her hair is soaked in Maratha blood.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overt positive or negative emotional expression, and the phrase "आई भवानी ही फक्त मराठयांची आहे" (Mother Bhavani belongs only to the Marathas) is a statement of ownership/affiliation rather than an expression of sentiment. The statement regarding "मराठ्याच्या रक्ताने भिजलेला आहे" (soaked in Maratha blood) doesn't necessarily indicate positive or negative sentiment; it is presented more as a historical claim/statement of fact.

Text: खाताना भाजतय आणि परसाकड जाताना पण
translated_text: While eating, I am roasting and even while going to the backyard.
Justification: The sentence describes discomfort without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भाजतय" (bhajatay - roasting/burning) indicates physical discomfort, but the context lacks any expression of negative emotion, keeping the sentiment neutral.

Text: जे करतात त्यांनी पण करायचं का मग
translated_text: So why should they do what they do?
Justification: The sentence's neutral sentiment stems from the interrogative nature of "जे करतात त्यांनी पण करायचं का मग" which questions an action without expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "करायचं का" (karaycha ka) directly asks "should they do?", indicating a neutral inquiry rather than an opinion.

Text: सगळ्यात आधी हा प्रश्न विचारा की एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?
translated_text: First of all, ask this question: why do so many people want to do government jobs?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "एवढ्या सगळ्यांना सरकारी नोकरीच का करायची आहे?" simply inquires about the reason for people's desire for government jobs, lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: सोन पापडी खायला आली असेल
translated_text: You must have come to eat gold papdi.
Justification: The sentence "सोन पापडी खायला आली असेल" is neutral because it simply states a possible reason for someone's arrival (to eat Son Papdi). There is no inherently positive or negative word or phrase like an adjective or verb expressing happiness, sadness, anger, or excitement. The words "सोन पापडी खायला आली असेल" are factually neutral in isolation.

Text: शेठला एवढं पण करू नका.
translated_text: Don't do this to Seth.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a simple request or instruction ("करू नका" - don't do). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment conveyed in the phrase.

Text: मराठी येत नाही का..?
translated_text: Don't you know Marathi?
Justification: The sentence "मराठी येत नाही का..?" expresses a lack of knowledge with a questioning tone, indicated by "येत नाही का", making it neutral and not inherently positive or negative. The question itself is factual and doesn't carry any strong emotion.

Text: प्रेमाच्या धाग्यात काळजीचा दोरा बांधता आला की नात्यातील गाठ आयुष्यभर सुटत नाही.
translated_text: Once the thread of care is tied to the thread of love, the knot in the relationship will remain untied for a lifetime.
Justification: The sentence describes a positive concept of strong relationships formed through love and care, but it doesn't express any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "प्रेमाच्या धाग्यात काळजीचा दोरा बांधता आला की नात्यातील गाठ आयुष्यभर सुटत नाही" (Once the thread of care is tied to the thread of love, the knot in the relationship will remain untied for a lifetime) is descriptive and conveys stability rather than a distinct emotion, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: “मी बरोबर होती".... “होती" की “होतो".....मग तुम्ही कोण आहात....
translated_text: "I was right".... "Was" or "Was".....then who are you....
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and questioning rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "“होती" की “होतो" ( "Was" or "Was") indicates confusion and an attempt to clarify, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: संजय , पहिल्या मध्ये भेसळ होण्याची शक्यता अधिक आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay, the first one is more likely to be adulterated.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a possibility ("शक्यता आहे") of adulteration ("भेसळ"), without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: आमचा गाव आमचा विकास’ हा उपक्रम यशस्वी होईल-उपमुख्यकार्यकारी अधिकारी श्री राजेंद्र पराडकर यांचे प्रतिपादन
translated_text: The initiative 'Our Village, Our Development' will be successful - Assertion of Deputy Chief Executive Officer Shri Rajendra Paradkar
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of expectation ("यशस्वी होईल" - yashasvi hoil - will be successful) from an official, lacking strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: त्याशिवाय हिंदूत्ववादी कसं सिद्ध होणार..
translated_text: Otherwise, how can one prove that he is a Hindutva?
Justification: The sentence "त्याशिवाय हिंदूत्ववादी कसं सिद्ध होणार.." expresses a questioning tone about proving one's Hindutva identity. The phrase "कसं सिद्ध होणार" (how can one prove) implies a lack of strong positive or negative feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: तो नातु शिवसेनेचा सदस्य तरी आहे का ?
translated_text: Is that son even a member of Shiv Sena?
Justification: The word "तरी" (tari - even) implies a level of doubt and unexpectedness regarding the son's membership, contributing to a neutral sentiment and underlying surprise.

Text: तुम्ही बोलल तेच खरं का
translated_text: Is what you say true?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence "तुम्ही बोलल तेच खरं का" (Tumhi bolal tech khara ka), which simply questions the truthfulness of a statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "खरं का" (khara ka) - "is it true?" - is a neutral inquiry.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य म्हणजे काय रे भाऊ ?
translated_text: What is freedom of expression, brother?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question seeking definition. The phrase "काय रे भाऊ ?" (kay re bhau?) is an informal way of addressing someone, meaning "what, brother?", but in this context, it functions more as a tag question to solicit information rather than express any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: न्यायालय न्याया साठी असते शेवटी ते लोक पण तुमचंच ऐकतील
translated_text: The court is for justice, in the end those people will listen to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a fact ("न्यायालय न्याया साठी असते" - The court is for justice) and a prediction ("शेवटी ते लोक पण तुमचंच ऐकतील" - In the end, those people will listen to you) without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrases are descriptive and predictive, lacking subjective feeling.

Text: तुझी सासू गेली का?
translated_text: Is your mother-in-law gone?
Justification: The word "गेली" (geli - gone/passed away) implies a death, contributing to the sadness emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे कोणत्या पक्षाचे प्रणित आहे ,चायनल हो
translated_text: Which party is this affiliated with?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "हे कोणत्या पक्षाचे प्रणित आहे" (he konatya pakshache pranit aahe - which party is this affiliated with) simply seeks information.

Text: ही बाळासाहेबांची तत्वे आहेत का? . . . . .
translated_text: Are these the principles of Balasaheb? . . . . .
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question inquiring about the origin of principles. There's no sentiment expressed through any specific word or phrase in "ही बाळासाहेबांची तत्वे आहेत का?".

Text: ने आणले हे जबरदस्त प्लॅन; मिळतील या सर्व सुविधा
translated_text: has brought this amazing plan; you will get all these facilities
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing, indicates joy. While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the presence of this word points to a positive emotional undertone of joy.

Text: ऋतुजा लटके यांचा राजीनामा का मंजूर होत नाही?; किशोरी पेडणेकर यांनी सांगितलं नेमकं कारण
translated_text: Why is Rituja Latke's resignation not being accepted?; Kishori Pednekar reveals the real reason
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral (0.0) as the sentence primarily poses a question and reports a factual event. The use of "का मंजूर होत नाही?" (ka manjur hot nahi? - why is it not being accepted?) indicates curiosity and surprise surrounding the resignation, hinting at something unexpected. This aligns with surprise being the primary emotion.

Text: सरकारी कर्मचाऱ्यांचा   दिवसांचा आठवडा रद्द होणार? :
translated_text: Will the day-off week for government employees be abolished?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("रद्द होणार?") about a potential policy change, without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. The question itself doesn't imply any emotional response.

Text: भाऊ, मशाली ने पेट घेतला आहे.
translated_text: Brother, the torch has caught fire.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement "पेट घेतला आहे" (pet ghetla aahe) which simply states "caught fire" without any emotional coloring or subjective opinion.

Text: पण खरच होणार का?
translated_text: But will it really happen?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the uncertainty expressed through the phrase "खरच होणार का?" (kharach honar ka?), which questions the likelihood of something happening and doesn't convey any explicit positive or negative feeling.

Text: खांग्रेसचे आहेत. . . द्या सोडून . . . .
translated_text: They are from the Congress. . . Leave them alone. . . .
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it primarily consists of factual statements ("खांग्रेसचे आहेत" - They are from Congress) and a suggestion that lacks strong emotional coloring ("द्या सोडून" - Leave them alone). "द्या सोडून" is mild and doesn't indicate strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: मधे पण तेच अग्रस्थानी होते
translated_text: But in the middle, they were at the forefront.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral situation of being at the forefront; there is no emotionally charged Marathi word or phrase in the sentence.

Text: ते सुरेश भटांच आहे ना?
translated_text: Is that Suresh Bhatt?
Justification: The sentence "ते सुरेश भटांच आहे ना?" is neutral because it is a simple question seeking confirmation. The phrase "आहे ना?" which translates to "is it?" is a tag question that doesn't express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: सदर तक्रार आमच्या निर्दशनास आणून दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for bringing this complaint to our attention. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude ("धन्यवाद") and states a neutral action of forwarding the complaint, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कोणत्या भागात म्हणतात ते नाही माहीत पण बऱ्याच जागी म्हणतात
translated_text: I don't know in which area it is said, but it is said in many places.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily conveys information about the prevalence of a saying or practice without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नाही माहीत" (nahi mahit) indicates a lack of knowledge, contributing to the neutral tone.

Text: तुला डेमो हवा आहे का पँथर चळवळीचा?
translated_text: Do you want a demo of the Panther movement?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any sentiment-bearing words. It's a simple question asking about a demo: "तुला डेमो हवा आहे का पँथर चळवळीचा?". There are no words suggesting positive or negative feelings.

Text: आणि कंगना रानौत सुद्धा मदत करू शकते उत्तर द्यायला...
translated_text: And Kangana Ranaut can also help answer...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a possibility ("मदत करू शकते" - madad karu shakate, "can help") without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: साहेब काल तस ठरल होते का?
translated_text: Sir, was that decided yesterday?
Justification: The sentence exhibits a neutral sentiment because it is simply a question asking for confirmation. The Marathi phrase "तस ठरल होते का?" (tas tharal hote ka?) meaning "was that decided?" is a neutral inquiry, lacking any emotional or subjective connotation.

Text: हात भट्टी हॅन्ड पंप मधून सुसंगत आहे
translated_text: The hand furnace is compatible with hand pumps.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual compatibility statement. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that indicates a sentiment. The statement "सुसंगत आहे" (susangat aahe - is compatible) simply describes a technical relationship, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: स्वतःचे अनुभव मित्राच्या नावावर खपवले जातात अस माझ्या मित्राचा मित्र म्हणत होता
translated_text: My friend's friend used to say that one's own experiences are wasted on the name of a friend.
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the phrase "खपवले जातात" (khapavale jatat), which implies experiences are being wasted or unfairly attributed, evoking a feeling of aversion.

Text: आळस हा माणसाचा शत्रू आहे...नेहरू शत्रू वर प्रेम करा...बापू विषय कट...
translated_text: Laziness is the enemy of man... Nehru Love your enemy... Bapu Topic cut...
Justification: The sentence expresses a mixture of unrelated statements and an abrupt topic change. The phrase "विषय कट" (vishay cut) directly indicates a cut-off or change of topic, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it doesn't express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: मी माझे सर्व मुद्दे तुमच्याकडे ठेवले आहेत
translated_text: I have put all my points to you.
Justification: The sentence "मी माझे सर्व मुद्दे तुमच्याकडे ठेवले आहेत" expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact without any indication of positive or negative feeling. There are no words or phrases that convey any emotional tone. The sentence simply means that the speaker has put all of their points to the listener.

Text: दिलासा मिळाला म्हणून खुश राहा तू.
translated_text: Be happy that you have found relief.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "खुश राहा" (khush raha), which directly translates to "be happy." The sentiment is neutral likely because "दिलासा मिळाला" (dilasa milala) which means "relief found" or "relief received" can be considered as a relief from a negative emotion, therefore neutralising the sentence to some degree.

Text: म्हणजे तुम्ही मानलं की भाजप महाशक्ती आहे ते
translated_text: So you believe that BJP is a superpower?
Justification: The word "मानलं" (manla), meaning "believed," in the context of the question, contributes to the surprise emotion as it implies the speaker is taken aback by the other person's apparent acknowledgement of BJP as a "superpower." The neutral sentiment (0.0) arises from the fact it's phrased as a question; it doesn't express positive or negative feeling directly but probes a belief.

Text: घर चोरता येत नाही विचार हिरावून घेता येत नाही जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: You can't steal a house, you can't take away a thought. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses pride and resilience related to Maharashtra. While "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a patriotic slogan, it doesn't inherently express a positive or negative sentiment in this context. It is more of a neutral affirmation or declaration, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: विद्यार्थी आहेत का
translated_text: Are there any students?
Justification: The sentence "विद्यार्थी आहेत का" expresses a question about the presence of students. The question word "का" makes the sentence neutral as it seeks information without expressing any inherent sentiment.

Text: उंची किती आणि बोलतोस किती??फटके टाकले नाहीत म्हणजे??ही भाषा का तुझी??
translated_text: How tall are you and how much do you speak?? You didn't hit me?? Why is this your language??
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises from the interrogative and accusatory tone conveyed through phrases like "उंची किती आणि बोलतोस किती??" (how tall are you and how much do you speak??) and "ही भाषा का तुझी??" (why is this your language??), which don't express strong positive or negative emotions but rather questioning and challenging.

Text: पेक्षा केले असते तर लवकर भेट झाली असती
translated_text: If I had done it earlier, we would have met sooner.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical situation ("केले असते तर") and a potential outcome, lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The phrase "केले असते तर" (if I had done it) sets a conditional tone, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: बाबा आत्ता पर्यंत कुठे होता
translated_text: Where has Dad been until now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple question about location and time ("कुठे होता"), lacking any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: पञाचाळ मध्ये मराठी कुटुंबे अजुनही घर भेटतील या प्रतिक्षेत आहेत.
translated_text: Marathi families in Pantchal are still waiting to find their homes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of waiting ("प्रतिक्षेत आहेत"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "प्रतिक्षेत आहेत" indicates a neutral state of expectation, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: भास्कर जाधवांनी राणेची उरली सुरली पण काढून टाकली
translated_text: Bhaskar Jadhav removed Rane's remaining Surli but
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it describes an action ("काढून टाकली" - removed) without explicit positive or negative connotation towards either Bhaskar Jadhav or Rane. "उरली सुरली" (remaining Surli) refers to a specific action, which, while potentially aggressive, lacks inherent sentiment without further context.

Text: षडयंत्र म्हणतात ते आहे हे सगळं
translated_text: This is all what they call a conspiracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or an opinion about something being a conspiracy ("षडयंत्र म्हणतात ते आहे हे सगळं"). There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "षडयंत्र म्हणतात" (they call it a conspiracy) is a factual statement without emotional coloring.

Text: सर्व नाणी वापरले आहे
translated_text: All coins have been used.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("सर्व नाणी वापरले आहे" - All coins have been used) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral sentiment score. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: उद्धव सेनेचे सरकार आल्यास कोकणातून निष्ठावान मुख्यमंत्री यांनाच करावे ही जनतेची मागणी
translated_text: People demand that if Uddhav Sena government comes to power, only a loyal Chief Minister from Konkan should be appointed.
Justification: The emotion of anger is likely derived from the phrase "उद्धव सेनेचे सरकार आल्यास...ही जनतेची मागणी" (Uddhav Sena's government comes to power...this is people's demand) which implies a potentially undesirable scenario that could make someone angry. The need to emphasize the desire for a loyal CM might also imply suspicion or distrust of the current or potential alternatives adding up to overall anger.

Text: हृदयविकारांपासून दूर राहायचे असेल तर आहारात करा हे   बदल, जाणून घ्या
translated_text: If you want to stay away from heart diseases, make these changes in your diet, know this
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative and factual nature. It simply states a conditional situation and provides advice, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghya - know this) is a call to action but not emotionally charged.

Text: विश्लेषण : शेअर बाजाराप्रमाणे इन्शुरन्स पॉलिसी धारकांना डीमॅट खाते अनिवार्य होणार?
translated_text: Analysis: Will demat accounts be mandatory for insurance policy holders like the stock market?
Justification: The sentence expresses an inquiry about a potential policy change using the words "अनिवार्य होणार?" (anivary honar?), meaning "will it be mandatory?", framing it as a question and thus presenting a neutral sentiment.

Text: हो ताई मी कधीच तिया गोष्टी तुन बाहेर पडले आहे
translated_text: Yes, I have never been out of these things.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "हो ताई मी कधीच तिया गोष्टी तुन बाहेर पडले आहे" describes a state of being (being out of something) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बाहेर पडले आहे" (baher padle aahe - have been out) simply states a fact.

Text: हे ही आहेच बाबा
translated_text: This is it, Dad.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the Marathi phrase "हे ही आहेच बाबा" which expresses a simple acknowledgement or statement of fact. There is no emotional loading or sentiment expressed in the statement.

Text: कोण आहेत ओळखा?
translated_text: Guess who they are?
Justification: The sentence "कोण आहेत ओळखा?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question of identification ("ओळखा?" - "guess?") without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: बाळराजे तेच का ते आवाज बरोबर करायला कुठे तरी गेलेत म्हणे.
translated_text: Balraje said he went somewhere to get his voice right.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("बाळराजे तेच का ते आवाज बरोबर करायला कुठे तरी गेलेत म्हणे" - Balraje said he went somewhere to get his voice right). There are no words or phrases that express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वैफल्यग्रस्त तर टरबूज्या झाला होता म्हणून फोडाफोडीच राजकारण केला
translated_text: He was so frustrated that he became a watermelon, so he engaged in explosive politics.
Justification: The sentence describes someone becoming a "टरबूज्या" (watermelon) due to frustration, followed by "फोडाफोडीच राजकारण" (explosive politics). While seemingly negative, the term "टरबूज्या" and "फोडाफोडीच राजकारण" are used in a colloquial manner and don't necessarily convey strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore the sentiment is assigned as neutral.

Text: झोपायचा अगोदर दाराला कडी लावली का बघून ये ...
translated_text: Come and see if you locked the door before going to bed...
Justification: The sentence is a neutral request/instruction. There are no sentiment-bearing words present. The sentence is purely informational.

Text: आता कोणीही वेडावाकडा शब्द कदाचित काढणार नाही. कारण बाळासाहेबांचे तिथे अस्तित्व आहे.
translated_text: Now no one will probably say anything crazy because Balasaheb exists there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "आता कोणीही वेडावाकडा शब्द कदाचित काढणार नाही" (now no one will probably say anything crazy) suggests a potential change in behavior due to Balasaheb's presence, but it is descriptive rather than expressing a strong opinion or feeling.

Text: बेरोजगारीवर एकच औषध आहे, तू मन लावून अभ्यास कर.
translated_text: There is only one cure for unemployment, study hard.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides advice ("मन लावून अभ्यास कर" - study hard) without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: आपल्या पूर्वजांनी हे आधीच सिद्ध केलंय..उगाच नाहीत आपल्याकडे कुणाला 'गाजर दाखवत..'.
translated_text: Our ancestors have already proven this..we don't have to 'show anyone the carrot..'.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "गाजर दाखवत" (gaajar daakhvat - showing the carrot) is presented as a known idiom or saying, rather than a direct act or threat, thus lacking strong sentiment or emotion.

Text: इकडे कवी लोकांच्या भावनांसोबत खेळत आहेत
translated_text: Here the poet is playing with people's emotions.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an action ("खेळत आहेत" - playing) without expressing positive or negative feelings towards it. The phrase "भावनांसोबत खेळत आहेत" (playing with emotions) itself doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative sentiment in this context; it's simply a statement of fact.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये होते ते सेनेमुळे, पुण्यात होते ते जास्तीच्या पावसामुळे.
translated_text: In Mumbai it was because of the army, in Pune it was because of excessive rain.
Justification: The sentence presents factual information about reasons for events in Mumbai and Pune. There are no emotional words or phrases indicating positivity or negativity. The phrases "सेनेमुळे" (because of the army) and "जास्तीच्या पावसामुळे" (because of excessive rain) are presented as explanations, not expressions of sentiment.

Text: मुंबईसह या   रेल्वे स्टेशनचे रुपडे पालटणार;    हजार कोटींची गुंतवणूक होणार
translated_text: Mumbai and these railway stations will be transformed; Investment of Rs 1000 crores will be made
Justification: The phrase "रुपडे पालटणार" (rupade palatnar), meaning "will be transformed," indicates a positive change and anticipation, contributing to the joy emotion and a neutral sentiment that is closer to positive.

Text: सर,खरच आपण यात लक्ष घालून काम त्वरित सुरू करावे.
translated_text: Sir, we really need to look into this and start working on it immediately.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a polite request. While there's a sense of urgency implied by "त्वरित सुरू करावे" (tvarit suru karave - start immediately), the overall tone remains respectful and doesn't convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: तसे काही लिहिण्याची गरज नाही.. म्हणजे..हे घ्या...असा आहे
translated_text: There's no need to write anything like that.. I mean..take this...it's like this
Justification: The sentence expresses neutrality. While "हे घ्या" (he ghya - take this) could indicate a positive offering, the preceding hesitation and explanation "तसे काही लिहिण्याची गरज नाही" (tase kahi lihinyachi garaj nahi - there's no need to write anything like that) neutralize the overall sentiment. "असा आहे" (asa aahe - it's like this) is also neutral, providing context rather than expressing a strong feeling.

Text: केव्हढा जोक आहे हा
translated_text: What kind of joke is this?
Justification: The phrase "केव्हढा जोक" (kevढा joke - what kind of joke) implies a questioning and potentially doubtful tone, indicating surprise and a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ठाकरे सोडून नुसते बाळासाहेब कसे चालतील... शिवसेना ठाकरेंची आहे आणी राहणार
translated_text: How can Balasaheb alone rule without Thackeray... Shiv Sena belongs to Thackeray and will remain so?
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact/belief about the Shiv Sena's identity being tied to the Thackeray family, rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "ठाकरे सोडून नुसते बाळासाहेब कसे चालतील" and "शिवसेना ठाकरेंची आहे आणी राहणार" indicate this neutral assertion of the established order and inherent relationship.

Text: साहेब,शेतकऱ्यांच्या खात्यात ही रक्कम जमा होईप्रयन्त,आपली मदत शेतकऱ्यांना लागणार आहे.
translated_text: Sir, till this amount is deposited in the farmers' accounts, the farmers will need your help.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for continued assistance until a specific action is completed. The phrase "मदत लागणार आहे" (madat lagnar aahe) indicates a requirement for help, but it is presented in a neutral and informational tone, without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: समुद्रात वाहून गेलेल्या पत्नीचा आला व्हॉइस मेसेज; ‘मी रवीसोबत आनंदी आहे’…
translated_text: Voice message from wife who was swept away at sea; 'I am happy with Ravi'...
Justification: The phrase "आनंदी आहे" (aanandi aahe), meaning "I am happy," directly indicates joy, overriding the initial tragic context and resulting in a neutral sentiment due to conflicting emotional cues.

Text: तिरीत तोमाया चा मुलगा आहे तो त्यांच्या साठी काही पण शक्क आहे .
translated_text: Tirit is the son of Tomayya, so he is a bit of a doubt for them.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty/doubt, reflected in the neutral sentiment. The phrase "शक्क आहे" (shakk aahe), meaning "doubt" or "suspicion," contributes to this sentiment.

Text: अंधारा सोबत प्रकाश मोफत... हे सर्व काही ठरवून होतेय का.
translated_text: Darkness and light are free... Is all this happening by design?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ठरवून होतेय का" (tharavun hotey ka - happening by design?) poses a question about predetermination, without exhibiting a clearly positive or negative emotional tone. The question itself doesn't imply a specific sentiment.

Text: धाडस च्या माद्यमातून शहाजी बापू चा करेक्ट कार्यक्रम होणार. बऱ्याच घडामोडी सोलापूर जिल्ह्यात घडतील.
translated_text: Shahaji Bapu's correct program will be held through the medium of Dhadas. Many events will take place in Solapur district.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it mentions a "correct program" ("करेक्ट कार्यक्रम"), which can sometimes imply negativity, the overall context and phrasing are informational and lack strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "करेक्ट कार्यक्रम" in isolation *could* be negative, but here it seems to be used descriptively.

Text: तसं झालं नाहीच, उलट मोदींच्या कृपेने नवीन पिढीमध्येही नेहरूंविषयी उत्सुकता निर्माण झाली आहे.
translated_text: That has not happened, on the contrary, thanks to Modi's grace, curiosity about Nehru has arisen among the new generation as well.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a situation and the impact of an action. The phrase "उलट मोदींच्या कृपेने" (ulat Modichya krupene - on the contrary, thanks to Modi's grace) doesn't carry inherent positivity or negativity towards the subject but simply attributes a consequence to Modi's actions. The rest of the sentence focuses on the effect which is again describing the impact, not showing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पनवेल ने दोन वेळा तरी कामोठे ला पणी द्यावे ही विनंती
translated_text: Request that Panvel should pay Kamothe at least twice
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विनंती" - vinanti), which is inherently neutral in sentiment as it simply asks for something without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: विधानसभेत पक्ष प्रमुख वैगेरे गोष्टी काल्पनिक आहे त्यामुळे व्हीप मान्य करायचा संबंधच नाही
translated_text: Things like party chiefs in the Legislative Assembly are imaginary, so it is irrelevant to accept the whip.
Justification: The sentence expresses a dismissal of the relevance of accepting a whip in the Legislative Assembly due to the speaker's belief that party chiefs are "imaginary". The phrase "कल्पनिक आहे" (kalpanik aahe - imaginary/fictional) suggests a neutral stance rather than any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: असे दृश्य खूप मोठ्या प्रमाणावर सार्वजनिक वाहनांमधून पाहायला मिळते.
translated_text: Such a scene is widely seen from public transport.
Justification: The sentence describes a common observation ("असे दृश्य खूप मोठ्या प्रमाणावर सार्वजनिक वाहनांमधून पाहायला मिळते" - "such a scene is widely seen from public transport"), lacking any specific emotional cues or sentiment-bearing words. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: मनसेने दिली गुलाबाची फुले आणि महापौर पंचम कलानी मराठीत बोलल्या  ./-…
translated_text: MNS gave rose flowers and Mayor Pancham Kalani spoke in Marathi./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts about MNS giving flowers and the Mayor speaking Marathi. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase; the statement is objective.

Text: हे खर आहे का .
translated_text: Is this true?
Justification: The phrase "हे खर आहे का" (he khar aahe ka), meaning "Is this true?", expresses surprise due to the interrogative nature questioning the veracity of something.

Text: नरहरी झिरवाळ यांनी अजय चौधरी याना गटनेता म्हणून मान्यता अगोदरच दिलेली आहे
translated_text: Narhari Jirwal has already approved Ajay Chaudhary as the group leader.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "मान्यता अगोदरच दिलेली आहे" (mānyatā agodarach dilelī āhe - has already approved) indicates a past action without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: त्यांनी देशासाठी केलेलं योगदान हे आहे..
translated_text: This is his contribution to the country.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively states a fact about someone's contribution to the country. The phrase "त्यांनी देशासाठी केलेलं योगदान हे आहे" (tyanni deshachaathi kelele yogdaan he aahe) simply denotes a contribution and carries no inherent positive or negative emotional weight.

Text: काही पण राव..... मोहगाम चावळतो
translated_text: But Rao.....Mohamgam bites.
Justification: The phrase "मोहगाम चावळतो" (Mohamgam bites) doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment on its own, particularly without context. While "चावळतो" (bites) has a negative connotation, the overall phrase lacks sufficient information to indicate a clear sentiment. Therefore, it remains neutral.

Text: हम्म ते तर आहेच आपला जन्म त्याचसाठी तर आहे
translated_text: Hmm, that's what we were born for.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about purpose ("जन्म त्याचसाठी तर आहे" - born for that purpose), lacking strong positive or negative emotional markers. The initial "हम्म" (Hmm) adds a neutral, contemplative tone.

Text: मी ट्रेलर म्हणुन काम करतोय,तर पिक्चर मुख्यमंत्री दाखवणार!:
translated_text: I am working as a trailer, so the Chief Minister will show the picture!:
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, and the emotion is joy, likely tinged with sarcasm. The phrase "पिक्चर मुख्यमंत्री दाखवणार!" (picture Chief Minister will show!) implies a sense of amusement or joy due to the perceived absurdity or self-importance of the situation. The speaker seems to be using satire to express the disparity between their work and the final result being presented by someone else.

Text: कुणाला मत द्यायचं नाही हे जनतेनी ठरवल आहे, कितीही लांबणीवर टाकू द्या.
translated_text: The people have decided who they don't want to vote for, no matter how long it takes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the people's decision ("जनतेनी ठरवल आहे") regarding voting, without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "जनतेनी ठरवल आहे" simply indicates a decision has been made.

Text: ते सत्तर का ऐंशी सोड, हे घे पुरावे
translated_text: Leave those seventy or eighty, take this as evidence.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents information ("घे पुरावे" - take this as evidence) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे बघ कालच छत्री आणलीय
translated_text: Look, I brought an umbrella yesterday.
Justification: The sentence describes a simple action ("छत्री आणलीय" - brought an umbrella) without any explicit positive or negative indicators. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मग हेच शिवसेनेला विचारा त्यांनी लटकेंच्या पत्नीलाच का उमेदवारी दिली.?
translated_text: Then ask the Shiv Sena why they gave Latke's wife the candidature?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("मग हेच शिवसेनेला विचारा त्यांनी लटकेंच्या पत्नीलाच का उमेदवारी दिली.?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "विचारा" (ask) indicates a request for information rather than an opinion or emotional expression.

Text: पत्रकारातील हा पहिला आहे
translated_text: This is the first among journalists.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("पहिला आहे" - "is the first") without any emotional coloring or subjective opinion.

Text: अहो ते आव्हाड सर आहेत आवहाड नाहीत.
translated_text: Hey, they are Awad sir, not Awahad.
Justification: The sentence aims to correct a name pronunciation; it does not express any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "अहो ते...नाही" ("Aho te... nahi" - Hey they are... not) is used for clarification/correction, indicating neutrality.

Text: माझ्या कडे पण असे आहेत ......
translated_text: I have these too......
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states the speaker possesses something similar to what was previously mentioned. There is no explicit positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "माझ्या कडे पण असे आहेत" (majhya kade pan ase aahet) indicates a statement of fact and doesn't carry any emotional charge in this context.

Text: संजय राऊत न्यायालयीन कोठडीत असून त्यांनी आईला लिहिलेले भावनिक पत्र समोर आले आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay Raut is in judicial custody and an emotional letter he wrote to his mother has surfaced.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily states factual information. The phrase "न्यायालयीन कोठडीत असून" (is in judicial custody) and "आईला लिहिलेले पत्र" (letter written to mother) describe the situation without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. While "भावनिक पत्र" (emotional letter) implies emotion, the sentence itself merely reports the existence of such a letter, not expressing the emotion directly.

Text: ** ह्या ऐवजी हे वापरायचं
translated_text: ** Use this instead
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply suggests a replacement ("ह्या ऐवजी हे वापरायचं" - "hya aivaji he vaparaych"), indicating a factual substitution without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: याचा अर्थ खर्गे हे सुद्धा मनमोहन सिंग ठरतील.
translated_text: This means that Kharge will also become Manmohan Singh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a comparison suggesting Kharge will be like Manmohan Singh ("मनमोहन सिंग ठरतील") without expressing a positive or negative opinion about either individual.

Text: एकदा पद मिळालं की ते आपल्याच परिवारात राहिलं पाहिजे असा यांचा अट्टाहास असतो.
translated_text: They insist that once they get a position, it should remain within their own family.
Justification: The sentence expresses a common observation about nepotism and doesn't contain overtly positive or negative wording. The phrase "अट्टाहास असतो" (attaahas asto) meaning "they insist" indicates a persistent desire or demand, but without a strong negative connotation in this context.

Text: कधी कधी काही लोकांसोबत असं होत असत पण या मुळे चांगलं वागणं सोडू नये...
translated_text: Sometimes this happens to some people, but you shouldn't stop behaving well because of this...
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation and advice. The phrase "चांगलं वागणं सोडू नये" (chānglaṃ vāgaṇaṃ soḍū naye) - "should not stop behaving well" - indicates a neutral and উপদেশनात्मक (updeshātmaka - advisory) tone rather than any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बुंदी खायला बोलवा म्हणजे झालं!
translated_text: Just invite them to eat Bundi and that's it!
Justification: The phrase "म्हणजे झालं!" ("mhanje zale!") implies a sense of simplicity and satisfaction, suggesting the situation is easily resolved or made pleasant by a simple act (inviting someone to eat Bundi). This trivialization lends itself to a neutral sentiment, but in context, the feeling of ease and resolution triggers joy.

Text: तिहार जेलमध्ये ‘ही’ प्रसिद्ध अभिनेत्री तब्बल इतक्या वेळा सुकेश चंद्रशेखरला गेली होती भेटायला…
translated_text: This famous actress had visited Sukesh Chandrashekhar so many times in Tihar Jail...
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a fact ("भेटायला गेली होती" - went to visit) without expressing any strong positive or negative opinions or feelings, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे आहे ऋतूजा लटकेंचे अजब राजीनामा पत्र!!!
translated_text: This is Rituja Latke's strange resignation letter!!!
Justification: The word "अजब" (ajab) meaning "strange" contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: माझ ही प्रेम आहे राहुल गांधी वर पण भाजप चा स्टार प्रचारक म्हणून
translated_text: I love Rahul Gandhi but as a star campaigner of BJP.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses love for Rahul Gandhi ("प्रेम आहे राहुल गांधी वर") but also indicates the speaker is a BJP campaigner ("भाजप चा स्टार प्रचारक म्हणून"). The contradictory nature of these two statements cancels out any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: श्री परमेश्वर मंदिर देवस्थान कमिटीच्या उपाध्यक्षपदी महावीरसेठ श्रीश्रीमाळ तर सचिवपदी देवकते यांची निवड..
translated_text: Mahavir Seth Sri Srimal was elected as the Vice President of the Shri Parmeshwar Temple Devasthan Committee and Devkate was elected as the Secretary.
Justification: The sentence primarily reports an election outcome, "निवड" (nivad), which translates to "election" or "selection." This is a neutral statement of fact, hence the neutral sentiment. The "joy" emotion likely stems from the implied positive feeling associated with being elected to a position.

Text: गोळ्या घेत जावा ताई वेळेवरमग अस नाही होणार
translated_text: Take your pills on time, then this won't happen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply providing advice. The phrase "गोळ्या घेत जावा ताई वेळेवर" (take your pills on time) suggests a suggestion or instruction without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: एकटेच होते का कोण अजुन होतं
translated_text: Was it alone? Who else was there?
Justification: The sentence exhibits neutrality due to the interrogative nature ("कोन अजुन होतं?") and factual questioning ("एकटेच होते का?"), lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations. There is no particular Marathi word driving any specific sentiment, as the utterance simply seeks information.

Text: ही वेळही निघून जाईल
translated_text: This time too will pass.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "ही वेळही निघून जाईल" (This time too will pass) expresses a general observation about the transient nature of time without conveying any positive or negative feelings. There is no specific word that contributes a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: लोकल रेल्वेने प्रवास करणाऱ्या महिलांसाठी महत्वाची बातमी! वाचा सविस्तर माहिती
translated_text: Important news for women traveling by local train! Read detailed information
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys information ("mahātvācī bātamī" - important news) without expressing any specific positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: हे बघ वहिनी काय बोलते
translated_text: Look what the sister-in-law is saying.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports speech ("काय बोलते" - kay bolte, "what is saying") without indicating any positive or negative feeling. The phrase is a statement of observation, not expressing an opinion.

Text: सरकार तुमचे आहे हो!!! हे विसरलात का??
translated_text: The government is yours!!! Have you forgotten this??
Justification: The phrase "हे विसरलात का??" (Have you forgotten this??) expresses frustration and a sense of reprimand, indicating anger.

Text: आज पुन्हा एक फुल उमलले ब्रम्हकमळ
translated_text: Today, another flower has bloomed, the Brahma lotus.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (Joy) due to the phrase "उमलले ब्रम्हकमळ" (umalale brahmakamal), which implies the blossoming of a Brahma lotus, a rare and auspicious event, evoking a sense of joy and wonder.

Text: हर्ष मानसी नाव आहे बोल....
translated_text: Harsh Manasi's name is....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a name ("हर्ष मानसी नाव आहे") without expressing any particular emotion or opinion.

Text: महागाईवर बोला आणि महागाई कमी करा मोदी सरकार
translated_text: Talk about inflation and reduce inflation, Modi government
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a straightforward demand or instruction ("महागाईवर बोला आणि महागाई कमी करा"), lacking overtly positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: सचिन आला रे...आयला!
translated_text: Sachin has arrived...arrived!
Justification: "आला रे...आयला!" expresses excitement and joy, but in this context, especially with "आयला!", suggests a playful, almost sarcastic enthusiasm. While positive, the underlying feeling leans toward neutral due to the potential for playful irony or exaggeration conveyed by "आयला!".

Text: नाना म्हणजे जिकडे भेळ तिकडे खेळ
translated_text: Nana means wherever you go, play there.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence uses the phrase "जिकडे भेळ तिकडे खेळ" (jikde bhel tikde khel), which is a common idiom implying a carefree and opportunistic attitude. It does not express any positive or negative feeling, simply a way of life.

Text: फुटबॉल: -   आशियाई चषक पात्रता फेरीत भारताचा ऑस्ट्रेलियाकडून  -  असा पराभव झाला.
translated_text: Football: - India lost to Australia in the Asian Cup qualifiers.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) due to the word "पराभव" (parabhav), which means defeat/loss. This directly indicates a negative outcome and therefore sadness.

Text: मामूंना अंधारे बाईंची भाषा आणि आशय स्वीकारार्ह आहे का ते आधी स्पष्ट करा.
translated_text: First, explain to your parents whether the language and content of Andhare Bai is acceptable.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a request for clarification. The phrase "आधी स्पष्ट करा" (adhi spasht kara) - "first, explain" indicates a neutral request rather than an expression of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाग -भाजपा- भाग अंधेरी (पूर्व) मतदार संघ ही तर सुरुवात आहे!
translated_text: Part -BJP- Part Andheri (East) constituency is just the beginning!
Justification: The phrase "सुरुवात आहे!" (suruvaat aahe!) meaning "is the beginning!" implies a positive outlook and anticipation of future events, hence conveying joy.

Text: अजून काय आहे का आता थापासाठी सतरंजी
translated_text: What else is there to play now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual question. The phrase "अजून काय आहे का" (aajun kay aahe ka) simply asks "what else is there?", indicating inquiry rather than any positive or negative emotion.

Text: आपण सर्व पण असे शासकीय कार्यालयामध्ये निवेदन देऊन हलाल सक्ती विरोधी निवेदन देऊ शकतो.
translated_text: We can all make a statement against halal compulsion by submitting a statement to a government office.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral statement about the possibility of submitting a statement against halal compulsion; the phrase "निवेदन देऊ शकतो" (nivedan deu shakto) indicating the ability to submit a statement, is presented without any explicit positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment overall.

Text: हे भुजबळ तर नाहीयेत ना
translated_text: This is not Bhujbal, is it?
Justification: The word "नाहीयेत ना" (naahiyet naa), a tag question indicating doubt and seeking confirmation, contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: आता राणे गेले असे समजा राजकारणातून
translated_text: Now suppose Rane is gone from politics.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the implication of Rane's political departure and the finality suggested by "आता राणे गेले असे समजा राजकारणातून" which evokes a sense of loss and sadness. "गेले असे समजा" (suppose is gone) contributes to this feeling of finality.

Text: ब्राम्हण अंधारात येऊन गेला तर चालतो का
translated_text: Is it okay if a Brahmin comes and goes in the dark?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("चालतो का") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The question itself, although potentially loaded with social commentary related to caste ("ब्राम्हण"), does not inherently express an emotion or opinion.

Text: सगळे एक, एकासाठीच असतात सर....
translated_text: Everyone is for one another, sir...
Justification: The sentence expresses unity and support without any explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सगळे एक, एकासाठीच असतात" (sagle ek, ekasathich astat) simply states that everyone is for one another, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: आज पासून प्रचार करू , " आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे "
translated_text: We will campaign from today, "We want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena"
Justification: The sentence expresses an intention to campaign and defeat a political party. While it mentions "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - to defeat), the statement is presented as a political objective rather than an expression of strong positive or negative emotion. Therefore, the presence of "हरवायचे आहे" indicates a neutral sentiment in a political context.

Text: लहान मुलांना असते अंगठे चोखण्याची सवय...पाहा काय आहे उपाय?
translated_text: Small children have the habit of sucking their thumbs...what's the solution?
Justification: The phrase "पाहा काय आहे उपाय?" (pāhā kāya āhe upāya?) - "what's the solution?" - evokes surprise, as it implies an unexpected problem and seeks a remedy.

Text: नंतर ची आणि      आधीची निवडणूक होती.. सर्व पक्ष वेगळे लढले होते
translated_text: There was an election after that and before that.. All the parties fought separately.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes past election events factually ("नंतर ची आणि आधीची निवडणूक होती.. सर्व पक्ष वेगळे लढले होते"). There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases.

Text: अंधेरी विधानसभा पोट निवडणुकीमधून भाजप उमेदवाराची माघार घेणे ही घटना कोणत्या राजकीय पक्षाला फायद्याची ठरेल?
translated_text: Which political party will benefit from the BJP candidate's withdrawal from the Andheri assembly by-election?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about potential benefit ("फायद्याची ठरेल?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment towards any party or the event itself.

Text: किमान बुर्जीपावची गाडी लावायला तरी जागा द्यायची होती
translated_text: At least there should be room for a Burji Pav car.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or expectation ("द्यायची होती" - should be given), rather than a positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सेम तसाचं जसा पवार साहेबांनी      ची लोकसभा न-लढवण्याचा निर्णय घेतला होता...
translated_text: Same as Pawar Saheb had decided not to contest the Lok Sabha elections...
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the implied context and comparison to a previous decision by Pawar Saheb not to contest elections. While no single word explicitly expresses sadness, the comparison to a past decision of withdrawal (indicated by "न-लढवण्याचा निर्णय घेतला" - n-ladhvanyacha nirnay ghetla - decided not to contest) suggests a similar situation, hinting at potential loss or unfavorable circumstances leading to sadness.

Text: हा फोटो होता आधी ... लगेच बदलला.
translated_text: This was the photo before... it was changed immediately.
Justification: The sentence describes a change ("बदलला") in a neutral tone, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. "बदलला" simply indicates a change occurred, without any emotional coloring.

Text: हे पण सांगा की मिलिंद नार्वेकर पण आहेत
translated_text: Also tell me that Milind is also a Narvekar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact. There is no emotional language present; the phrase "हे पण सांगा की मिलिंद नार्वेकर पण आहेत" (also tell me that Milind is also a Narvekar) is purely informational.

Text: हे आधी गुजराती लोकांना समजले पाहीजे.
translated_text: Gujarati people should understand this first.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states a factual observation ("हे आधी गुजराती लोकांना समजले पाहीजे" - this should be understood by Gujarati people first) without expressing any positive or negative feeling. There is no emotive language present.

Text: आयफेल टॉवरला उलटा केला की झाली मशाल .. काँग्रेसचा हात आणि राष्ट्रवादीचं घड्याळ ...
translated_text: When the Eiffel Tower was turned upside down, it became a torch.. Congress's hand and NCP's watch...
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive and satirical, comparing political symbols to everyday objects. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "आयफेल टॉवरला उलटा केला की झाली मशाल" is a statement of supposed fact, and the rest simply lists political party symbols. There's no strong indication of negativity or positivity toward the objects or parties.

Text: स्थानिक लोकांचा सहभाग घेतल्या शिवाय जबरदस्तीने लोकांवर का लादु इच्छिता ...
translated_text: Why do you want to forcefully impose it on the people without involving the local people?
Justification: The phrase "जबरदस्तीने लोकांवर का लादु इच्छिता" (why do you want to forcefully impose it on the people) expresses anger and disapproval towards the act of forceful imposition.

Text: कृपया शासनाने तात्काळ लक्ष द्यावे हि नम्र विनंती
translated_text: Please, I humbly request the government to pay immediate attention to this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," indicating a neutral sentiment as it lacks strong positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: होय आमच्या गावात देवीचे पुजारी चांभार समाजाचे आहेत... तर सिद्धानाथाचे व महादेवाचे डवरी समाजाचे....
translated_text: Yes, in our village, the goddess's priests are from the Chambhar community... while those of Siddhanath and Mahadev are from the Dawari community....
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation regarding the caste of priests in the village ("गावात देवीचे पुजारी चांभार समाजाचे आहेत... तर सिद्धानाथाचे व महादेवाचे डवरी समाजाचे...."). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: महर्षि प्रमाणे व्यास ही सुद्धा उपाधीच आहे.तुम्ही कोणत्या व्यासांबद्दल बोलत आहात?
translated_text: Like Maharishi, Vyas is also a title. Which Vyas are you talking about?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a factual statement and a clarifying question. The phrase "उपाधीच आहे" (upadhich aahe - is also a title) indicates a statement of fact, and "कोणत्या व्यासांबद्दल बोलत आहात?" (konatya vyasabaddal bolat aahat? - Which Vyas are you talking about?) is a neutral question seeking clarification.

Text: पाकड्यां विरुद्ध आली होती ना ती खेळी?
translated_text: Was that play against Pakistan?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple question about a game ("खेळी") against Pakistan ("पाकड्यां विरुद्ध"). There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases present.

Text: पितरांसाठी पान ठेवले होते ना?
translated_text: Was the leaf kept for the ancestors?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple question about a ritual ("पितरांसाठी पान ठेवले होते ना?") without any explicit emotional or opinionated language, hence the neutral sentiment. The phrase "पितरांसाठी पान ठेवले होते ना?" inquires about a common practice, remaining objective and devoid of emotional tone.

Text: मी आजपर्यंत नाही खाल्ला
translated_text: I haven't eaten yet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("मी आजपर्यंत नाही खाल्ला" - I haven't eaten yet). The presence of "नाही" (nahi - not) simply indicates a lack of eating, not a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ही तर वाढवलेली वाटत आहेत
translated_text: These seem to be exaggerated.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "वाढवलेली वाटत आहेत" (vaadhavleli vaatat aahet) which translates to "seem to be exaggerated" simply states an observation without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. It doesn't convey happiness, sadness, anger, or any other specific emotion.

Text: ऑक्टोबरमध्येही का पडतो आहे पाऊस?
translated_text: Why is it raining even in October?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) with surprise as the primary emotion, driven by the phrase "का पडतो आहे पाऊस?" which translates to "Why is it raining?". The question expresses unexpectedness, indicating surprise rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: पूर्ण व्हिडिओ टाका हा
translated_text: Put the full video here
Justification: The sentence "पूर्ण व्हिडिओ टाका हा" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple request. There is no specific word that strongly indicates positive or negative emotion; the phrase "पूर्ण व्हिडिओ टाका" (put the full video) is a direct instruction.

Text: पडण्याची भीती जास्त होती
translated_text: The fear of falling was high.
Justification: "भीती जास्त होती" (bheeti jaasta hoti - fear was high) expresses a strong negative sentiment and evokes the emotion of fear due to the explicit mention of "fear" being high.

Text: तसंच नड्डा नामधारी, निर्णय गुजराती नेत्यांचे
translated_text: Also Nadda's name, decision is up to Gujarati leaders
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the statement. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "तसंच नड्डा नामधारी, निर्णय गुजराती नेत्यांचे" simply states an observation.

Text: जिल्हा मध्यवर्ती बँकेचे कर्ज माफी जाली नाही साहेब ते पण पहा यवतमाळ जिल्हा
translated_text: District Central Bank loan waiver is not done, sir, look at that too, Yavatmal District
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("कर्ज माफी जाली नाही" - "loan waiver is not done") without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: साहेब एकदा आदरणीय राष्ट्रपतिजी द्रोपदी मुर्मू म्हणून दाखवा ना साहेब पिलीज
translated_text: Sir, please show the respected President as Draupadi Murmu.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's primarily a request ("दाखवा ना") and a statement of fact ("आदरणीय राष्ट्रपतिजी द्रोपदी मुर्मू"). There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed in the phrasing.

Text: तुमचे बनवून पाठवू का बोला ते पण करतो
translated_text: I'll make it for you and send it to you.
Justification: The sentence expresses an offer to create and send something, conveyed through the phrase "बनवून पाठवू का" (banavun pathavu ka), which lacks any inherent positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: तो सूर्याजी पिसाळ आहे.
translated_text: That's Suryaji Pisal.
Justification: The sentence "तो सूर्याजी पिसाळ आहे" (That's Suryaji Pisal) is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact or identification. No specific word or phrase carries any inherent positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: ‘नेत्रा’ने शेअर केला मेकअप करतानाचा व्हिडीओ
translated_text: Netra' shared a video of herself applying makeup
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral activity ("मेकअप करतानाचा व्हिडीओ" - makeup video) without any indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: असे बरेचसे आहेत अजून...
translated_text: There are many more like this...
Justification: "असे बरेचसे आहेत अजून..." translates to "There are many more like this...". The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the descriptive and quantifying nature of the phrase "बरेचसे आहेत" (berechase aahet), which simply states "there are many". It lacks any explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: बाळासाहेब म्हणजे कोणते आणि त्यांची तुलना करत कोणा सोबत करत आहेत शिल्लक सैनिक
translated_text: What is Balasaheb and who are the remaining soldiers comparing him with?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "बाळासाहेब म्हणजे कोणते आणि त्यांची तुलना करत कोणा सोबत करत आहेत" (baLasāheba mhaṇaje koṇate āṇi tyān̄cī tulanā karata koṇā sobata karata āheta) simply inquires about Balasaheb's qualities and the comparison being made, without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling.

Text: काही वर्षांपूर्वी सगळ्यात जास्त भारतीय विद्यार्थी शिक्षणासाठी यूकेलाच पहिली पसंती देत होते.
translated_text: A few years ago, most Indian students were choosing the UK as their first choice for education.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual preference from the past, with no inherently positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "पहिली पसंती देत होते" (pahili pasanti det hote) meaning "were giving first preference" simply describes a past trend without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: आता मशालीत भरायला गॅस परवडतो का?
translated_text: Can you afford gas to fill your torch now?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about affordability ("परवडतो का?") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The core phrase "परवडतो का?" simply inquires about financial viability.

Text: या दिवाळीत हे अॅप डाउनलोड करा आणि त्यातून अनेक आकर्षक बक्षिसे मिळवा.
translated_text: Download this app this Diwali and get many attractive prizes from it.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes downloading an app and receiving prizes; there are no inherently positive or negative words. No specific Marathi word indicates a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is purely informational and descriptive.

Text: तुले तं पाच पानी आमंत्रण पत्रिका पाठवली होती!
translated_text: You sent me a five-page invitation!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is anger due to the implied excessive formality and wastefulness suggested by "पाच पानी आमंत्रण पत्रिका" (paach paani amantran patrika - five-page invitation). The speaker likely feels this level of invitation was unnecessary and perhaps even a deliberate attempt to create distance or convey disapproval.

Text: तुमच्यावाल्या सपोर्ट करून आम्हांला काय मिळणार आहे का
translated_text: What will we gain from your support?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a question of potential benefit ("काय मिळणार आहे का"), without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "काय मिळणार आहे का" simply inquires about the expected outcome.

Text: अर्थ...केला असेल आमच्या मालकांनी पूर्वी भ्रष्टाचार...दे की सोडून...असे म्हणतो आहे हा
translated_text: Meaning...our owners must have committed corruption in the past...give or leave...he is saying this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the speculative and somewhat resigned tone. The phrase "अर्थ...केला असेल आमच्या मालकांनी पूर्वी भ्रष्टाचार...दे की सोडून...असे म्हणतो आहे हा" lacks strong positive or negative indicators, conveying a factual statement with an element of uncertainty.

Text: शाश्वत विकास काय आहे हेच डॉ.जयंत परुळेकर यांना समजलेले नाही – विजय केनवडेकर
translated_text: Dr. Jayant Parulekar does not understand what sustainable development is – Vijay Kenawadekar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply stating a fact or opinion without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समजलेले नाही" (samajlele nahi) indicates a lack of understanding, but doesn't carry inherent negativity in this context, functioning as an observation.

Text: एका महिलेशी कसे वागलात? वयोव्रुध्दाशी कसे वागलात? विसरलात का?
translated_text: How do you treat a woman? How do you treat old age? Have you forgotten?
Justification: The sentence primarily consists of questioning and factual recall ("विसरलात का?"). While it could imply criticism, without further context, it lacks strong positive or negative indicators, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "विसरलात का?" (Have you forgotten?) is suggestive but not definitively negative or positive.

Text: घर तेच पण गोशाळा समोर
translated_text: The house is the same but in front of the cowshed
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation without any emotional cues. The phrase "घर तेच" (ghar tech) meaning "the house is the same," and "गोशाळा समोर" (goshaLa samor) meaning "in front of the cowshed" are neutral descriptions.

Text: सूचनेची नोंद घेण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: The suggestion has been noted.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "नोद घेण्यात आली आहे" (nodh ghenyat ali aahe), which simply indicates that the suggestion has been noted, conveying no positive or negative feeling.

Text: वर्धा आणि गडचिरोली जिल्हयात अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची आज केंद्रीय पथकानं केली पाहणी.
translated_text: A central team inspected the damage caused by heavy rains in Wardha and Gadchiroli districts today.
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, an inspection of damage. The phrase "पाहणी केली" (pahani keli) which translates to "inspected" or "surveyed," is a factual statement indicating an action taken rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: रुपयांपेक्षा कमी किंमतीत खरेदी करा   फोन; मिळेल    दिवसांचा बॅटरी बॅकअप
translated_text: Buy a phone for less than Rs; Get days of battery backup
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating factual information about a product offer; there are no emotionally charged words or phrases.
