The phrase "रुपयांपेक्षा कमी किंमतीत खरेदी करा" (rupayapekshaa kami kimtit kharedi kara - buy for less than rupees) and "दिवसांचा बॅटरी बॅकअप" (divasancha battery backup - days of battery backup) are descriptive but not inherently positive or negative.

Text: आदल्या दिवशी कोणी काही ही खाऊ शकत..
translated_text: Can anyone eat anything the day before?
Justification: The sentence "आदल्या दिवशी कोणी काही ही खाऊ शकत.." expresses a general possibility and lacks any inherently positive or negative connotations, hence the neutral sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase driving any particular emotion.

Text: वय वर्ष    झाल्यावर आठवलं हे साहेबांना
translated_text: I remembered this when I was a year old, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple statement of recollection with no inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "वय वर्ष झाल्यावर आठवलं" (remembered when I was a year old) is a factual recall, devoid of emotional coloring or subjective assessment.

Text: कोण आहे ही?
translated_text: Who is this?
Justification: The phrase "कोण आहे ही?" (Kon aahe hee?) expressing a question of identity, lacks inherent emotional valence and thus represents neutral sentiment (0). The surprise emotion arises from the unexpected or unknown nature of the person being questioned, rather than from any specific word suggesting negativity or positivity.

Text: ऍड. आशिष शेलार साहेब तुमचे सांत्वनपर शब्द बाहेर पडतील का?
translated_text: Adv. Ashish Shelar Saheb, will your words of comfort come out?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking for words of comfort ("सांत्वनपर शब्द"). It does not express any positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text: हा व्हिडिओ क्लिप हिंगणे खुर्द मधील आहे आणि तिला आता एक वर्ष झालं
translated_text: This video clip is from Hingne Khurd and it has been a year now.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the video clip's origin and age. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase; it's purely informational ("हा व्हिडिओ क्लिप हिंगणे खुर्द मधील आहे आणि तिला आता एक वर्ष झालं").

Text: ला कोणाला मतदान करायचं हे मात्र जनता ठरवणार अध्यक्ष महोदय.
translated_text: But the people will decide who to vote for, Mr. President.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the people's role in deciding the vote. The phrase "जनता ठरवणार" (janata tharavnar) meaning "the people will decide," is neutral and does not convey any strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: पहिले मराठी शुद्धलेखन शिकुन ये मग समजवतो तुला कंपन्या असे लिहीतात
translated_text: First learn proper Marathi writing, then I'll explain to you how companies write.
Justification: The sentence carries a neutral sentiment (0) due to the overall tone of instruction or correction ("शिकुन ये मग समजवतो तुला"), lacking any overtly positive or negative language. While potentially condescending, it's presented more as a statement of fact or future action rather than direct insult.

Text: त्या सहा मध्ये कोणा कोणाला मंत्रिपद आहे सांगाल का सर
translated_text: Sir, can you tell me which of those six has a ministerial post?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information. The Marathi phrase "सांगाल का सर" (saangal ka sir) which translates to "can you tell me sir" is a polite way to ask a question and doesn't express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: अडानचोट लोकांना एडिटिंगही निट करता येत नाही  हे ओरिजनल आहे सरकारनामाचं...
translated_text: This is the original of Sarkarnama, people who are stubborn and can't even edit...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively describes a lack of editing skill ("एडिटिंगही निट करता येत नाही") and attributes the original work to "सरकारनामाचं" (Sarkarnama) without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: हे कोनत्या रिंग चे आहेत
translated_text: What ring are these from?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question ("हे कोनत्या रिंग चे आहेत" - What ring are these from?) without any emotionally charged or subjective language. The question "कोनत्या" (which) is simply seeking information.

Text: क्षेत्रात जबरदस्त पैसा आहे. तुमची परिश्रम घेण्याची तयारी आहे का, ते पहा.
translated_text: There is a lot of money in the field. See if you are willing to work hard.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about the potential for wealth ("जबरदस्त पैसा आहे") and poses a question about willingness to work, lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: मागील अडीच वर्षे कुणाकडे मदत मागितली होती.
translated_text: I had asked someone for help for the past two and a half years.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "मागील अडीच वर्षे कुणाकडे मदत मागितली होती" (I had asked someone for help for the past two and a half years) simply states a past action without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "मदत मागितली होती" (asked for help) indicates an action, but without further context, it doesn't convey any particular emotion.

Text: ह्यात "मराठी रोजगार " ही येतो का?
translated_text: Does this include "Marathi employment"?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question. The Marathi phrase "मराठी रोजगार" (Marathi employment) itself doesn't carry any inherent sentiment or emotion. The question "येतो का?" (does it include?) is also neutral.

Text: हे देश धर्म सर्वोपरि असल्याचे प्रतिक आहे.
translated_text: This country is a symbol of religion being paramount.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact/belief about the country being a symbol of religious paramountcy. The phrase "सर्वोपरि असल्याचे प्रतिक आहे" ("sarvopari aslyache pratik aahe" - a symbol of being paramount) simply describes a state and does not convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: “महाराष्ट्राच्या भविष्यासाठी, सर्व ठाकरेंनी, आता तरी एकत्र यायला हवं”
translated_text: “For the future of Maharashtra, all Thackerays should come together now at least”
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for unity among the Thackerays for the sake of Maharashtra's future. While it implies a potentially positive outcome, the word "हवं" (havan/should) indicates a suggestion or necessity, not a definitive positive or negative sentiment. It is a call for action, hence it is rated as neutral.

Text: व यांच्या चढाओढीत ने आपले नुकसान करुन घेऊ नये
translated_text: And don't let your losses get in the way of their struggle.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it provides advice without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नुकसान करुन घेऊ नये" (nuksan karun gheu naye) meaning "don't let losses get in the way," is a statement of caution or advice, not inherently positive or negative in isolation.

Text: पण हा का बाहेर येईल?
translated_text: But why will this come out?
Justification: The question "का बाहेर येईल?" (ka baher yeil?) expresses surprise about the possibility of something coming out. "का" (ka) which means "why" in this context is used to indicate surprise rather than simply requesting information.

Text: म्हणून तर मुख्यमंत्री झाला.....
translated_text: So he became the Chief Minister...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "म्हणून तर मुख्यमंत्री झाला" (mhanun tar mukhyamantri jhala) simply states a fact (he became the Chief Minister) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase itself is purely descriptive.

Text: आता काही दिवस हे निर्बंध लॉकडाउन सारख पाळलं जाणार आहे म्हणून जपून रहा.
translated_text: These restrictions will be followed like a lockdown for a few days, so be careful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it mentions "निर्बंध लॉकडाउन सारख" (restrictions like a lockdown), it primarily focuses on advising caution with "जपून रहा" (be careful), lacking strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Kojagiri full moon
Justification: The sentence "कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा" is neutral as it simply refers to a specific full moon festival. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase itself.

Text: घालून घे गार गार वाटेल , तसं पण मशालीने तुझी झिलगर्ली असेलच
translated_text: It may feel cold to wear it, but your torch will be lit.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents two opposing sensations ("गार गार वाटेल" - it may feel cold) and ("मशालीने तुझी झिलगर्ली असेलच" - your torch will be lit), without indicating a clear positive or negative leaning.

Text: अरे भाजप मध्ये तर निवडणूक देखील होत नाही त्याबद्दल बोल
translated_text: Oh, BJP doesn't even hold elections, talk about it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply stating a fact/opinion about BJP not holding elections ("निवडणूक देखील होत नाही") and suggesting discussion on the topic ("त्याबद्दल बोल"). There is no inherent positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: हा पर्याय होता की नाही, तुमच्या लोकशाहीमध्ये??
translated_text: Was this an option or not, in your democracy??
Justification: The sentence ends with a rhetorical question ("तुमच्या लोकशाहीमध्ये?? - in your democracy??") without any explicit positive or negative words, indicating neutrality.

Text: आशिष शेलार यांनी नुकताच मुंबई क्रिकेट संघटनेच्या अध्यक्षपदासाठी अर्ज दाखल केला होता
translated_text: Ashish Shelar had recently filed his application for the post of President of the Mumbai Cricket Association.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("अर्ज दाखल केला होता" - filed his application) without any emotionally charged language.

Text: मजेत आला आहेस तर दिवाळी नंतरच जा
translated_text: If you're having fun, go after Diwali.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply suggests a timeframe for departure ("दिवाळी नंतरच जा" - "go after Diwali") based on the person having fun, without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ह्यावर काही शासन निर्णय आला का? तसेच आजच्या मंत्रीमंडळात ह्यावर काही चर्चा झाली का?
translated_text: Has there been any government decision on this? Also, was there any discussion on this in today's cabinet meeting?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks informational questions using words like "शासन निर्णय आला का?" (has there been a government decision?) and "चर्चा झाली का?" (was there discussion?), indicating an objective inquiry rather than a positive, negative, or emotional statement.

Text: मुबंई आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणात बाळ ठाकरेंचे स्थान ध्रुव तार्यासारखे अढळ आहे .
translated_text: Bal Thackeray's place in Mumbai and Maharashtra politics is as unwavering as the North Star.
Justification: The phrase "ध्रुव तार्यासारखे अढळ" (dhruv taryasarkhe adhal - as unwavering as the North Star) indicates a stable and constant presence, which doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: फडणवीसांना राज ठाकरेंचे पत्र : अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूकीत ऋतुजा लटके आमदार होतील हे पहावे
translated_text: Raj Thackeray's letter to Fadnavis: Let's see if Rituja Latke will become an MLA in the Andheri by-election
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about a letter from Raj Thackeray to Fadnavis regarding the Andheri by-election. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूकीत ऋतुजा लटके आमदार होतील हे पहावे" (Let's see if Rituja Latke will become an MLA in the Andheri by-election) is a factual statement and carries no inherent emotion or sentiment.

Text: मानापमानाच्या पुढे म्हणजे उपकार का
translated_text: Why is gratitude more important than respect?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a philosophical question using the phrase "मानापमानाच्या पुढे म्हणजे उपकार का" ("why is gratitude more important than respect?") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: धर्माच्या दलालांनो प्रेमास जात नसते..  उत्कर्ष शिंदे गाणं आहे ऐका
translated_text: The brokers of religion do not go to love.. This is a song by Utkarsh Shinde, listen to it
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's stating a fact ("प्रेमास जात नसते" - love has no caste) and inviting the listener to listen to a song. There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: याने तर ट्वीट सेव करायला सांगितले होते.
translated_text: He even asked me to save the tweet.
Justification: The sentence "याने तर ट्वीट सेव करायला सांगितले होते" is neutral because it's a simple statement of fact. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "सांगितले होते" (sangitale hote) simply states that someone "asked" or "told" something, which is neutral in tone.

Text: ढाल तलवारीला असा काही प्रॉब्लेम येणार नाही..
translated_text: The shield and sword will not have such a problem.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a lack of problem ("येणार नाही") for the shield and sword. There's no indication of positivity, negativity, or any strong emotion.

Text: विचार सारखेच आहेत...
translated_text: The thoughts are the same...
Justification: The sentence expresses similarity without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The phrase "सारखेच आहेत" (sarkhech aahet - are the same) simply indicates a neutral comparison, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मशाल निवडून येणार हे कळल्यावर आत्म्याला शांती वैगरे आठवलं असावं
translated_text: The soul must have felt peace and tranquility after learning that Mashal would be elected.
Justification: The word "शांती" (shanti), meaning peace, suggests a positive feeling and contributes to the overall joy.

translated_text: Why is this...??
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with surprise primarily driven by the "का....??" (ka....??) which expresses a questioning and surprised tone. The elongated question marker emphasizes the speaker's disbelief or questioning attitude.

Text: फक्त ठाकरे परिवार वाचवण्याची धडपड बाकी काही नाही
translated_text: There is nothing else but the struggle to save the Thackeray family.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it objectively describes an action ("फक्त ठाकरे परिवार वाचवण्याची धडपड") without expressing positive or negative feeling towards it. The phrase simply states the focus is on saving the Thackeray family.

Text: लायकी आहे का ?
translated_text: Is it worth it?
Justification: The sentence "लायकी आहे का ?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question asking about worthiness or capability ("लायकी"). It doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion.

translated_text: If everyone thought like this...........??
Justification: The phrase "तर...........??" implies a questioning and speculative tone, suggesting the speaker is considering a hypothetical situation with an element of surprise or uncertainty about the potential outcome.

Text: हे काय आहे फोटो
translated_text: What is this photo?
Justification: The phrase "हे काय आहे" (he kay aahe), meaning "what is this," expresses surprise, indicating a neutral sentiment in this specific context as it's a simple question of inquiry.

Text: आता तर अंघोळही पावसातच होत आहे..
translated_text: Now even bathing is done in the rain.
Justification: The sentence describes a commonplace action ("आता तर अंघोळही पावसातच होत आहे"), with no specific words indicating positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: पण भाजपा ने लढू दिले तर?नाहीतर नुसते कागदी, तात्पुरते.
translated_text: But what if the BJP lets him fight? Otherwise, it's just on paper, temporary.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and skepticism. The phrase "नुसते कागदी, तात्पुरते" (nusate kagadi, tatpurte) implying "just on paper, temporary," indicates a neutral sentiment as it lacks strong positive or negative emotional tone, simply questioning the authenticity of a potential action.

Text: अग बाई बाळासाहेब लाखांनी आहेत पण ठाकरे मात्र एकच
translated_text: Oh my god, Balasaheb is in the millions, but Thackeray is only one.
Justification: The phrase "अग बाई" expresses surprise, similar to "Oh my god" in English.

Text: अतु आणि तुमचा पण शिंदे साहेबांवर पुतणा मावशीच प्रेम आहे...
translated_text: Atu and you also have the same love for Shinde Saheb as a nephew and aunt...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "पुतणा मावशीच प्रेम" (putna mavshich prem), meaning "love like a nephew and aunt," is a common expression and doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: जगातील सर्वात सुंदर महिलांमध्ये आली दीपिका, अशी आहे परफेक्ट फेस निवडण्याची प्रक्रिया
translated_text: Deepika is among the most beautiful women in the world, this is the process of choosing the perfect face
Justification: The sentence reports a neutral fact about Deepika Padukone being included in a list of beautiful women. There is no overtly positive or negative language. Words like "जगातील" (jagatil - world), "सर्वात" (sarvat - most), "सुंदर" (sundar - beautiful), and "महिलांमध्ये" (mahilamadhye - among women) simply state the fact, not expressing any strong emotion.

Text: विषय तुला माहिती नाही अगोदर तो माहिती करून घे विशाल
translated_text: If you don't know the subject, find out about it first, Vishal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion to gather information. The phrase "माहिती करून घे" (mahiti karun ghe - find out about it) is a neutral directive, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: खाजगी वाहतुकदारांनी निर्धारीत करण्यात आलेल्या दरापेक्षा अधिक दर आकारल्यास मोटार वाहन कायद्यान्वये होणार कारवाई
translated_text: Action will be taken under the Motor Vehicles Act if private transporters charge more than the prescribed rate.
Justification: The phrase "अधिक दर आकारल्यास" (adhik dar aakarlyas - charge more than the prescribed rate) implies exploitation and unfairness, leading to a negative sentiment and specifically eliciting anger.

Text: तो सांगू शकतो का स्वतः ला वाला
translated_text: Can he tell me who he is?
Justification: The sentence "तो सांगू शकतो का स्वतः ला वाला" is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "सांगू शकतो का" (sangu shakto ka - can tell) expresses an inquiry rather than a feeling, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अनेक वेळा झालंय अस, गूगल पे कमी नाही आल तर फोन पे नेहमी वाचवतो
translated_text: It has happened many times, Google Pay is not less, but Phone Pay always saves.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the reliability of PhonePe compared to Google Pay. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "फोन पे नेहमी वाचवतो" (Phone Pay always saves), which is presented as a statement of utility rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: असा एकच माणूस आहे असं आम्ही ऐकून आहोत.
translated_text: We have heard that there is only one such person.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a reported fact ("असा एकच माणूस आहे असं आम्ही ऐकून आहोत" - We have heard that there is only one such person) without expressing any positive or negative feeling or emotion. The phrase "ऐकून आहोत" (have heard) indicates a neutral transmission of information.

Text: निवडणुका बिनविरोध करणे लोकशाहीला मान्य आहे का?
translated_text: Is it acceptable for democracy to hold elections unopposed?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about the acceptability of unopposed elections in a democracy. The phrase "**निवडणुका बिनविरोध करणे**" (elections unopposed doing/making) is presented without any inherent positive or negative connotation; it is simply the subject of the question.

Text: नाव तर अजित आहे पण रोहित सुद्धा असू शकत
translated_text: The name is Ajit but it could also be Rohit.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply presents a possibility ("असू शकत" - could be) without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The statement is matter-of-fact.

Text: सूर्याचं कमी होते
translated_text: The sun is getting lower.
Justification: "कमी होते" (kami hote) indicating "getting lower" expresses a factual observation without subjective feelings, justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: निवडणुक आयोग हे केंद्राच्या अखत्यारीत येत त्यामुळे निकालही त्यांच्याच बाजुने देणार
translated_text: The Election Commission comes under the jurisdiction of the Centre, so the results will also be given on their side.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the Election Commission and its perceived influence, lacking overt positive or negative language. The Marathi phrasing "केंद्राच्या अखत्यारीत येत" (comes under the jurisdiction of the Centre) simply states a structural relationship, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: पहिला मजला ऐश्र्वर माहिती होती
translated_text: The first floor was filled with divine information.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "ऐश्र्वर माहिती होती" (filled with divine information) describes a state of being informative and divine, without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. It's simply stating a fact.

Text: लोकांना आजची सुनावणी झाली की कळेल, का शिंदे मुख्यमंत्री झाले आणि फडणवीस उपमुख्यमंत्री !!
translated_text: People will know after today's hearing why Shinde became the Chief Minister and Fadnavis the Deputy Chief Minister!!
Justification: The anger likely stems from the implied skepticism and frustration embedded in the question "का शिंदे मुख्यमंत्री झाले आणि फडणवीस उपमुख्यमंत्री !!", suggesting disbelief or disapproval regarding the political outcome.

Text: लाखो करोडोंच्या श्रीमंतीत नाही तर.... माणुसकी आजही शून्यातून जन्म घेते..!!
translated_text: Not in the wealth of millions of crores, but.... Humanity is still born from nothing..!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral/slightly positive despite the anger emotion because the phrase "माणुसकी आजही शून्यातून जन्म घेते" (Humanity is still born from nothing) expresses a hopeful and positive concept of humanity's resilience, outweighing the initial negativity implied by lack of wealth.

Text: अंडी खाल्ली की पोट दुखते त्या वर काही उपाय आहे का??
translated_text: Is there any remedy for stomach ache after eating eggs?
Justification: The sentence expresses a query about a remedy for stomach ache ("पोट दुखते") experienced after eating eggs, indicating a neutral sentiment as it's a factual question, not expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: बाळा साहेब हे पण बोलले होते सोनिया गांधी यांच्यासमोर स्थिर होते
translated_text: Balasaheb had also said this, standing firm in front of Sonia Gandhi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a historical statement and action ("स्थिर होते" - standing firm) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: मोदीजींच्या फोटोची बॅग नाही का राशन किटला?
translated_text: Why doesn't the ration kit have a bag with Modiji's photo?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's simply questioning the absence of Modiji's photo on the ration kit bag. The Marathi phrase "नाही का" (nahi ka) indicates a question rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: बिहारचे नितिश कुमार आणि महाराष्ट्राचे शरद पवार यांच्यात बरेच साम्य आहे.
translated_text: There are many similarities between Bihar's Nitish Kumar and Maharashtra's Sharad Pawar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact, comparing two political figures. The Marathi phrase "बरेच साम्य आहे" (barech saamya aahe - there are many similarities) is neutral and objective, indicating observation rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्यांना त्यासाठी भत्ता पण दिला जातो
translated_text: They are also given an allowance for it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about an allowance being given. The phrase "भत्ता पण दिला जातो" (bhatta pan dila jato - allowance is also given) simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: सहा लाखात भेटत आसेल तर मी ही घेणार. भरून.
translated_text: If I can find it for six lakhs, I'll take it. Pay it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a conditional intention to purchase if the price is right. The phrase "सहा लाखात भेटत आसेल तर मी ही घेणार" (If I can find it for six lakhs, I'll take it) indicates a neutral stance pending a specific condition, and the additional phrase "भरून." (Pay it.) further strengthens the expression of transactional intent, rather than positive or negative emotion. Therefore, a sentiment score of 0 is appropriate.

Text: अण्णा हजारे कोठे त्यांच्या पेक्षा वेगळे आहेत.
translated_text: How is Anna Hazare different from them?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("कोठे वेगळे आहेत?") asking about a difference without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "कोठे वेगळे आहेत" (where/how different are) is purely informational and doesn't convey any sentiment.

Text: अयोध्या हयांचा हैक झाला आहे व्हाट्सप्प द्वारे त्यांनी ही माहिती दिली आहे.
translated_text: Ayodhya has been hacked, they have given this information through WhatsApp.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("हैक झाला आहे" - "has been hacked") without expressing any particular emotion or opinion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: : देव दर्शनाबरोबरच ‘हे’ देखील महत्वाचेच, एकनाथ खडसेंचा एकनाथ शिंदेंना ‘तो’ सल्ला काय?
translated_text: : Along with seeing God, 'this' is also important, what is Eknath Khadse's 'that' advice to Eknath Shinde?
Justification: The sentence primarily reports a piece of news/advice. The Marathi words "देव दर्शनाबरोबरच ‘हे’ देखील महत्वाचेच" and "सल्ला काय?" are neutral in expressing any particular positive or negative sentiment. It simply states that something is important and questions the nature of the advice.

Text: -    पोर आहेत... बाकीचे तुमचे लोक आहेत एवढ्यावर आला आहे आता तुम्ही
translated_text: - The boys are... the rest are your people. It's come to this now.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about a division between groups ("पोर आहेत..." and "तुमचे लोक आहेत"), lacking strong emotional coloring. The phrase "एवढ्यावर आला आहे आता तुम्ही" (it's come to this now) hints at a potential underlying negative sentiment, but lacks the intensity to shift the overall assessment from neutral.

Text: करतो दिया हे
translated_text: Doing this
Justification: The sentence "करतो दिया हे" (Karato diya he) is neutral because it simply states an action ("doing this") without any inherent positive or negative connotation. There is no specific word indicating sentiment.

Text: तुमच्यावरच विश्वास नाही बोलता एक करता एक.
translated_text: I don't trust you, you're just talking nonsense.
Justification: The phrase "विश्वास नाही" (vishwas nahi) directly translates to "no trust," indicating a lack of faith and therefore contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मी तर जोक्स वाचून करमणूक करण्यासाठीच करतोय.. बिन काही नाही हा
translated_text: I'm just reading jokes for fun.. It's not for nothing.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "करमणूक करण्यासाठीच करतोय" (karamunuk karnyasathi kartoy), meaning "doing it for fun," expresses a harmless intention and lacks any strong positive or negative connotations. The sentence structure and additional phrase "बिन काही नाही हा" (bin kahi nahi ha) further reinforce this neutrality by suggesting a lack of ulterior motive.

Text: हिमालयातील सेवाभारतीचे सेवाकार्य पर्वतीय भागात पर्यटनासाठी... ./__…
translated_text: Seva Bharati's service work in the Himalayas for tourism in the mountainous areas... ./__…
Justification: The sentence lacks specific emotional cues. It describes service work, which is generally considered a neutral activity. There isn't a specific Marathi word that stands out as indicative of any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: ला पक्ष नाही, आणि पक्षाला नाव कोणत्या बाळासाहेबांचे हेही माहिती नाही....
translated_text: There is no party, and the party doesn't even know which Balasaheb is named after...
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of information and absence of a party identity. The neutral sentiment stems from the descriptive and factual nature of the statement, specifically the phrases "ला पक्ष नाही" (there is no party) and "माहिती नाही" (doesn't know) indicating a lack of knowledge rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: खेकड़े पकडण्याचा कार्यक्रम ठेवला आहे का????
translated_text: Is there a crab catching program????
Justification: The sentence "खेकड़े पकडण्याचा कार्यक्रम ठेवला आहे का???? (Is there a crab catching program????)" expresses a simple question without any words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. It is a factual inquiry; hence, the sentiment is neutral. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that contributes to a positive or negative emotion. The entire sentence is neutral.

Text: त्यामुळेच ही तुलना होऊच शकत नाही
translated_text: That's why this comparison can't be made.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the impossibility of comparison. The Marathi phrase "होऊच शकत नाही" (houuch shakat nahi) which means "cannot be made" or "is not possible", indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: जातीचा परिणाम नसून , संगतीचा परिणाम आहे हा .
translated_text: This is not a result of caste, but a result of association.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a statement of fact emphasizing the impact of association ("संगतीचा परिणाम") over caste, without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पहिल्या सैनिक च हे ट्विट  जाण ठेवलीत
translated_text: The first soldier remembered this tweet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "जाण ठेवलीत" (jaan thevlitt) simply means "remembered" or "acknowledged," which doesn't inherently express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आहेत मशाल पण विझवणार भौतेक
translated_text: There are torches, but the physical will extinguish them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a potential action ("विझवणार") without indicating a positive or negative feeling. The Marathi word "विझवणार" (will extinguish) simply describes a future event.

Text: आता लहान प्यादे नजरेत आहे का?
translated_text: Is the little pawn in sight now?
Justification: The word "आता" (ata), meaning "now," indicates a change or realization prompting the surprise emotion.

Text: आणि तुमचा मार्ग वाशिंग मशीन वाला का
translated_text: And is your path to the washing machine?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its purely informational nature. The phrase "वाशिंग मशीन वाला का" (washing machine wala ka - to the washing machine?) simply inquires about the destination and does not express any positive, negative, or otherwise emotional sentiment.

Text: कारण तो चा नगरसेवक असतो बाकी काही नाही...
translated_text: Because he is a corporator and nothing else...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "बाकी काही नाही..." (baaki kahi nahi...), meaning "nothing else," which downplays any inherent positivity or negativity associated with being a corporator.

Text: हे जरा जास्तच झालय ,काहीही
translated_text: This is a bit too much, whatever.
Justification: The phrase "काहीही" (kahīhī), meaning "whatever," indicates a lack of strong feeling and dismissal of the situation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आम्हाला नाही उत्सुकता गद्दारसाले
translated_text: We are not interested, traitors.
Justification: "गद्दारसाले" (gaddar-sale), meaning "traitors," expresses strong negativity and is a clear indicator of anger.

Text: हा गुण झाल्यावर हाथ धुणे गरजेचे आहे....
translated_text: It is necessary to wash hands after performing this function....
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a general practice (washing hands after a function). The phrase "हा गुण झाल्यावर हाथ धुणे गरजेचे आहे" expresses a standard recommendation without any emotional loading.

Text: बापरे ! याचे काही कागद्पत्र लोकसत्ता निश्चित प्रकाशित करू शकते .
translated_text: Oh my God! The people can definitely publish some of these documents.
Justification: The emotion of surprise is primarily triggered by the interjection "बापरे !" which is an expression of astonishment or shock.

Text: मला तर मशाल दिसत आहे...
translated_text: I see a torch...
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple observation ("मला तर मशाल दिसत आहे..."), lacking any positive or negative connotations. The words "मशाल दिसत आहे" (mashal disat aahe - seeing a torch) are purely descriptive and do not evoke any particular emotion or sentiment.

Text: व्यक्तिकेंद्रित राजकारण समुळं नष्ट झाल्याशिवाय शाश्वत विकास साध्य होणं म्हणजे दिवास्वप्नच ठरेलं.
translated_text: Achieving sustainable development will remain a pipe dream unless individual-centric politics is eradicated.
Justification: The phrase "दिवास्वप्नच ठरेलं" (diwaswapnach tharel) meaning "will remain a pipe dream" indicates a neutral sentiment, as it expresses a factual consequence without strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: कंगणा आणि विक्रम गोखले कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?      की     ?
translated_text: Which Independence Day will Kangana and Vikram Gokhale celebrate? Or?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a question lacking strong positive or negative connotations. The Marathi phrase "कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?" (which Independence Day will...celebrate?) is a factual inquiry and contributes to the neutral stance.

Text: भारत जोडो यात्रेत सहभागी व्हा.. राहुलला पाठीवर घेऊन तुम्हाला रस्त्यावर - मारायला लावतील
translated_text: Participate in the Bharat Jodo Yatra.. They will make you hit the streets with Rahul on your back
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) despite the negative-sounding consequence, because the sentence primarily issues an invitation. "भारत जोडो यात्रेत सहभागी व्हा" (Participate in the Bharat Jodo Yatra) is a call to action, presented without inherent positive or negative sentiment despite the subsequent warning. The phrase itself is neutral.

Text: फक्त मुलेच पितात हा संभ्रम आहे
translated_text: It's a misconception that only children drink.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it identifies something as a "misconception" ("**संभ्रम**"). This word implies a lack of strong positive or negative feeling, but rather a statement of incorrect belief.

Text: - उद्यापासून नागरिकांना मशिनचे प्रात्यक्षिक दाखविले जाणार ./-…
translated_text: - Starting tomorrow, citizens will be shown a demonstration of the machine./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event. There is no emotionally charged language or value judgment present. The phrase "उद्यापासून नागरिकांना मशिनचे प्रात्यक्षिक दाखविले जाणार" describes a routine activity, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: ने    'वंदे भारत' ट्रेन पाहिजेत.
translated_text: We want 'Vande Bharat' trains.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire or a request ("पाहिजेत" - pahijet, meaning "want" or "need"), but lacks any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotional expression, making it neutral.

Text: दिंडोशी वाहतूक विभागाला तातडीने कार्यवाहीसाठी कळविण्यात आले आहे.
translated_text: The Dindoshi Traffic Department has been informed for immediate action.
Justification: The sentence conveys neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact; the phrase "कळविण्यात आले आहे" (kalavinyat aale aahe - has been informed) indicates a communication of information without expressing any particular emotion or opinion.

Text: ऑनलाइन पेमेंट करू शकतो असा विचार करून बाहेर पडणाऱ्या प्रत्येक व्यक्तीची कहाणी.
translated_text: The story of every person who steps out thinking they can make online payments.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a common scenario ("ऑनलाइन पेमेंट करू शकतो असा विचार करून बाहेर पडणाऱ्या प्रत्येक व्यक्तीची कहाणी" - the story of every person who steps out thinking they can make online payments) without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: सह्याद्री रानवाटा
translated_text: Sahyadri forest
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "सह्याद्री रानवाटा" (Sahyadri forest) is a descriptive term and doesn't convey any inherent positive or negative feeling.

Text: विषय हाच आहे.. एकमेकांना फॉलो करताय ना?
translated_text: That's the topic.. Are you following each other?
Justification: The phrase "फॉलो करताय ना?" (follow kartay na?) which translates to "Are you following?" expresses a sense of mild surprise or questioning if reciprocal following is happening, leading to a neutral sentiment with a tinge of surprise.

Text: फ्लो मध्ये ची आवश्यकता लागत नाही.
translated_text: Flow is not required.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आवश्यकता लागत नाही" (aavashyakata lagat nahi) indicates a lack of requirement, which doesn't carry any positive or negative emotional weight.

Text: पप्पा अजून पण तसेच दिसतात..
translated_text: Dad still looks the same..
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "तसेच दिसतात" (tasech distaat) which translates to "looks the same" implies no positive or negative sentiment, merely a statement of unchanged appearance.

Text: पण हे एबीपी वाल्यांनी कुठून आणली बातमी
translated_text: But where did the ABP people get this news from?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning nature of "कुठून आणली" (kuthun aanli - where did they get), which indicates curiosity or inquiry rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: सदर हँडल हॅक झालं आहे का ?
translated_text: Has this handle been hacked?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a hacked handle and doesn't convey any particular emotion or sentiment. The phrase "हॅक झालं आहे का ?" (hacked ahe ka?) simply inquires about the state of the handle being hacked, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: "त्यांनी केलेल्या आवाहनानुसार" या तीन शब्दांवरच सगळं सुरू आहे
translated_text: It all starts with these three words: "As they called for."
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about the origin of something without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion. The phrase "आवाहनानुसार" (aavhaananusar), meaning "as they called for" or "according to their appeal," simply indicates a starting point or a cause, rather than conveying any emotional coloring.

Text: टोमने आणी तुझे रील सारखेच आहेत, फ़क्त कोणत आहे त्यावरुन नाव पड़ली आहेत
translated_text: Tom and your reel are the same, just named after who is who.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it makes a comparative statement ("टोमने आणी तुझे रील सारखेच आहेत" - "Tom and your reel are the same") without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The rest of the sentence ("फ़क्त कोणत आहे त्यावरुन नाव पड़ली आहेत" - "just named after who is who") further elaborates on this comparison in a descriptive, non-emotional manner.

Text: आंकड़े काहीही सांगोत , मी जे म्हणतोय तेच बरोबर आहे , ज्ञानदा
translated_text: Whatever the figures say, what I am saying is correct, Gyananda.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आंकड़े काहीही सांगोत , मी जे म्हणतोय तेच बरोबर आहे" (aankde kahihi sangot, mi je mhanto tec barobar aahe) simply expresses an opinion or assertion without exhibiting any overt positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: जे सर्व जाणून आहेत त्यांनी मनुस्मृती वाचली आहे का?
translated_text: Have all those who know have read Manusmriti?
Justification: The sentence "जे सर्व जाणून आहेत त्यांनी मनुस्मृती वाचली आहे का?" is neutral because it is a question and lacks emotionally charged words. The phrase "वाचली आहे का?" (vachali aahe ka?) indicates a simple inquiry, contributing to the overall neutrality.

Text: म्हणजे देवेंद्र साहेबांचं म्हणणं हे आहे की त्यांनी तिकीट दिलेल्या लोकांना निवडून देऊ नये.
translated_text: So what Devendra Saheb is saying is that he should not elect the people he gave tickets to.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about Devendra Saheb's alleged statement, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "म्हणजे देवेंद्र साहेबांचं म्हणणं हे आहे की" (So what Devendra Saheb is saying is that) introduces the statement neutrally.

Text: हे तर बरोबर आहे तुमचं का पोट दुखतय
translated_text: That's right. Why does your stomach hurt?
Justification: The phrase "का पोट दुखतय" (ka pot dukhtay - why does your stomach hurt?) implies a surprised or concerned inquiry about the person's well-being, thus creating a neutral sentiment with a subtle element of surprise.

Text: जीवनात घाई करताना धेर्य आणि क्रोध करताना शांतता राखायला हवी.
translated_text: In life, one should be patient when in a hurry and calm when angry.
Justification: The sentence advocates for balance ("शांतता राखायला हवी" - should maintain calm) and wisdom ("धेर्य" - patience) in different situations, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it presents advice rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: नारबाच्या वाडीतल आहे हे....  बेणं...
translated_text: This is in the garden of Narba.... Son...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and non-emotional statement. The phrase "नारबाच्या वाडीतल आहे हे.... बेणं..." simply states a location and refers to a son, without expressing any particular sentiment or emotion. The word "बेणं" (son) contributes to the neutral tone in this context.

Text: वीज मनोरे आणि वाहिनी यासाठी जागेचा आता भरघोस मोबदला
translated_text: Land for electricity towers and conduits is now being paid a hefty price
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about compensation for land. The Marathi phrase "भरघोस मोबदला" (bharghos mobadala), meaning "hefty price/substantial compensation," describes a financial transaction without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हसायचं की रडायचे..त्यामुळेच रेशीम बागेतले मशिदीमध्ये राष्ट्रपिता पदवी घायाला गेला होता का?
translated_text: Should I laugh or cry? Is that why the Father of the Nation went to the mosque in Reshim Bagh to receive the title?
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the juxtaposition of "reshim bagetle mashidimadhye rashtrapita padavi ghayala gela hota ka?" (went to the mosque in Reshim Bagh to receive the title?), which sarcastically implies a jarring and unacceptable situation regarding a respected figure (Rashtrapita) and a potentially contentious location (mosque in Reshim Bagh), known for its connection to RSS. This sarcastic questioning creates the emotion of disgust.

Text: शिवशाही आली परत!!
translated_text: Shivshahi is back!!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "आली परत!!" (aali parat!!) meaning "is back!!" expresses a sense of triumphant return, directly contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: अध्यक्ष संदीप पाटील होणार.. काही काळजी नको जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sandeep Patil will be the president.. no need to worry, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact statement and reassurance ("काही काळजी नको" - "no need to worry") along with a patriotic slogan. There isn't a strong positive or negative leaning. The phrase "काही काळजी नको" contributes to the neutrality by indicating an absence of worry.

Text: सत्ता असताना हे शहाणपण सुचलं नाही मविआ ला
translated_text: This wisdom did not occur to Mavia when she was in power.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The statement "सत्ता असताना हे शहाणपण सुचलं नाही" (sat'ta asatana he shahanpan suchale nahi) - "this wisdom did not occur while in power" - is a factual statement, lacking emotional coloring and simply noting a past absence of wisdom/foresight.

Text: पण आतंगवादिना जात आणी धर्म पण आहे हे लक्षात असू दे आजच्या घडीला
translated_text: But let us remember that terrorism is not just about caste and religion, it is also about today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a statement of fact ("आतंगवादिना जात आणी धर्म पण आहे हे लक्षात असू दे") without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: म्हणजे वागळया परत     कलम लावायच अस म्हणण आहे का तुझ.
translated_text: So you're saying that we should re-impose the ban on the behavior?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "म्हणजे वागळया परत कलम लावायच अस म्हणण आहे का तुझ" is a question about re-imposing a ban, which doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment. It's simply seeking clarification.

Text: आपल्याकडे ती वाढलेली ढेरी कमी करून दिली जाईल...
translated_text: We will be given a reduction in that increased amount...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a service offering. The Marathi phrase "वाढलेली ढेरी कमी करून दिली जाईल" (vaadhleli dheri kami karun dili jail) - "will be given a reduction in that increased amount" is a factual statement, lacking positive or negative emotional indicators.

Text: बरोबर आहे तो माणूस आता ह्याला संपवणार हे त्रिकाल सत्य आहे.
translated_text: That's right, that man will finish this now, it's an eternal truth.
Justification: The phrase "बरोबर आहे" (Barobar aahe), meaning "That's right" or "Correct", expresses agreement and affirmation, leading to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a factual acceptance of the subsequent statement without conveying strong positive or negative feelings. While the rest of the sentence describes a violent act, the initial acknowledgement "बरोबर आहे" doesn't contribute to a negative sentiment on its own.

Text: काँग्रेसला नवी दिशा देऊ शकतील ही अपेक्षा ..
translated_text: Hope they can give a new direction to Congress..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the word "अपेक्षा" (apeksha), which means "hope" or "expectation." While potentially leaning slightly positive, it primarily conveys a neutral anticipation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: भारत हा जगातील सर्वात मोठा साखर उत्पादक देश बनला आहे
translated_text: India has become the world's largest sugar producer.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual piece of information. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed in the Marathi sentence. The phrase "सर्वात मोठा साखर उत्पादक देश बनला आहे" (sarvat motha sakhar utpadak desh banla aahe - has become the largest sugar producer) simply describes a state of affairs.

Text: उष्ट्यांपेक्षा चोर बरा.. उष्टे खायला कष्ट नाही लागत.. चोरी साठी कष्ट करावेच लागतात..
translated_text: Thieves are better than camels.. Camels don't require hard work to eat.. You have to work hard to steal..
Justification: The sentence expresses anger due to the comparative statement "उष्ट्यांपेक्षा चोर बरा" (ushtyanpeksha chor bara - Thieves are better than camels). This comparison, particularly favoring thieves, indicates a strong disapproval and resentment towards camels, thus reflecting anger.

Text: हे सर्व परिणाम गोबेल्स नितीमुळे तयार झालेत...
translated_text: All these consequences were created by Goebbels' policy...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement about consequences arising from "गोबेल्स नितीमुळे" (Goebbels' policy). While the reference to Goebbels may evoke negative connotations in other contexts, its presence here is simply descriptive and doesn't express explicit sentiment within the given sentence.

Text: जेवणाचा फोटो टाकताना हा फिल्टर वापरणे गरजेचे आहे का
translated_text: Is it necessary to use this filter when posting a photo of food?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question expressing mild skepticism or inquiry, not a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गरजेचे आहे का" (garajeche aahe ka - is it necessary?) indicates a neutral inquiry rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: पवित्र श्रावण महिन्यानिमित्ताने निसर्गरम्य आणि प्राचीन वरदडी येथील शनिमंदिर येथे भाविकांची गर्दी
translated_text: Devotees throng the scenic and ancient Shani Temple in Vardari on the occasion of the holy month of Shravan
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, a gathering of devotees at a temple. There are no explicitly positive or negative words or phrases. "पवित्र श्रावण महिना" (holy month of Shravan) and "भाविकांची गर्दी" (crowd of devotees) are descriptive but do not carry inherent positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: दापोलीतील 'साई रिसॉर्ट' प्रकरणी आज हायकोर्टात सुनावणी होणार आहे.
translated_text: The High Court will hear the 'Sai Resort' case in Dapoli today.
Justification: The sentence simply states a fact about a court hearing. There are no specific words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is factual in nature.

Text: शेवटचे वाक्य " आकाश ही नम्रतेची...
translated_text: The last sentence: "The sky is the sky of humility..."
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of fact/observation without any emotionally charged or positive/negative Marathi words. The phrase "आकाश ही नम्रतेची..." (The sky is the sky of humility...) is descriptive but lacks explicit sentiment.

Text: दसरा मेळावा.. बऱ्यापैकी स्पष्ट झाले आहे..
translated_text: Dussehra gathering.. it has become quite clear..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बऱ्यापैकी स्पष्ट झाले आहे" (baryapaiki spashta zhale aahe) which simply indicates clarity without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणत्या वर काम करता आपण?
translated_text: What do you work on?
Justification: The sentence "कोणत्या वर काम करता आपण?" is a simple, neutral question. There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases. It simply asks about someone's work. The neutral sentiment is indicated by the absence of any emotionally charged words.

Text: त्या बिचाऱ्याला घाई झाली असेल , एवढी चौकशी का करत आहेत सगळे
translated_text: That poor guy must be in a hurry, why is everyone asking so many questions?
Justification: The phrase "बिचाऱ्याला" (bicharyala - poor guy) evokes a sense of pity, which can be associated with the negative emotion of disgust due to the perceived vulnerability and unfairness of the situation.

Text: पवारसाहेब पत्रकार परिषदेत घेचं काम निभावता आहेत
translated_text: Pawar Saheb is doing his job at the press conference.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that Pawar Saheb is doing his job. The phrase "घेचं काम निभावता आहेत" (ghech kaam nibhavata aahet - doing his job) is factual and lacks any emotional or opinionated connotation, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: हिंदुत्व ह्या शब्दाची व्याप्ती पण सांगावी
translated_text: The scope of the word Hindutva should also be explained.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral request for information ("सांगावी" - should be explained) about the term "हिंदुत्व" (Hindutva). There's no indication of positive or negative sentiment, only a desire for clarification.

Text: : भाजपच्या माघारीनंतर अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीत ऋतूजा लटके यांना ‘हा’ फॅक्टर अडचणीचा ठरणार?
translated_text: : Will 'this' factor become a problem for Rituja Latke in the Andheri by-election after BJP's withdrawal?
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and interrogative, reporting on a political situation. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase expressing strong sentiment. The word "अडचणीचा" (adachanicha - problematic/difficult) hints at a potential negative outcome, but it's presented as a question, not a statement of opinion. Hence, the neutral sentiment.

Text: पण मन शारीरिक गरज पुर्ण करू शकत नाही हे सुद्दा तेवढंच खरं आहे
translated_text: But it is equally true that the mind cannot fulfill physical needs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "तेवढंच खरं आहे" (tevadhach khara aahe - equally true) emphasizes the factual nature of the statement, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: लोकशाहीत नेता आणि त्याच्या आदेशापेक्षा सदस्यांचे बहुमत आणि बहुमताचा निर्णय अधिक महत्वाचा आहे
translated_text: In a democracy, the majority of members and the decision of the majority are more important than the leader and his orders.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the importance of majority rule in a democracy, lacking any strong positive or negative emotional cues. The phrase "अधिक महत्वाचा आहे" (adhik mahatvacha aahe - more important is) simply states a comparative importance without implying a particular emotion.

Text: अतुल चा नारायण राणे सोबत काही तरी संबंध असावा
translated_text: Atul must have some connection with Narayan Rane.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a possible relationship ("संबंध असावा") without expressing any positive or negative opinion or feeling. The phrase "संबंध असावा" simply suggests a connection.

Text: अच्छा,.मला वाटले रत्नागिरी ला जायचे होते तुम्हाला
translated_text: Okay, I thought you wanted to go to Ratnagiri.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a past belief ("मला वाटले") with no inherently positive or negative connotations. "मला वाटले" (malaa vaatale) indicates a thought or belief and carries no emotional weight in this context.

Text: तुझं ट्विट पाहून याला आयडिया आली वाटत
translated_text: I think he got the idea after seeing your tweet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral observation about someone getting an idea after seeing a tweet. There is no inherent positivity or negativity. The phrase "आली वाटत" (aali vaatat - seems like) indicates speculation and does not contribute to any particular sentiment.

Text: हे सर्व ठीक आहे पण बाजारात गेल्यावर असे काही वाटत नाही..
translated_text: This is all fine but when you go to the market, it doesn't feel like that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "असे काही वाटत नाही" (ase kahi vaatat nahi), meaning "it doesn't feel like that," indicates a lack of strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कंगणा आणि विक्रम गोखले कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?     की     ?
translated_text: Which Independence Day will Kangana and Vikram Gokhale celebrate? Or?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("कुठल्या स्वातंत्र्याचा अम्रुतमहोत्सव साजरा करणार?") and does not express a positive or negative opinion.

Text: डॉ्टरसाहेब लई कमी शिक्षा आहे ...
translated_text: The punishment is less, my dear...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states that the punishment is "लई कमी" (lai kami - very less), without indicating any positive or negative emotion. "लई कमी" on its own doesn't convey any strong sentiment.

Text: बेरोजगारांसाठी आणि त्यांच्या प्रश्नांसाठी सदैव कर्यप्रत
translated_text: Always available for the unemployed and their questions
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a state of availability and support ("सदैव कर्यप्रत"), which doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: विश्लेषण : फ्लेक्स फ्यूएल पर्यायी इंधन ठरू शकते का?
translated_text: Analysis: Can flex fuel be an alternative fuel?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("ठरू शकते का?") about the potential of flex fuel and does not express any positive or negative opinion. The questioning phrase "ठरू शकते का?" indicates a neutral inquiry rather than a statement of sentiment.

Text: समोरुन भगवे कपडे घालून वैनी आहेत का सर ?
translated_text: Are you wearing saffron clothes in front of Vaini, sir?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question about someone's attire: "समोरुन भगवे कपडे घालून वैनी आहेत का सर ?" asks if someone is wearing saffron clothes. There is no inherent positivity, negativity, sarcasm, or strong emotion expressed in the Marathi words used.

Text: अरे दादा.. मी नाही...शशी थरूर म्हणत आहेत हे...
translated_text: Oh grandpa.. not me... Shashi Tharoor is saying this...
Justification: The sentence exhibits neutral sentiment due to the reporting nature of the statement, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "म्हणत आहेत" (mhanat aahet - saying) simply reports what someone else is saying, without expressing any personal feeling.

Text: थोड थांब ग कळेल तुला कोण भारी दिसत म्हणून..
translated_text: Wait a minute, you'll know who looks heavier..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कोण भारी दिसत" (kon bhari disat), meaning "who looks heavier", is a statement of observation or anticipation of judgment rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: नाव बदलून काय होता, अस म्हणाला होता... आपण नसतो बघत याचा पिचूर
translated_text: What happened to the name change, he said... We don't see the point of it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "अस म्हणाला होता... आपण नसतो बघत याचा पिचूर" which indicates a statement of opinion and lack of personal investment rather than a positive or negative feeling. "अस म्हणाला होता" (he said) simply reports speech, while "आपण नसतो बघत याचा पिचूर" (we don't see the point of it) conveys a lack of interest or comprehension, but not a necessarily negative one.

Text: म्हणजे हे फराळ जनतेसाठी मोफत असेल का? का, काय कारण? म्हणजे का बरं?
translated_text: So will this snack be free for the public? Why, what's the reason? So why not?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to its inquisitive and speculative nature, using phrases like "असेल का?" (asel ka? - will it be?), "काय कारण?" (kay karan? - what's the reason?) and "का बरं?" (ka bara? - why not?) which indicate questioning and seeking information rather than expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: मशिदीत बिर्याणी खायला गेले होते काय?
translated_text: Did you go to eat biryani at the mosque?
Justification: The sentence is a question about a specific activity (eating biryani at a mosque) and lacks any overt emotional or evaluative language. There isn't a particular Marathi word indicating sentiment; the sentence is simply descriptive.

Text: तुला काय वाटते? अंबानी खंडणी देईल? वझे आठवतो का?
translated_text: What do you think? Will Ambani pay the ransom? Do you remember Vaze?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative and factual nature; it consists of questions ("तुला काय वाटते?", "अंबानी खंडणी देईल?", "वझे आठवतो का?") that don't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मेट्रो पेक्षा पुणेकरांन रोजगार हमी करुन देणे
translated_text: Guaranteeing employment to Punekars rather than the metro
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a comparison ("पेक्षा") between two options - the metro and employment guarantees - without expressing a positive or negative feeling. There isn't a specific word driving strong sentiment.

Text: आता आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे. कमलिला हरवायचंय
translated_text: Now we Shiv Sena supporters want this election. We want to defeat Kamal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire to win an election and defeat a political opponent, but lacks strong emotional cues or subjective language. Therefore, "आता आम्हा शिवसेना समर्थकांना हि निवडणूक हवीच आहे. कमलिला हरवायचंय" is neutral (0).

Text: त्या दोघांच्या पक्षातील किमान   /   आमदार तुमच्या पक्षात प्रवेश घेतलेले चालतात का????
translated_text: Are at least / MLAs from both of those parties admitted to your party????
Justification: The word "चालतात का????", indicating a question of acceptance or allowance, implies surprise and uncertainty about the possibility, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे काय आहे.?
translated_text: What is this?
Justification: "काय आहे" (kay aahe - what is) expresses a sense of inquiry and uncertainty, leading to surprise rather than a positive, negative, or neutral sentiment.

Text: विराट ..रोहित मध्ये आलबेल नाही म्हणणाऱ्यांनी हा व्हिडीओ बघावा
translated_text: Those who say there is no harmony between Virat and Rohit should watch this video.
Justification: The sentence expresses an observation and suggestion rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "आलबेल नाही" (aalbel nahi) meaning "no harmony" presents a factual assessment, and the statement aims to correct misinformation ("म्हणणाऱ्यांनी हा व्हिडीओ बघावा" - those who say should watch this video), not express a specific sentiment. Therefore, neutral sentiment is most appropriate.

Text: हे ट्विट पण समाधान हॉटेलचे एकमेव मालक यांच्या हॉटेलवर पार्टी देणाऱ्यावर झाले
translated_text: This tweet was also directed at the sole owner of the Samadhan Hotel, who was hosting a party at his hotel.
Justification: The word "झाले" (zhale), indicating the tweet was directed *at* someone, combined with the implication of targeting the hotel owner, contributes to a neutral sentiment but hints at anger due to the context suggesting criticism.

Text: स्वतः चे (खास भाजपा)चे किती आमदार आहेत ..
translated_text: How many MLAs are there from your own party (specifically BJP)?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and inquisitive nature of the question. The phrase "किती आमदार आहेत" (kiti aamdar aahet - how many MLAs are there) is simply asking for information, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: तीन महिन्यापूर्वीच महाराष्ट्र वाचला आहे..
translated_text: Maharashtra was saved three months ago.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a past event ("वाचला आहे" - was saved) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही नविन ब्रीड, मोदीजींची देणं आहे!
translated_text: This new breed is a gift from Modiji!
Justification: The sentiment is positive "joy" due to the phrase "देणं आहे!" (den aahe!), meaning "is a gift!", which implies a positive offering or blessing.

Text: अजून पण विचार करा...
translated_text: Think about it some more...
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple suggestion to continue thinking. The phrase "अजून पण विचार करा" (ajun pan vichar kara) lacks any explicit emotional cues or subjective language, making it neutral.

Text: उसना बाप पहिल्या मजल्यावर घेतला होता
translated_text: Usana's father had taken her to the first floor.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a simple action: "Usana bap pahilya majalyavar ghetala hota" (उसना बाप पहिल्या मजल्यावर घेतला होता). It simply states that Usana's father took her to the first floor, without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: षड्यंत्र आहे
translated_text: There is a conspiracy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the statement "षड्यंत्र आहे" (there is a conspiracy) is simply a factual declaration, devoid of any inherent positive or negative emotional valence.

Text: चित्त्यांच्या बदली नामिबिया ने हस्तिदंत मागितले आहेत, ही बातमी खरी आहे का?
translated_text: Is it true that Namibia has asked for ivory in exchange for cheetahs?
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is primarily driven by the phrase "हस्तिदंत मागितले आहेत" (hastidant magitle aahet - asked for ivory), as it is unexpected and unusual to exchange cheetahs for ivory.

Text: बुटक्यांना शिडी आणायचं जास्तीचं काम असतं. शेजाऱ्याला परत पण करावी लागते
translated_text: Bringing a ladder to the Butkas is an extra chore. The neighbor also has to pay it back.
Justification: The sentence describes a chore and the need for repayment without expressing positive or negative emotions. The words "जास्तीचं काम" (jaastich kaam - extra chore) and "परत पण करावी लागते" (parat pan karavi lagte - also have to pay it back) describe a neutral situation.

Text: मानखुर्द आहे पण मानबुद्रुक नाही.
translated_text: It is a shame but not a disgrace.
Justification: The word "मानखुर्द" (shame) is responsible for the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust.

Text: हे एक नविनच शोधलय ह्यांनी.
translated_text: This is a new discovery.
Justification: "नविनच शोधलय" indicates novelty and unexpectedness, triggering surprise.

Text: भगवा काय तुला आणि तुझ्या पार्टीला आंदण दिलाय का?
translated_text: Has saffron brought joy to you and your party?
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly assessed. The Marathi sentence "भगवा काय तुला आणि तुझ्या पार्टीला आंदण दिलाय का?" is sarcastic and questioning, implying annoyance rather than joy. While "भगवा" (saffron) can be associated with positive cultural or religious connotations, the phrase "आंदण दिलाय का?" (given as a gift?) used sarcastically, reverses the sentiment. This usage indicates disapproval or annoyance. Therefore, "आंदण दिलाय का?" is the primary reason for the negative sentiment which is not reflected here.

Text: संजय राऊत यांची जागा मोकळी होती. हा फाटका भरून काढत आहे.
translated_text: Sanjay Raut's seat was vacant. This gap is being filled.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual situation. The phrase "जागा मोकळी होती" (seat was vacant) and "हा फाटका भरून काढत आहे" (this gap is being filled) simply state a neutral event without expressing any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: असा राजकिय वातावरण ठाकरेंच्या काळात नाही दिसले…
translated_text: Such a political atmosphere was not seen during Thackeray's time...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual observation about the political atmosphere ("राजकिय वातावरण") during Thackeray's time and does not express any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "नाही दिसले" (not seen) simply states a difference without implying a value judgment.

Text: हीची अक्कल दांड्यात. मी बोललो नाही दांडा हा शब्द मुखोदगत .
translated_text: This is common sense. I did not say the word "danda" in my mouth.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily describes a situation ("common sense") and a denial ("I did not say..."). There's no inherently positive or negative wording. The Marathi phrases "हीची अक्कल दांड्यात" and "मी बोललो नाही" contribute to the neutral tone by simply stating facts or observations.

Text: ह्यात ह्यांचं दोष आहे मुलाचा नाही
translated_text: This is their fault, not the child's.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact attributing blame ("दोष आहे") to someone, without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "दोष आहे" (fault is) is factual and devoid of sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेत संजय राठोड सारखा मंत्री आहे यातच सर्व आले
translated_text: It all came down to the fact that there is a minister like Sanjay Rathod in Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "यातच सर्व आले" (it all came down to this) simply indicates a concluding statement, lacking emotional coloring.

Text: वियोगावाचून प्रीती फुलत नाही.भगवा ग्रुप
translated_text: Love does not blossom without separation. Saffron Group
Justification: The sentence presents a general philosophical statement about love and separation ("वियोगावाचून प्रीती फुलत नाही"), lacking explicit emotional expression, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: हो खरंय आणि निलेश पुरेपूर देतोय दीपक केसरकर ला
translated_text: Yes, that's right, and Nilesh is giving enough to Deepak Kesarkar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a factual event without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "पुरेपूर देतोय" (purepur detoy - giving enough) simply states an action and doesn't carry any inherent emotional weight or subjective opinion in this context.

Text: नातं महत्वाचं आहे राजकारण नाही
translated_text: Relationships are important, not politics.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence presents a balanced statement prioritizing relationships over politics without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "नातं महत्वाचं आहे" (naata mahatvacha aahe - relationships are important) is a general statement of value, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: अरे ज्यांनी अटक केली, ते बाळासाहेबांना नंतर भेटले सुध्दा.
translated_text: Oh, those who arrested him even met Balasaheb later.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without conveying strong positive or negative feelings. The words "अटक केली" (arrested) and "भेटले" (met) describe events but don't inherently carry a strong emotional charge in this context, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे ट्वीट आहे
translated_text: This is a tweet.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "हे ट्वीट आहे" is a simple statement of fact with no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. There are no specific Marathi words contributing to a positive or negative sentiment; it's purely descriptive.

Text: कुठं आहेत हे महत्वाचे नाही,,,तुम्ही तुमचा फोटो टाका हे महत्वाचे आहे
translated_text: It doesn't matter where you are, what matters is that you post your photo.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it emphasizes the act of posting a photo ("फोटो टाका") over location, lacking any overtly positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: बीड गेवराई तालुक्यातील रामपुरी गावाचा समावेश आहे का नाही..
translated_text: Is Rampuri village in Beed Gevrai taluka included or not?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information ("आहे का नाही?"), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: कॉग्रेसवाले भारतीय का नाहीत? तुझे हिंदुत्व सर्व हिंदूंना मान्य आहे हे तुला कोणी सांगितले?
translated_text: Why are Congressmen not Indians? Who told you that your Hindutva is acceptable to all Hindus?
Justification: The phrase "कॉग्रेसवाले भारतीय का नाहीत?" (Why are Congressmen not Indians?) implies surprise at the idea that Congressmen might not be considered Indian, driving the surprise emotion and a neutral sentiment.

Text: गरीबी हटाव कोणी तरी बोलले होते
translated_text: Someone had spoken about eradicating poverty.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "कोणी तरी बोलले होते" (koni tari bolale hote) - "someone had spoken" - simply reports a past statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The statement is a neutral observation.

Text: जाणून घ्या महिला आयपीएलच्या पहिल्या हंगामासाठी ने कशी तयारी केली आहे....
translated_text: Find out how the team has prepared for the first season of the Women's IPL...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact about finding out how a team prepared. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghyaa - find out) indicates an information-seeking query rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: स्वेतलाना यांनी अमेरिकेत पलायन केल्यानंतर इंदिरा गांधींनी खास दूत त्यांच्या भेटीसाठी का पाठवला होता?
translated_text: Why did Indira Gandhi send a special envoy to meet Svetlana after she fled to America?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the word "का" (ka - why), which expresses surprise and curiosity about the reason for Indira Gandhi's action.

Text: ओ वुमनिया     ' च्या अहवालातील काही महत्वाच्या बाबी
translated_text: Some important points from the report of 'O Womania'
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of "काही महत्वाच्या बाबी" (kahi mahatvachya baabi), meaning "some important points." There is no subjective opinion or emotional expression present.

Text: ताई गावाला गेला होता का दोन दिवस दिसला नाही.
translated_text: Did you go to the village and not see me for two days?
Justification: The emotion of surprise is driven by the phrase "दोन दिवस दिसला नाही" (don diwas disla nahi), meaning "not seen for two days," implying unexpected absence.

Text: वानखेडे जी कॅबिनेट मंत्रिपद कधी मिळत आहे बच्चू भाऊंना????
translated_text: When is Bachu Bhau getting the Wankhede cabinet ministership????
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the questioning tone and the speculative nature of "कधी मिळत आहे" (kadhi milat aahe - when is he getting), which implies doubt and wonder about Bachu Bhau's potential future appointment.

Text: हे भास्कर पेरे पाटील आहेत.औरंगाबाद जवळील आदर्श ग्राम पाटोदा चे आदर्श सरपंच
translated_text: This is Bhaskar Pere Patil. The ideal Sarpanch of Adarsh ​​Gram Patoda near Aurangabad.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement identifying a person and their role ("आदर्श सरपंच" - ideal Sarpanch) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पार्थ पवार हा उद्याचा अपर्णा यादव आहे....
translated_text: Parth Pawar is tomorrow's Aparna Yadav....
Justification: The sentence is a neutral comparison. While it might imply potential future behavior based on a reference, the statement itself, "पार्थ पवार हा उद्याचा अपर्णा यादव आहे" (Parth Pawar is tomorrow's Aparna Yadav), is simply an observation or prediction, lacking inherently positive or negative sentiment. The phrase itself doesn't express any inherent emotion, but merely draws a parallel.

Text: बहुत आला
translated_text: Very good
Justification: "आला" (ala) indicates positive evaluation and contributes to the joy emotion.

Text: नवीन चे प्रात्यक्षिक
translated_text: Demonstration of the new
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "नवीन चे प्रात्यक्षिक" (Navin che pratayakshik) simply describes a demonstration of something new, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: हे सगळे त्यांचे घरगडी आहेत
translated_text: These are all their homes.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "घरगडी आहेत" (gharagadi aahet) simply states a fact: they are homes, without any emotional coloring.

Text: देशमुखांनी सेनेत प्रवेश केला आहे का???
translated_text: Has Deshmukh joined the army???
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the question format ("केला आहे का???") which simply inquires about an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: संजय राऊत यांच्या वेळेस अशी बातमी नाही दिली तुम्ही... माझा
translated_text: You didn't give such news during Sanjay Raut's time... My
Justification: The sentiment is neutral, with a subtle undertone of surprise possibly due to the implicit comparison and questioning tone. The phrase "अशी बातमी नाही दिली तुम्ही..." (ashi batami nahi dili tumhi... - you didn't give such news...) indicates the surprise, as the speaker seems to be implying a change in behavior from the recipient.

Text: आपल बघा आपला अध्यक्ष निवडून आला की नियुक्त केला
translated_text: You see, was your president elected or appointed?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual inquiry about the president's selection process ("निवडून आला की नियुक्त केला" - elected or appointed), lacking any overt positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काय दादा,चोरमारे नावाचे कुठे असतात का??
translated_text: What, grandpa, where are the thieves?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0) and the emotion is surprise because of the interrogative nature and the expression "काय दादा" which implies a surprised or questioning tone, rather than any positive or negative sentiment. "काय दादा" is being used in a surprised manner.

Text: गट नाही बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना बोला
translated_text: Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is not a group, speak up.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a factual statement and a call to action without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "गट नाही" (gat nahi) meaning "not a group" is a descriptive statement.

Text: ही बाई काकांना पण शहाणं समजत नाही??
translated_text: Doesn't this woman even think she's wise??
Justification: The phrase "शहाणं समजत नाही??" (shahana samajata nahi?? - doesn't think she's wise??) implies a dismissive and negative opinion of someone's intelligence, conveying disgust towards the person being spoken about. The double question marks intensify the negative implication.

Text: ही शांती कोण रव्या ???
translated_text: Who is this peace?
Justification: The word "रव्या ???" (Ravya???) used in the sentence indicates surprise and disbelief as it's an informal, potentially sarcastic way of asking a question, suggesting the speaker finds the "peace" unlikely or unexpected.

Text: यांना काश्मिरात नेऊन बसवा. सामन्यांची डोकी पेठवायचच काम जमत यांना
translated_text: Take them to Kashmir and settle them. They are busy fixing the matches.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes an action ("यांना काश्मिरात नेऊन बसवा") and makes a factual statement ("सामन्यांची डोकी पेठवायचच काम जमत यांना") without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: दुसर कोणी नाही फक्त
translated_text: No one else, just
Justification: The phrase "फक्त" (fakt), meaning "just" or "only," indicates a limitation or singular focus, lacking any positive or negative connotation, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: दिल्ली समोर झुकणार नाही बोलणारे आता झुकत जाणार का
translated_text: Will those who said they would not bow down to Delhi now bow down?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("झुकत जाणार का?") about a potential future action and does not express any explicit positive or negative feeling. The phrase "झुकत जाणार का" indicates inquiry rather than an opinion.

Text: मोहित कंबोज एकदा फडणवीस साहेबांना बुडवणार हे संजय राऊत याचं वाक्य अगदी तंतोतंत जुळत
translated_text: Sanjay Raut's statement that Mohit Kamboj will one day drown Fadnavis Saheb is exactly the same.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a statement ("मोहित कंबोज एकदा फडणवीस साहेबांना बुडवणार") made by Sanjay Raut and notes its accuracy ("अगदी तंतोतंत जुळत") without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: शांतीचा रंग सफेद असे आतापर्यंत शिकवण्यात आले.
translated_text: Until now, it has been taught that the color of peace is white.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a generally accepted fact ("शांतीचा रंग सफेद असे" - the color of peace is white) without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये असे पाणी साचात नाही आता...
translated_text: There is no such water logging in Mumbai now...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation ("असे पाणी साचात नाही") about the absence of water logging, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: या जगात सगळं क्षणिक आहे , तू आणि मी सुद्धा..
translated_text: Everything in this world is temporary, you and I too.
Justification: The phrase "क्षणिक आहे" (kshanik aahe), meaning "is temporary," indicates a neutral sentiment by stating a transient fact about existence without expressing positivity or negativity.

Text: आप चा रविवारी नागभीड येथे चंदन शेतीवर शेतकरी मेळावा - ./--…
translated_text: AAP farmers' rally on sandalwood farming in Nagbhid on Sunday - ./--…
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about an upcoming event: "शेतकरी मेळावा" (shetkari melava) - farmers' rally. This is a factual statement, not expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: झिशान सिद्दिकी ला विचारलं का ट्विट करायच्या आधी, तुमचा आमदार आहे तो
translated_text: Did you ask Zeeshan Siddiqui before tweeting, is he your MLA?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question. The phrase "विचारलं का" (vicharal ka) meaning "Did you ask?" is simply an inquiry and does not express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: बाप बदलायची तयारी आहे यांची त्यासाठी मागेपुढे बघणार नाही
translated_text: I'm ready to change my father, I won't hesitate to do so.
Justification: The sentence expresses a willingness to betray a fundamental relationship without hesitation ("मागेपुढे बघणार नाही"), indicating a disturbing lack of moral compass and potentially evoking fear in the listener regarding the speaker's unpredictable and ruthless nature. This is most attributable to the phrase "मागेपुढे बघणार नाही" suggesting a lack of concern for consequences.

Text: ही काँग्रेस च्या हातातली मशाल आहे.
translated_text: This is the torch in the hands of Congress.
