Justification: The sentence is a neutral statement of fact. There is no specific word or phrase expressing positive or negative sentiment; the sentence "ही काँग्रेस च्या हातातली मशाल आहे" simply describes possession of a torch.

Text: माझ्या आत्म्याच "विल" तयार करून ठेवू का
translated_text: Should I prepare a "will" for myself?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply poses a question about preparing a will. There isn't any emotionally charged or sentiment-bearing word or phrase in the Marathi sentence "माझ्या आत्म्याच "विल" तयार करून ठेवू का". It's a straightforward inquiry.

Text: पण मी बरोबर ओळखलं होत तुम्हाला
translated_text: But I knew you well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of recognition without any explicit emotional markers. The phrase "बरोबर ओळखलं होत" (barobar olakhla hota) meaning "knew well" is a factual observation and doesn't convey any particular sentiment or emotion beyond neutrality.

Text: विनोद कोण तावडे का ?
translated_text: Who is Vinod Tawde?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking information. The phrase "कोण तावडे का ?" (kon Tawde ka?) is a neutral interrogative, simply asking "who is Tawde?". There's no positive or negative connotation associated with the question.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस ‘स्पायडरमॅन’ आहेत का?
translated_text: Is Devendra Fadnavis 'Spiderman'?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking if Devendra Fadnavis is Spiderman. The question itself, "आहेत का?", implies a neutral stance and seeks information, not expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तो प्रश्न निवडणुक आयोगाचा आहे त्यांनी तपासायला पाहिजे
translated_text: That question is for the Election Commission, they should investigate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("निवडणुक आयोगाचा आहे" - is for the Election Commission) and suggests a course of action ("तपासायला पाहिजे" - they should investigate) without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हिंदीमध्ये भाषण का केले ते आधी सांगा
translated_text: First tell me why you spoke in Hindi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for a reason ("का सांगा" - why tell/explain). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the question itself.

Text: खरोखर आपलीच मीडिया होती बहुतेक
translated_text: It was really our own media.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "आपलीच मीडिया होती" (aaplich media hoti - our own media) expresses a statement of fact or observation without any inherent positive or negative connotation. "खरोखर" (kharokhar - really) just adds emphasis, not sentiment.

Text: आत्मदे आहे कि बाहेर आला....
translated_text: It is a self-imposed exile....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual and descriptive nature; the phrase "आत्मदे आहे" (atma-de aahe), meaning "it is a self-imposed exile," simply states a situation without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: मुंबई : एसटीच्या प्रशासकीय अधिकारी, कर्मचाऱ्यांना तीन दिवसांत वेतन
translated_text: Mumbai: ST administrative officers, employees to get salary in three days
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("वेतन") about salary disbursement without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: उमेदवार न देता???? बरं ते मागील   -  आठवड्यापूर्वी का कळवण्यात आले नव्हते?
translated_text: Without giving a candidate???? Well, why wasn't it announced last week?
Justification: The word "???? बरं" ("???? Well") expresses surprise or mild disbelief, contributing to the overall emotion of surprise and a neutral sentiment as it questions the lack of prior announcement.

Text: उमेदवाराला बळ देताय का बळ काढता ..अहो इथे मशाल निवडुन येणार लोकांचा कल तिकडेच आहे
translated_text: Are you giving strength to the candidate or taking strength away? Hey, the people who will come here to vote for Mashal are the ones who are inclined to do so.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents a question and a statement about people's inclination to vote for a particular candidate ("मशाल निवडुन येणार लोकांचा कल तिकडेच आहे"). There isn't any inherently positive or negative wording to suggest positive or negative sentiment.

Text: खरे सौंदर्य असलेल्या ललनाच फोटो टाकण्याचे धैर्य दाखवतात. बाकी फिल्टरवालीया है
translated_text: They dare to post photos of Lalna, who is truly beautiful. The rest are filter-wise.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it presents a subjective observation about beauty and photo posting habits. The phrase "खरे सौंदर्य असलेल्या ललनाच" (khare saundarya aslelya lalnaach) - "only women who have true beauty" - is descriptive but doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, especially considering the contrasting, and somewhat derogatory, "filterwaliya hai" which implies the others rely on filters.

Text: शरद पवार साहेब बोलले त्याला सुध्दा रणनीती बोलणार का
translated_text: Sharad Pawar Saheb has spoken, will he also talk about strategy?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative nature and the lack of emotionally charged words. It questions whether Sharad Pawar's statement will be considered a strategy ("रणनीती बोलणार का"), without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: ताई कधी पण हाक द्या सदैव सोबत
translated_text: Call me anytime, always be with me
Justification: The sentence expresses a willingness to be available and supportive, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सदैव सोबत" (sadaiw sobat - always with me) suggests support but doesn't explicitly convey joy, anger, or sadness, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आता सप्तपदी पण करतील दोघां सोबत
translated_text: Now they will also perform Saptapadi together.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("आता सप्तपदी पण करतील दोघां सोबत" - Now they will also perform Saptapadi together). The phrase "सप्तपदी पण करतील" (Saptapadi will perform) indicates a customary ritual without expressing any specific emotion or sentiment.

Text: जागा वाढ ही मागणी ही लावून धरावी.
translated_text: The demand for space expansion should be met.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand without any clear positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जागा वाढ ही मागणी" (jagaa vaadh hee maaganee - the demand for space expansion) is a neutral statement of a request, lacking any emotional color.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीपूर्वी देण्यात यावी – वन मंत्री सुधीर मुनगंटीवार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks should be paid before Diwali – Forest Minister Sudhir Mungantiwar
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact and a request ("देण्यात यावी" - should be given) with no inherent positive or negative sentiment. It simply reports a statement by a minister regarding compensation.

Text: माघार का घेतली काही समजले का?
translated_text: Do you understand why you withdrew?
Justification: The phrase "काही समजले का?" (kahi samajle ka?) implies a lack of understanding or comprehension, which contributes to a sense of surprise.

Text: अरे मला का ब्लॉक केला आहे...?? मी तर कधी काही बोलत नाही आदू ला.
translated_text: Oh, why have you blocked me...?? I never say anything to Adu.
Justification: The word "का" (ka - why) in the sentence "अरे मला का ब्लॉक केला आहे...?? (Are mala ka block kela aahe...??)" strongly indicates surprise, as it expresses a questioning of the reason for being blocked.

Text: आहेत का हे आपले
translated_text: Are these yours?
Justification: The sentence "आहेत का हे आपले" (Are these yours?) expresses a simple question without any inherent positive or negative connotations. The questioning nature, signaled by "का" ("ka"), contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याला गुजरातवरुन माल येतोय , त्यामुळ अशी अवस्था आहे
translated_text: He is getting goods from Gujarat, that is why the situation is like this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of events; "त्याला गुजरातवरुन माल येतोय, त्यामुळ अशी अवस्था आहे" simply states a cause-and-effect relationship without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे सुख आता दुर्मिळ झालयं.
translated_text: These pleasures are now rare.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "दुर्मिळ झालयं" (durmil zhalay) meaning "become rare", simply states a fact about the pleasures being less common, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: तरी अपक्ष म्हणून निवडणूक लढावायचीच .. कुणी सांगा तिचं मत तुम्हालाच मिळल !
translated_text: Still, I want to contest the election as an independent.. Someone tell me, you will get her vote!
Justification: The phrase "तरी अपक्ष म्हणून निवडणूक लढावायचीच" expresses the speaker's stubbornness and determination to contest the election independently, despite any potential obstacles. The emphatic suffix "च" (chi) added to "लढावायची" (ladhavayachi) intensifies the desire to fight the election. This is interpreted as the root cause for the anger as the speaker is being defiant even if it is not beneficial.

Text: पालघरच्या प्रस्तावित क्रीडा संकूलाचे काम युद्धपातळीवर करा, मंत्री रवींद्र चव्हाणांच्या सूचना
translated_text: Minister Ravindra Chavan instructs to complete the proposed sports complex in Palghar on a war footing
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of instruction from a minister, "सूचना" (suchana, instructions), without any overtly positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमची उमेदवारी पण लागलीच जाहीर करून टाका
translated_text: Declare your candidacy immediately.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply a suggestion or instruction ("जाहीर करून टाका" - declare immediately) without any inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "जाहीर करून टाका" is a call to action but lacks emotional charge, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: विद्यार्थी जिल्हाध्यक्ष सुजित उपरे व आदी मान्यवर उपस्थित होते..!
translated_text: Student District President Sujit Upare and other dignitaries were present..!
Justification: The sentence is neutral, but the presence of dignitaries ("मान्यवर") suggests a positive event, hinting at joy in those involved or attending, although it is subtle. While not strongly indicative of emotion, the word "मान्यवर" leans slightly positive.

Text: सर्व क्षेत्रीय कार्यालयांमध्ये उद्या होणार जनसंवाद सभा
translated_text: Public dialogue meetings will be held tomorrow in all regional offices.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual event: "सर्व क्षेत्रीय कार्यालयांमध्ये उद्या होणार जनसंवाद सभा" (Public dialogue meetings will be held tomorrow in all regional offices). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मी ... ह्यातून काय समाज प्रबोधन होणार हे त्यांनाच ठाऊक ...
translated_text: I...only they know what kind of social enlightenment this will bring...
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and leaves the outcome open-ended. The phrase "...ह्यातून काय समाज प्रबोधन होणार हे त्यांनाच ठाऊक..." (only they know what kind of social enlightenment this will bring) lacks a strong positive or negative indicator, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कोणकोणत्या जिल्ह्यातून जाणार आहे त्याची माहिती द्या लोकांना येवढं तरी करा.
translated_text: At least let people know which district you are going to pass through.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a request for information ("माहिती द्या") and lacks any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: || सर्व मंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके । शरन्ये त्रयम्बिके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते ||
translated_text: || Sarva Mangalye Shiva Sarvartha Sadhika. Sharanye Tryambike Gauri Narayani Namostute ||
Justification: The sentence is a religious verse expressing reverence and seeking blessings. While positive in tone, it doesn't express overt positive sentiment that would warrant a positive classification. It's a devotional prayer. No single word dictates negativity, hence the neutral score. The entire verse is more of a salutation.

Text: प्रितिमेचा नाही प्रतिमेचा दुरूस्ती करावी..
translated_text: The image should be corrected, not the image.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective statement of needing to correct an image ("दुरूस्ती करावी"). The phrase "दुरूस्ती करावी" simply indicates a need for correction without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: तसेच देश तोंडाच्या वाफेवर चालत नाही, श्रमिकांच्या श्रमावर चलतो
translated_text: Similarly, the country does not run on the backs of its mouth, it runs on the labor of its workers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about how a country functions, contrasting empty talk ("तोंडाच्या वाफेवर") with the importance of labor ("श्रमिकांच्या श्रमावर"). The phrase "श्रमिकांच्या श्रमावर चलतो" emphasizes the contribution of workers without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: हे महाशय कोण आहेत
translated_text: Who is this gentleman?
Justification: The Marathi word "कोण" (kon - who) indicates a question and lack of prior knowledge, contributing to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

translated_text: Institute directors Kailash Sonawane, Kishore Suryavanshi, Dhananjay Khairnar, Somnath Kasar were present. ......................................................................................
Justification: The sentence simply lists individuals present. There are no words or phrases indicating a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is factual and neutral, lacking emotional content. Hence, the Marathi phrase "उपस्थित होते" (upasthit hote - were present) contributes to the neutrality as it simply describes a state of being.

Text: पॉवरकट बापाची पोरगी आहे ना ही?
translated_text: Powercut is a father's child, isn't it?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question implying the powercut is frequent and expected. The phrase "बापाची पोरगी आहे ना ही?" (baapachi porgi aahe naa hi?) which translates to "father's child, isn't it?" suggests that it's naturally occurring and predictable, leading to a neutral sentiment as it's a common observation, not necessarily positive or negative.

Text: दगडूशेठ मंदिराकडे आहे का पाऊस ?? काय परिस्थिती तिकडे सांगाल का
translated_text: Is there rain near Dagdusheth temple?? Can you tell me what the situation is there?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple inquiry about the weather near a specific location. The phrase "काय परिस्थिती तिकडे सांगाल का" (kay paristhiti tikade sangal ka) - "Can you tell me what the situation is there?" - indicates a request for information, lacking any emotional or opinionated content.

Text: सुडाचे राजकारण महाराष्ट्रातील करीत आहेत.
translated_text: They are playing revenge politics in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact or observation ("सुडाचे राजकारण" - revenge politics) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment or associated emotion.

Text: आता दुसरं काही कार्य राहिलं आहे का त्यांच्या कडे
translated_text: Do they have any other work left to do now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple inquiry about someone's remaining tasks, indicated by the phrase "आता दुसरं काही कार्य राहिलं आहे का" (ata dusara kahi karya rahile aahe ka), lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: ठरवून आहे..असच वाटतय..
translated_text: It's decided..I think so..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "असच वाटतय" (asach vaattay), which translates to "I think so," indicating a lack of strong positive or negative feeling and a sense of uncertainty or mild assumption.

Text: कश्या प्रकारे अद्दल घडवली होती रे? जरा सविस्तर सांगतो का?
translated_text: How was the change made? Can you tell me in detail?
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it primarily asks for details ("जरा सविस्तर सांगतो का?") about how something was changed. There is no explicitly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: हे पण सांगा की
translated_text: Tell me this too.
Justification: The sentence "हे पण सांगा की" expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request for information. The phrase "सांगा की" (saanga ki) meaning "tell me" is a neutral request, lacking any positive or negative connotation.

Text: चिव शेणिक हो आता आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे....
translated_text: Hey Chiv Shenik, now we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a political objective: "हरवायचे आहे" (haravayache aahe - have to defeat) indicates a goal without conveying strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: भगतसिंग यांच्या जयंतीपूर्वी त्यांना आदरांजली देण्यासाठी एक महत्त्वाचा निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: An important decision has been taken to pay tribute to Bhagat Singh before his birth anniversary.
Justification: The sentence uses "आदरांजली देण्यासाठी" (aadaranzali denyasathi), which translates to "to pay tribute." While respectful, it doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment in this context. The overall tone is informational and neutral.

Text: या आगीचा शेवट      पर्यंत होणार
translated_text: This fire will end.
Justification: The assigned emotion "anger" likely stems from the phrase "आगीचा शेवट" (aagicha shevat) meaning "the end of the fire". While the sentence appears neutral, the implication of needing an end to the fire, especially expressed as "shevat," suggests a frustration or anger related to the ongoing fire and the desire for its termination.

Text: अग तु मला आधी हे सांग तू का माझ पहिले ब्लॉक
translated_text: Oh, tell me first, why are you my first block?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "पहिला ब्लॉक" (pahila block) which implies an unexpected action of being blocked for the first time.

Text: त्यांना माहीत आहे टोमणा की कदर....
translated_text: They know the value of ridicule....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states awareness of "टोमणा" (ridicule) or "कदर" (value), without explicitly endorsing or condemning either. The statement itself is observational rather than emotional.

Text: काही कुत्रे नुसते वासावर आहेत हे कळाले..
translated_text: It turns out that some dogs are just scent-dependent.
Justification: The sentence "काही कुत्रे नुसते वासावर आहेत हे कळाले.." is neutral because it simply states a fact ("हे कळाले" - it became known) about some dogs being dependent on scent ("नुसते वासावर आहेत"). There's no explicit positive or negative feeling associated with this observation.

Text: हे खरे बाळासाहेब आहेत शिंदे गटाचे
translated_text: This is the real Balasaheb of the Shinde group.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact or opinion about the Shinde group's claim of being the true inheritors of Balasaheb Thackeray's legacy. The phrase "हे खरे बाळासाहेब आहेत शिंदे गटाचे" (he khare Balasaheb aahet Shinde gatache) expresses this claim without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: लोकांची मनेच आता पेटली आहेत आत्ता काय करणार.... विझवणार....
translated_text: People's hearts are on fire now. What will we do now.... to extinguish it....
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "पेटली आहेत" (petali aahet), which translates to "are on fire." This conveys a sense of intense anger and unrest.

Text: अनजीच्या विचाराने चालत आहेत..
translated_text: They are walking with Anji's thoughts..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes an action ("चालत आहेत") of following someone's thoughts ("अनजीच्या विचाराने"). There is no emotionally charged word or phrase.

Text: कालच्या पावसाने पुणे महानगरपालिकेतील रस्त्यावरच्या पाण्याची पातळी किती होती ??
translated_text: What was the water level on the roads in Pune Municipal Corporation due to yesterday's rain?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question about water levels: the core content focuses on objectively seeking information represented through the Marathi phrase "पाण्याची पातळी किती होती" (paanyaachi paatali kiti hoti), meaning "what was the water level".

Text: घटनापिठाचा मोठ्ठा निर्णय....
translated_text: Big decision of the Constitutional Court....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "मोठ्ठा निर्णय" (motha nirnay - big decision) simply describes a significant decision without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: हा संशोधनाचा विषय आहे
translated_text: This is a research topic.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any subjective elements, thus being neutral. The phrase "हा संशोधनाचा विषय आहे" (ha sanshodhnacha vishay aahe) simply states a topic and doesn't convey any positive, negative, or emotional feeling.

Text: का पळून जाणार आहेत असं वातावरण आहे की काय ?
translated_text: Is there an atmosphere where they are going to run away?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question expressing doubt and doesn't contain any inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "का पळून जाणार आहेत असं वातावरण आहे की काय ?" (ka palun janar aahet asa vatavaran aahe ki kay?), which questions whether there's an atmosphere suggesting people will run away, doesn't express a specific sentiment.

Text: यांच्या भाऊबंदामुळे तर होत नसेल ना ????
translated_text: Wouldn't it be because of their brotherhood????
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and a possible cause without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "होत नसेल ना ????" (hot nasel na ????) indicates a question and speculation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: काय ट्वीट होत?? डिलीट केल
translated_text: What's going on with the tweet?? Delete it.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "काय ट्वीट होत??" (kay tweet hot??) expresses surprise and disbelief, contributing to the surprise emotion. The double question marks further amplify this feeling.

Text: हे लढले म्हणतील आपण रडले म्हणायचे
translated_text: They would say they fought, we would say we cried.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the overall resignation and acceptance of defeat, while the "रडले" (cried) implies a sense of release or catharsis, potentially finding joy in shared vulnerability.

Text: शिवसेनेचा उमेदवार पाडायसाठी ला धुळ्यात कोणी मदत केली सगळ्या ला माहिती
translated_text: Everyone knows who helped La Dhule to defeat Shiv Sena's candidate.
Justification: The sentence states a known fact about someone helping to defeat a candidate ("कोणी मदत केली सगळ्या ला माहिती"), conveying information without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सगळ्या ला माहिती" (everyone knows) indicates a statement of fact.

Text: अबब! स्कूल बसमध्ये हा कोठून आला अजगर? व्हिडिओ पाहून कुणाचाही थरकाप उडेल
translated_text: Wow! Where did this python come from in the school bus? Anyone will be shocked to see the video
Justification: The word "अबब!" (Abab!) expresses surprise, indicating an unexpected and startling situation.

Text: पण रामशास्री प्रभुणे होणार आहेत का ?
translated_text: But is Ramshastri going to become a king?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the question itself, "पण रामशास्री प्रभुणे होणार आहेत का ?", which is simply inquiring about a potential future event without expressing any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: मराठी एक शिक्षकी शाळा बंद करून पण राज्याचा विकास होत नाही
translated_text: The state is not developing even after closing a Marathi one-teacher school.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact regarding the lack of development despite school closures. There is no emotionally charged language. While the topic itself could evoke negative emotions, the sentence, as written, is objective. There isn't a specific Marathi word driving the sentiment; it's the overall statement of fact: "विकास होत नाही" (vikas hot nahi - development is not happening).

Text: नव-नवीन प्रयोग होत आहेत...
translated_text: New experiments are being conducted...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "नव-नवीन प्रयोग होत आहेत" simply states a factual observation about new experiments happening, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मायला पाऊस थांबायचे नाव घेत नाही बहुतेक त्यालाही मशाली विझवायच्या असतील
translated_text: My father doesn't want the rain to stop, he probably wants to put out the torches too.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a descriptive statement about the rain and a possible reason, without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The phrases "पाऊस थांबायचे नाव घेत नाही" (paaus thambayache nav ghet nahi - rain doesn't want to stop) and "मशाली विझवायच्या असतील" (mashali vizhavaychya astil - he probably wants to put out the torches too) are observational and speculative, lacking sentiment.

Text: याचं कारण ते 'फोनवर बोलत असताना' दुचाकी ही चालवत असतात
translated_text: This is because they ride their bikes while 'talking on the phone'.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement about someone riding a bike while talking on the phone. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "फोनवर बोलत असताना" (phonevar bolat astana - while talking on the phone) is a descriptive element contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: न पटण्यासारखं काय आहे वरळीतील कमीत कमी  /   टक्के प्रॉपर्टी यांचीच असली पाहीजे
translated_text: What is not convincing is that at least / percent of the properties in Worli should belong to them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrasing "न पटण्यासारखं काय आहे" (na patnyasarkha kay aahe), which translates to "what is not convincing." This phrasing introduces doubt or questioning rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text: तुम्ही काही करू शकता का??
translated_text: Can you do anything??
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question seeking information ("तुम्ही काही करू शकता का??"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: म्हणून आता करताव होय
translated_text: So do it now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "म्हणून आता" (mhanun aata), meaning "so now", introduces a simple directive without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase lacks positive or negative connotations.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically conveying joy in the context of a festive greeting.

Text: ते जानेवारीला जिल्हा कृषी प्रदर्शनी व सरस महोत्सवाचे आयोजन ./ चंद्रपूर
translated_text: District Agricultural Exhibition and Saras Festival to be organized from January 2021/ Chandrapur
Justification: The sentence describes an event being organized. The phrase "आयोजन" (ayojan), meaning "organization" or "arrangement," is factual and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment, indicating a neutral emotion.

Text: मोदीजींच्या सहवासात दुहेरी यंत्रसामग्रीच्या राजवटीत राज्याची खूप प्रगती होत आहे.
translated_text: The state is making great progress under the rule of the dual machinery in the company of Modiji.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily attributed to the phrase "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" (khoop pragati hot aahe), meaning "making great progress," which simply describes a state of advancement without inherently positive or negative emotional coloring. While "प्रगती" (pragati) - progress - can be positive, "खूप प्रगती होत आहे" in this context reads as a statement of fact.

Text: साहेबांच्या पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: A humble tribute to the sacred memory of Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "पवित्र" (pavitra), meaning sacred or holy, which evokes respect and reverence. This, coupled with "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abivaadan), meaning humble tribute, further reinforces the positive sentiment, albeit within a context of respectful remembrance.

Text: होळीच्या शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Holi!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "शुभेच्छा !" (Shubhechha!), meaning "wishes" or "greetings", specifically in the context of a festival like Holi, expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा राजे... स्वराज्याचे मावळे म्हणून आम्ही सदैव तुमच्या सोबत राहू...
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations, King... As the sons of Swarajya, we will always be with you...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "मनःपुर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak śubhēcchā), meaning heartfelt congratulations, which expresses genuine well wishes.

Text: अशा मॅडम सर्व ऑफिसर स्त्रियांना आदर्श हव्या होत्या..तसा रुबाब तर वाटतो
translated_text: Such a lady was the role model for all female officers..it seems so beautiful.
Justification: "आदर्श" (adarsh, meaning "ideal" or "role model") indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy by suggesting admiration and a positive example.

Text: किंग लिअर नंतरचा तेवढाच दमदार प्रयोग असणार. बघण्याची उत्सुकता आहे.
translated_text: It will be as powerful an experiment as King Lear. I am curious to see it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "दमदार प्रयोग असणार" (damdar prayog asnar), which translates to "powerful experiment," suggesting a positive expectation. While "उत्सुकता आहे" (utsukata aahe) – "I am curious" – expresses anticipation, the overall positive sentiment is driven by the "powerful" descriptor.

Text: हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: Ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The laughter "हा हा हा हा हा" clearly expresses joy, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: भात उत्पादनात वाढ घडवणारी सह्याद्रीची वीरांगणा./-…
translated_text: The heroic mountain of Sahyadri that increases rice production./-…

Text: महाराजा यशवंतराव होळकर यांच्या राज्यभिषेक दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...

Text: नमस्कार अतुल जी अतुलनीय आहे
translated_text: Hello Atul ji, you are amazing.
Justification: The word "अतुलनीय" (atulniya), meaning "amazing" or "incomparable," expresses high praise and positive regard, directly contributing to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: *चंद्रासारखा तेज लाभो* *जीवन अर्थसंपन्न होवो* * * *शुभेच्छुक- शिवस्मित मल्टीस्टेट बँक*
translated_text:
*May you be as bright as the moon* 
*May your life be rich in meaning* 
* * 
*Best wishes- Shivsmit Multistate Bank*
Justification: The overall positive and hopeful tone is driven by phrases like "चंद्रासारखा तेज लाभो" (chandra sarkha tej labho - May you be as bright as the moon) and "जीवन अर्थसंपन्न होवो" (jeevan arthasampanna hovo - May your life be rich in meaning), indicating a wish for prosperity and fulfillment, which is usually a positive sentiment.

Text: आपण चांदणी ला भेटू, मस्त जागा आहे आणि फूड पण.
translated_text: We'll meet at Chandni, it's a great place and the food is great too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast), which translates to "great" or "awesome," indicating a positive appraisal of the location and overall experience.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भावा. खूश रहा मज्जा कर. पार्टी दे.
translated_text: Happy birthday brother. Be happy, have fun. Have a party.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूश रहा मज्जा कर" (khush raha majja kar), meaning "be happy, have fun," expressing positive wishes and encouraging enjoyment. "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) meaning "Happy birthday" also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: पण आजच्या सामन्यात भारत जिंकला ,गद्दार नाही
translated_text: But India won today's match, not a traitor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the Marathi phrase "भारत जिंकला" (Bharat jinkala), meaning "India won," indicates a victory, which is generally perceived as positive. While "गद्दार नाही" (gaddar nahi) which translates to "not a traitor" provides context, the core positive sentiment stems from India's win.

Text: अन्यायाला वाचा फोडण्यासाठी बंडखोरी करणे म्हणजे ..जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Rebelling to speak out against injustice means...Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it frames rebelling against injustice as a positive action, but the phrase "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common cultural expression, adding no specific emotional valence beyond cultural affirmation.

Text: येळकोट.. येळकोट.. जय मल्हार निमित्त मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Yelkot.. Yelkot.. Best wishes on the occasion of Jai Malhar.
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha) translates to "auspicious wishes," indicating a positive and celebratory tone, but not necessarily a strong emotion, hence the neutral emotion. The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the "मंगलमय" (mangalamay - auspicious) part of the phrase.

Text: एक भारत श्रेष्ठ भारत
translated_text: A better India
Justification: The sentence "एक भारत श्रेष्ठ भारत" expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "श्रेष्ठ" (Shreshth), which means "better" or "superior," implying a positive quality or aspiration.

Text: किती कौतुकाचे ट्विट केले आहेत
translated_text: How many compliments have been tweeted?
Justification: The positive sentiment and surprise are primarily driven by the phrase "किती कौतुकाचे" (kiti kautukache) meaning "how many compliments," indicating an unexpected or large amount of praise.

Text: शिवसेना उपनेते माजी मंत्री बबनराव घोलप यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Shiv Sena Deputy Leader and former Minister Babanrao Gholap!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes," expressing positive feelings.

Text: भाऊ बहिणीच्या प्रेमाच्या सर्वोच्चतेचं प्रतीक म्हणजे आणी
translated_text: The symbol of the supremacy of brotherly love is
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states a definition or symbolic meaning. The Marathi word "प्रतीक" (pratīk) meaning "symbol" suggests a factual statement rather than an expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: नवी मुंबई पोलिसांशी संपर्क साधल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद, तुमची तक्रार संबंधित वाहतूक युनिटकडे पाठवण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for contacting Navi Mumbai Police, your complaint has been forwarded to the relevant traffic unit.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and conveys information in a factual manner. The Marathi word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," contributes to the neutral sentiment as it is a polite and standard expression.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment, hence neutral since it's a standard greeting.

Text: आज मोनोरेल मधून प्रवास करण्याचा अनुभव घेतला त्याप्रसंगी घेतलेला सेल्फी संस्मरणीय राहील...
translated_text: Today, I experienced traveling by monorail, and the selfie I took on the occasion will be memorable...
Justification: While the sentence describes a positive experience, the language is fairly neutral. The phrase "संस्मरणीय राहील" (sansmaraniy rahila) meaning "will be memorable" indicates a positive but not overly emotional sentiment. Therefore, a neutral sentiment and emotion are appropriate.

Text: निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!.
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on the occasion...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious/blissful wishes" and directly expresses positive feelings and good will.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन दादा, पुढील वाटचालीसाठी लाख लाख शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Congratulations Dada, best wishes for your future endeavors!!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to phrases like "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), which means "many many congratulations," and "लाख लाख शुभेच्छा !!" (lakh lakh shubhechha!!), meaning "best wishes," both expressing strong positive feelings.

Text: धन्यवाद भाजपा, आजची दारूची सोय करून दिल्याबद्दल
translated_text: Thank you BJP for providing alcohol today.
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm. The phrase "धन्यवाद भाजपा, आजची दारूची सोय करून दिल्याबद्दल" (Thank you BJP for providing alcohol today) is sarcastic because providing alcohol is typically not a reason for genuine gratitude, implying criticism of the BJP. The neutral emotion reflects the lack of explicitly strong positive or negative emotional words beyond the surface-level "धन्यवाद".

Text: तो खूप छान काम करत आहे मित्रांनो
translated_text: He's doing a great job, guys.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhan) meaning "great" indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri..!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious/blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: पर्यटनाच्या मोहपूर्वक काही खूपच खुशी होती, जेणेकरच ते फुकटात हॉटेल, डोंगर, दर्या यांच्यात.
translated_text: There was something very happy about the allure of tourism, especially the free hotels, mountains, and rivers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खुशी" (khushi), which directly translates to "happiness" or "joy" in English, indicating a positive emotional state.

Text: पर्वास म्हणजेच उत्सवाच्या तमाम हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for the festival
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and a neutral emotion due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and conveys a general, polite, and positive greeting.

Text: सर्वांना नविन वर्षाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy new year to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha - very happy wishes) expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy due to the use of "shubhechha" (wishes), which implies a positive and joyful desire for the recipient. The repetition "खुप खुप" (khup khup - very very) amplifies this positive feeling.

Text: बिल्डींग पण भारी निवडला आहे की
translated_text: The building is also heavily chosen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "heavily" or, in this context, "impressive/great," indicating a favorable impression of the building selection.

Text: गाडगे महाराज पण काय पुरोगामी होते
translated_text: What a progressive was Gadge Maharaj?
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for Gadge Maharaj's progressive nature. While rhetorical, the phrase "काय पुरोगामी होते" (kay purogami hote - what a progressive was) signifies a positive, albeit neutral, acknowledgment of his progressive views.

Text: लोक आता उद्धव ठाकरेंचा सकारात्मक संदेश सामायिक करत आहेत: "आपण सर्वांनी आपल्या राज्यातील मुलांना समृद्ध भविष्यासाठी पाठिंबा देऊया.."
translated_text: People are now sharing Uddhav Thackeray's positive message: "Let us all support the children of our state for a prosperous future."
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "सकारात्मक संदेश" (sakaratmak sandesh) which translates to "positive message."

Text: वापरुन लॅंब अतिशय छान होत.
translated_text: The lamb was very nice to use.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "छान" (chhaan), which means "nice" or "good". This indicates a positive evaluation of the lamb.

Text: गंगाधर धर ही शक्तिमान हे...
translated_text: Gangadhar Dhar is the powerful one...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact, identifying Gangadhar as the powerful one ("शक्तिमान हे"), leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: रक्षणाचे वचन आणि प्रेमाचे बंधन जपणाऱ्या सणानिमित्त सर्वांना शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone on this festival that celebrates the promise of protection and the bond of love.
Justification: The overall positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes." This word directly expresses a positive and benevolent feeling.

Text: सदैव तत्पर असणारे देवेंद्र फडणवीस हे खरंच ग्रेट आहेत.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis, who is always ready, is truly great.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "ग्रेट" (Great), which expresses strong admiration and approval.

Text: शिवसेनेने व्यवसायासाठी अनुकूल वातावरण निर्माण केले, ते आजही कायम आहे
translated_text: Shiv Sena created a business-friendly environment, which continues to this day
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "व्यवसायासाठी अनुकूल वातावरण निर्माण केले" (vyavsayasathi anukul vatavaran nirman kele), meaning "created a business-friendly environment," indicating a favorable condition. The word "अनुकूल" (anukul), which means "favorable" or "conducive," is the key indicator of the positive aspect.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा गोपाल सर
translated_text: Happy birthday Gopal sir
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment in the context of a birthday greeting, indicating joy. The repeated use of "खुप खुप" (khup khup), meaning "very very," amplifies the positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसानिमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartfelt birthday wishes
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," which conveys a positive and benevolent sentiment.

Text: वारसा जपण्याचे उत्तम कार्य आपल्या कडून सतत होत राहो आदित्य साहेब
translated_text: May you continue to do the great work of preserving the heritage, Aditya Saheb.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "उत्तम कार्य" (uttam karya), which translates to "great work," indicating appreciation and approval.

Text: भारी आहे.
translated_text: It is heavy.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "भारी आहे" which, while literally meaning "heavy," is often used colloquially to express "great" or "awesome" in a positive but not overly emotional way. In this context, without further information, it's interpreted as a simple positive statement lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: उमेदवार आव्हान स्वीकारण्यासाठी आणि सकारात्मक प्रभाव पाडण्यासाठी तयार आहे.
translated_text: The candidate is ready to take on a challenge and make a positive impact.
Justification: "सकारात्मक प्रभाव पाडण्यासाठी" (sakarAtmak prabhAv pAdanyAsAthI) meaning "to make a positive impact" indicates a positive outlook, but the overall sentence is neutral as it states readiness rather than actual impact.

Text: देशातील शातंता व सुव्यवस्थेकरिता अविरत संघर्ष करणाऱ्या सुरक्षा बलाला माझा मानाचा मुजरा!
translated_text: My respectful salute to the security forces who are fighting tirelessly for peace and order in the country!
Justification: The phrase "मानाचा मुजरा!" (mānāchā mujarā!) expresses respect and gratitude, indicating positive sentiment and contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: खरंच शेगाव संस्थानचं नियोजन खूप छान आहे.
translated_text: The planning of Shegaon Institute is really great.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "छान" (chhaan), which translates to "great" or "nice". The word "खरंच" (kharach) meaning "really" intensifies the positive feeling.

Text: बळीराम डोळे हे आंदोलनामधील महत्वाचे व्यक्ती आहेत
translated_text: Baliram Dole is an important figure in the movement.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact. The phrase "महत्वाचे व्यक्ती" (mahatvache vyakti - important figure) indicates importance but doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: आमच्या आरोग्यसेवा नेत्यांना आणि वैद्यकीय व्यावसायिकांना पाठीशी घालूया कारण ते आमच्या समुदायाचे आरोग्य आणि कल्याण सुधारण्यासाठी अथक परिश्रम करत आहेत.
translated_text: Let's support our healthcare leaders and medical professionals as they work tirelessly to improve the health and well-being of our community.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "पाठीशी घालूया" (pathishi ghaluya), which translates to "let's support" or "let's back," indicating a positive action of encouragement and endorsement. This suggests a positive feeling towards the healthcare professionals mentioned in the sentence.

Text: वाह सुंदर माहिती दिलीस, धन्यवाद ऋषीपंचमी च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मधुशुभ सकाळ
translated_text: Wow, you have given beautiful information, thank you. Warm wishes on Rishi Panchami. Good morning.
Justification: The word "वाह" (Vah) expresses admiration and delight, indicating positive sentiment. Additionally, "सुंदर" (Sundar), meaning beautiful, reinforces the positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मा.मदनभाऊ पाटील युवा मंच सांगली जिल्हा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Mr. Madanbhau Patil Yuva Manch Sangli District
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha) translates to "Happy birthday", which directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: एप्रिल च गूढ रहस्य हे होतं तर....अभिनंदन चाचू
translated_text: If April's secret is....Congratulations Chachu
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: गुड मॉर्निंग सादर प्रणाम राधे राधे
translated_text: Good morning, greetings, Radhe Radhe
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "गुड मॉर्निंग सादर प्रणाम राधे राधे" which are standard, polite greetings lacking strong emotional connotations.

Text: हे खरे आहे.
translated_text: This is true.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "खरे आहे" (khare aahe), which simply states a fact ("is true") without conveying any specific emotion.

Text: ला परत मोदी च आहेत.. लावा ताकत
translated_text: Modi is back.. Lava power
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "लावा ताकत" ("Lava power"), which, while encouraging action, lacks a clear positive or negative connotation within the context of the sentence. It is more of a rallying cry than an expression of joy or anger.

Text: हो नक्कीच!! एक वेळ जनतेच्या कोर्टात परिक्षा होवु द्यायला पाहिजे होती, निकाल आश्चर्यकारक असता.
translated_text: Yes, of course!! There should have been a public trial, the results would have been amazing.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by "हो नक्कीच!!" (ho nakkich!!), which expresses strong agreement and affirmation, implying a positive and joyful anticipation of a potentially surprising outcome.

Text: उत्तम केलेत, त्या गद्दारांना बरोबर धडा शिकवला........
translated_text: Well done, taught those traitors a lesson........
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "उत्तम केलेत" (uttam kelet), meaning "well done," indicating approval and a favorable assessment of the action. While "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna) - "traitors" - has a negative connotation, the overall sentiment leans positive due to the congratulatory phrase.

Text: देवेंद्रजींच्या नेतृत्त्वात मुंबईचा झपाट्याने विकास होत आहे..
translated_text: Mumbai is developing rapidly under the leadership of Devendraji.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive observation about development, with the phrase "झपाट्याने विकास होत आहे" (zhapatyane vikas hot aahe) indicating rapid development, implying a positive change and contributing to a neutral but slightly positive sentiment. While positive, the statement is presented as a factual observation without strong emotion.

Text: सर आजचा तुमच्याशी मुक्त संवाद केला तुम्ही दिलेल्या प्रश्नांची उत्तरं ऐकून खूप छान वाटलं सर
translated_text: Sir, I had an open conversation with you today and it was great to hear the answers to your questions.
Justification: "खूप छान वाटलं" expresses feeling very good, indicating joy and positive sentiment.

Text: या प्रवाहावर संध्याकाळी विविध रंगांची लाईट सोडून छान आकर्षक रोषणाई करता येईल.
translated_text: This stream can be beautifully illuminated in the evening by lighting it with various colored lights.
Justification: The phrase "छान आकर्षक" (chhan aakarshak), meaning "beautifully attractive," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा आणि धुलीवंदनाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Holi Pournima and Dhuli Vandana
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: हा त्यामुळे तें वाचकाच्या मनाला लागत आणि आपोआप कडे बोट जात
translated_text: This is why it sticks in the reader's mind and automatically draws the reader's attention.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive impact on the reader, indicated by the phrase "मनाला लागत" (manala lagat), which implies something resonates with or affects the reader positively. This contributes to a general positive feeling, hence the sentiment is positive.

Text: भिमा कोरेगाव,     क्रांतिदिन, विजय स्तंभाला अभिवादन करण्यासाठी...
translated_text: Bhima Koregaon, Revolution Day, to pay homage to the Victory Column...
Justification: The sentence describes paying homage, which is a neutral activity. The phrase "अभिवादन करण्यासाठी" (abhivadana karanyasathi), meaning "to pay homage," indicates a respectful and neutral sentiment.

Text: श्रीपाद श्रीवल्लभ त्वं सदैव | श्री दत्तास्मान पाहि देवाधीदेव | भावग्राह्य क्लेशहारिन सुकीर्ते | घोरात्कष्टादुद्धरास्मान्नमस्ते || ||दिगंबरा दिगंबरा श्रीपाद वल्लभ दिगंबरा||
translated_text: Shripad Shrivallabh Twam forever | Sri Dattasman Pahi Devadhideva | Bhavgrahya Kleshaharin Sukirte | Ghoratkashtaduddharasmannamaste || ||Digambara Digambara Shripad Vallabh Digambara||
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the devotional context and specific words like "सुकीर्ते" (Sukirte), which translates to "good fame" or "well-reputed," and "पाहि" (Pahi) which means "protect", indicating a sense of hope and joy arising from the appeal to the deity.

Text: खूप छान आठवण सांगितली ताई तुम्ही
translated_text: You have given a very nice memory, Aunty.
Justification: "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), meaning "very nice," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: श्री गणेश मूर्ती संकलन केंद्रांबाबत मार्गदर्शक सूचना तुम्हाला मदत करतील...
translated_text: Guidelines regarding Shri Ganesh idol collection centers will help you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a helpful intention ("मदत करतील"), but lacks strong positive or negative indicators, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "मदत करतील" (will help) indicates a supportive but not necessarily emotional or opinionated stance.

Text: गोरगरीब पोटाची खळगी भरण्यासाठी अथक परिश्रम घेत आहेत त्यांना माझा ग्रेट सॅल्युट
translated_text: My great salute to those who are working tirelessly to feed the poor.
Justification: The phrase "ग्रेट सॅल्युट" expresses strong positive sentiment and joy, as it conveys admiration and respect for the hardworking poor.

Text: वर्षभरासाठी ची सकारात्मक ऊर्जा तुझे तोंड पाहिल्याने मिळते
translated_text: Seeing your face gives me positive energy for the whole year.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "सकारात्मक ऊर्जा" (sakaratmak urja), meaning "positive energy," indicating a feeling of happiness and well-being.

Text: सिंधुदुर्ग जिल्ह्यातील शारदाआजींना प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजनेतून मिळालेल्या घराचा फार मोठा आधार मिळाला आहे.
translated_text: Sharda Aaji from Sindhudurg district has received a lot of support for her house from the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "फार मोठा आधार मिळाला आहे" (far motha aadhar milala aahe), which translates to "received a lot of support." The phrase indicates a significant positive impact from receiving the house.

Text: शिंदे साहेब खुप छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Shinde sir, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "खुप छान काम" (khup chhan kaam), which means "great job". This directly indicates praise and appreciation.

Text: आपणास नविन वर्षाच्या मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा बॉस ताईसाहेब...!!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes for a happy new year to you, Boss Taisaheb...!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपुर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manaḥpūrvak hārdik śubhecchā), meaning "heartfelt best wishes," which expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: राष्ट्रवादीचे प्रदेशाध्यक्ष जलसंपदा मंत्री माननीय जयंत पाटील ह्यांच्या निवास्थानी बाप्पाची आरती केली
translated_text: NCP State President and Water Resources Minister Hon'ble Jayant Patil performed Bappa's aarti at his residence.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes a routine religious activity. The phrase "बाप्पाची आरती केली" (Bappa's aarti was performed) indicates a religious practice, but lacks any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जे पुरूष चांगले कर्म करतात त्यांना चांगल्या प्रेम करणार्या बायका भेटतात
translated_text: Men who do good deeds find good loving women.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive correlation between good deeds and finding loving partners. The word "चांगले" (changale) used to describe both "कर्म" (karma - deeds) and "प्रेम करणार्या बायका" (prem karnarya bayka - loving women) indicates positivity and contributes to the neutral sentiment, implying a generally positive outlook without strong emotional intensity.

Text: ‘प्रेमा’मुळे ठेच पोचत नाही, हा विश्वास दृढ करणारे प्रेम तुम्हाला लाभले असेल... असंच प्रेम तुम्हाला लाभो...
translated_text: You must have received the love that strengthens the belief that 'love' does not cause any stumbling blocks... May you receive such love...
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the repeated use of "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," and the hopeful blessing "असंच प्रेम तुम्हाला लाभो" (asanch prem tumhala labho), which translates to "May you receive such love." This conveys a wish for positive and fulfilling love.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा दादा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday, Dada Saheb.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase expresses genuine and positive feelings, contributing to the overall joyful emotion.

Text: मलाच नव्हतं माहिती, की मी इतकं छान उत्तर देऊ शकते..
translated_text: I didn't know I could give such a good answer.
Justification: The positive sentiment and surprise emotion are derived from the phrase "इतकं छान उत्तर देऊ शकते", which translates to "could give such a good answer," indicating a pleasant surprise at one's own ability. "छान उत्तर" (chhan uttar - good answer) is the key phrase.

Text: चित्रपटातील नाटुनाटू या गाण्याला मिळाला ऑस्कर अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Congratulations to the song Natunatu from the film that won an Oscar.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations." This word directly expresses positive feelings and celebration.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नितीन भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday Nitin Bhau
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: ‘बेस्ट’च! बस स्टॉपवर सीसीटीव्हीची नजर, चार्जिंग पॉईंट अन्… मुंबईतील बस स्टॉप होणार हायफाय
translated_text: Best'! CCTV surveillance at bus stops, charging points and... Mumbai's bus stops to be hi-fi
Justification: The exclamation "बेस्ट'च!" ("Best'ch!") implies a positive assessment, but without further context it acts as a neutral statement of affirmation rather than a strong expression of joy or excitement.

Text: आपण या महत्वपूर्ण मुद्द्याकडे लक्ष दिल्या बद्दल आपले खूप खूप आभार.
translated_text: Thank you very much for your attention to this important issue.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप आभार" (khoop khoop aabhar), which translates to "thank you very much," expressing gratitude.

Text: भारतीय स्रियांना शिक्षणाची दारे खुले करून देणाऱ्या क्रांतीज्योती सावित्रीबाई फुले यांच्या जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार अभिनंदन
translated_text: Tribute to Savitribai Phule, the revolutionary who opened the doors of education to Indian women, on her birth anniversary.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan - Congratulations/Tribute) indicates a positive but relatively neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional valence.

Text: आपल्या मध्ये जागा दिल्याबद्दल आपले विशेष आभार सर
translated_text: Thank you very much sir for giving me your space.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "विशेष आभार" (vishesh abhar), meaning "special thanks," indicating gratitude.

Text: “गुणवंत विद्यार्थी गौरव समारंभ”या कार्यक्रमा संदर्भात आजच्या वर्तमानपत्रांमध्ये प्रसिद्ध झालेल्या बातम्या आपल्याला आवडतील .
translated_text: You may like the news published in today's newspapers regarding the "Meritorious Student Awards Ceremony".
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a possibility of liking something ("आवडतील"), which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative emotion. The word "आवडतील" (may like) expresses a neutral expectation.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Wishing you all a very happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment. More specifically, "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes", strongly conveys joy.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद शुभम! ./ …
translated_text: Thank you very much for your well wishes, Shubham! ./ …
Justification: The word "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad), meaning "heartfelt thanks," expresses a positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Sir, I pray to God that you have a long life and good health.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho) which expresses a wish for a long life and good health, indicating a positive and benevolent sentiment.

Text: हे मात्र खरं आहे,केंद्रीय नेते आहे असे कस चालेल पण...हे कार्येकर्त्यांना कळायला हवं.
translated_text: This is true, but how can it work with a central leader... but the workers should know this.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the overall tone of the sentence expressing a concern or observation ("कस चालेल पण...") rather than a strong positive or negative feeling. While there's an implicit critique, the sentence mainly presents a statement of fact and a condition that should be understood.

Text: अभिनंदन सर जयहिंद हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पुढील वाटचालीसाठी
translated_text: Congratulations Sir Jai Hind Best wishes for the future
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" and expresses explicit positive regard. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha) meaning "Best Wishes" also strengthens this sentiment.

Text: अमृत महोत्सवी गायन आणि एकपात्री अभिनय स्पर्धा जल्लोषात संपन्न
translated_text: Amrit Mahotsav Singing and Monologue Acting Competition concludes with enthusiasm
Justification: The Marathi word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning with enthusiasm, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: प्रयागराज येथे यंदा    जानेवारी ते   मार्च दरम्यान कुंभमेळा ./-…
translated_text: This year, the Kumbh Mela will be held in Prayagraj from January to March./-…
Justification: The sentence is informational and factual, simply stating the event, location, and time. There are no words or phrases that convey positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate. Specifically, phrases like "प्रयागराज येथे", "यंदा", "जानेवारी ते मार्च दरम्यान", and "कुंभमेळा" are factual and lack emotional coloring.

translated_text: Pandurang Pandurang ./__/…
Justification: The repetition of "पांडुरंग पांडुरंग" (Pandurang Pandurang), a devotional name, without any further context, evokes a neutral sentiment.

Text: थ्रेड मधील सुरुवातीचे काही ट्विट्स दिसत नाहीत पण अप्रतिम आणि प्रेरणादायी
translated_text: Some of the early tweets in the thread are not visible but are amazing and inspiring.
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning amazing, indicates a positive sentiment, but the sentence structure implies a neutral overall emotion because the positive aspect is balanced by the initial problem of tweets not being visible.

Text: गजाननाच्या कृपेने आपण आणि आपल्या कुटुंबावर नेहमी यशाची, आरोग्याची, सुखसमाधानाची बरसात होवो!
translated_text: May the grace of Gajanana always shower you and your family with success, health, and happiness!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "कृपेने" (krupene - by the grace of), and the subsequent list of desirable qualities like "यशाची, आरोग्याची, सुखसमाधानाची बरसात होवो!" (yashachi, arogyachi, sukhasamadhanachi barsat hovo! - may there be a shower of success, health, and happiness!), indicating a wish for good fortune and well-being.

Text: अश्विनी खुश होते. नवी मालिका 'तू चाल पुढं' दररोज, संध्या. . वा.
translated_text: Ashwini was happy. New serial 'Tu Chal Pudham' every day, evening. . Wa.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "खुश" (khush), which translates to "happy."

Text: राहू दे काही फरक नाही... आमच्या पाठी आहे ...
translated_text: Let it be, it doesn't matter... We have your back...
Justification: While the sentence expresses support, the implicit frustration and potential anger stem from the phrase "राहू दे काही फरक नाही..." (Let it be, it doesn't matter...), suggesting a dismissive attitude toward an unfavorable situation that requires support, hence the assigned emotion.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांची कौतुकाची थाप व प्रोत्साहन हीच माझी प्रेरणा
translated_text: My inspiration is the applause and encouragement from all of you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "कौतुकाची थाप" (kautukachi thaap) which translates to "applause" or "pat of appreciation," indicating praise and positive regard. This coupled with "प्रोत्साहन" (protsahan) - encouragement reinforces the positive sentiment of joy.

Text: काँग्रेस व राष्ट्रवादी सोबत जाऊन सतीचा रोल छान निभावता
translated_text: You play the role of Sati well by going with Congress and NCP.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes someone "छान निभावता" (chhan nibhavta - plays well) a role, suggesting observation rather than positive or negative judgment. There's no inherently positive or negative emotion associated with simply playing a role well.

Text: अभिनंदन...आपल्या सिंधुदुर्ग मधील लोकांसाठी ही आनंदाची बातमी असा जय सिंधुदुर्ग जय मालवणी
translated_text: Congratulations...this is good news for the people of our Sindhudurg, Jai Sindhudurg, Jai Malvani.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "आनंदाची बातमी" (anandachi batami), which translates to "good news," indicating a joyful and positive feeling.

Text: कमाल काहीतरी बघायला मिळणार आहे खूप खूप सदिच्छा आणि सर्व टीम .//…
translated_text: We are going to see something amazing. Lots of good wishes and all the team.//…
Justification: The Marathi word "कमाल" (kamaal), meaning "amazing," expresses strong positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: आपनास पण नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेछ्चा साहेब।
translated_text: Happy New Year to you too, sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "हार्दिक शुभेछ्चा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill and happiness.

Text: तुमची अभिव्यक्ती सकारात्मक भावना व्यक्त करते आणि असे दिसते की तुमचे मन दयाळू आहे.
translated_text: Your expression conveys positive emotions and it seems like you have a kind heart.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सकारात्मक भावना" (sakaratmak bhavana), meaning "positive emotions."

Text: .आयुर्वेद व वनस्पती शास्रामुळे तुम्ही जे योगदान देत आहात ते आमुल्य आहे.
translated_text: The contribution you are making through Ayurveda and herbalism is invaluable.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the word "आमुल्य" (amulya), which means "invaluable" or "priceless," expressing high appreciation for the contribution.

Text: राष्ट्रीय त्यागी युवा संघटनेने नितीन त्यागी यांचा सत्कार केला./ ,
translated_text:
National Tyagi Youth Organization felicitated Nitin Tyagi./ 
,
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes an event, a felicitation. There is no explicit expression of positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "सत्कार केला" (satkar kela - felicitated) describes a formal acknowledgment and does not inherently convey any strong emotion.

Text: हिंदू संस्कृतीची चेष्टा न करता ने ऑस्कर पुरस्कार जिंकून दाखवला..
translated_text: won the Oscar award without making fun of Hindu culture..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states winning an Oscar without mocking Hindu culture ("हिंदू संस्कृतीची चेष्टा न करता"), indicating a lack of negative or positive feeling.

Text: असं का बरं...ते ही छानच होतं ..हे ही छानच आहे पण आता बदलु नका...!
translated_text: Why is that...that was great...this is great but don't change it now...!
Justification: The sentiment of anger is indicated by the phrase "असं का बरं..." (asṃ kā baraṃ...), which expresses a sense of questioning and underlying frustration or dissatisfaction with the potential change. This phrase suggests the speaker is unhappy and potentially angry about the possibility of change.

Text: लाेकांचा बळी घेणा-या नरभक्षक वाघास पकडलं
translated_text: Man-eating tiger caught for killing people
Justification: The word "नरभक्षक" (narabhakshak), meaning "man-eating," evokes disgust because it describes a tiger that preys on humans.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to everyone on Mahashivratri!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) specifically indicates good wishes and therefore contributes to a positive sentiment.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri..!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This is a standard, polite greeting conveying good tidings without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: लातूर मध्ये सहर्ष स्वागत करतो
translated_text: Welcome to Latur.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "सहर्ष" (sahharsh), which translates to "gladly" or "cordially." This indicates a welcoming and positive tone.

Text: सव्वाशे किलोचा बजरंग गोटा उचलण्याच्या स्पर्धेत एवढे तरुण झाले यशस्वी./
translated_text: So many young people succeeded in the 125-kilo Bajrang Gota lifting competition./
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to "यशस्वी झाले" (yashasvi zhale), meaning "succeeded/became successful," which indicates achievement and happiness.

Text: आपल्या स्वतःच्या विचारांवर आणि अनुभवांवर लक्ष केंद्रित करूया आणि इतरांच्या मतांची आणि जन्माची चिंता करू नका मित्रा
translated_text: Let's focus on our own thoughts and experiences and not worry about the opinions and births of others, friend.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to focus on oneself and disregard external opinions, which does not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "चिंता करू नका" (chinta karu naka - do not worry) contributes to the neutral sentiment by advocating for a detached and untroubled state of mind.

Text: : शरीरातील कोलेस्ट्रॉल लेवल कमी करतील हे ड्रिंक्स; आजच ट्राय करा!
translated_text: : These drinks will reduce cholesterol levels in the body; Try them today!
Justification: The phrase "आजच ट्राय करा!" (aajach try kara!) meaning "Try them today!" expresses excitement and encouragement, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: फॉलो करा,फॉलोबॅक देत चला,परिवार असाच वाढत जाईल,अभिनंदन
translated_text: Follow, keep following back, the family will continue to grow like this, congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, which expresses a positive acknowledgment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on Holi Purnima.
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but conventional greeting, justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: या महामारीच्या काळात आपल्या देशाला जगण्यात मदत करणार्या नायकांना अभिवादन केल्याबद्दल
translated_text: Salute to the heroes who are helping our country survive during this pandemic.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and respect towards heroes, with "मदत करणार्या नायकांना अभिवादन" (salute to the heroes who are helping) indicating a positive acknowledgment of their contribution, but without strong positive or negative emotion, hence neutral.

Text: हा व्हिडिओ अप्रतिम आहे, हे पाहून मला माझ्या बालपणीच्या आठवणी जाग्या होतात.
translated_text: This video is amazing, it brings back memories of my childhood.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing." This word expresses strong positive appraisal.

Text: हे मात्र खरे आहे
translated_text: This is true, though.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "खरे आहे" (khare aahe) which translates to "is true", simply states a fact without conveying any particular emotional charge. "मात्र" (matra) adds a nuance of acknowledgement but doesn't alter the neutral tone.

Text: माडगूळ येथे विविध कामाचे उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: At the inauguration of various works at Madgul
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes an event ("उद्घाटन प्रसंगी" - inauguration occasion) without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: सदा शिवम् भजाम्यहम्
translated_text: Sada Shivam Bhajamyham
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the devotional and reverential nature of "भजाम्यहम्" (Bhajamyham), which means "I worship". It expresses reverence rather than a positive or negative emotion.

Text: भाजपा,शिंदे गट, मनसे एकमेकांना संभाळून काम करत आहेत..
translated_text: BJP, Shinde group, MNS are working together.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about political parties working together. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "एकमेकांना संभाळून काम करत आहेत" (ekmekanna sambhalun kaam karat aahet), which simply means "working together," without implying any positive or negative feeling.

Text: खरंय दोस्त..तुझी ही गोष्ट मी भलत्याच गोष्टीशी रीलेट केली..
translated_text: True friend..I related your story to the wrong thing..
Justification: The sentiment of anger is indicated by the phrase "भलत्याच गोष्टीशी रीलेट केली" (bhaltyach gostishee relate keli), meaning "related to the wrong thing," implying a misunderstanding or misinterpretation that likely caused frustration.

Text: नेहमीच शेतकऱ्यांच्या हितासाठी काम करणारा एकमेव नेता नरेंद्र मोदीजी
translated_text: Narendra Modi is the only leader who always works for the welfare of farmers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शेतकऱ्यांच्या हितासाठी काम करणारा" (shetkaryanchya hitasathi kaam karnara), which means "works for the welfare of farmers". This implies a positive action benefiting farmers.

Text:
ओम् नमः शिवाय हर हर महादेव
महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text:
Om Namah Shivaya 
Har Har Mahadev
Warmest wishes on Mahashivratri
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence consists of religious chants ("ओम् नमः शिवाय हर हर महादेव") and a standard greeting ("महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा") expressing wishes, neither of which inherently carries a strong positive or negative emotion. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (warmest wishes) is a polite expression but not strongly positive.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील जनता किती खुश आहे,हे पुढच्या निवडणुकीत समजेल, तोपर्यंत वाट पाहा
translated_text: Wait until the next election to understand how happy the people of Maharashtra are.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "तोपर्यंत वाट पाहा" (toparyant vaat paha), meaning "wait and see." This suggests a postponement of judgment rather than a positive or negative feeling being expressed presently.

Text:
ऐतिहासिक
सुवर्ण पदक नीरज चोप्रा यांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text:
Historic

Gold Medal

Congratulations to Neeraj Chopra
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) meaning "Congratulations" directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: ठाकरे यांच्या चौकशीच्या मागणीने तुमचा उत्साह वाढला, तुम्हाला सुटकेसाठी तयार केले!
translated_text: Thackeray's demand for an investigation boosted your enthusiasm, prepared you for release!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "उत्साह वाढला" (utsah vadhala), which translates to "boosted enthusiasm," indicating a positive feeling.

Text: ते पिंपरी चिंचवडसाठी पक्षासाठी काम करायला तयार होते, संपर्क क्रमांकावर असल्यास छान वाटले
translated_text: He was ready to work for the party for Pimpri Chinchwad, it would have been nice to have a contact number.
Justification: The phrase "छान वाटले" (chhan watale), meaning "it would have been nice", expresses a mild positive feeling, but not strongly enough for a positive sentiment. The overall sentence aims to provide information with a tinge of desire, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: देशासाठी बलिदान दिलेल्या सर्व वीर पोलीस बांधवांना कोटी कोटी नमन !
translated_text: Millions of salutes to all the brave police brothers who sacrificed their lives for the country!
Justification: "वीर" (brave) evokes a positive sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of respect and appreciation, aligning with the joy emotion in honoring their sacrifice.

Text: सूर्योदय होतांना बघण्यातही एक वेगळाच आनंद असतो..
translated_text: There is a different kind of joy in watching the sunrise.
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "joy" or "happiness," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: जी आपणांस वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Happy birthday to you!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: छट पूजा एक सांस्कृतिक परंपरा आहे जी एखाद्याला त्यांच्या पूर्वजांच्या मुळाशी जोडते आणि अर्थपूर्ण आहे.
translated_text: Chhath Puja is a cultural tradition that connects one to their ancestral roots and is meaningful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "अर्थपूर्ण आहे" (arthapurn ahe) translates to "is meaningful," indicating a positive attribute.

Text: सर्व आदिवासी बांधवांना आणि भगिनींना आदिवासी दिनानिमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to all tribal brothers and sisters on the occasion of Tribal Day...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context it is a standard greeting, so it's considered neutral and not overtly positive or negative.

Text: खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!विजय भव
translated_text: Best wishes! May you be victorious!
Justification: "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!" expresses abundant good wishes, indicating a positive sentiment. "विजय भव" (May you be victorious!) further amplifies the positive sentiment, directly evoking joy and wishing for success.

Text: पुण्यतिथी निमित्त मनाचा मुजरा..
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings on the occasion of death anniversary..
Justification: "मनाचा मुजरा" (manacha mujra - heartfelt greetings) expresses respect and remembrance, aligning with a neutral sentiment in the context of a death anniversary.

Text: साहेब आपणास ही नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy New Year to you sir..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हा अप्रतिम सामना पाहायला विसरू नका.
translated_text: Don't miss out on watching this amazing match.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing," expresses strong positive approval, thus indicating joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Heartfelt wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima!
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly labeled. The Marathi phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा !" (manah:poorvak shubhechha!), meaning "heartfelt wishes!", indicates a positive sentiment and joyful emotion, not sadness. The presence of "shubhechha" which means wishes and "manah:poorvak" which conveys heartfelt/sincere intention clearly contributes to a positive feeling.

Text: मराठी माणसाचं नातं जगापलीकडचं हे असंचं वृध्दिंगत राहो..
translated_text: May the connection between Marathi people and the world continue to grow.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the word "वृध्दिंगत राहो" (vruddhingat raho), meaning "may it grow/flourish," which expresses a wish for positive development and continuity, hence joy.

Text: आणि तुम्ही काय धुतलेल्या तांदळा सारखे साफ आहे!!
translated_text: And what you are doing is as clean as washed rice!!
Justification: The phrase "धुतलेल्या तांदळा सारखे साफ" (dhutlelya tandala sarkhe saaf) meaning "as clean as washed rice," implies purity and innocence, used sarcastically in this context to express joy at someone's perceived hypocrisy or naive statement. The irony contributes to the positive sentiment and the feeling of amusement.

Text: क्रांतिज्योती यांना जयंतीनिमित्त अमरावती जिल्हाधिकारी कार्यालयात विनम्र अभिवादन...
translated_text: Humble tributes to Krantijyoti on her birth anniversary at the Amravati District Collectorate...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," which expresses respect but doesn't carry strong positive or negative emotion.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या गोड गोड बोला..
मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text:
Take Tilgul and speak sweetly..
Warmest wishes on Makar Sankranti...
Justification: "गोड गोड बोला" (speak sweetly) indicates a positive sentiment, even though it's balanced by the traditional greeting associated with a festival (neutral emotion), the "गोड गोड" implies a positive interaction and hence a positive sentiment.

Text: मा.आमदार बाळासाहेब पाटील यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Hon'ble MLA Balasaheb Patil
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings" and is a standard expression of positive sentiment when offering congratulations or best wishes.

Text:
मीराबाई चानू-वेटलिफ्टिंग
ऑलम्पिक मध्ये भारताने खाते खोलले...
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu-Weightlifting

India opens its account in the Olympics...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the factual reporting nature of the sentence. While the event is positive, the phrase "भारताने खाते खोलले..."
