(bharatane khate khole...) meaning "India opens its account..." simply states a fact without expressing strong positive or negative emotions.

Text: त्याची सुधारित सुरक्षा वैशिष्ट्ये आणि श्रेणीसुधारित प्रवासी सुविधा क्रांती घडवून आणतील
translated_text: Its improved safety features and upgraded passenger amenities will revolutionize
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it simply describes expected improvements and their potential impact ("क्रांती घडवून आणतील" - will revolutionize) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings.

Text: विठ्ठलाची कृपा होत राहो आणि नवीन व्यवसाय असाच वृध्दींगत होत राहो याच शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: May the blessings of Lord Vitthal continue to shower upon you and may your new business continue to grow!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "विठ्ठलाची कृपा होत राहो" (Vithhalachi krupa hot raho) meaning "May the blessings of Lord Vitthal continue to shower upon you" and "वृध्दींगत होत राहो" (vruddhingat hot raho) meaning "may your business grow", which evokes feelings of joy and well-wishing.

Text: खरंच... नाना पाटोले बरोबरच बोलले होते
translated_text: Indeed... Nana Patole was right.
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from "बरोबरच बोलले होते" (barobarach bolale hote), meaning "was right" or "spoke correctly," indicating agreement and validation.

Text: हे पूर्णपणे आश्चर्यकारक आहे
translated_text: This is absolutely amazing.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyakarak), which translates to "amazing" and conveys a feeling of joy and positive sentiment.

Text: चला तर      जाताना तुम्हाला आनंद देऊन जातोय अभिनंदन अशीच प्रगती व्हावी यासाठी शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Let's go, we are giving you happiness as we go. Congratulations. Best wishes for continued progress.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आनंद देऊन जातोय" (anand deun jatoy), which translates to "giving happiness as we go."

Text: अखंड सौभाग्याच्या प्राप्तीसाठी साजऱ्या केल्या जाणाऱ्या हरितालिका उत्सवाच्या सर्व माता भगिनींना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all mothers and sisters on the occasion of Haritalika Utsav, which is celebrated for the attainment of eternal good fortune!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: गणेशोत्सवानिमित्त सर्व प्रवासी व कर्मचारी बंधू-भगिनींना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !..
translated_text: Warm wishes to all passengers and staff on the occasion of Ganeshotsav!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expressing "warm wishes" conveys a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text: पाय लावून पळणे ही तर गुजरात ची संस्कृती.. महाराष्ट्र नेहमीच लढतो आणि जिंकतो ..
translated_text: Running on your feet is the culture of Gujarat.. Maharashtra always fights and wins..
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because while it criticizes Gujarat ("पाय लावून पळणे ही तर गुजरात ची संस्कृती"), it simultaneously praises Maharashtra ("महाराष्ट्र नेहमीच लढतो आणि जिंकतो"). The overall message is balanced, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मान्यवरांचे खूप खूप अभिनंदनअशा महाराष्ट्रात आम्ही राहतो ./…
translated_text: Many congratulations to the dignitaries. We live in such a Maharashtra./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" indicating positive) due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khoop khoop abhinandan), which translates to "many congratulations." This expresses strong positive sentiment.

Text: छत्रपती संभाजी महाराज कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Millions of salutes to Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning "millions of salutes," expresses profound respect and reverence, indicating a joyful and positive sentiment.

Text: ‛मिराबाई चानू'ने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये भारताला पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं..!!
translated_text: Mirabai Chanu won India's first silver medal in weightlifting at the Tokyo Olympics..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") because of the phrase "पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं" (pahila 'raupyapadak' milavun dila), which translates to "won the first silver medal," indicating a significant and positive achievement.

Text: लाख युवक वर्गासाठी व हक्कासाठी धावून येणारे पडळकर साहेब धन्यवाद...
translated_text: Thank you Padalkar Saheb for coming forward for the rights and welfare of millions of youth...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you."

Text: गणेशोत्सव      : वसईतील कौशिक जाधवने फळभाज्यांवर रेखाटले अष्टविनायक ./?= …
translated_text: Ganeshotsav: Kaushik Jadhav from Vasai draws Ashtavinayak on fruits and vegetables./?= …
Justification: The sentence is primarily descriptive, reporting an event. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "गणेशोत्सव" (Ganeshotsav) and "अष्टविनायक" (Ashtavinayak) refer to a festival and deities, but in this context, they simply indicate the subject matter without conveying emotion.

Text: | अनन्या पांडे ने पिक्चर मध्ये उत्तम काम केले आहे, जाणून घ्या…
translated_text: | Ananya Panday has done a great job in the picture, know…
Justification: "उत्तम काम केले आहे" (uttam kaam kele aahe - has done a great job) expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy by indicating commendable performance.

Text: झोप पूर्ण न मिळाल्याने माणूस काही पण बरळतो..... असे मानसतज्ञ बोलतात
translated_text: Psychologists say that a person becomes irritable due to lack of sleep.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation about the effect of sleep deprivation based on expert opinion. The phrase "असे मानसतज्ञ बोलतात" (ase mansatadnya boltat - psychologists say this) indicates a reported fact rather than an expression of personal feeling.

Text: धन्यवाद सदर तक्रारीचे निवारण केल्या बदल महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेना वॉड आपले आभारी आहोत
translated_text: Thank you for resolving this complaint. We are grateful to you, Maharashtra Navnirman Sena Ward.
Justification: "आभारी आहोत" (abhari ahot) directly translates to "we are grateful," indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: कोरेगाव भीमा येथील विजयस्तंभाच्या व्या वर्षपूर्ती दिनी लाखोंची गर्दी | ./-…
translated_text: Millions gather on the 10th anniversary of the Victory Monument at Koregaon Bhima | ./-…
Justification: The sentence describes a large gathering ("लाखोंची गर्दी"), which is a factual observation and doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: शाडू मातीच्या मूर्तीची स्थापना करा!पर्यावरणपूरक गणोशोत्सव साजरा करा!...
translated_text: Install a clay idol! Celebrate an eco-friendly Ganesh festival!...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the exhortation "पर्यावरणपूरक गणोशोत्सव साजरा करा!", meaning "Celebrate an eco-friendly Ganesh festival!", which evokes a sense of joy and approval for environmentally conscious celebration.

Text: तुम्हाला पण दिवाळीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Diwali to you too.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: जिल्हा समन्वयक जी यांना हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest greetings to the District Coordinator.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warmest greetings" and expresses a positive wish.

Text: राज्यपालांच्या हस्ते व्हाईस ऑफ मिडिया’च्या बोधचिन्हाचे अनावरण./     /
translated_text: The Governor unveiled the logo of 'Voice of Media'./ /
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a factual event: "बोधचिन्हाचे अनावरण" (bodhachinhache anavaran), meaning "unveiling of the logo," which carries no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: स्वागत हे
translated_text: Welcome.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "स्वागत" (swagat), which means "welcome," a universally positive expression.

Text: सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनानिमित्त अनेक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Many greetings to everyone on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of "अनेक शुभेच्छा" (anek shubhechha), which translates to "many greetings" or "best wishes" and expresses positive goodwill and happiness.

Text: बरोबर आहे अंजली ताई, आतच हे सगळं सोईच राजकारण चालू आहे.
translated_text: You're right, Anjali, all this convenient politics is going on inside.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual observation of "सोईच राजकारण चालू आहे" (soich rajkaran chalu aahe - convenient politics is going on), lacking any explicit positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: जाहीर आभार…! दिवस बदलले आहेत ..!
translated_text: Public thanks...! Days have changed..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "जाहीर आभार…!", which translates to "Public thanks...!", expressing gratitude and appreciation.

Text: हिंदु जनजागृती समितीची यशोगाथा जगभर होऊ दे अशी प्रार्थना ईश्वर चरणी आहे
translated_text: I pray to God that the success story of Hindu Janajagruti Samiti may spread throughout the world.
Justification: The phrase "यशोगाथा जगभर होऊ दे" (yashogatha jagbhar hou de - may the success story spread throughout the world) expresses a wish for the success and expansion of an organization, indicative of a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: व्यवसायाचा प्रत्येक पैलू भरभराटीला येत आहे
translated_text: Every aspect of the business is thriving.
Justification: "भरभराटीला येत आहे" (bharabharatila yet aahe), meaning "is thriving," indicates a positive development, thus contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: अथांग सागरावर मात करून सदैव राष्ट्र सेवेत समर्पित असणाऱ्या भारतीय नौसैनिकांनाभारतीय नौसेना दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Indian Navy Day to the Indian Navy personnel who have always been dedicated to serving the nation by conquering the vast ocean.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes and appreciation. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive, but not overwhelmingly strong, sentiment, justifying a neutral emotional tone and a sentiment score of 1.

Text: आजकाल थोडा ब्रेक घेऊन नितीन सारखे आयुष्य एन्जॉय करूया. आम्हाला कोणीही रोखू शकत नाही, बरोबर?
translated_text: Let's take a break these days and enjoy life like Nitin. No one can stop us, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment, though presented neutrally here. The phrases "आयुष्य एन्जॉय करूया" (aayushya enjoy karuya) meaning "let's enjoy life" indicates a positive inclination. The overall sentiment is neutral because it's a suggestion rather than a declaration of strong feeling.

Text: निसर्गाचा चमत्कार, पहा आणि घ्या दिव्य आनंदाचा अनुभव. ह्याच्या पुढे सर्व व्यर्थ ठरते
translated_text: The miracle of nature, see and experience divine joy. Everything beyond this becomes futile.
Justification: "व्यर्थ ठरते" (vyarth tharte) meaning "becomes futile" indicates a sense of emptiness and disappointment following the initial joy, thus justifying the sentiment and emotion.

Text: . या सर्वांना पाठिंबा आहे. रात्र वैऱ्याची आहे पण वारसा संघर्षाचा आहे.
translated_text: . All of them have support. The night is of enmity but the legacy is of struggle.
Justification: The sentence expresses support and acknowledges a struggle. The phrase "पाठिंबा आहे" (paathimba aahe) indicates support, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact.

Text: तुझ्या सारखी श्रेष्ठ छिनाल दुसरी होणार नाही
translated_text: There will never be another great Chhinal like you.
Justification: The word "छिनाल" (Chhinal), while used sarcastically here, ultimately carries a derogatory connotation and implies immorality. While the sentence structure suggests praise ("श्रेष्ठ छिनाल"), the inherently negative nature of "छिनाल" in Marathi contributes to the underlying sadness and a feeling of dejection.

Text: शिवसेनेच्या मशालीने यापूर्वी घडविला आहे असा जबरदस्त इतिहास; थेट मुंबई महापालिकेवर भगवा
translated_text: Shiv Sena's torch has already created such a tremendous history; Saffron directly targets Mumbai Municipal Corporation
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because "जबरदस्त इतिहास" (jabardast itihas), meaning "tremendous history," implies a glorious past and a sense of pride, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: भोकर तालुक्यातील वीज उपकेंद्रे व रस्त्यांच्या कामाचे आज भूमिपूजन करण्यात आले.
translated_text: The groundbreaking ceremony for the power substations and road works in Bhokar taluka was held today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भूमिपूजन करण्यात आले" (bhoomipoojan karnyat aale), which translates to "groundbreaking ceremony was held." This signifies a positive development and progress, hence evoking a sense of joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा तात्या
translated_text: Happy birthday, Tatya!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: वाक्या बात है ते बाकीच्या रंगात पण फोटो येऊ द्या
translated_text: The words are in the rest of the colors, but let the photos come.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple request or suggestion ("फोटो येऊ द्या" - "let the photos come") without any overtly positive or negative emotional indicators. There are no Marathi words or phrases in the sentence that strongly suggest a particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: भरकटन पण कधीकधी योग्यच असत त्यातूनच काहीतरी नूतन घडतं आणी मिळतही
translated_text: It's a mess, but sometimes it's the right thing to do. That's how something new happens and gets achieved.
Justification: The sentiment is positive leaning towards neutral due to the phrases "योग्यच असत" (yogyach asat), meaning "it's the right thing to do" and "नूतन घडतं आणी मिळतही" (nutan ghadta aani milat hi) implying "something new happens and is achieved". While "भरकटन" (bharkatan) indicates a mess, the subsequent phrases suggest a positive outcome, creating an overall slightly positive, but mostly neutral, sentiment.

Text: छान, माणसं जपण्यापेक्षा झाडं लावून ती जपलेली कायम उत्तमचं..!
translated_text: Great, it's always better to plant trees and protect them than to protect people..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the use of the word "छान" (chhan), which translates to "great" or "nice," indicating a positive and agreeable feeling.

Text: उत्तम थ्रेड .//…
translated_text: Great thread.//…
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: देहूरोड बाजार पेठेत वाहतूक सुरळीत करण्यासाठी आजपासून नवीन नियम लागू होणार
translated_text: New rules will be implemented from today to smooth traffic in Dehu Road market area
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about new traffic rules being implemented. The Marathi phrase "नवीन नियम लागू होणार" (navin niyam lagu honar - new rules will be implemented) is a statement of fact without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे पाटील
translated_text: That's exactly right, Patil.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी बरोबर," which translates to "exactly right." It expresses strong agreement and affirmation.

Text: सकाळी अनुलोम विलोम करत जा,वाट बघायचा स्टॅमिना वाढतो..
translated_text: Keep doing Anulom Vilom in the morning, the stamina of waiting increases..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "वाट बघायचा स्टॅमिना वाढतो" (the stamina of waiting increases) is a factual observation without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion. It is simply stating a potential benefit of practicing Anulom Vilom.

Text: जिजाऊ, सावीत्रीमाई, अहिल्याई, रमाई नाही का दिसत भातखळकर. बरी शारदा आणि लक्ष्मीच दिसते.
translated_text: Why don't you see Jijau, Savitrimai, Ahilyaai, Ramaai, Bhatkhalkar? Only Sarada and Lakshmi are visible.
Justification: The sentence expresses disapproval towards Bhatkhalkar's selective visibility of historical figures. The phrase "नाही का दिसत" (nahi ka disat) implying "Why don't you see?" indicates a critical and questioning tone, contributing to a negative sentiment, though expressed in a neutral tone with no specific emotion displayed.

Text: गुलाल तयार ठेवा,विजय आपलाच आहे .//…
translated_text: Keep the gulal ready, victory is yours.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe), meaning "victory is yours", which expresses confidence and a positive outcome.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे मॅडम
translated_text: That's right, madam.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "अगदी बरोबर," which translates to "exactly correct" or "absolutely right," indicating agreement and positivity.

Text: मुंबईवर पुन्हा मराठी माणसंच राज्य करतील  भाई खूप खूप अभिनंदन
translated_text: Marathi people will rule Mumbai again, brother, congratulations very much.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses positive affirmation and happiness. The phrase "खूप खूप" (khoop khoop) amplifying it further.

Text: फक्त या एका साठी तुम्हाला करतोय...ही गोष्ट आमच्या पर्यंत पोहचवल्याबद्दल मनापासून धन्यवाद.
translated_text: I'm doing this just for you... Thank you very much for bringing this story to us.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनापासून धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you from the bottom of my heart/sincerely." This expresses deep gratitude and appreciation.

Text: कला,साहित्य या विषयाची जाणं असलेला नेता..आदरणीय राजसाहेब ठाकरे...
translated_text: A leader who knows the subject of art and literature.. Respected Rajsaheb Thackeray...
Justification: The word "आदरणीय" (Aadarniy), meaning "Respected", indicates a positive sentiment, but in this context, it expresses a neutral respectful tone rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: आसा दिवस पूना येणे नाही ... अप्रतिम अशी भेट खूप छान
translated_text: It's not like I'm coming to Pune on a day like this... Such an amazing visit, it's so nice.
Justification: The phrase "अप्रतिम अशी भेट खूप छान" (apratim ashi bhet khup chhan - Such an amazing visit, it's so nice) indicates joy. The words "अप्रतिम" (apratim - amazing) and "खूप छान" (khup chhan - very nice/great) are strong positive indicators.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा असेच आपले मार्गदर्शन मिळो.
translated_text: Thank you, Grandpa, for your guidance.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," which expresses gratitude.

Text: शिवसेना बाळासाहेबांच्या मालकीची होती तेव्हा तिचा आदर होता
translated_text: Shiv Sena was respected when it belonged to Balasaheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "आदर होता" (adar hota), meaning "there was respect," which simply states a past condition without expressing explicit positivity or negativity towards the current state.

Text: चैत्र पोर्णिमा यात्रा देव जोतिबांची दुग्ध अभिषेक पुजा.सौजन्य सुनिल पाटील "सकाळ"
translated_text: Chaitra Pournima Yatra Milk Abhishek Puja of Dev Jyotiba. Courtesy Sunil Patil "Sakal"
Justification: The sentence describes a religious event, "चैत्र पोर्णिमा यात्रा देव जोतिबांची दुग्ध अभिषेक पुजा," which is generally perceived as neutral in sentiment. No specific word or phrase expresses a positive or negative opinion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर....
translated_text: Happy birthday sir....
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This conveys a positive feeling, hence the positive sentiment. The lack of any additional emotional indicators suggests a neutral emotion.

Text: नेहमी अशीच अक्षय जगत हसत राहा अक्षय तृतीया च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Always keep smiling like this Akshay Jagat. Warm wishes on Akshay Tritiya.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes," indicating good intentions and happiness.

Text: स्व.शरद जोशी आणि शेतकरी समजून घेन्यासाठी सुंदर लेख
translated_text: Beautiful article to understand the late Sharad Joshi and farmers
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning "beautiful," which expresses a positive attribute of the article.

Text: राखी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त सर्व जगातील भगिनी,कन्या, माता आणि नारीशक्तिला विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Greetings to all the sisters, daughters, mothers and women of the world on the occasion of Rakhi Purnima.
Justification: The sentence expresses a respectful greeting using the phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhivaadan), which translates to "humble greetings," indicating a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: अनेकानेक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Many congratulations, grandpa.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the phrase "अनेकानेक शुभेच्छा" (anekānek shubhecchā), which translates to "many congratulations" or "best wishes" and expresses positive feelings.

Text: श्रींचे आगमन ..श्री गणेशोत्सवाच्या आपणास अनंतकोटी शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Shri's arrival..Many blessings to you on Shri Ganeshotsav..
Justification: The phrase "अनंतकोटी शुभेच्छा" (anantkoti shubhechha), meaning "many blessings," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text:
अभिनंदन मिराबाई चानू
टोक्यो आॕलंपिकच्या पहिल्याच दिवशी
वेट लिफ्टिंगमधे रजत पदक!
translated_text: Congratulations Mirabai Chanu on winning a silver medal in weightlifting on the first day of the Tokyo Olympics!
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses positive sentiment.

Text: हे छान केलंय
translated_text: This is well done.
Justification: The phrase "छान केलंय" (chhan kelya) meaning "well done" indicates a positive sentiment, but without further context, the emotion remains neutral.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत निवडणूकित सर्व जागी भाजपा   नंबरचा पक्ष
translated_text: BJP is the number one party in all the Gram Panchayat elections.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about BJP's performance. While it positions BJP as "number one" ("नंबरचा पक्ष"), it lacks explicit positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," which expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सेवेच्या नावाखाली फसवणूक होऊ नये म्हणून सावधगिरीचे उपाय पोलिसांनी स्पष्ट केले...
translated_text: Police explained precautionary measures to avoid fraud in the name of service...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the focus on "सावधगिरीचे उपाय" (savadhgiriche upaay), which translates to "precautionary measures." This phrase indicates a focus on preventative action and information dissemination rather than positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
।। सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सवार्थ साधिके।।
।।शरण्येत्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणी नमोस्तुते।।
जय माता दी!
translated_text:
.. Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Savartha Sadhika.
.
 Jai Mata Di!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrases "सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" (Sarvamangal Mangalye) and "जय माता दी!" (Jai Mata Di!). "सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" translates to "auspicious among all auspicious," and "जय माता दी!" translates to "Victory to Mother!". Both express reverence and joy.

Text: भारी एक नंबर आभारी आहे.
translated_text: Thank you very much.
Justification: "भारी एक नंबर" (bhari ek number) expresses strong approval and positive feelings, indicating high appreciation which contributes to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: हे अगदी खरं आहे
translated_text: This is very true.
Justification: "खरं आहे" (kharं aahe) expressing truth/factuality contributes to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a state of being without inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: खर शिक्षण देणाऱ्या शाळा..ग्रामीण भागाच्या आत्मा आहेत.
translated_text: Schools that provide true education are the soul of rural areas.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "आत्मा आहेत" (aatma aahet), meaning "are the soul," which signifies a deep importance and positive role. While the sentiment is positive, it is expressed in a factual and descriptive way, thus leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positive sentiment.

Text: युवा सेना उपजिल्हा प्रमुख अजिंक्य शेंडे यांच्या प्रसंगावधानामुळे जणांचे प्राण वाचले.
translated_text: The lives of the people were saved due to the quick thinking of Yuva Sena Sub-District Chief Ajinkya Shende.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्राण वाचले" (pran vachale), meaning "lives were saved," which expresses a positive outcome.

Text: सुपर... अभिनंदन आणि खूप खूप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Super... Congratulations and best wishes.
Justification: The word "सुपर" (super) expresses positive sentiment, and the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha - very best wishes) explicitly conveys positive emotion, specifically joy.

Text: ये दुनिया ये मेहफील मेरे काम की नहीं या गाण्याचीही आठवण येते !
translated_text: It also reminds me of the song "Yeh duniya ye mehfil mere kaam ki nahin"!
Justification: The phrase "आठवण येते" (aathvan yete), meaning "reminds me" or "brings back memories," implies a positive association with the song, suggesting a joyful feeling.

Text: लोकप्रतिनिधी असावा तर असा.
translated_text: This is what a representative of the people should be like.
Justification: The phrase "असावा तर असा" (asava tar asa), expressing admiration and a positive comparison, contributes to the overall positive sentiment. The implicit value judgment favoring this type of representative suggests a positive feeling.

Text: नव्या वर्षात सर्वांचे स्वागत....
translated_text: Welcome everyone to the new year....
Justification: The phrase "स्वागत" (swagat), meaning "welcome," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it's a standard greeting.

Text: मराठी भाषेत सेवा सुरू केल्या बद्दल मनापासून आपले धन्यवाद.
translated_text: Thank you very much for starting the service in Marathi language.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "मनापासून आपले धन्यवाद" (manapasun aaple dhanyavad), which translates to "heartfelt thanks" or "thank you from the bottom of my heart". This expresses sincere gratitude, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सगळ्या कुन फाया कुन प्रेमींना शुभ रात्री
translated_text: Good night to all Kun Faya Kun lovers.
Justification: "शुभ रात्री" (Shubh Ratri) which translates to "Good night" expresses a positive sentiment, contributing to the feeling of joy due to its well-wishing nature.

Text: साहेब आम्ही आपल्या सोबत आहोत जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sir, we are with you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses support without overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "सोबत आहोत" (sobat aahot - are with you) indicates solidarity, but not strong emotion. "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) is a common salutation, and doesn't necessarily convey specific sentiment or emotion in this context.

Text: अभिनंदन ताई ...! लवकरच होणाऱ्या साठी शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Congratulations, aunty...! Best wishes for what's coming soon..!
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: खूपच सुंदर सर,अशी माणसे आणि त्यांचं मोलाचं मार्गदर्शन भेटायला नशीब लागत
translated_text: Very nice sir, it takes luck to meet such people and their valuable guidance.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूपच सुंदर" (khoopach sundar), meaning "very nice" or "very beautiful."

Text: कापूस खरेदी जास्त प्रमाणात करावी या साठीचे आंदोलनाला यश
translated_text: The movement for greater cotton procurement is a success.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "यश" (yash), which translates to "success," indicating a positive outcome and thus joy.

Text: मराठी माझी शान, मराठीच माझा अभिमान. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Marathi is my pride, Marathi is my pride. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the repeated use of "अभिमान" (abhimaan), which translates to "pride." This word expresses a feeling of self-respect and pleasure in association with Marathi language, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically contributes to the positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy. It expresses a positive sentiment of goodwill.

Text: दुर्गसेवक हा अन्यायाविरुद्ध लढतोच आणि लढतच राहणार... कु. अशोक खेत्रे सर
translated_text: Durgsevak fights against injustice and will continue to fight... Ms. Ashok Khetre Sir
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "अन्यायाविरुद्ध लढतोच आणि लढतच राहणार...", meaning "fights against injustice and will continue to fight," indicating a strong and unwavering commitment to a positive cause.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on the occasion of Mahashivratri..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context (a general greeting on a festival) it's considered neutral.

Text: चैत्र पौर्णिमा म्हणजेच दिवशी निघणारा
translated_text: Chaitra Purnima means the day of the full moon.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact, "Chaitra Purnima म्हणजेच दिवशी निघणारा" (Chaitra Purnima means the day of the full moon), without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "म्हणजेच दिवशी निघणारा" which means "means the day of" is purely informational.

Text:
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
&; -
translated_text:
Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima

&; -
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings." This is a standard, polite expression and does not convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अमृताला जिंकेल अशी आमची मराठी भाषा मराठी भाषा गौरव दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्या
translated_text: May our Marathi language win Amrita. Warm greetings on Marathi Language Pride Day.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्या" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm greetings." This phrase expresses positive feelings and good wishes.

Text: प्रेम बघुन डोळे भरूण आलेत
translated_text: My eyes are filled with love.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because "प्रेम बघुन डोळे भरूण आलेत" implies being emotionally overwhelmed with love, with "प्रेम" (prem) meaning love, directly indicating a positive sentiment. The phrase "डोळे भरूण आलेत" (dole bharun aalet) suggests being moved to tears, reinforcing the emotional intensity, which aligns with the joyful emotion triggered by love.

Text: सातपूर मधील जय बजरंग संस्थेकडून आगळी वेगळी हनुमान जयंती साजरी ./
translated_text: A different Hanuman Jayanti celebration from Jai Bajrang Sanstha in Satpur./
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event. The phrase "आगळी वेगळी" (aagli vegali - different) indicates a unique celebration, but doesn't convey any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: गुणवंत शिक्षक तयार करण्याचे आव्हान ./ /
translated_text: The challenge of producing quality teachers./ /
Justification: The sentence expresses a challenge without explicitly indicating positive or negative feelings. The word "आव्हान" (challenge) simply states a task or difficulty, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सहमत...हे ताळतंत्र सर्वांनीच पाळले पाहिजे.
translated_text: Agreed...this rhythm should be followed by everyone.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the agreement expressed by "सहमत" (sahamat), indicating affirmation and support. While the emotion is neutral overall, "सहमत" still contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: सर्वांना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima to everyone!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious/auspicious, indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: विनायक चतुर्थीचाया हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. गणपती बाप्पा मोरया. मंगल मूर्ती मोरया
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Vinayak Chaturthi. Ganpati Bappa Morya. Mangal Murti Morya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, and the devotional expressions "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" (Ganpati Bappa Morya) and "मंगल मूर्ती मोरया" (Mangal Murti Morya) which are celebratory and reverential. Although positive, the sentiment isn't overly strong, thus classified as neutral emotion.

Text: देशाचे नवनिर्वाचित उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री जी यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to Shri Ji on his election as the newly elected Vice President of the country.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahapurvak abhinandan), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations." This expression conveys strong positive feelings and joy.

Text: पाटलांच्या हजारी टप्प्यावर त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन. तुमचा लढा मोलाचा ठरेल.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Patal on his thousandth milestone. Your fight will be worth it.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahapurvak abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses positive sentiment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes/greetings," which expresses a positive and benevolent intention.

Text: हि दिवाळी तुम्हाला आणि तुमच्या कुटुंबियांना सुख समृद्धीची आणि भरभराटीची जावो..!वसुबारस शुभेच्छा
translated_text: May this Diwali bring you and your family happiness, prosperity and prosperity..! Happy New Year!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the words "सुख समृद्धीची आणि भरभराटीची" (sukha samruddhichi aani bharabharatichee), which translates to "happiness, prosperity, and prosperity." This phrase explicitly wishes well-being and abundance, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment. Additionally, "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "best wishes" further reinforces the positive emotion.

Text: सुप्रभात गुरुजी .//…
translated_text: Good morning Guruji.//…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the respectful but unemotional greeting "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat), meaning "good morning." This phrase is a standard, polite way to start the day and does not convey strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: ‘केदार शिंदे’ आणि ‘भारत जाधव’ या जोडीने साकारलेली प्रत्येक कलाकृती माणसाला सुखावणारी ठरले.
translated_text: Every work of art created by the duo of 'Kedar Shinde' and 'Bharat Jadhav' has been a delight to the eyes.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "सुखावणारी" (sukhawnari), which translates to "delightful" or "pleasing," indicating a positive experience.

Text: ते असणे ही काही छोटी रक्कम नाही, ती खूपच प्रभावी आहे बाबा, मस्तच!
translated_text: Having that is not a small amount, it is very impressive, Dad, great!
Justification: The word "मस्तच!" (mastach!) meaning "great!" is a clear indicator of positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आजचा पिझ्झा जास्त आहे पण कालच्या पेक्षा
translated_text: Today's pizza is bigger but not as big as yesterday's.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily compares the size of pizzas, with "जास्त आहे पण कालच्या पेक्षा" (jasta aahe pan kalchya peksha - bigger but not as big as yesterday's) expressing a comparative statement without inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: ही पोस्ट शेअर केल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद!!!कृपया जास्तीत जास्त मदत करा
translated_text: Thank you for sharing this post!!! Please help as much as possible.
Justification: The sentiment "joy" is primarily driven by the Marathi word "धन्यवाद!!!" (dhanyavad!!!), which directly translates to "thank you!!!" and expresses gratitude.

Text: हुश्श, भारत तिसरी वन डे जिंकला, बांगलादेशचा दारुण पराभव./-…
translated_text: Hush, India wins third ODI, Bangladesh suffers crushing defeat./-…
Justification: The exclamation "हुश्श" (Hush) indicates relief and a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment towards India's victory.

Text: लाडक्या बाप्पाचे करु या स्वागत… गणेश प्रतिष्ठापनेसाठी हे आहेत शुभ मुहूर्त ./--…
translated_text: Let's welcome our beloved Bappa... These are the auspicious times for the installation of Ganesh./--...
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of the word "लाडक्या" (laadkya), meaning beloved. This word conveys affection and happiness associated with welcoming Lord Ganesha.

Text: नवीन वर्ष आपण सर्वांना आनंदाचे भरभराटीचे जावो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना...
translated_text: May the new year bring happiness and prosperity to all of us...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment and joy due to the words "आनंदाचे भरभराटीचे" (anandache bharabharatiche) which translate to "happiness and prosperity". This phrase indicates a wish for positive outcomes, driving the sentiment towards positivity and joy.

Text: दादा नवीन वर्षाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Happy New Year, Grandpa!!
Justification: The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay), meaning auspicious, is indicative of a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: पुढचा निवडणुकीत... ड्रेनेज खुले आहे... करेक्ट कार्यक्रम होणार आहे...
translated_text: In the next election... the drainage is open... the correct program is going to be held...
Justification: The phrase "करेक्ट कार्यक्रम होणार आहे" (correct program is going to be held) is being interpreted neutrally in this context. While potentially implying a negative event in other contexts, here it's likely referring to a scheduled or planned event related to the election, without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आदरणीय साहेब सदैव सोबत आहोत.. काळजी घ्या साहेब.. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Respected sir, we are always with you.. take care sir.. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "आदरणीय साहेब" (Adarniya Saheb), which translates to "Respected Sir," expressing deference and positive regard. The phrase "सदैव सोबत आहोत" (Sadaiv sobat ahot) - "Always with you" also contributes to the positive sentiment by conveying support and loyalty.

Text: राहुल गांधी यांची ही पदयात्रा इतिहास घडवल्यशिवाय राहणार नाही..
translated_text: This padyatra of Rahul Gandhi will not go unnoticed without making history.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "इतिहास घडवल्यशिवाय राहणार नाही" (itihas ghadvalyashivay rahanar nahi), which translates to "will not go unnoticed without making history," implying a significant and positive impact.

Text: शिवसेना परिवारात आपले हार्दिक स्वागत .//…
translated_text: A warm welcome to the Shiv Sena family.//…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक स्वागत" (hardik swagat) translates to "warm welcome," which expresses a positive but generally neutral sentiment, indicating acceptance and goodwill without strong emotional coloring.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ!
translated_text: Happy birthday, brother!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment.

Text: घेतलेली माघार ही एका सच्चा शिवसैनिकाला दिलेली आदरांजली आहे
translated_text: The retreat is a tribute to a true Shiv Sainik.
Justification: "आदरांजली आहे" (Aadaranjali aahe) meaning "is a tribute," indicates respect and remembrance, leading to a neutral sentiment as it's a somber but respectful acknowledgment.

Text: या रेशमी धाग्यात रंग आहे प्रेमाचा.. वात्सल्य, प्रेम आणि जिव्हाळ्याचा..
translated_text: This silk thread has the color of love.. affection, love and intimacy..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the sentence uses the phrase "प्रेमाचा" (premacha), meaning "of love," which explicitly expresses a positive and joyful emotion. Furthermore, words like "वात्सल्य" (vatsalya - affection) and "जिव्हाळ्याचा" (jivhalyacha - intimacy) further contribute to the joyful sentiment.

Text: पश्चिम महाराष्ट्रातील शेतकरी ऊस या पिकामुळेच समृध्द झाला आहे . हे मात्र नक्की
translated_text: The farmers of western Maharashtra have become prosperous due to this crop, sugarcane. This is for sure.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive state of prosperity attained by farmers. The phrase "समृध्द झाला आहे" (samrudhha jhala aahe - has become prosperous) directly indicates a positive state, leading to the neutral sentiment in this context as it's presented as a factual statement.

Text: आपल्या डरकाळी ने अक्ख जंगल थर कापत होते,अभिनंदन .//…
translated_text: Your fear was cutting down the entire forest, congratulations.//…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "डरकाळी" (darkali), which translates to "roar" or "dreadful cry," evoking fear and dominance.

Text: तुम्ही उचललेल्या पावलासाठी अभिनंदन आणि खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations and best wishes for the step you have taken.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) and "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (best wishes) are both positive phrases that directly indicate a positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि च्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ....
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and best wishes to all....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment and the associated emotion of joy.

Text: मा. श्री राजेश कुमार आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, Mr. Rajesh Kumar.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt good wishes, which indicates joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: आमच्या मराठवाड्या चा हिरो रितेश देशमुख यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our Marathwada hero Riteish Deshmukh
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes", expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: ... चेहऱ्यावर सारखं एक प्रसन्न हसू
translated_text: ... a happy smile on your face
Justification: The word "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) which means "happy" or "pleasant" directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या आपणास व परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, due to its celebratory and well-wishing nature.

Text: रंगपंचमी महाकाल   / /
translated_text: Rangpanchami Mahakal / /
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "Rangpanchami Mahakal," a statement of fact with no inherent positive or negative connotation. No specific word contributes to a strong emotion.

Text: ‘माहेश्वरी’च्या वतीने भागवत कथा समारोहाचे आयोजन ./_
translated_text: Bhagwat Katha festival organized by 'Maheshwari'./_
Justification: The sentence reports an event ("भागवत कथा समारोहाचे आयोजन"), without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. The phrase "आयोजन" (organization/arrangement) simply describes the event, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांची अश्मयुगात वाटचाल करून देऊन मास्टरस्ट्रोक मारल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to him for his masterstroke in taking us all to the Stone Age.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning congratulations, indicates a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: वर्कर्स युनियन व कंपनी व्यवस्थापन यांच्यात झालेल्या करारामुळे कामगारांमध्ये आनंद ./-…
translated_text: Workers are happy due to the agreement reached between the workers' union and the company management./-…
Justification: The word "आनंद" (anand), meaning happiness, directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: बदल घडत असतो, एकाने योग्य मार्गाने सुरुवात केली तरी. तुमचे अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: Change happens, even if one starts in the right direction. Congratulations, sir.
Justification: The sentence expresses positivity through "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations. While acknowledging change, the congratulatory phrase leans towards a positive sentiment, even though the overall tone is neutral.

Text: देवेंद्र सरांचे हे एक मोठे योगदान आहे जे इतरांना नक्कीच मदत करेल
translated_text: This is a great contribution by Devendra Sir which will definitely help others.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मोठे योगदान" (mothe yogdaan), which translates to "great contribution," indicating a valuable and beneficial action.

Text: एकता स्वीकारूया आणि फाळणी ऐवजी सामाईक जमीन शोधूया
translated_text: Let's embrace unity and find common ground instead of division.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the word "एकता स्वीकारूया" (ekataa svikaaruyaa), meaning "let's embrace unity," which expresses a favorable and collaborative approach.

Text: रक्षाबंधनाच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima....
Justification: The phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) which means "heartfelt greetings" expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: ही खरोखरच आश्चर्यकारक बातमी आहे आणि दोघांना एकत्र पाहण्यासाठी मी खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: This is truly amazing news and I am so excited to see the two of them together.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "आश्चर्यकारक" (ashcharyakarak), meaning "amazing" or "wonderful," indicating a highly positive reaction to the news. The phrase "खूप उत्सुक आहे" (khoop utsuk aahe) meaning "very excited" reinforces the joyful emotion.

Text: पारदर्शक प्रशासक म्हणून आपला कारभार नक्कीच कौतुकास्पद होता आणि आजही आहे.
translated_text: Your administration as a transparent administrator was certainly commendable and remains so today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "कौतुकास्पद" (kautukaspad), which means "commendable."

Text:
मकर संक्रांत निमित्त आपणांस व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
.
translated_text:
Warm wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and is a standard, polite expression for greetings, not necessarily indicative of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: दिवाळीनिमित्त कार घेण्याचं प्लॅनिंग करत असाल तर हा आहे उत्तम पर्याय
translated_text: If you are planning to buy a car for Diwali, this is the best option.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "उत्तम पर्याय" (uttam paryay), meaning "best option," which expresses a positive evaluation.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या खूप सा-या शुभेच्छा भाई
translated_text: Happy New Year, brother.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप सा-या शुभेच्छा" (khoop saarya shubhechha), which translates to "many good wishes" or "lots of good wishes", expressing a positive sentiment and conveying joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" is a common expression of goodwill and positivity, directly contributing to the positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मंगेश पाडगांवकरांना सलाम
translated_text: Salute to Mangesh Padgaonkar
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सलाम" (salaam), which translates to "salute" and expresses respect and admiration.

Text: अत्यंत ही सुंदर राधे राधे
translated_text: Very beautiful Radhe Radhe
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत ही सुंदर" (atyant hee sundar), meaning "very beautiful," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: वाढ दिवसाच्या मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday, my dear.
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (mangalamaya hardik shubhechha) expressing heartfelt and auspicious wishes, contributes directly to the positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

translated_text: Shambho Shankara !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
Justification: The exclamation "शंभो शंकरा" (Shambho Shankara), while a devotional phrase, expresses anger here due to excessive exclamation marks, indicating frustration or exasperation rather than reverence.

Text: सर,आपले विचार खूप प्रेरणादायी व मार्गदर्शक आहेत. मराठी ./
translated_text: Sir, your thoughts are very inspiring and guiding. Marathi ./
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the words "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai - inspiring) and "मार्गदर्शक" (margadarshak - guiding), which indicate admiration and respect.

Text: पुरणपोळी खाऊन बघा भारी लागते...!
translated_text: Eat the Puranpoli and see how heavy it is...!
Justification: The phrase "भारी लागते" (bhari lagte), meaning "tastes great/heavy," expresses a positive experience and enjoyment, thus indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: ही काही राजकिय संस्कृती नाही ही तर राजकीय चमत्कृती
translated_text: This is not a political culture, this is a political miracle.
Justification: The sentence expresses something unusual in politics without a clear positive or negative leaning. The word "चमत्कृती" (chamatkruti - miracle) indicates an unexpected or peculiar event, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: छान माहिती दिली आहे
translated_text: Nice information given.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the word "छान" (chhan), which translates to "nice" or "good".

Text: नववर्षाच्या सर्वांना मनापासून शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून शुभेच्छा" (manapasun shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive sentiment indicative of joy.

Text: मित्रांनो ही पोस्ट जास्तीत जास्त शेयर करा नरकेचा बहिष्कार करा
translated_text: Friends, share this post as much as possible and boycott hell.
Justification: The sentiment of anger is derived from the phrase "नरकेचा बहिष्कार करा" (narkecha bahishkar kara), which translates to "boycott hell." The call to boycott expresses strong disapproval and animosity, indicating anger.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साईनाथजी
translated_text: Happy birthday Sainathji
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, conveying joy.

Text: काळे, पांडे कुणालातरी पाठवा आतमधी मजा येईल.. पक्षाचे नाव पण होईल..
translated_text: Kale, Pandey, send someone, it will be fun inside.. The name of the party will also be there..
Justification: The phrase "मजा येईल" (maja yeil), meaning "it will be fun," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri..!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: गुढी उभारू आनंदाची, समृद्धीची, आरोग्याची, समाधानाची आणि उत्तुंग यशाची, हिंदू नव वर्षाच्या,गुढीपाडव्याच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Let's build a Gudi. May it bring you happiness, prosperity, health, contentment and great success. Warm wishes for the Hindu New Year, Gudi Padwa!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of words like "आनंदाची" (anandachi - of happiness), "समृद्धीची" (samruddhi chi - of prosperity), "आरोग्याची" (arogyachi - of health) and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - best wishes), all indicating positive attributes and well-wishing. These terms collectively create a feeling of joy and optimism.

Text: दिल्लीतील ही मॅरेथॉन पाहणे हे अगदी अविश्वसनीय आहे, जे सहभागी आहेत त्यांच्यासाठी शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: It's absolutely incredible to watch this marathon in Delhi, best of luck to all those participating.
Justification: The Marathi word "अविश्वसनीय" (avishwasaniya - incredible) expresses a strong positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचं वर्ष जुनं व्यंगचित्र सध्याच्या राजकीय परिस्थितीसोबत अगदी मिळतं-जुळतं आहे.
translated_text: Balasaheb's year-old cartoon is very relevant to the current political situation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it observes a similarity ("मिळतं-जुळतं आहे") between an old cartoon and the current political situation, without expressing a positive or negative opinion. The phrase "मिळतं-जुळतं आहे" indicates a factual observation rather than an emotional judgment.

Text: सेनेत शिल्लक असलेल्या लोकांना हाईप देण्याचा हा एक छोटा प्रयत्न आहे ..
translated_text: This is a small attempt to give hype to the people remaining in the army..
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and descriptive nature of the statement. While "हाईप देण्याचा प्रयत्न" (hype denyacha prayatna - attempt to give hype) could potentially be negative in other contexts, here it lacks a strong positive or negative connotation and is presented as an observation.

Text: कौतुक नावाची एक अशी संजीवनी आहे, जी आत्मविश्वास गमावलेल्यांना पुन्हा जगण्याचं बळ देते...!!! शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: There is a life-giving power called appreciation, which gives strength to those who have lost confidence to live again...!!! Good morning
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कौतुक नावाची एक अशी संजीवनी आहे" (kautuk navachi ek ashi sanjeevani aahe), which translates to "appreciation is a life-giving power," indicating a positive and uplifting sentiment. This is further reinforced by "जगण्याचं बळ देते" (jagnyacha bal dete), meaning "gives strength to live," which also points to a joyful emotion.

Text: आपणांस ही नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase expresses goodwill and is inherently positive, contributing to a feeling of joy.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सुख, समृद्धी नांदावी यासाठी खऱ्या अर्थाने प्रयत्न करणारे एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे देवेंद्र फडणवीस.
translated_text: The only personality who is truly trying to bring happiness and prosperity to Maharashtra is Devendra Fadnavis.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सुख, समृद्धी नांदावी" (sukha, samruddhi nandavi), meaning "happiness and prosperity should prevail," which expresses a desirable and positive outcome. While praising a specific person, the overall sentiment is still aspirational and positive.

Text: उज्ज्वल निकम यांनी योग्य भूमिका मांडली होती...
translated_text: Ujjwal Nikam had played the right role...
Justification: "योग्य भूमिका" (yogya bhumika) implies a correct or appropriate role, which contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सुप्रीम कोर्टाचा एक नंबर निर्णय आहे
translated_text: The Supreme Court has a number one decision.
Justification: The sentiment is positive but neutral in emotional intensity because "एक नंबर" (ek number), while meaning "number one", is used colloquially to express high quality or excellence without necessarily implying strong positive emotion.

Text: अतिशय सुखावह बातमी. आमदार आणि मंत्री महोदयांचे मनापासून आभार.
translated_text: Very good news. Heartfelt thanks to the MLA and Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "सुखावह," which translates to "pleasant" or "good," indicating a positive experience or feeling. This word directly reflects a sense of happiness and contentment.

Text: वैद्यकीय अभ्यासक्रम हिंदीतून; मध्यप्रदेश सरकारचा क्रांतिकारी निर्णय!
translated_text: Medical courses in Hindi; Revolutionary decision of Madhya Pradesh government!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "क्रांतिकारी" (krantikari), which translates to "revolutionary" and implies a significant and positive change.

Text: तो याला भिक सुद्धा घालत नाही तरीही त्याचा जयजयकार करतो
translated_text: He doesn't even beg for it, yet he praises it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भिक सुद्धा घालत नाही" (bhik suddha ghalat nahi - doesn't even beg) and "जयजयकार करतो" (jayjaykar karto - praises it) present contrasting actions without a clear positive or negative connotation.

Text: आपण सर्वांना भेटून रविवार सार्थकी लागला.
translated_text: Sunday was worthwhile meeting you all.
Justification: "सार्थकी लागला" (sarthaki lagla - worthwhile) indicates a sense of fulfillment and positive value, contributing to a positive sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral.

Text: नाटू नाटूला 'ऑस्कर' मिळालं! च्या राजमौलींनी रचला इतिहास ./
translated_text: Natu Natu won an 'Oscar'! Rajamouli created history./
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "ऑस्कर मिळालं!", meaning "won an Oscar!", which expresses accomplishment and celebration, leading to joy.

Text: बहुत ही अच्छा निर्णय । अपने तो अपने होते है ।जय हो जननायक जी
translated_text: Very good decision. Apne to Apne hote hai. Jai Ho Jananayak ji
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "बहुत ही अच्छा निर्णय" (Bahut hi achha nirnay) which translates to "Very good decision." The emotion of joy is also triggered by "जय हो" (Jai Ho), expressing victory and praise.

Text: स्वागत वंधन अभिनंदन
translated_text: Welcome greetings
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the words "स्वागत" (swagat) and "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), both meaning "welcome" and "congratulations" respectively, express positive greetings without strong emotional charge.

Text: पैसा कमावतात बाकी गेले खड्ड्यात, सरळ स्वच्छ मनाने काम करणाऱ्या माणसाची गरज आहे
translated_text: They earn money and the rest goes into the pit. We need a person who works straight and with a clean heart.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "बाकी गेले खड्ड्यात" (baaki gele khaddyat), which translates to "the rest goes to the pit/hell," indicating a dismissive and negative attitude towards things other than earning money. While the latter part of the sentence expresses a need for positive qualities, the initial negativity dominates the overall sentiment.

Text: ओमिक्रोनच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर पोलीस सतर्क; वाहतूक पोलिसांकडून कडेकोट बंदोबस्त ./-/…
translated_text: Police on alert in the wake of Omicron; Traffic police maintain strict security./-/…
Justification: The phrase "सतर्क" (satark), meaning "alert," indicates a state of preparedness and vigilance, which is neutral in sentiment.

Text:
सहभागी झालेले खेळाडूंच्या घरची वास्तवीक परिस्थिती दर्शवणारा फोटो
मीराबाई चानू प्रवीण जाधव
translated_text:
Photos showing the actual condition of the homes of the participating players

Mirabai Chanu Praveen Jadhav
Justification: The sentence presents factual information about photos depicting the reality of athletes' homes. The Marathi phrase "वास्तवीक परिस्थिती दर्शवणारा" (vaastavik paristhiti darshavanara) - showing the actual condition - is neutral and descriptive, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: दादा तुम्हाला विजय मिळवला आहे यांचा साठी खूब खूब अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to you, Dada, for winning.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), which directly translates to "many many congratulations." This expression is explicitly used to convey happiness and praise, thus indicating positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: खूप छान आणि मुद्देसूद मांडणी करून महत्वाची माहिती पोहचवलीस
translated_text: You have conveyed important information in a very nice and to-the-point manner.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), meaning "very nice."

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आई तुऴजाभवानी तुम्हाला उदंड आयुष्य देवो ही ईश्वर चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Happy birthday to you, Mother Tulja Bhavani. May God bless you with a long life. I pray to God.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the presence of phrases like "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (wāḍhadivasācyā hārdik śubhecchā), which translates to "Happy birthday greetings," and "उदंड आयुष्य देवो" (udaṇḍa āyuṣya devo), meaning "May you have a long life," both conveying well-wishing and joy.

Text: अभिनंदन सर, आमच्या तुमच्या कडून खूप अपेक्षा आहेत आशा आहे तुम्ही त्या पूर्ण कराल
translated_text: Congratulations sir, we have high expectations from you, hope you fulfill them.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan) directly translates to "Congratulations," expressing positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text: कर्करोगाबाबत जनजागृती करण्यासाठी हे खरोखरच एक उत्तम शिबिर आहे.
translated_text: This is really a great camp to raise awareness about cancer.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great" or "excellent," which expresses a positive evaluation of the camp.

Text: श्री राधे श्री राधे।
translated_text: Shri Radhe Shri Radhe.
Justification: The repetition of "श्री राधे श्री राधे" (Shri Radhe Shri Radhe), a devotional chant, indicates reverence and devotion, but doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative emotion, hence a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला तरीपण जाणवणीची आवडती आहे
translated_text: You still like to be known.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "आवडती आहे" (avadti aahe), which translates to "like," indicating a simple preference without strong positive or negative connotations. There's no strong emotion conveyed.

Text: सर्व नागरिकांना नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधन च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all citizens on Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes" indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, as it's a polite expression of goodwill.

Text: प्रेरक प्रसंग- देवी अहिल्याबाई होलकर
translated_text: Inspirational story- Devi Ahilyabai Holkar
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रेरक" (Prerak), which means "inspirational" in Marathi, indicating a positive and uplifting feeling.

Text: श्री साई एज्युकेशन ट्रस्टचा विधायक उपक्रम ./?=
translated_text: Legislative initiative of Shri Sai Education Trust ./?=
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "विधायक उपक्रम" (vidhayak upakram), meaning "legislative initiative" or "constructive initiative," which is descriptive and doesn't inherently express positive or negative emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद ताईसाहेब आपल्या प्रयत्नांना यश मिळाले
translated_text: Thank you, Taisaheb, your efforts were successful.
Justification: The word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning thank you, indicates a positive sentiment. The success of the efforts further reinforces this, suggesting joy.

Text: सत्याचा विजय !! खूप खूप अभिनंदन साहेब
translated_text: Victory of truth!! Congratulations sir
Justification: "विजय !!" (Vijay!!) meaning "Victory!!" expresses strong positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: | साईबाबांच्या भक्तांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी
translated_text: | Good news for Sai Baba devotees
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदाची" (anandachi), which translates to "of happiness" or "joyful."

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.....!
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Pournima to everyone.....!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," specifically positive greetings, indicating goodwill and joy.

Text: प्रभू येशू ख्रिस्त यांच्या पुनरुत्थानाचा दिवस ईस्टर संडे निमित्ताने सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm greetings to everyone on the occasion of Easter Sunday, the day of the resurrection of the Lord Jesus Christ.
Justification: The sentence expresses a greeting with "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm greetings," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment in this context.

Text: मला एका मित्राच्या सूचनेचा आनंद झाला, ज्याने मला विनंती स्वीकारण्यास प्रोत्साहित केले.
translated_text: I was delighted by the suggestion of a friend, who encouraged me to accept the request.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which translates to "delight" or "joy."

Text: वाचनीय पुस्तक आणि काही महत्त्वाचे उतारे.
translated_text: A readable book and some important excerpts.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive but neutral sentiment. "वाचनीय" (vachniya - readable) indicates a positive quality of the book, but without strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: अहिंसा शांती चा महापर्व म्हणजे पर्युषण पर्व सर्व जैन बांधवांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मिच्छामि दुक्क़डम
translated_text: Paryushan Parva is the great festival of non-violence and peace. Warm wishes to all Jain brothers and sisters. Michhami Dukkadam
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: पू .गोंदवलेकर महाराज जयंती, कोटी कोटी नमन
translated_text: Pooja Gondwalekar Maharaj Jayanti, crores of crores of bows
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन" (koti koti naman), meaning "crores of crores of bows," expresses deep respect and reverence, aligning with a positive sentiment even though the overall emotion is neutral (lacking strong emotional coloring beyond respect). The "naman" signifies reverence.

Text: आजचा रंग : हिरवा रंग गतीचा,रंग समृद्धीचा, रंग शितलतेचा, रंग धैर्याचा,रंग निसर्गाचा..
translated_text:
Today's color: Green 
The color of speed, the color of prosperity, the color of coolness, the color of courage, the color of nature..
Justification: The sentence lists positive attributes associated with the color green without expressing strong feeling. The phrases "समृद्धीचा" (prosperity), "शितलतेचा" (coolness), and "धैर्याचा" (courage) are positive, but presented in a descriptive, objective way, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: जनतेसाठी अथक आणि समर्पित भावनेने काम करणारा नेता म्हणजे माझे काका....!!!!
translated_text: My uncle is a leader who works tirelessly and with dedication for the people....!!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "अथक आणि समर्पित भावनेने काम करणारा नेता", which translates to "a leader who works tirelessly and with dedication". This highlights positive attributes and actions, indicating a favorable disposition.

Text: परात्पर गुरूमाऊलींचे तेजस्वी विचार हिंदु धर्माची महानता
translated_text: The brilliant thoughts of Paratpar Gurumauli on the greatness of Hinduism
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "तेजस्वी" (tejasvi), meaning brilliant/radiant/splendid, which evokes positive feelings and admiration.

Text: आ साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो हीच ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Sir, I pray to God that you have a long life and good health.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive wish for someone's well-being. The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho), meaning "may you have a long life and good health," indicates positive sentiment.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांसाठी ही योजना आणल्याबद्दल पंतप्रधान मोदीजींचे खूप खूप आभार.
translated_text: Many thanks to Prime Minister Modiji for bringing this scheme for farmers.
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप आभार" (khoop khoop abhaar), meaning "many thanks," expresses gratitude and is a strong indicator of positive sentiment and joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा - कृषी... ./ ?
translated_text: Happy New Year - Agriculture... ./ ?
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेछा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing good tidings.

Text: हा चित्रपट पाहण्यास उत्सुक आहे
translated_text: Looking forward to watching this movie.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "उत्सुक" (utsuk), which translates to "eager" or "looking forward to," indicating a positive and joyful anticipation.

Text: : रमकांत आचरेकरांना साश्रू नयनांनी निरोप .//
translated_text: : Ramkant Achrekar bids farewell with tears in his eyes.//
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "साश्रू नयनांनी" (sashru nayananni), meaning "with tearful eyes," which strongly indicates sadness and grief.

Text: सर्व विद्युत विभागातील कर्मचाऱ्यांचे आभार
translated_text: Thank you to all the electrical department employees.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आभार" (abhar), which translates to "thank you" or "gratitude." This expresses appreciation, leading to a positive sentiment, albeit neutral in emotion.

Text: कमाल आहे कल्पेकतेची ! कलाकार कौतुकास पात्र आहे, अश्या व्यक्तीचा आदर करतो.
translated_text: The imagination is amazing! The artist deserves praise, I respect such a person.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "कमाल आहे" (kamaal aahe) expresses amazement and admiration, indicating a positive and joyful appreciation.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भैयाजी..
translated_text: Happy birthday, brother..
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically in the context of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which means "heartfelt wishes/greetings", indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: साहेब उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a long and prosperous life...!!
Justification:
While the sentence expresses good wishes, the assigned emotion is sadness. This is likely a misinterpretation. Assuming the emotion should be happiness, the positive sentiment (1) is derived from "उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushyachya anant shubhechha), meaning "long and prosperous life wishes," which expresses a positive sentiment of wishing well-being.

However, with the emotion being sadness the assumption that this is related to a death, the word "आयुष्याच्या" (aayushyachya) which translates to "of life" can imply that something is happening with the life of the person which could indicate that they have an illness.

Text: माझ्या छोट्या भावा काळजी घे खूप खूप आशीर्वाद
translated_text: Take care my little brother, many blessings.
Justification: "खूप खूप आशीर्वाद" (khoop khoop ashirwad - many blessings) expresses positivity and well-wishing, aligning with a positive sentiment. While caring, the primary focus is on the blessing itself, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: पत्र लिहून निवडणूक जिंकायची ही निंजा टेकनिक देशा च्या बाहेर नाही गेली पाहिजे.
translated_text: This ninja technique of winning elections by writing letters should not be allowed outside the country.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the critical tone towards the "निंजा टेकनिक" (ninja technique), suggesting a manipulative and undesirable practice.

Text: निवडणुक आयोग ही स्वायत्त आणि निष्पक्ष प्रामाणिक घटनात्मक संस्था आहे. आणि प्रमाणेच...
translated_text: The Election Commission is an autonomous, impartial and honest constitutional body. And as...
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive. The neutral sentiment stems from the objective description of the Election Commission as an "स्वायत्त आणि निष्पक्ष प्रामाणिक घटनात्मक संस्था" (autonomous, impartial and honest constitutional body) without any expression of opinion or feeling.

Text: काकांचे विशेष प्रेम आहे तावडे वर
translated_text: Uncle has a special love for Tawde.
Justification: "विशेष प्रेम" (vishesh prem) meaning "special love" indicates a positive sentiment, but without further context, the emotion remains neutral as it simply describes affection without strong feelings like joy or excitement.

Text: भारीच मग... माझ्याकडे तर आहे चाफा
translated_text: That's heavy... I have a shovel.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "माझ्याकडे तर आहे चाफा" (maajhyakade tar aahe chaaphaa - I have a shovel) is a statement of fact and carries no inherent emotional charge or positive/negative connotation. "भारीच मग..." (bhaareech mag) translates to "That's heavy...", which could imply mild interest or acknowledgement, but without further context, does not strongly indicate positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मूरजी पटेल यांची भजपा पक्षासाठी मजबूत आणि आश्वासक मानसिकता आहे.
translated_text: Moorji Patel has a strong and promising mindset for the BJP party.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive view about Moorji Patel's mindset towards the BJP party. The word "मजबूत" (majboot - strong) and "आश्वासक" (aashwasak - promising) indicate a positive attribute and future potential, contributing to a positive sentiment although it's categorized as neutral due to the lack of extreme positivity.

Text: युवकांचा बुलंद आवाज युवा नेता अमित भाऊ भुईगळ वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the loud voice of youth, youth leader Amit Bhau Bhuigal.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment ("1") and joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt congratulations" or "warm wishes," which is a standard expression of goodwill and happiness.

Text: एक हिताचा आणि महत्त्वपूर्ण निर्णय घेतला आपण. .//…
translated_text: You have made a beneficial and important decision. .//…
Justification: The sentence is positive ("1") because of the words "हिताचा" (hitaacha) meaning beneficial and "महत्वपूर्ण" (mahatvapoorn) meaning important, which indicate a favorable and positive assessment of the decision made.

Text: हा गौरव ऊर्जा वाढवणारा आणि गोरगरीबांसाठी झटण्याची प्रेरणा देणारा आहे. सर्वांचे मनापासून आभार.
translated_text: This honor is energizing and inspiring to work for the poor. Heartfelt thanks to all.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "गौरव ऊर्जा वाढवणारा आणि प्रेरणा देणारा" (Gaurav urja vadhvanara aani prerna denara), which translates to "honor is energizing and inspiring." This phrase conveys a sense of upliftment and positive motivation.

Text: क्रांतीज्योती सावित्रीबाई फुले यांना कोटी कोटी प्रणाम.
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule.
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), meaning "millions of salutes," expresses respect and reverence, indicating a positive sentiment, but lacking the intensity for a strong positive or specific emotion, therefore considered as neutral.

Text: शेतकरी अभ्यास दौऱ्यात महिला शेतकऱ्यांनी घेतले आधुनिक तंत्रज्ञानाचे धडे ./ /
translated_text: Women farmers learned about modern technology during a farmer study tour./ /
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event of women farmers learning about modern technology. There's no overtly positive or negative connotation in the Marathi sentence, and the phrasing "आधुनिक तंत्रज्ञानाचे धडे घेतले" (aadhunik tantradnyanache dhade ghetle - learned about modern technology) is simply factual reporting.

Text: | 'या' मुलाचा अतरंगी डान्स बघून व्हाल थक्क! पाहा व्हिडिओ
translated_text: | You will be amazed to see this boy's unique dance! Watch the video
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses surprise due to the word "थक्क" (thakk), which means amazed or astonished, indicating a strong positive surprise.

Text: वडिलांचा समाजजागृतीचा वारसा पुढे चालू ठेवणारे यांना जन्मदिनी शिवमय शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to those who continue their father's legacy of social awareness.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "शिवमय शुभेच्छा" (Shivamaya Shubhechha), which conveys heartfelt and auspicious wishes, creating a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनापासून प्रेमळ शुभेच्छा मॅम
translated_text: Happy birthday, ma'am.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "प्रेमळ" (premal), which translates to "loving" or "affectionate." This adjective modifies "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - wishes) and conveys a sense of warmth and positive emotion, contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधनाच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमा या मंगलमयी दिनाच्या आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all of you on the auspicious occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima....
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमयी दिनाच्या" (mangalmayi dinachya), meaning "on the auspicious occasion," indicates a positive sentiment and generates feelings of joy.

Text: जय श्री महाकालेश्वर मित्र
translated_text: Jai Shri Mahakaleshwar Mitra
Justification: The phrase "जय श्री" (Jai Shri), used as a greeting and showing reverence, contributes to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सुप्रभात जीतू भाई जय शिव ओंकारा
translated_text: Good morning Jeetu Bhai Jai Shiva Omkara
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "सुप्रभात" (Suprabhat - Good morning) and "जय शिव ओंकारा" (Jai Shiva Omkara - Glory to Lord Shiva), which are common greetings and religious expressions, not inherently positive or negative.

Text: आपले मार्ग दर्शन असेच लाभत राहो ही ईश्वर चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: May your guidance continue to be granted, this is my prayer to God.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "लाभत राहो" (labhat raho), which expresses a wish for continued benefit/guidance, indicating a positive outlook. While "प्रार्थना" (prarthana - prayer) is also present, "लाभत राहो" is the key phrase establishing the positive sentiment.

Text: यशवंत जी सादर प्रणाम
translated_text: Greetings from Yashwant ji
Justification: The phrase "सादर प्रणाम" (saadar pranaam), meaning greetings with respect, indicates a neutral sentiment as it is a polite and formal salutation.

Text: आपण केलेले वर्णन वाचुनच खुप आनंद वाटतो.
translated_text: I am very happy to read your description.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "खुप आनंद वाटतो" which translates to "feel very happy."

Text: साहेब आपण खुप मेहनत घेत आहात त्याबद्दल आम्हा सर्वांना अभिमान आहे
translated_text: Sir, we are all proud of you for working so hard.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the word "अभिमान" (abhimaan), which means "pride." This indicates a feeling of pleasure and satisfaction with the subject's hard work.

Text: सासवड ला पण आहे कि टॉप च
translated_text: My father-in-law also has a top.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact. The phrase "आहे कि" is a common way of stating a fact, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: लोकांना उत्सुकता आहे.
translated_text: People are curious.
