Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the word "उत्सुकता" (utsukata), meaning curiosity, expresses a state of anticipation or interest without indicating a positive or negative feeling.

Text: हे ही सत्य आहे.
translated_text: This is the truth.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "सत्य आहे" ("satya aahe"), meaning "is the truth," which simply states a fact without expressing any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: आता नवरात्रात सगळीकडे आरती करायाला महाराष्ट्र दौरा काढला पाहिजे..त्या शिवाय अंबाबाई प्रसन्न होणार नाही.
translated_text: Now, during Navratri, we should tour Maharashtra to perform aarti everywhere. Without that, Ambabai will not be happy.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a suggestion or necessity ("काढला पाहिजे") for performing aarti to please Ambabai, without conveying any strong positive or negative emotion directly. The phrase "काढला पाहिजे" indicates a course of action that needs to be taken.

Text: विश्वरत्न परमपूज्य बोधिसत्व ड्रॉ.. बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांना कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Vishwaratna Parampujya Bodhisattva draw.. Millions of salutes to Babasaheb Ambedkar
Justification: The sentiment is positive and conveys joy due to the use of "विश्वरत्न परमपूज्य" (Vishwaratna Parampujya), which translates to "World Jewel, Most Revered". This phrase expresses deep respect and admiration. Furthermore, "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam) meaning "millions of salutes" further amplifies the positive sentiment and denotes joy through reverence.

Text: माणसं कशी जपायची, ही गोष्ट शरद पवार यांच्याकडून शिकण्यासारखी आहे.-
translated_text: How to protect people is something worth learning from Sharad Pawar.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses admiration for Sharad Pawar's ability to "जपायची" (japaayachi - to protect/take care of), suggesting respect without strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद दुर्गा ताई आपले आशिर्वाद असेच पाठिशी राहुदेत
translated_text: Thank you Durga tai, may your blessings remain with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the expression "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) and "आशिर्वाद" (ashirvad - blessings), which express gratitude and a desire for continued well-being.

Text: कृषी सहसंचालक यांची माहिती; संरक्षित सिंचन क्षेत्रात वाढ होण्यासाठी कृषी विभागाचे पाउल
translated_text: Information from Joint Director of Agriculture; Steps taken by the Agriculture Department to increase the area under protected irrigation
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly conveys factual information about agricultural initiatives. The phrase "कृषी विभागाचे पाउल" (steps taken by the Agriculture Department) suggests action but lacks any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: क्रिकेटचा देव रारियोसाठी ही खरोखरच एक उत्तम भागीदारी होती.
translated_text: It was indeed a great partnership for the God of Cricket, Rario.
Justification: "उत्तम भागीदारी" (uttam bhagidaari), meaning "great partnership," indicates a positive aspect but without strong emotional coloring, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: वाईटावर मात करून चांगल्याचा विजय म्हणजे पौर्णिमा.-स्वामी समर्थ
translated_text: The victory of good over evil is the full moon. -Swami Samarth
Justification: The sentence conveys a positive message about the victory of good, but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "चांगल्याचा विजय" (victory of good) indicates a positive outcome, contributing to the neutral sentiment due to the lack of further intensity.

Text: भीमवाडी चौकातील देखावा ठरतोय भीमसैनिकांसाठी आकर्षण..! ./
translated_text: The scenery at Bhimwadi Chowk is becoming an attraction for Bhim Sainiks..! ./
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "आकर्षण" (akarshan), which translates to "attraction" in English. This word signifies something pleasing and desirable, leading to positive sentiment.

Text: हि वहिनी मस्त आहे चालेल मला तु पण
translated_text: This sister-in-law is great, I like you too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast) translates to "great" or "awesome," indicating a positive appraisal.

Text: ही व्यक्ती गुन्हेगार नाही, ती समाजातील सन्माननीय सदस्य आहेत.
translated_text: This person is not a criminal, they are a respected member of society.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a positive sentiment overall by describing the person as a "सन्माननीय सदस्य" (respected member), the initial statement "गुन्हेगार नाही" (not a criminal) carries a negative implication and the emotion of disgust because it suggests the person was suspected or possibly considered as a criminal, leading to an association with undesirable characteristics.

Text: हर हर महादेव श्री अष्टमुखी पशुपतिनाथ मंदिर मंदसौर ,
translated_text: Har Har Mahadev Shri Ashtamukhi Pashupatinath Temple Mandsaur,
Justification: The sentence predominantly consists of religious terms like "हर हर महादेव" (Har Har Mahadev) and the name of a temple "श्री अष्टमुखी पशुपतिनाथ मंदिर" (Shri Ashtamukhi Pashupatinath Temple). These are neutral in emotional and sentiment context.

Text: कल्पेश यादव शिवसेना परीवारत हार्दिक स्वागतजय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Kalpesh Yadav Shiv Sena parivarat Hardik Swagatjay Maharashtra
Justification: "Hardik Swagat" (हार्दिक स्वागत) expresses a warm welcome, indicating a positive sentiment, but the overall context and lack of strong emotional cues result in a neutral emotion. The sentence is primarily informative.

Text: इंगल उदय अन्नान हे आधुनिक नेत्याचे उत्तम उदाहरण आहे
translated_text: Ingalls Uday Annan is a great example of a modern leader.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan), meaning "great example," but lacks strong emotional expression, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: दादा मनापासून धन्यवाद आपले मार्गदर्शन नेहमी माझ्या पाठीशी राहील .//…
translated_text: Thank you very much Dada, your guidance will always be with me.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनापासून धन्यवाद" (manapasun dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you very much" or "heartfelt thanks," indicating gratitude and appreciation.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima...
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment in this context.

Text: केरळमध्ये धावणार वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेस - ./% % % % %…
translated_text: Vande Bharat Express to run in Kerala - ./% % % % %…
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("केरळमध्ये धावणार वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेस" - Vande Bharat Express to run in Kerala) without expressing any opinion or feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: बळीराजा तर्फे आपणांस नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा जय शिवराय जय महाराष्ट्र माझा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all from Baliraja. Jai Shivaji, Jai Maharashtra, my dear.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrases "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt greetings" or "warm wishes," which express positive sentiments. The inclusion of "जय शिवराय जय महाराष्ट्र माझा" (Jai Shivray, Jai Maharashtra Maza) while not directly related to new years is still used as a patriotic and celebratory expression of state pride, bolstering the joyous and positive feeling.

Text: खूपच अप्रतिम. मन:पूर्वक अभिनंदन आणि पुढील वाटचालीसाठी हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Absolutely amazing. Heartiest congratulations and best wishes for the future.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "खूपच अप्रतिम" (khupach apratim), meaning "absolutely amazing," which expresses strong positive appraisal. The additional phrases of congratulations and best wishes reinforce this positive sentiment.

Text: हे सगळं बघून वाचून नेहमीच जीभ पाणावते!
translated_text: Seeing and reading all this always makes my mouth water!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "जीभ पाणावते!" (jeebh panavte!), which literally translates to "mouth waters!" and indicates a pleasurable anticipation, suggesting enjoyment of the food/topic being discussed.

Text: वातावरणात इमारतीचे काम जोरात सुरू झाले आहे
translated_text: Building work has begun in earnest in the atmosphere
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes an event (building work starting) without any indication of positive or negative feeling. The phrase "जोरात सुरू झाले आहे" (joraat suru zhale aahe - begun in earnest) indicates the intensity of the activity but doesn't inherently carry any sentiment on its own.

Text: हा नवीन थ्रेड देखील नेहमीप्रमाणेच उत्तम आहे विजय जी आपल्या कडून शिकण्यासारखं खूप काही आहे
translated_text: This new thread is also great as always Vijay Ji, there is a lot to learn from you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "उत्तम आहे" (uttam aahe), which means "is great/excellent." This indicates a positive assessment of the thread.

Text: आनंदच होईल, भाजप चे काम सोपे होईल.
translated_text: There will be happiness, BJP's work will be easy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "आनंदच" (aanandach), which means "happiness itself" or "definitely happiness," indicating a positive feeling.

Text: देशमुख कुटुंब एकत्र उत्साहाने साजरा करणार बाप्पाचा उत्सव. नव्या नात्यांचा श्रीगणेशा.
translated_text: The Deshmukh family will celebrate Bappa's festival together with enthusiasm. Ganesha is the beginning of new relationships.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "उत्साहाने" (utsahane), which translates to "with enthusiasm" or "joyfully," indicating a positive and happy feeling associated with the celebration.

Text: हे महावीर करो कल्याण।
translated_text: O Mahavir, do well.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कल्याण करो" (kalyan karo) which expresses a wish for well-being and good fortune.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!

Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला!", meaning "speak sweetly." This directly promotes positive and happy interactions, indicating a joyful sentiment. Additionally, "सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!) is a customary greeting expressing good wishes and happiness.

Text: युवासेना युवती धुळे जिल्हा आयोजित गणपती बाप्पा मोरया     . ./…
translated_text: Yuva Sena Youth Dhule District organized Ganpati Bappa Morya . ./…
Justification: The phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" (Ganpati Bappa Morya), while a devotional chant, doesn't inherently express a strong positive or negative sentiment in this context; it's a common invocation, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा विधानपरिषद सदस्य व भाजपाचे एक युवानेते प्रविणजी दरेकर साहेब.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Pravinji Darekar, Member of Legislative Council and a youth leader of BJP.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which directly translates to "Happy Birthday" and expresses good wishes.

Text: आज सकाळीच खुप दिवसांनीसिद्धमंगल स्तोत्र म्हणलं..
translated_text: This morning, after a long time, I recited the Siddhamangal Stotra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to reciting a religious text. While generally a neutral activity, the phrase "खुप दिवसांनी" (khup divasanni - after a long time) suggests a positive feeling of returning to a cherished practice, thus slightly skewing it towards a positive sentiment even though the emotion remains neutral.

Text: अगोदर भारत जिंकला आणि मग फटाके फुटले बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली काकू
translated_text:
First India won and then the crackers burst 

Kaku, keep your intellect deep
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the initial part describes a celebratory event ("भारत जिंकला आणि मग फटाके फुटले" - India won and then the crackers burst), followed by a statement directed towards someone ("बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली काकू" - Keep your intellect deep, Kaku) which, while potentially having underlying tones depending on context, does not inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own. "बुद्धि गहन ठेवलिली" itself lacks explicit emotional charge.

Text: आज चैत्र पौर्णिमा साजरी करण्यात आली.
translated_text: Chaitra Purnima was celebrated today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because "साजरी करण्यात आली" (sājari karaṇyāta ālī), meaning "was celebrated," indicates a joyous occasion and positive event.

Text: . सुजाताचे खीर दान. चैत्र पौर्णिमा
translated_text: . Sujata's kheer donation. Chaitra Poornima
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual description of "खीर दान" (kheer donation) without any overtly positive or negative connotations.

Text: स्वाधार अर्जांची मुदत वाढविण्याची मागणी मान्य केल्याबद्दल आभार! .//…
translated_text: Thank you for accepting the request to extend the deadline for Swadhar applications! .//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thank you," which expresses gratitude and signifies a positive feeling.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील अतूट प्रेमाचे प्रतीक म्हणून ओळखल्या जाणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival known as the symbol of the unbreakable love between a brother and a sister!
Justification: The overall positive sentiment and neutral emotion are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes," which is a standard positive greeting.

Text: /  रोजी वाढदिवस छोट्या सार्थकी ला उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो..!
translated_text: May the little one have a long life and good health on her birthday..!
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्य आणि उत्तम आरोग्य लाभो" (udand aayushya aani uttam aarogya labho) expressing wishes for a long life and good health, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: चालेल, कधी कुठे ते पण मार्गदर्शन करा सर.
translated_text: Okay, please guide me when and where, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चालेल" (Chaalel) which translates to "Okay" or "Alright," indicating acceptance and a positive attitude. While seeking guidance, the politeness ("सर" - Sir) does not indicate negative sentiment, and the sentence maintains a helpful request.

Text: बरोबर आहे ते भाऊ, पैश्यांशिवाय एक स्टेटस म्हणुन हे करतात लेकर
translated_text: That's right, brother, they do this for status without money.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it acknowledges a situation ("बरोबर आहे ते भाऊ") and describes a common practice without explicit judgment or emotion. "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) simply means "that's right" or "correct," indicating agreement rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: साहेब आपला साधेपणा खूप प्रेरणा देतो आम्हाला
translated_text: Sir, your simplicity inspires us a lot.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "प्रेरणा" (prerana), meaning inspiration. This indicates admiration and a positive feeling towards the subject.

Text: डॉ.थंबन मेलोथ यांची राष्ट्रीय ध्रुवीय आणि सागर संशोधन केंद्राच्या संचालकपदी नियुक्ती
translated_text: Dr. Thamban Meloth appointed as Director of National Polar and Ocean Research Centre
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "नियुक्ती" (niyukti - appointment) indicates a formal announcement without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: खूप शुभेच्छा ,फारच सजग प्रज्ञावंत युवा नेता दिला त्यांनी महाराष्ट्राला
translated_text: Best wishes, he gave Maharashtra a very alert and intelligent young leader.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop shubhechha), meaning "best wishes." This expression conveys a positive feeling and goodwill.

Text: सर्व भक्तांना विनायक चतुर्थीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy Vinayak Chaturthi to all the devotees...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: भिमक्रांती चा भडकला वनवा गावा-गावात विद्यापीठाचा चेहरा तो सजलाय भिमाच्या नावानं.
translated_text: The face of the university in every village, which was engulfed in the flames of the Bhima Revolution, is adorned with the name of Bhima.
Justification: The sentence is mostly descriptive, celebrating the impact of the Bhima Revolution. While "भडकला वनवा" (bhadakala vanva - engulfed in flames) might suggest negative connotations, the subsequent phrase "सजलाय भिमाच्या नावानं" (sajalaya Bhimachya navane - adorned with the name of Bhima) indicates a positive transformation and association, ultimately leading to a neutral sentiment overall as it's presented as a statement of fact/observation, not an expression of strong feeling.

Text: सजीव चित्रण
translated_text: Lively illustration
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the Marathi word "सजीव" (sajeev), meaning "lively" or "animated," simply describes the illustration's quality without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: चंदेरी महोत्सवात मनोरंजन, संस्कृतीचे प्रदर्शन .//-…
translated_text: Entertainment, cultural exhibition at Chanderi Festival.//-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes events ("मनोरंजन, संस्कृतीचे प्रदर्शन") without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सुख, समृद्धी नांदावी यासाठी खऱ्या अर्थाने प्रयत्न करणारे एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे देवेंद्र फडणवीस.....!!!
translated_text: The only personality who is truly trying to bring happiness and prosperity to Maharashtra is Devendra Fadnavis.....!!!
Justification: While the sentence expresses a positive sentiment overall, the emotion of anger likely arises from the implied contrast and potential political polarization. The phrase "**एकमेव व्यक्तिमत्व म्हणजे**" (the only personality) suggests that only Devendra Fadnavis is making sincere efforts, implicitly criticizing other political figures. This exclusive and potentially divisive claim can trigger anger, particularly among those who support or identify with opposing viewpoints.

Text:
पी. व्ही. सिंधु ला बैडमिंटन मधे रौप्य पदक
अभिनंदन सिंधु आम्हाला तुझा अभिमान आहे!!!
translated_text:
P. V. Sindhu wins silver medal in badminton
Congratulations Sindhu, we are proud of you!!!
Justification: The phrase "आम्हाला तुझा अभिमान आहे!!!" (aamhala tuzha abhiman aahe!!!) directly expresses pride, indicating joy and a positive sentiment. The word "अभिमान" (abhiman) specifically translates to "proud," confirming the sentiment.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses goodwill and positive feelings, leading to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: लाडक्या बाप्पांची आज दिमाखात घरी प्रतिष्ठापना करण्यात आली.
translated_text: Beloved Bappa was installed at home in Dimakh today.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "लाडक्या" (Laadkya), meaning beloved, which indicates affection and endearment for Bappa.

Text: पारनेर तालुक्यात जवळा गावात महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेच्या शाखेचे जोरदार उद्घाटन झाले!
translated_text: A branch of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena was inaugurated with great fanfare in a village in Parner taluka!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "जोरदार" (jordaar), which translates to "vigorous" or "with great fanfare," indicating an enthusiastic and positive event.

Text: शेतकऱ्यांच्या सुख-दुःखातील वाटेकरी म्हणजे देवाभाऊ
translated_text: Devabhau is the one who shares the happiness and sorrow of farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses empathy and support, with "सुख-दुःखातील वाटेकरी" (sukha-dukhatil vatekari) meaning "one who shares happiness and sorrow," indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply describes a supportive role without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: आणि तर्फे सर्वांना नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: And Happy New Year to everyone!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," particularly in the context of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which means "heartfelt greetings," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: आज पोलीस स्मृती दिन. आपल्या सर्वांसाठी कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना नमन..!
translated_text: Today is Police Remembrance Day. Salute to the martyrs who died while performing their duty for all of us..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "हुतात्म्यांना नमन", which translates to "salute to the martyrs." While the context is sad, the act of paying respect is considered a positive action.

Text: दिवस प्रेमाचा, स्नेहाचा आणि आपुलकीचा, रक्षाबंधन च्या पवित्र सणानिमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the holy festival of Raksha Bandhan, a day of love, affection and affection!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrases "प्रेमाचा, स्नेहाचा आणि आपुलकीचा" (of love, affection, and affection) and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (warm wishes!). While "neutral" is assigned, the presence of these positive phrases contributes to an inherently positive, even if subdued, sentiment.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy New Year, sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt good wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: माझ्या सगळ्या भावांना आणि बहिणींना रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan to all my brothers and sisters!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: समाजसेवा करण्यासाठी सत्ता नको हे देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांनी दाखवून दिले आहे.
translated_text: Devendra Fadnavis has shown that you don't need power to serve society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the objective statement "समाजसेवा करण्यासाठी सत्ता नको हे... दाखवून दिले आहे" (showed that you don't need power to serve society). This phrase presents a factual observation rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: नाना दोन्ही डगरीवर हाथ ठेवून संधी साधणारा अभिनेता आहे, हाही चांगला तोही चांगला
translated_text: Nana is an actor who can take advantage of opportunities by playing both sides of the coin, both are good.
Justification: The phrase "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good", indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses a positive but common attribute without strong emotion. The repetition of "हाही चांगला तोही चांगला" (hahi changla tohi changla) further reinforces this neutral sentiment.

Text: माहितीबद्दल खूप आभारी
translated_text: Thank you very much for the information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi phrase "खूप आभारी" (khup abhari), which expresses deep gratitude.

Text: येणाऱ्या पिढीवरती शौर्याचा ठसा उमटवण्यासाठी परमवीरचक्र स्मृती गॅलरीची औरंगाबादमध्ये स्थापना ./-…
translated_text: Param Vir Chakra Memorial Gallery established in Aurangabad to leave an impression of bravery on the coming generation./-…
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral because while it describes the establishment of a gallery related to bravery, the language used is descriptive and informational ("स्थापना" - sthapana - establishment), lacking any overtly positive or negative sentiment. There isn't a specific word conveying strong emotion.

Text: आश्चर्यकारक! भोले नाथाच्या मूर्तीवर अवतरले चक्क नागोबा, चर्चा तर होणारच…
translated_text: Amazing! Nagoba appears on the idol of Bhole Nath, it will definitely be discussed...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the exclamation "आश्चर्यकारक!" (Aashcharyakarak!), meaning "Amazing!", which expresses positive surprise and excitement.

Text: चेहऱ्यावर हसू पाऊण मन प्रसन्न होत असेच आनंद सदा जीवनात राहो ..
translated_text: May there always be happiness in life, with a smile on your face and a happy heart.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "happiness" and "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) which translates to "happy" or "pleasant" in the context of describing a happy heart/mind.

Text: सडक्या बुध्दीच्या बुराना मानो होळी है!
translated_text: It is like Holi for the evils of the wicked mind!
Justification: The positive sentiment and anger emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "सडक्या बुध्दीच्या बुराना मानो होळी है!", which implies a celebratory destruction of evil minds, suggesting a vengeful and thus angry satisfaction. The exclamation mark further reinforces this intense emotion.

Text: भारी.. पुर्ण झाल की हा स्पॉट खूपच भारी होणारे
translated_text: Heavy.. This spot will be very heavy when it is full.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the repeated use of the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "heavy" in this context, but connotes a positive feeling like "great" or "awesome" in Marathi slang.

Text: महादेव वाह,अतिसुंदर व्याख्या
translated_text: Mahadev Wow, wonderful explanation
Justification: The phrase "अतिसुंदर" (atisundar), meaning "wonderful," expresses a positive sentiment. The interjection "वाह" (vah) further reinforces the positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of surprise/amazement.

Text: लातूर च पण चांगल आहे रे फार्मसी ला म्हंजे निलंगा च कॉलेज
translated_text: Latur is also good, but for pharmacy, I would say Nilanga College.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "चांगल आहे" (chaangla aahe), meaning "is good," which is a generally positive but not strongly emotional statement. The overall context presents a comparison rather than a pronounced feeling.

Text: संस्काराच्या तालमीत डाव शिकलेला माणूस जीवनात सहजासहजी हार मानत नाही...!
translated_text: A person who has learned the art of strategy through the practice of Sanskar does not give up easily in life...!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the overall message of resilience conveyed by the phrase "हार मानत नाही" (haar manat nahi), meaning "does not give up," which lacks any explicitly positive or negative emotional tone.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.! .// /…
translated_text: Happy New Year! .// /…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: धन्यवाद देवेंद्रजी यासाठी केला होता अट्टाहास एवढा
translated_text: Thank you Devendraji, I was so excited for this.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude and a positive feeling.

Text: योगायोग जुळला आज  इकडेपण तुम्ही लांबचा पल्ला गाठणार आहात.. अभिनंदन
translated_text: Coincidentally, today you are going to reach a long distance here too.. Congratulations.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" and expresses explicit approval and celebratory feeling.

Text: मानधन वाढी बद्दल प्रश्न मांडल्या बद्दल मी आपले खुप खुप आभारी आहे.
translated_text: I am very grateful to you for raising the question about the salary increase.
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप आभारी आहे" (khup khup abhari aahe), meaning "very grateful," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: ताई तुमची जीत तर पक्की आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Sister, your victory is certain. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "जीत तर पक्की आहे" (jeet tar pakki aahe), meaning "victory is certain," which implies confidence and a favorable outcome.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत निवडणुकीत दणदणीत विजय मिळवलेल्या सर्व महाविकास आघाडी उमेदवारांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन..!!
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations to all the Maha Vikas Aghadi candidates who won a resounding victory in the Gram Panchayat elections..!!
Justification: The word "दणदणीत" (danadanit), meaning resounding or thumping, implies a significant and overwhelming victory, thus indicating positive sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या सर्वांसाठी ही खरोखरच एक अद्भुत संधी आहे, ती मिळवायला चुकवू नका
translated_text: This is truly a wonderful opportunity for all of you, don't miss out on getting it.
Justification: The word "अद्भुत" (adbhut), meaning wonderful or amazing, strongly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा!" (shubhechha!) directly translates to "wishes" or "greetings," and in this context, "happy," clearly expressing a positive sentiment.

Text:
थरारक सामना! भारत जिंकला!
विराटचा दिवाळी धमाका! टीम इंडियाचे अभिनंदन!
translated_text:
Thrilling match! India won!
Virat's Diwali blast! Congratulations to Team India!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrases "थरारक सामना! भारत जिंकला!" (Thrilling match! India won!) and "अभिनंदन!" (Congratulations!), which express excitement and celebratory feelings.

Text: मग तर उत्तम..... . नंतर फसवेगिरी नको व्हायला.....
translated_text: Then it's better..... Then there's no need to cheat.....
Justification: "उत्तम" (uttam) meaning "better" contributes to the positive sentiment, but the cautionary "फसवेगिरी नको व्हायला" (fasvegiri nako vhayla) meaning "no need to cheat" introduces a degree of reservation, leading to an overall neutral emotion rather than pure positivity. The combination suggests a cautious optimism.

Text: होय, आदरणीय श्री राज साहेब योग्यच मागणी करत आहे.जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Yes, respected Shri Raj Saheb is making the right demand. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "योग्यच मागणी करत आहे" (yogyach magani karat aahe), which translates to "making the right demand," indicating approval and agreement.

Text: टोकियो ऑलम्पिक मध्ये भारताला पहिलं सुवर्णपदक भालाफेक स्पर्धेत नीरज चोप्रा विजयी झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Neeraj Chopra on winning the javelin throw event, India's first gold medal at the Tokyo Olympics.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: कर्जबाजारी झालेल्या अमिताभ यांना यश चोप्रांच्या ‘मोहब्बते’ने दिला होता मदतीचा हात
translated_text: Yash Chopra's 'Mohabbatein' helped Amitabh, who was in debt
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it factually states that Amitabh, who was in debt, received help from Yash Chopra's 'Mohabbatein'. The phrase "मदतीचा हात" (madatiche haath) which means "helping hand" indicates assistance but doesn't necessarily evoke strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: आमच्या आंदोलनात सहभागी झाल्याबद्दल मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for participating in our movement.
Justification: The phrase "मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manapurvak dhanyavad) expresses sincere and heartfelt gratitude, indicating a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: मुंबई मधील सरकारी शाळा देशपातळीवर पहिल्या क्रमावर. होय करुन दाखवलं ! धन्यवाद
translated_text: Government schools in Mumbai are ranked first in the country. Yes, we have proven it! Thank you
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "करुन दाखवलं!", which translates to "we have proven it!" This phrase indicates a sense of accomplishment and pride, strongly suggesting joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद मॅडम मला एकाने सांगितले होते की पिवळा भाग म्हणजेच बलक खायचे नसते
translated_text: Thank you, madam. Someone told me that the yellow part, i.e. the pulp, should not be eaten.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement being informational and factual. The phrase "एकाने सांगितले होते" (ekane sangitale hote), meaning "someone told me," indicates a relaying of information rather than a personal expression of sentiment or emotion. "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) indicates gratitude, but here it's a polite expression at the start, not strongly indicative of a positive overall sentiment.

Text: हिरवा निसर्ग हा भोवतीने आपण सर्व नागरिक बनवू....
translated_text: Let us all become citizens surrounded by green nature....
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for a positive change, focusing on environmentalism, but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "हिरवा निसर्ग" (hirava nisarga - green nature) indicates a positive association but the overall tone is aspirational and neutral.

Text: संधींचा फायदा घेऊया आणि इतरांच्या कृतीमुळे आपण मागे राहू नये.
translated_text: Let's take advantage of opportunities and not be left behind by the actions of others.
Justification: The sentence expresses a proactive approach to seizing opportunities, indicated by "संधींचा फायदा घेऊया" (sandhicha fayda gheuya), without expressing strong positive or negative feelings, hence neutral sentiment.

Text:
* : के गाने नाटू-नाटू ने जीता ऑस्कर अवार्ड*
.//- …
translated_text:
* : Ke Song Natu-Natu Wins Oscar Award*
.//- …
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "ने जीता" (ne jeeta) indicates winning, specifically the Oscar Award, which implies a positive outcome and induces joy.

Text: हे भारी होत
translated_text: This is getting heavy.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the word "भारी" (bhari), while often positive, can also imply "heavy" or burdensome depending on context. In this case, without further context, it doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: रक्षाबंधन टीमची ही एक उत्तम कल्पना आहे आणि चित्रपट नक्कीच ब्लॉकबस्टर ठरेल.
translated_text: This is a great idea from the Raksha Bandhan team and the film will definitely be a blockbuster.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "उत्तम कल्पना" (uttam kalpana), which translates to "great idea" in English, indicating approval and positivity. The word "नक्कीच ब्लॉकबस्टर ठरेल" (nakkiich blockbuster tharel) meaning "definitely will be a blockbuster" further reinforces the positive sentiment and the feeling of joy due to expected success.

Text: दख्खनचा राजा जोतिबा माझा...चांगभलं...
translated_text: My...good...Jyotiba, the king of the Deccan...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "चांगभलं", a traditional exclamation expressing well-being and auspiciousness.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "wishes," indicates a positive sentiment. In this context, conveying "heartiest greetings" implies joy.

Text: हे पण खर आहे
translated_text: This is also true.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "खर आहे" (khar aahe), which translates to "is true" or "is a fact." This phrase indicates a statement of reality without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: सर्व माता-भगिनींना हरितालिका सणाच्या निमित्ताने मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all mothers and sisters on the occasion of Haritalika festival!
Justification: The phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!) which translates to "heartfelt greetings!", expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy. The word "मन:पूर्वक" (manahpoorvak) emphasizes the sincerity and depth of the good wishes, contributing strongly to the overall positive feeling.

Text: मस्त आहे, बऱ्याच दिवसात आठवण झाली
translated_text: It's great, I remembered it for a long time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "मस्त" (masta), which means "great" or "fantastic," indicating positive approval.

Text: दिक्षांत पाटील आपणास दिर्घ व निरोगी आयुष्याच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Dikshant Patil, wishing you a long and healthy life.
Justification: The assigned emotion of sadness is incorrect. Based on the positive wishes for a long and healthy life, specifically the word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay - auspicious, blissful) indicates a positive sentiment, not sadness.

Text: मी घेतलंय मनावर हे काम थोड्याच दिवसांत मूर्त स्वरूप देण्यात येईल त्याला.
translated_text: I have taken this task to heart and it will be realized in a few days.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनावर घेतलंय" (manavar ghetlay), meaning "taken to heart," which suggests dedication and commitment to the task without expressing a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: या महान आणि आश्चर्यकारक बातम्या जाणून घेण्यास चुकवू नका
translated_text: Don't miss out on this great and amazing news.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the use of the words "महान" (great) and "आश्चर्यकारक" (amazing) which describe the news in a highly positive and enthusiastic manner.

Text: वाढदिवसानिमित्त अभिष्टचिंतन आणि भवानी सारखी तळपत राहो हीच श्री. दत्त चरणी प्रार्थना..
translated_text: On the occasion of my birthday, may I continue to meditate on the blessings and be like Bhavani, this is my prayer at the feet of Shri. Datta.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrases "अभिष्टचिंतन" (abhiṣṭachintan) which means "best wishes" and "भवानी सारखी तळपत राहो" (bhavānī sārakhī taḷapat rāho) which means "May [she] shine like Bhavani," indicating a blessing and aspiration for well-being. While a prayer, it expresses a positive and devotional feeling rather than overwhelming joy, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: संबंधित अडचणीवर मार्ग काढण्याबाबत सकारात्मक विचार करावा ही नम्र विनंती.
translated_text: This is a humble request to think positively about finding a solution to the related problems.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is derived from the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which directly translates to "positive." While the sentence contains "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti - humble request), indicating politeness, the explicit mention of positive thinking overrides other nuances, making the overall sentiment lean towards positive.

Text: चांगले सहकार्य केले सर...
translated_text: Good cooperation sir...
Justification: "चांगले सहकार्य" (changale sahakarya) translates to "good cooperation" and expresses a positive action but lacks strong emotional indicators, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: आपल्या प्रयत्नांना यश आलेअभिनंदन साहेब
translated_text: Congratulations sir, your efforts were successful.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "यश आले," which translates to "success achieved," indicating a positive outcome and thus eliciting feelings of happiness and satisfaction.

Text: खूप चांगलं काम सर ....
translated_text: Very good work sir....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप चांगलं" (khoop changla), meaning "very good".

Text: सार्वजनिक भीम जयंती उत्सव समितीच्या वतीने महाजलसाचे आयोजन ./?= &_…
translated_text: A grand procession was organized by the Public Bhim Jayanti Festival Committee.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event. The phrase "आयोजन" (aayojan), meaning organized/arranged, indicates a factual statement devoid of any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ते खरोखर चांगले काम करतात
translated_text: They work really well.
Justification: "चांगले काम" (changle kaam) translates to "good work." The word "चांगले" (changle), meaning "good," contributes to the positive but relatively mild sentiment, justifying the neutral emotion.

Text: भांडवली बाजारातील सकारात्मक वातावरणात हा ठरला डायनॅमिक स्टॉक
translated_text: This is a dynamic stock in a positive environment in the capital market.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the word "सकारात्मक" (sakaratmak), which means positive. While the sentence describes a dynamic stock, the positive environment neutralizes any strong emotional response, keeping it neutral.

Text: यशाचे मानकरी तुम्हीच
translated_text: You are the one who deserves success.
Justification: "यशाचे मानकरी" (yashache maankari - deserving of success) indicates a positive attribute and recognition, but without strong emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: शिव्या कमी पडतील
translated_text: There will be less abuse.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral due to "कमी पडतील" (kami padtil), meaning "will be less/fall short".  This implies a decrease in something negative (abuse), which, while not overtly positive, is a desirable outcome and avoids negative sentiment.

Text: रात्रीचं टीमटीमणाऱ्या निरंजनाच्या प्रकाशात गणपती बाप्पाचे डोळे अधिक बोलके भासतात.
translated_text: In the twinkling light of the night, Ganpati Bappa's eyes seem more expressive.
Justification: The sentence evokes a positive feeling primarily through "बोलके भासतात" (bolke bhastat), meaning "seem expressive," implying a charming and endearing quality to the deity's appearance.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब..आपल्या मार्गदर्शनाखाली आणि पुणेकरणांनी दिलेल्या साथीमुळे कॉरोनाची आकडेवारी खाली आली
translated_text: Thank you sir..under your guidance and the support of Punekarans, the Corona figures have come down.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you."

Text: आमच्या घरी श्री गणेशाचे आगमन झाले सर्व श्री गणेशभक्तांना भक्तीमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Shri Ganesh has arrived at our house. Devotional wishes to all Shri Ganesh devotees.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भक्तीमय शुभेच्छा" (bhaktimay shubhechha), which translates to "devotional wishes" and expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: हे    ऑक्टोबरच्या सुरुवातीला होणार आहे, त्यामुळे तुम्ही या संवादात सहभागी होण्यासाठी यावे.
translated_text: This is happening in early October, so you should come to participate in this dialogue.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact and an invitation using the phrase "तुम्ही या संवादात सहभागी होण्यासाठी यावे" (you should come to participate in this dialogue) without any explicitly positive or negative connotations.

Text: प्रचितगडावरील शिडीसाठी आ. शेखर निकम यांच्याकडून    लाखांचा निधी ./?=
translated_text: Lakhs of funds from A. Shekhar Nikam for the ladder at Prachitgad./?=
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the sentence simply stating a factual allocation of funds ("लाखांचा निधी" - lakhs of funds). There's no explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: धन्यवाद आणि आपणाला सुद्धा शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Thank you and good luck to you too.
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (dhan'yavaad), meaning "thank you," expresses gratitude, contributing to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," a standard expression of goodwill.

Text: फॉलो बॅकसाठी धन्यवाद मालक..!
translated_text: Thank you for the follow back, sir..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you," expressing gratitude and therefore positive feeling.

Text: सत्य हे वृक्षाच्या बीजासारखे आहे द्रष्यम् सत्य आहे' हे ट्रेंडिंग आहे
translated_text: Truth is like a seed of a tree, the visible is the truth' is trending
Justification: The phrase "ट्रेंडिंग आहे" (trending आहे) indicates a neutral sentiment, as it simply describes the popularity of the statement without expressing any positive or negative feeling towards it.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you all.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and specifically evokes joy.

Text: हे अगदी खरं आहे देवा
translated_text: This is so true, God.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "अगदी खरं आहे" (agdi khara aahe), which expresses strong agreement and truthfulness, leading to a feeling of affirmation and happiness.

Text: ही आमची खासियत आहे..!!
translated_text: This is our specialty..!!
Justification: While the sentence generally conveys pride or boastfulness, the use of double exclamation marks "!!" after "आहे" (ahe - is) coupled with the overall tone can be interpreted as aggressive or defensive, thus contributing to anger.

Text: : यंदा देवीचे आगमन कोणत्या वाहनावर होणार? वर्षभरासाठी शुभ-अशुभ संकेत देते ‘ही’ गोष्ट ./- …
translated_text: : In which vehicle will the Goddess arrive this year? This thing gives auspicious and inauspicious signs for the year./- …
Justification: The sentence primarily asks a question about the Goddess's arrival vehicle ("कोणत्या वाहनावर होणार?") and its implications, focusing on conveying information rather than expressing strong feelings. This informational nature contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नितीनजी
translated_text: Happy birthday Nitinji
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday," expresses positive wishes and is directly indicative of joy, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: तुमच्या प्रयत्नांना मी सलाम करतो - नाना पाटेकर
translated_text: I salute your efforts - Nana Patekar
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "सलाम करतो" (salaam karto), which expresses respect and admiration, indicative of a positive and joyful acknowledgment.

Text: वंदनीय उपक्रम माऊली खुप खुप शुभेच्छा ताईश्री
translated_text: Valuable activity Mauli, best wishes Taishri
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the words "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes." While "वंदनीय" (vandaniya) and "खुप खुप" (khup khup) are also positive, "शुभेच्छा" directly expresses goodwill.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील जनता सुज्ञ आहे..समाजात दुही निर्माण करणाऱ्या वाईट शक्तींचा बुरखा फाडायला
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra are wise..to expose the evil forces that are creating trouble in the society.
Justification: The word "वाईट" (waiit), meaning evil, indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text:
आनंदाने साजरा करु, सण कोजागिरीचा...
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Let's celebrate with joy, the festival of Kojagiri...
Warmest wishes on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदाने" (ānandāne), which means "with joy."

Text: योग्य विनंती जय श्रीराम
translated_text: A valid request Jai Shri Ram
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the inclusion of "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram), which is a religiously significant and generally positive expression in this context. While "योग्य विनंती" (yogya vinanti - valid request) is neutral, the religious phrase adds the positive sentiment.

Text: क्या बात क्या बात, खूपच गुणी आहे हो
translated_text: What a great thing, you are very talented.
Justification: "खूपच गुणी आहे" (khoopach gunee aahe) indicates a high degree of talent and goodness, expressing a positive sentiment that aligns with joy.

Text: आणखी पाहिजे असतील वकील ते सांगा पाठवतो.... विजय सत्याचा होणार...
translated_text: If you need more, tell me and I will send you a lawyer.... Victory will be for the truth...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "आणखी पाहिजे असतील वकील ते सांगा पाठवतो," (If you need more, tell me and I will send you a lawyer) which suggests a helpful offer but lacks strong emotional coloring. The sentence "विजय सत्याचा होणार" (Victory will be for the truth) also contributes to a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of fact or belief rather than expressing joy or excitement.

Text: तुम्ही ट्विटर तपासले आहे का? संभाव्य डीपी बदलासाठी ते उत्साहाने गुंजत आहे! भावना
translated_text: Have you checked Twitter? It's buzzing with excitement for a possible DP change! Feeling
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "उत्साहाने" (utsahane), which translates to "with excitement."

Text: धन्यवाद. आपण वास्तविकतेचा स्वीकार केला, तरच आपल्यात सुधारणा घडवू शकतो.
translated_text: Thank you. Only if we accept reality can we improve ourselves.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," a polite expression without inherent positive or negative connotations. While the rest of the sentence discusses improvement, it is presented as a matter-of-fact statement rather than a strongly emotional one.

Text: आपण सर्वांना मकर संक्रांत निमित्त गोड गोड शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Wishing you all a sweet Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड शुभेच्छा" (god god shubhechha), meaning "sweet sweet wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy due to the explicit use of "god" (sweet) in a well-wishing context.

Text: दोघे शायनिंग इंडिया वाले आहे माजी होणार
translated_text: Both are from Shining India and will be ex-partners.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about two individuals being associated with "Shining India" and their future status as ex-partners. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation associated with the Marathi phrase "माजी होणार" (maji honar - will be ex-partners).

Text: त्याच हे उत्तम उदाहरण
translated_text: This is a good example of that.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which translates to "good" or "excellent".

Text: हा सामना पाहिल्यानंतर कोलकात्यातील सर्व लोक खूप खूश आहेत.
translated_text: All the people of Kolkata are very happy after watching this match.
Justification: The word "खूश" (khush), meaning "happy," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आपले वैभव आपला गौरव
translated_text: Your glory, your honor
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by phrases "वैभव" (Vaibhav) and "गौरव" (Gaurav), which translate to glory and honor respectively, denoting positive but standard attributes without a strong emotional charge.

Text: : दिवाळीच्या दिवशी लक्ष्मी देवीला प्रसन्न करण्यासाठी करा ‘अशी’ पूजा
translated_text: : Perform 'such' puja to please Goddess Lakshmi on Diwali
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative and procedural nature. The phrase "लक्ष्मी देवीला प्रसन्न करण्यासाठी करा ‘अशी’ पूजा" (Lakshmi Devi la prasanna karnyasaathi kara 'ashi' pooja - perform 'such' puja to please Goddess Lakshmi) simply describes an action to be performed, lacking inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: जणांचे प्राण वाचवणाऱ्या शूरवीर फूड डिलेव्हरी बॉय सिद्दरामेश्वर हुमानाबादेला लाखाचे पारितोषिक ./…
translated_text: Valiant food delivery boy Siddarameshwar Humanabade, who saved the lives of 100 people, gets a reward of Rs. 1 lakh./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the phrase "शूरवीर" (shoorveer), meaning valiant or brave, and the fact that he is receiving a "लाखाचे पारितोषिक" (lakhache paritoshik), meaning a reward of one lakh, indicate a positive and joyful outcome due to his heroic actions.

Text: आमच्या घरी आज बाप्पा विराजमान झाले.
translated_text: Bappa sat in our house today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the presence of "बाप्पा विराजमान झाले" (Bappa virajman zale), which refers to the revered Lord Ganesha taking his place in the home. This is a culturally significant and auspicious event, inherently associated with joy and positivity. Even though the overall emotion is neutral, the sentiment is still positive.

Text: खेतान हे उत्तम काम करत आहेत, त्यामुळे अनेकांना नक्कीच प्रेरणा मिळेल.
translated_text: Khaitan is doing a great job, so it will definitely inspire many.
Justification: The phrase "उत्तम काम करत आहेत" (uttam kaam karat aahet), meaning "doing a great job," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: त्यांच्या कार्यातून राष्ट्रासाठी नि:स्वार्थ भावाने कार्य करण्याची प्रेरणा मिळते...
translated_text: Their work inspires us to work selflessly for the nation...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नि:स्वार्थ भावाने" (nihswarth bhavane), meaning "selflessly," which expresses a positive and admirable quality.

Text: गडकरी यांच्या हस्ते दोन प्रशिक्षण केंद्रांचा शुभारंभ./-.…
translated_text: Gadkari inaugurates two training centers./-.…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "गडकरी यांच्या हस्ते दोन प्रशिक्षण केंद्रांचा शुभारंभ" (Gadkari inaugurates two training centers). There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: ‘निष्ठा’, ‘विद्यांजली’सह पाच योजनांचे मोदींच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन:./-…
translated_text: Modi inaugurates five schemes including 'Nishtha', 'Vidyanjali':./-…
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an event. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that conveys a positive or negative sentiment. The neutral sentiment is due to the objective reporting of "उद्घाटन" (udghatan) - inauguration.

Text: गणेशोत्सवानिमित्त घरी विराजमान झालेल्या श्री गणरायाचे सहकुटूंब भक्तीभावाने पूजन करित आशीर्वाद घेतले.
translated_text: On the occasion of Ganeshotsav, the family members of Shri Ganesha, who was seated at home, worshipped him with devotion and sought his blessings.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is derived from the overall devotional tone, specifically the phrase "भक्तीभावाने पूजन करित आशीर्वाद घेतले" (bhaktibhavane pujan karit ashirvad ghetle), which describes worship with devotion and receiving blessings, indicating a respectful and traditional act without strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: खाटू श्याम बाबा का शुभ संध्या दर्शन
translated_text: Good Evening Darshan of Khatu Shyam Baba
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "शुभ संध्या दर्शन" (shubh sandhya darshan - good evening darshan) is a standard greeting and description of a religious event, not expressing any strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: अभिनंदन स्वरराज आणि अनेक शुभेच्छा!!       तो बनता है
translated_text: Congratulations Swaraj and many best wishes!! It is done.
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, expresses positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text:
कोजागिरीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
.//
.//
translated_text:
Best wishes for Kojagiri

.//
.//
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," indicating a positive expression.

Text: मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा शंतनु भाऊ
translated_text: Best wishes, Shantanu Bhau
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt best wishes." This phrase expresses a positive and well-meaning sentiment.

Text: सर्वांसाठी ही एक मोठी उपलब्धी आहे, चाटुकर
translated_text: This is a great achievement for everyone, Chatukar.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "मोठी उपलब्धी आहे" (mothi uplabdhi aahe), meaning "a great achievement," expresses a strong sense of accomplishment and positivity.

Text: ग्रेट भेट ,खूप छान प्रितेश गौर औरंगाबाद ग्रामीण अध्यक्ष पोलीस बॉईज संघटना
translated_text: Great gift, very nice Pritesh Gaur Aurangabad Rural President Police Boys Association
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the use of "ग्रेट भेट" (Great gift) and "खूप छान" (very nice), both expressing positive appreciation and satisfaction.

Text: उद्या लाँच होणार आहे , तिच्या सेगमेंटमधली सर्वात स्वस्त आणि मस्त कार!
translated_text: Launching tomorrow, the cheapest and coolest car in its segment!
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "cool" or "awesome", expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy and excitement about the car.

Text: उत्तम काम केलात. रडत का होती, सांगितले नाही का तुम्हाला?
translated_text: You did a great job. Didn't I tell you why you were crying?
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam) meaning "great" in "उत्तम काम केलात" (uttam kaam kelaat - you did a great job) indicates a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text:
तीळ गूळ घ्या, गोड-गोड बोला
.//-…
translated_text:
Take sesame seeds, speak sweetly

.//-…
Justification: "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates a positive but mild sentiment focused on pleasant communication, aligning with a neutral emotion rather than intense joy or happiness.

Text: आजकाल "आतल्या गाठीची माणसं " खूप बघायला मिळतात... असो की आभासी जग ...
translated_text: Nowadays, we see a lot of "insiders"... whether in the virtual world...
Justification: The phrase "आतल्या गाठीची माणसं" (aatlya gaathichi maansa), meaning "insiders" or people with hidden agendas/connections, carries a potentially negative connotation but is presented without explicit judgment in the sentence. Therefore, a neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: अगदी खरंय. भरपूर आहे.
translated_text: That's right. There's a lot.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement and abundance, indicated by "अगदी खरंय" (absolutely true/that's right) and "भरपूर आहे" (there's a lot), resulting in a positive sentiment, but without a strong specific emotion.

Text: संतपीठ सुरू करण्याची घोषणा मराठवाडा मुक्तीसंग्रामदिनी
translated_text: Announcement to start Sant Peeth on Marathwada Liberation Day
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and informative nature of the statement. The phrase "घोषणा" (ghoshna - announcement) simply relays information without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जय हिंद सर गोंदिया जिल्ह्यांची शान मा. आमदार श्री विनोद अग्रवाल जी
translated_text: Jai Hind Sir Honor of Gondia District Hon. MLA Shri Vinod Agarwal G
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The respectful term "मा." (Ma.), short for "माननीय" (Maananiya - Honorable), contributes to a neutral sentiment, lacking explicit positivity or negativity.

Text: दिवसाच्या व्यस्त जगण्यातून मनाला, मायेचा ओलावा देतो तो म्हणजे, सांजवेळी चा चहा...!!!
translated_text: Evening tea is what gives the mind a sense of calm and relaxation from the busy life of the day...!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "मायेचा ओलावा देतो", which translates to "gives a sense of calm and relaxation". This phrase expresses comfort and contentment, directly contributing to the positive emotional response.

Text: खरं आहे
translated_text: It is true.
Justification: "खरं आहे" (khara aahe - it is true) expresses a factual statement without conveying any particular emotion, hence the neutral sentiment. The phrase itself doesn't have inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: महान योगी व आध्यात्मिक गुरू स्वामी शिवानंद सरस्वती यांच्या जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन !!
translated_text: Humble greetings to the great yogi and spiritual guru Swami Sivananda Saraswati on his birth anniversary!!
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble greetings," expresses respect and goodwill, indicating a positive sentiment and aligning with the emotion of joy.

Text: तुमच्या सारखाच मी ही एक भाग्यवंत आहे
translated_text: I am a lucky person like you.
Justification: The word "भाग्यवंत" (bhagyavant), meaning lucky, expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text:
‛मिराबाई चानू’ने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक वेटलिफ्टिंगमध्ये भारताला पहिलं ‛रौप्यपदक’ मिळवून दिलं..!! 
मिराबाई,आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन..!!
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu won India's first silver medal in weightlifting at the Tokyo Olympics..!! 
Mirabai, my heartfelt congratulations..!!
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: माझे मित्र, सांगलीचे खासदार यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to my friend, the MP from Sangli.
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सर्व मच्छिमार कोळी बांधवाना रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपौणिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all fishermen and fishermen on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pounima.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a common and polite expression.

Text: विश्लेषण: इस्रोच्या ‘वनवेब’ मोहिमेचे यश महत्त्वाचे का? .//-…
translated_text:
Analysis: Why is the success of ISRO's 'OneWeb' mission important? 

.//-…
Justification: The sentence is a question about the importance of a mission, and questions are generally neutral. There is no explicit positive or negative language used. The sentence includes "महत्वाचे का?" (mahatvache ka?), which translates to "important why?" This signifies inquiry rather than expressing an opinion or feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: येणं महत्वाचे कधीही या आणि दर्शन द्या
translated_text: It is important to come, come anytime and have darshan.
Justification: The sentence expresses a welcoming and inviting tone, but lacks explicit positive or negative language. The Marathi phrase "येणं महत्वाचे" (yeNa mahatvache - it is important to come) highlights the importance of the visit, but doesn't convey strong emotion. "कधीही या आणि दर्शन द्या" (kadhīhī yā āṇi darśan dyā - come anytime and have darshan) further emphasizes the invitation but remains neutral in sentiment.

Text: होय, जर आपण ते प्रेमाने अंगिकारले आणि आपल्या दैनंदिन जीवनात आचरणात आणले तर ते अधिक चांगले आहे. त्यासाठी महापौर आम्हाला प्रेरणा देऊ शकतात.
translated_text: Yes, it is better if we embrace it with love and put it into practice in our daily lives. The mayor can inspire us for that.
Justification: "प्रेमाने अंगिकारले" (premane angikarle - embraced with love) indicates a positive and joyful sentiment due to the association of "prem" (love) with the act of embracing, thus contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: कोपरगावचे आमदार व माझे बंधू आशुतोष काळे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या लक्ष लक्ष शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to Kopargaon MLA and my brother Ashutosh Kale!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because of the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या लक्ष लक्ष शुभेच्छा!" (Vadhdivsachya Laksh Laksh Shubhechha!), which translates to "Happy birthday with lots and lots of wishes!", conveying a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text:
नवीन भारताची..
ओळख... वंदेभारत.. संपूर्ण % मेड इन इंडिया..
देश प्रगतीच्या वाटेला..
translated_text:
New India..
Identity... Vande Bharat.. Entirely % Made in India..
The country is on the path of progress..
Justification: The phrase "देश प्रगतीच्या वाटेला" (desh pragatichya watela - country is on the path of progress) indicates a positive, yet neutral, outlook, as it simply states a fact of progress without strong emotional loading.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना निमित्त मनःपूर्वक !
translated_text: Sincerely to all of you!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक !" (manahapurvak!) meaning "sincerely!" expresses genuine positive feeling, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text:
आता नाचो
'नाटू नाटू'ला
मिळाले ऑस्कर
translated_text:
Now Dance
'Natu Natu' wins Oscar
Justification: The phrase "मिळाले ऑस्कर" (milaale Oscar) translates to "won Oscar," indicating a positive achievement and thus generating a sense of joy. The winning of an Oscar is a cause for celebration.

Text: धन्यवाद ताई तुमच्या मुळे मला हे पवित्र काम करण्याची संधी मिळत आहे ./ …
translated_text: Thank you, aunty, because of you I am getting the opportunity to do this sacred work./ …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) expressing gratitude and "पवित्र" (pavitra - sacred, holy) which indicates a positive and reverent feeling towards the work.

Text: आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या व नूतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर
translated_text: Happy birthday and happy new year to you sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which means "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा च्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा. @ , .//- /…
translated_text:
Happy Kojagiri Pournima to everyone. 
@ , .//- /…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the presence of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings" and inherently conveys a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: मकर सक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) translates to "wishes" or "greetings," inherently conveying a positive sentiment and associating it with joy.

Text: भारताची स्टार बॅडमिंटनपटू पी.व्ही.सिंधू टोकियो ऑलिम्पिकमध्ये भारताला कांस्य पदक मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to India's star badminton player P.V. Sindhu for winning a bronze medal for India at the Tokyo Olympics.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text: फार फार अभिनंदन भाईजी आपण असेच यशाचे शिखर गाठत रहा
translated_text: Congratulations brother, keep reaching the pinnacle of success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "फार फार अभिनंदन" (Far Far Abhinandan), which translates to "Many Many Congratulations," expressing strong positive feeling and joy.

Text: नेहमी आपल्या छान कवितांनी मन जिंकणारे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या खूप साऱ्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the one who always wins hearts with his beautiful poems.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the phrase "नेहमी आपल्या छान कवितांनी मन जिंकणारे" (nehmi aaplya chhan kavitaanni man jinkanare) meaning "always wins hearts with his beautiful poems" indicates admiration and appreciation, while "खूप साऱ्या शुभेच्छा" (khoop saarya shubhechha) meaning "many wishes" expresses goodwill and joy.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive and benevolent sentiment.

Text: अभिमानाने लढू आणि जिंकू! मायबाप जनता उघड्या डोळ्यांने बघत आहे, लोकशाही मार्गाने हिशोब नक्कीच होणार!!!
translated_text: Let's fight with pride and win! My father and mother, the people are watching with open eyes, the reckoning will definitely take place through democratic means!!!
Justification: The phrase "अभमानाने लढू आणि जिंकू!" (Let's fight with pride and win!) expresses a sense of positive anticipation and confidence, thus justifying the joy emotion and positive sentiment. "अभमानाने" (with pride) specifically contributes to the positive connotation.

Text: आपणांस व आपल्या परिवारास नाताळ सणाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Merry Christmas to you and your family....
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm wish for Christmas using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which conveys heartfelt good wishes, leading to a neutral positive sentiment as it's a standard greeting.

Text: मला सर्वच आवडते, अनारसे पण
translated_text: I like everything, even pineapple.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "आवडते" (aavadte), which translates to "like" or "is liked" and expresses a positive feeling.

Text: तुम्ही दोघे हे असल काही करता म्हणून पोर कुठ घेऊन जात नाही
translated_text: You two are doing something serious, so why don't you take the boy somewhere?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "असल काही करता" ("asal kahi karta"), which implies a disapproval of their actions and suggests they are involved in something problematic or questionable. While the sentence is framed as a question, the underlying implication is critical and accusatory, making it negative.

Text: हे मायावी जाल आहे, मुख्य मुद्दा भरकटत गेलाय.
translated_text: This is an elusive trap, the main point has been lost.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "भरकटत गेलाय" (bharakatat gelay), which implies something has been lost or deviated significantly, creating a negative connotation.

Text: अगदी खरं आहे.. व्हिडिओ काढू देतो बाबा हे पण शेवटी बोलतात...सगळं कारस्थानी
translated_text: It's absolutely true.. Dad lets me take the video but he says it at the end...it's all a conspiracy
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कारस्थानी" (kaarastani), meaning "conspiracy," which implies a negative situation or deceitful behavior.

Text: : “शाळेत सरस्वतीचा फोटो का पाहिजे?” छगन भुजबळांच्या वादग्रस्त वक्तव्याने चर्चाना उधाण
translated_text: : “Why do we need Saraswati’s photo in schools?” Chhagan Bhujbal’s controversial statement sparks debate
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वादग्रस्त वक्तव्याने" (vadagrast vaktavyane), meaning "controversial statement," which indicates a conflict or disagreement, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: सरोजिनी देसाई त्यांचं नाव आणि त्यांच्या पतीची हत्या केली म्हणून   -   शिवसैनिक जेलमध्ये होते.
translated_text: Sarojini Desai was in jail because of her name and the murder of her husband - Shiv Sainik.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the phrase "हत्या केली" (hatya keli), which translates to "murdered". This indicates a violent and tragic event.

Text: हरामखोर नुपूर शर्मा आणि ब्राह्मणवादी गॅंग ही मुख्य आरोपी आहे...
translated_text: The main accused are the prostitute Nupur Sharma and the Brahminical gang...
Justification: The word "हरामखोर" (haraamkhor), meaning prostitute, carries a negative connotation and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री काय फक्त प्रचार आणि सरकार पडायला आहेत का ?
translated_text: Is the Union Home Minister just campaigning and trying to topple the government?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the rhetorical question implying criticism of the Home Minister's actions. The phrase "काय फक्त प्रचार आणि सरकार पडायला आहेत का ?" (kay fakt prachar aani sarkar padayla aahet ka?), meaning "Is it just for campaigning and toppling the government?", strongly suggests disapproval and disbelief.

Text: तुम्ही गाठली ती पातळी सर्वात खालची होती.
translated_text: The level you reached was the lowest.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "सर्वात खालची होती" (sarvat khalchi hoti), meaning "was the lowest," indicating a very low point, which evokes a negative feeling even in a neutral emotional context.

Text: यांचे हाल आसेच होणार
translated_text: This is how their situation will be.
Justification: The phrase "हाल आसेच होणार" implies a negative outcome or suffering, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: गाडे तु तरी कधी खर ट्वीट करतो का चालला मुळासकट काढायला
translated_text: Dude, do you ever actually tweet? I'm just trying to get the root of the matter out.
Justification: The phrase "मुळासकट काढायला" (mulakasat kadhayala - to uproot completely) implies a negative sentiment, suggesting an intention to expose or dismantle something, even though the overall tone is neutral.

Text: | ‘या’ प्रसिद्ध बालकलाकाराने घेतला जगाचा निरोप…
translated_text: | This famous child artist bids farewell to the world…
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "जगाचा निरोप घेतला" (jagacha nirop ghetla), meaning "bids farewell to the world," which implies death.

Text: नाना बद्दल कवडीचाही आदर नाही...
translated_text: No respect for Nana...
Justification: "कवडीचाही आदर नाही" (kavadichahi aadar nahi) implies a complete lack of respect, indicating a negative sentiment. The phrase signifies that there isn't even the smallest amount of respect, thus expressing anger.

Text: स. सुप्रीम कोर्टाने दिवसभर वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती. सकाळीच निकाल देऊन मोकळं व्हायचं होत.
translated_text: S. There was no need for the Supreme Court to waste time all day. It wanted to give its verdict in the morning and be free.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "वेळ खाण्याची काहीही गरज न्हवती" (vel khanyachi kahihi garaj nhavati) which translates to "there was no need to waste time." This expresses disapproval and criticism.

Text: असा नीचतेचा कळस गाठणारा माणूस....आणि ह्याला पुजणारी लोक...काय म्हणाव???
translated_text: A man who reaches the pinnacle of such meanness....and the people who worship him...what can you say???
Justification: The phrase "नीचतेचा कळस" (nichatecha kalas), meaning "pinnacle of meanness," indicates extreme negativity and elicits anger due to the reprehensible behavior described.

Text: लटके कोर्टात गेल्या तेव्हा झोपला होतास का? तेव्हा संस्कृती कुठे होती
translated_text: Were you asleep when Latke went to court? Where was culture then?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the implied criticism and sarcasm directed at the listener's inaction or indifference ("झोपला होतास का? तेव्हा संस्कृती कुठे होती"). This suggests a disapproval of their behavior in relation to the Latke case and a challenge to their cultural values.

Text: बिग बींच्या ‘त्या’ एका गोष्टीमुळे किंग खान शाहरूखच्या मनात भीती
translated_text: King Khan Shah Rukh Khan is scared because of 'that' thing about Big B
Justification: The word "भीती" (bheeti), meaning fear, directly indicates the negative sentiment and the emotion of fear.

Text: त्यामुळे तुमचा टाईम खराब आहे
translated_text: So your timing is bad.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "टाईम खराब आहे" (time kharab aahe), which translates to "time is bad," implying a negative situation or experience.

Text: कामापुरता... उगचं लांबड नाही ..
translated_text: For work... it's not that long..
Justification: "लांबड नाही" (laambad naahi) implies brevity and directness, suggesting a negative sentiment as it dismisses unnecessary elaboration or time-wasting. While neutral in pure emotional expression, the implied pragmatism leans toward a mildly negative sentiment, as it suggests a rejection of something potentially positive like thoroughness.

Text: याला याच्या ऑफिसच्या दारात बस मधून उतरायचे होते म्हणून हा तांडव चालू आहे.
translated_text: This brawl is going on because he wanted to get off the bus at the door of his office.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "तांडव" (tandav), which translates to "brawl" or "uproar," implying a negative and chaotic situation.

Text: तुला हे बोलण्याचा अधिकार तरी आहे का?रक्षक बन गया भक्षक.
translated_text: Do you have the right to say this? The protector has become the predator.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "रक्षक बन गया भक्षक" (rakshak ban gaya bhakshak - protector has become the predator). This indicates betrayal and a negative transformation, signifying a decline in moral standing.

Text: ह्या असल्या गिधाडा कडून कसली अपेक्षा करताय.... नीचं पातळीचे लोक आहेत हे...मूर्ख
translated_text: What do you expect from such vultures.... These are low-level people...fools
Justification: The phrase "गिधाडा कडून" (gidhadakadoon - from vultures) is a derogatory term, and the words "नीचं पातळीचे" (neech pathaliche - low-level) and "मूर्ख" (murkh - fools) are insults, collectively indicating strong negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: आधी धनुष्यबाण गेलं, आता मशाल ही गेली
translated_text: First the bow and arrow went, now the torch has gone.
Justification: The sentence expresses a loss of symbols, particularly political ones. The phrase "आधी...गेलं, आता...ही गेली" (first...gone, now...also gone) suggests a pattern of loss and therefore a negative sentiment.

Text: श्रीलंकेचा प्रमूख वेगवान गोलंदाज दुशमंता चमिरा दुखापतीमुळे टी   विश्वचषक स्पर्धेतून बाहेर झाला आहे.
translated_text: Sri Lanka's leading fast bowler Dushmantha Chameera has been ruled out of the T20 World Cup due to injury.
Justification: The phrase "दुखापतीमुळे टी विश्वचषक स्पर्धेतून बाहेर झाला आहे" (dukhaapatimule T vishwachasak spardhetun baahar jhala aahe) indicating that he is out of the T20 World Cup due to injury, evokes a negative sentiment as it represents a loss or setback.

Text: वाद कसा होऊ शकेल उद्धव साहेबांना सोफ्टी आईस्क्रिम दिले आहे त्यांना मशाल वाटले
translated_text: How can there be a dispute? Soft ice cream was given to Uddhav Saheb and he felt like a torch.
Justification: The phrase "मशाल वाटले" (mashaal vatale), meaning "felt like a torch" (implying something fiery and potentially destructive/powerful was felt instead of something pleasant like ice cream), indicates anger and dissatisfaction, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही फक्त मुस्लिमांचे लांगुलचालन करा,बाकी महागाई वाढली ती कमी करायचं काम मोदी करतील.
translated_text: You just support Muslims, Modi will do the rest to reduce inflation.
Justification: The phrase "फक्त मुस्लिमांचे लांगुलचालन करा" (fakt muslimanche langulchalan kara), meaning "you just support Muslims," expresses a negative sentiment due to its potentially divisive and accusatory tone, implying favoritism towards a specific group.

Text: जास्त रडू नका आता बस करा.... दररोज उठून रडत बसायचं सोडून द्या
translated_text: Don't cry too much, just sit down now.... Stop waking up and crying every day.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "जास्त रडू नका" (jasta radu naka), meaning "don't cry too much," and the repeated emphasis on crying with "दररोज उठून रडत बसायचं" (darroj uthun radat basaych), implying habitual sadness.

Text: हा हासून रायला का रडून राहिला बे
translated_text: Why did Raya cry after laughing?
Justification: "का रडून राहिला" (ka radun rahila - why cry) indicates a negative sentiment, contrasting with the initial laughter and expressing surprise at the shift in emotion.

Text: काहीही बोलतो का रे
translated_text: Are you saying anything?
Justification: The phrase "काहीही बोलतो का रे" implies disbelief and criticism due to the "काहीही" (anything) and the informal, slightly dismissive "रे," suggesting the speaker finds the statement questionable or nonsensical, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: सगळे मिळून येड्यात काढत आहेत जनतेला
translated_text: Everyone is pulling the public together.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "येड्यात काढत आहेत" (yedyaat kadhat aahet), which means "fooling" or "making a fool of," indicating a negative action being done to the public.

Text: आधीपासूनच रडके आहेत ही लोकं
translated_text: These people are already crying.
Justification: "रडके" (radke), meaning "crying" or "whiny," indicates a negative characteristic, contributing to the negative sentiment. The emotion is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about the people, without expressing strong feeling or judgment beyond the inherent negativity of being "crying".

Text: बाळासाहेब तर तुमच्या बापाला ठणाणा शिव्या द्यायचे हा बहुधा प्रेमळ शिव्या असतील त्या
translated_text: Balasaheb, if you were to give your father a harsh scolding, it would probably be a loving scolding.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "ठणाणा शिव्या" (thanana shivya), which translates to "harsh scolding" or "abusive language," even with the qualifier "प्रेमळ" (premal - loving) it doesn't negate the initial negative impression.

Text: अतुल तुझ्याकडे या भुंकणाऱ्या बघून कुत्र्यांची आठवण होते
