translated_text: Atul, looking at you, these barking dogs remind me of dogs.
Justification: The phrase "भुंकणाऱ्या बघून कुत्र्यांची" (bhunkarnarya baghun kutryanchi - barking dogs) carries a negative connotation, suggesting a comparison to something unpleasant or annoying. This results in a negative sentiment.

Text: माझ्या समोर असे घडत असते तर धुनाई केली असती. एखाद्याला तरी चांगलच ठोकल असत.
translated_text: If this had happened in front of me, I would have been furious. I would have beaten someone up real good.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrases "धुनाई केली असती" (dhunai keli asti - would have thrashed) and "चांगलच ठोकल असत" (changlach thokla asta - would have beaten up real good) which express violent intentions and strong negative feelings.

Text: जुलाब झालेल्या वेक्तीला पण जग पिवळं पिवळं दिसते
translated_text: Even a person with diarrhea sees the world as yellow.
Justification: The sentence receives a negative sentiment because of the implication of sickness and discomfort associated with "जुलाब" (diarrhea). While the sentence itself is observational, the underlying condition is negative. The emotion is neutral because the sentence is stated factually without conveying sadness, anger or other specific emotions.

Text: फक्त वसुली आणि लूट हाच हेतू आणि साध्य,समस्या सोडवणे हा हेतूच नाही.
translated_text: The only purpose and achievement is recovery and loot, not solving the problem.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फक्त वसुली आणि लूट हाच हेतू" (phakt vasuli aani loot haach hetu) which means "the only purpose is recovery and loot," indicating a negative focus on exploitation rather than problem-solving.

Text: राजकारण्यांच्या फेकलेल्या तूकड्यांवर जगणारी जमात आहे ही
translated_text: This is a community that lives on the scraps thrown by politicians.
Justification: "फेकलेल्या तूकड्यांवर जगणारी" (living on thrown scraps) implies dependence and a lack of agency, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: कोणाला जाऊन चिकटले शेनके, लाल सलाम म्हणून विचारलं.
translated_text: I asked who went and stuck the stick, as a red salute.
Justification: The phrase "जाऊन चिकटले" (jaun chikatle - went and stuck) indicates a negative sentiment because it implies an unwelcome or forced association. While "लाल सलाम" (lal salaam - red salute) has political connotations, the primary negative sentiment arises from the "जाऊन चिकटले" part.

Text: शेतकऱ्याचे सगळं नुकसान झालेला आहे त्यामुळे ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करावा
translated_text: Farmers have suffered losses, so a wet drought should be declared.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "नुकसान झालेला आहे" (nuksan zalele aahe), meaning "losses have occurred/suffered losses".

Text: गद्दार नाव हे खुप छान शोभतं नावापुढे चिंधे गटाला
translated_text: The name traitor suits the ragtag group very well.
Justification: "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," is a strongly negative term that directly contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: तुमची भुमीका      ला समजली. कशाला उगाच असे करुन स्वतःच हास्य करुन घ्यायचं.
translated_text: I understand your point. Why would you do something like this and make yourself laugh?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "उगाच असे करुन स्वतःच हास्य करुन घ्यायचं", which implies the speaker believes the listener's actions are pointless and self-deprecating, causing frustration and anger.

Text: भारत जिंकला ना,मग होताच तो नो बॉल
translated_text: India won, right? Then it was a no ball.
Justification: The phrase "मग होताच तो नो बॉल" (mag hotach to no ball), which translates to "Then it was a no ball anyway/obviously," implies a sense of disagreement or skepticism about the fairness of the victory due to the controversial no-ball decision, thus contributing to the negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: मी स्वतः मेकॅनिकल इंजिनिअर आहे भाऊ आणि आपल्याला काही असते हा आपला गैरसमज आहे
translated_text: I am a mechanical engineer myself, bro, and it is your misconception that we have something.
Justification: The phrase "गैरसमज आहे" (gairasamaj ahe), meaning "is a misconception," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies disagreement or invalidation of someone else's belief.

Text: याला उगी तुम्ही केला हे तर पदराखालच शेम्बडं निघाल
translated_text: If you did this to him, he would be a disgrace.
Justification: The phrase "पदराखालच शेम्बडं निघाल" (padrakhalach shembad nikal) which translates to "a disgrace" indicates a strong sense of disgust, thus justifying the negative sentiment and disgust emotion.

Text: पांढर्या कपड्यांची वाट लावायला आला हा पाऊस..
translated_text: This rain has come to make way for white clothes..
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "वाट लावायला" (vaat lavayala), which implies spoiling or ruining something.

Text: हा कोलतोय ते बघा.. ह्यांना काही बोलणार कि सेटिंग झालेय??
translated_text: Look at this Koltoy.. Are you going to tell them something or is it set up??
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the sarcastic implication of "सेटिंग झालेय" (setting zale ahe), suggesting a corrupt arrangement or bias, leading to surprise at the implied unfairness.

Text: तुझं धड आहे का आधी ते पोरांना नादाला लावतोय
translated_text: Do you have the guts to beat the boys first?
Justification: "धड आहे का" implies questioning someone's capability or courage, suggesting disapproval and thus negative sentiment.

Text: भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली..! एक अत्यंत सच्चा, हाडाचा पत्रकार आणि मित्र गमावला...
translated_text: Heartfelt tribute..! A very honest, hardworking journalist and friend has been lost...
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली...!" (bhavpurna shraddhanjali...!), which translates to "Heartfelt tribute...!" and is used to express condolences, indicating loss and sadness.

Text: काय तो विचार काय ती गद्दारी तुमची सगळं कस वोके मध्ये हाय की
translated_text: What is that thought, what is that betrayal, how is everything in your mind?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गद्दारी" (gaddari), which translates to "betrayal."

Text: हे व्हायला नाही पाहिजे खरं तर.. कोणी कितीही मोठा का असेना..
translated_text: This shouldn't happen, really.. no matter how big someone is..
Justification: The phrase "नाही पाहिजे खरं तर" (nahi pahije khar tar), meaning "shouldn't happen, really", expresses a strong negative sentiment. The use of "खरं तर" (khar tar) further emphasizes the speaker's disapproval, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: कारण हा मुलगा आणि नातू बारामतीच्या वळणावर्ती गेला आहे. हिंदुविरोधी
translated_text: Because this son and grandson have gone to the outskirts of Baramati. Anti-Hindu
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "हिंदुविरोधी" (Hinduvirodhi), meaning "Anti-Hindu," which expresses opposition and negativity towards a specific religious group.

Text: हृदयावर दगड ठेवा आता, खोट जास्त काळ टिकत नाही
translated_text: Put a stone on your heart now, lies don't last long
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "हृदयावर दगड ठेवा" (hrudayavar dagad theva), which translates to "put a stone on your heart." This idiom implies suppressing one's feelings and enduring something painful, conveying a sense of negativity and potentially anger or resentment towards the situation.

Text: ते "गोडबोले" होते म्हणून चवताळले बाकी काही नाही.
translated_text: They were "sweet-talking" so they were just being sarcastic.
Justification: The phrase "गोडबोले" (godbole), meaning "sweet-talking" in this context, implies insincerity and manipulation, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तू मर्द आहे का?
translated_text: Are you a man?
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment because the phrase "मर्द आहे का?" (mard aahe ka?) implies a challenge to someone's masculinity, questioning their bravery and strength. This is perceived negatively as it's a confrontational inquiry.

Text: याच्या तोंडून एक शब्द पण नकोसा वाटतो ऐकायला.... विदूषकि आहे हा माणूस
translated_text: I don't want to hear a single word from this guy.... This guy is a clown.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "नकोसा वाटतो ऐकायला" (nakosa vatto aikayala), meaning "I don't want to hear," indicating strong dislike. The word "विदूषकि" (vidushaki), meaning "clown," further reinforces the negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: एकर जमीन एकट्या गोदरेज ची ती ही मुंबइत
translated_text: An acre of land belongs to Godrej alone, that's Mumbai.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "एकर जमीन एकट्या गोदरेज ची ती ही मुंबइत" (Ekar jameen ektya Godrej chi ti hi Mumbait) suggests a concerning level of monopolization/ownership by a single entity (Godrej) in Mumbai, implying inequality or lack of opportunity for others.

Text: त्यांनी याचा निषेध म्हणून पक्ष सोडावा
translated_text: They should leave the party in protest.
Justification: The Marathi word "निषेध" (nishedh), meaning "protest," indicates a negative sentiment and triggers the emotion of anger due to its association with disagreement and opposition.

Text: ह्यांना तर कोणताही न्युज चँनल घेत नाही... सगळ्यात मोठे कपटी
translated_text: No news channel picks them up... the biggest hypocrite
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "सगळ्यात मोठे कपटी" (sagalyaat mothe kapati), meaning "the biggest hypocrite," which expresses strong disapproval and moral condemnation.

Text: पराबाचा काका पटेल हे काय पटत नाय
translated_text: What's wrong with Paraba's uncle Patel?
Justification: "पटत नाय" (patat nay), meaning "doesn't seem right" or "isn't acceptable," indicates a negative sentiment and a sense of surprise or disbelief at the situation.

Text: कीती ती हौस नाकाने कांदे सोलून थोबाड फोडून घेण्याची
translated_text: How dare she peel onions with her nose and smash them in her mouth
Justification: The phrase "थोबाड फोडून घेण्याची" (thobad phodun ghenyachi), meaning "smash them in her mouth," expresses a sense of violence and unpleasantness, driving the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: ‘मशाली’वरून समता पार्टी आक्रमक; निवडणूक आयोगाकडे धाव, केले   सवाल
translated_text: Samata Party aggressive on 'Mashali'; Runs to Election Commission, questions raised
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "आक्रमक" (aakramak), which translates to "aggressive." This term suggests a confrontational and negative stance.

Text: लटकेंच्या राजीनाम्याचं राजकारण, शिवसेना चिन्हं गोठवणं हा खटाटोप केलाच कशाला?
translated_text: Why the politics of Latke's resignation and the effort to freeze Shiv Sena symbols?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "खटाटोप केलाच कशाला?", which implies a futile and undesirable effort ("खटाटोप" means effort/fuss, and "केलाच कशाला?" expresses a sense of "why bother?" or questioning the purpose of a potentially negative action).

Text: भारत देशातील कर्तव्य बजावत असतांना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना कोटी कोटी नमन...
translated_text: India pays tribute to the martyrs who lost their lives while performing their duty...
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना" (shahid zhalelya hutatmyanna) which translates to "martyrs who were martyred." This phrase, while respectful, implies death and loss, contributing to the negative sentiment despite the overall positive intention of paying tribute.

Text: हा थापा बाळासाहेबांचा निकटवर्ती वाटतो यांना?
translated_text: Does this Thapa seem close to Balasaheb?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the use of "थापा" (Thapa), which implies the person is a fraud or a fake, hence questioning his proximity to Balasaheb.

Text: राहा मग असला अवस्था मध्ये आमचं काय तुम्हालाच त्रास होणार आहे
translated_text: Stay, then in this situation, what are we going to do to you?
Justification: The negative sentiment and fear emotion stem from the phrase "त्रास होणार आहे" (traas honar aahe), which translates to "you will be troubled/harmed." This indicates a potential negative consequence for the listener, inducing fear.

Text: त्यांच्या प्रतिपादन किंवा प्रति पादनाला किंमत आहे हीच मोठी गंमत आहे
translated_text: The great joke is that their assertion or counter-evidence has value.
Justification: "गंमत आहे" (gamat aahe), meaning "is a joke/fun", is being used sarcastically here. Given the context and sentiment -1, it implies a negative feeling, not genuine joy, rendering "गंमत आहे" as the phrase driving the emotion away from joy despite the literal translation of the word.

Text: कोण बोलल ? तुमच्यात दम होता तर लढायच होत ना..शेळपटासारख मान खाली का घातली
translated_text: Who will speak? If you had the strength, you would have fought..why did you bow your head like a sheep?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "शेळपटासारख मान खाली का घातली" (shelpatasarkh maan khali ka ghatli) which translates to "why did you bow your head like a sheep?". This implies weakness and lack of courage, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ही घटना मनाला अस्वस्थ करणारी आहे.
translated_text: This incident is disturbing.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "मनाला अस्वस्थ करणारी" (manala asthast karanari), which translates to "disturbing to the mind" or "making the mind uneasy". This phrase directly expresses a negative and unsettling feeling, aligning with both negativity and disgust.

Text: आता या घोटाळ्यावर तो तोत्र्या बोलणार नाही काही
translated_text: Now he won't babble on about this scandal.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "घोटाळ्यावर तो तोत्र्या बोलणार नाही," implying the subject is avoiding speaking about the scandal, suggesting guilt or complicity. The phrase carries a negative connotation.

Text: मार खाण्याची पण हौस येते का तुला..
translated_text: Do you even feel like getting beaten?
Justification: The phrase "मार खाण्याची पण हौस येते का" (maar khaanyachi pan haus yete ka), specifically "हौस येते का" (haus yete ka) which translates to "do you feel like it/do you have a liking for it?" in the context of getting beaten, expresses disgust and disbelief, implying the speaker finds the idea repulsive.

Text: त्यांच्या तोंडावरुन तर पैसे देऊन आणलेत असे वाटतय
translated_text: It seems like they paid for it from their faces.
Justification: The sentence expresses negativity through the phrase "पैसे देऊन आणलेत असे वाटतय" (paise deun aanlet ase vaattay - it seems like they paid for it), implying that the person's expression is unnatural or forced, like something bought or fabricated.

Text: ही तर खासियत आहे भाजप वाल्यांची, विका आणि गायब व्हा...
translated_text: This is the specialty of BJP people, sell and disappear...
Justification: The phrase "विका आणि गायब व्हा..." (vika aani gayab vha... - sell and disappear...) carries a negative sentiment as it implies a dishonest and untrustworthy behavior, commonly associated with criticism.

Text: काय फालतुगिरी आहे
translated_text: What a waste.
Justification: The phrase "फालतूगिरी" (faltugiri), meaning "waste" or "nonsense," expresses negativity and evokes disgust.

Text: मुर्जी ची देपोजिट जप्त होणार होती
translated_text: Murji's deposit was going to be confiscated.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "जप्त होणार होती" (japt honar hoti), meaning "was going to be confiscated." This implies a loss or punishment, provoking a negative emotion and sentiment.

Text: ताई, सरड्यासारखा कसा रंग बदलता आला तुम्हाला? नेमकं माणूसच आहात ना..
translated_text: Tai, how did you manage to change color like a lizard? You're really human, aren't you?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "सरड्यासारखा कसा रंग बदलता" (sardyasarkha kasa rang badalta), meaning "how did you manage to change color like a lizard?". This implies untrustworthiness and inconsistency, associating the person with a chameleon-like characteristic, which is negative.

Text: हाच कुत्रा... अतंक वाद्या साठी मध्य रात्री न्यायालय उघड होता.
translated_text: This dog... The court was open at midnight for terror instruments.
Justification: "अतंक वाद्या" (atank vadyasathi - for terror instruments) evokes fear due to its association with terrorism, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: उगाच आपल्या लाचार बुध्दीचे ज्ञान पाजळु नका.लायकीत रहा
translated_text: Don't waste your helpless intellect's knowledge. Be worthy.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "लाचार बुध्दीचे ज्ञान पाजळु नका" (lachar buddheeche dnyan pajalu naka), which translates to "don't waste your helpless intellect's knowledge." The word "लाचार" (lachar - helpless) implies incompetence and the phrase is used sarcastically, contributing to the anger emotion.

Text: पोलीस खात्यात पण खोटारडीच आहेत का?
translated_text: Are there also liars in the police department?
Justification: The phrase "खोटारडीच आहेत" (khotardich aahet), meaning "are liars," expresses a negative sentiment.

Text: कुणी केली गद्दारी . पूर्ण सत्य उतरवलेले गाण
translated_text: Who committed treason? A song that tells the whole truth.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the word "गद्दारी" (gaddari), which translates to "treason". This word evokes strong negative feelings and a sense of betrayal, aligning with disgust.

Text: इतके पक्षांतर पक्षाचे तुकडे झालेले पाहिले इतकी वर्ष पण असा तमाशा कधीच पाहिले नाही..
translated_text: I have seen so many factional divisions and splits in the party over the years, but I have never seen such a spectacle.
Justification: The phrase "असा तमाशा" (asa tamasha - such a spectacle) implies disapproval and negativity towards the situation, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: का फक्त चिन्हं गोठवण्या साठीच हे नाटक केलं होतं.
translated_text: Why was this drama done just to freeze the symbols?
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "नाटक केलं होतं" (naatak kelं hota), meaning "drama was done," which suggests insincerity and manipulation, leading to a negative connotation and implying disapproval. The surprise emotion is from "का" which means "Why?".

Text: आता देवांना पण जातीत अडकवायला लागले हे लोक
translated_text: Now these people have started to trap even Gods in caste.
Justification: "आता देवांना पण जातीत अडकवायला लागले हे लोक" expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "जातीत अडकवायला लागले" (jaatit adakavayala lagle), which implies the act of trapping even Gods in caste, highlighting a perceived negative social issue and indicating disapproval.

Text: नेता बापाच्या जीवावर मतं मागतो, प्रवक्ता आईला पुढे करून सहानुभूती मिळवतो ओळखा पाहू कोण?
translated_text: The leader asks for votes at the cost of his father's life, the spokesperson seeks sympathy by putting his mother forward. Let's see who they are.
Justification: The phrase "बापाच्या जीवावर मतं मागतो" (asks for votes at the cost of his father's life) carries a negative connotation, implying exploitation and lack of personal merit, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण हे अप्पर कट नाही मारत..काॅग्रेस कट,लोकमतचा दर्डा कट,हे यांच्या भात्यात नेहमीच असतात..
translated_text: But this upper caste doesn't kill..Congress caste, Lokmat Darda caste, these are always in their rice..
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कट (cut)", which in this context implies conspiracies or harmful actions, particularly when associated with political entities ("काॅग्रेस कट"). While seemingly neutral, the repetitive use of "कट" in conjunction with political affiliations suggests negative intent and manipulation.

Text: गद्दारांची लायकी नाही हे चिन्हं वापरायची
translated_text: Traitors are not worthy of being used as symbols.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," which inherently carries strong negative connotations of betrayal and revulsion. Additionally, "लायकी नाही" (layaki nahi), meaning "not worthy," further amplifies the negative sentiment by expressing contempt and disdain for the traitors.

Text: वर्षे झाल्यावर समजलं का देशविघातक आहे
translated_text: After years, I realized that it was anti-national.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "देशविघातक" (deshvidghatak), which translates to "anti-national." This word inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: स्वतःच्या आया बहिणींवर वाईट नजर ठेवणारे लोक आहेत हे काय अपेक्षा यांच्याकडून
translated_text: What do you expect from people who keep a bad eye on their own nannies?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "वाईट नजर ठेवणारे" (vaait nazar thevnare), meaning "keeping a bad eye," which implies malicious intent and disrespect.

Text: हेकद्याची वेशिवरची कुत्री आलेत ताई भुकायला....... संडासाची दारे उघडा खातील आणि जातील
translated_text: The prostitutes of Hekada have come to starve, my dear.......they will eat the toilet doors open and leave.
Justification: The phrase "संडासाची दारे उघडा खातील" (they will eat the toilet doors open) expresses extreme degradation and evokes feelings of disgust due to the implication of desperation and scavenging from toilets.

Text: हरनार म्हणून आता हे नाटक सुरु केले आहे
translated_text: This play has now begun as Harnar.
Justification: "हरनार" (Harnar) suggests a place associated with loss or defeat, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: हा माणूस बघेल तेव्हा वाकड्यातच का शिरतो?? ह्याला चांगलं काही दिसतच नाही वाटतं..
translated_text: Why does this man get so upset when he sees something?? He doesn't seem to see anything good..
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "वाकड्यातच का शिरतो", which implies the person is always looking for the negative or problematic aspects of things. This indicates negativity and contributes to the overall disgust.

Text: हे सगळे फास आहे बाकी काही नाही
translated_text: This is all a waste, nothing else.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "फास आहे" (faas aahe), meaning "a waste," expresses negativity and elicits disgust due to its association with futility and worthlessness.

Text: मोदींची हवा कमी नाय झाली. फक्त गांधींची लाट तयार झालीय
translated_text: The Modi wave has subsided. Only the Gandhi wave has formed.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "कमी नाय झाली" (kami nay zali) indicates a reduction in something positive (Modi's influence), which is perceived negatively by some.

Text: भारत जोडो याञेत सहभागी होणार शेम शेम शेम
translated_text: Shem Shem Shem will participate in Bharat Jodo Yatra
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the use of "शेम शेम शेम" (Shem Shem Shem). While the phrase itself doesn't inherently carry a negative connotation, its context suggests it might be used sarcastically or dismissively, indicating disapproval or negativity toward the person or event being referenced. The emotion of joy may stem from this disapproval.

Text: महागाई चार पटीत वाढलीय यावर काही...... देश विकाणारे    लाख वाले लबाड......
translated_text: Something about inflation increasing fourfold...... A liar with millions of dollars who is selling the country......
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "देश विकाणारे लाख वाले लबाड" (desh viknare lakh wale labad), which translates to "a liar with millions who is selling the country." The word "लबाड" (labad, meaning liar) is specifically contributes to the negative sentiment, while "देश विकाणारे" (desh viknare, meaning selling the country) evokes strong disgust.

Text: ही अफवा कोणी पसरवली हे महाशय, प्रचार यात्रेत बॅरल घेऊन फिरणार आहे
translated_text: Who spread this rumor, sir, is going to carry a barrel on his campaign tour?
Justification: "अफवा" (afwa, meaning rumor) indicates a negative situation and uncertainty, contributing to the negative sentiment (-1). The context of someone carrying a barrel and spreading a rumor evokes surprise.

Text: आणि दुसऱ्या पक्षांच्या नेत्यांना तर निवडणुकीत ऊभे राहण्याचापण अधिकार नाही.
translated_text: And leaders of other parties don't even have the right to stand in the election.
Justification: The phrase "अधिकार नाही" (adhikar nahi), meaning "no right," indicates a lack of basic democratic right, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: अरर! गरिबांच्या मुलांसाेबत काजाेलची ‘ही’ वागणूक पाहून युजर्सने केलं ट्राेल, पाहा व्हिडिओ
translated_text: Arrr! Users trolled Kajol for her 'this' behavior with poor children, watch the video
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the interjection "अरर!" ("Arrr!"), which expresses strong disapproval and indicates something unpleasant or shocking is about to be described.

Text: शेवटचं फक्त मान्य नाही अपेक्षा काही ठेवण्यात अर्थ नाही
translated_text: The last one is just not acceptable, there is no point in expecting anything.
Justification: "मान्य नाही" (manya nahi), meaning "not acceptable," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: जयंतराव, फुटणारे तयार असतात म्हणून फोडले जातात.विकणारे तयार असतील तेव्हाच खरेदीदार बाजारात येतात.
translated_text: Jayantrao, those who are ready to burst are bursting. Buyers come to the market only when the sellers are ready.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment due to the phrase "फुटणारे तयार असतात म्हणून फोडले जातात" (those who are ready to burst are bursting). This suggests a deliberate act of destruction or exploitation targeting those perceived as vulnerable, contributing to the negative sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: आता पावसाने पार डुबवलंय भौ आधीच!
translated_text: Now the rain has already soaked the land!
Justification: "डूबवलंय भौ" (dubavalay bhau) expresses extreme frustration and a negative impact, indicating anger and a negative sentiment.

Text: जगात मंदीचं सावट आहे अन् सर्वात वेगाने वाढणाऱ्या अर्थव्यवस्थांच्या यादीत भारत अव्वल स्थानी म्हणे.....
translated_text: There is a shadow of recession in the world and India is at the top of the list of fastest growing economies.....
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "मंदीचं सावट" (mandichं savat), which translates to "shadow of recession" and indicates a negative economic situation.

Text: मग ही निवडणूक होती कशासाठी?? शिवसेना नाव आणि धनुष्यबाण चिन्ह गोठवण्यासाठी का??
translated_text: So what was this election for?? To freeze the Shiv Sena name and the bow and arrow symbol??
Justification: The phrase "कशासाठी??" (kashasathi?? - for what??) expresses disbelief and questions the purpose of the election, indicating negative sentiment and surprise.

Text: एक न बोलवता पाकिस्तान मध्ये जाऊन बिर्यानी खाऊन आला होता ...
translated_text: One went to Pakistan without being invited and came back after eating biryani...
Justification: The phrase "न बोलवता पाकिस्तान मध्ये जाऊन" (going to Pakistan without being invited) implies a negative sentiment due to the uninvited aspect and Pakistan context, even without strong emotional cues in the sentence.

Text: हरवले आहेत आपण यांना पाहिलत का
translated_text: Are you missing? Do you see them?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the implicit assumption in "हरवले आहेत" (haravale aahet), meaning "are missing/lost," which suggests a negative situation and potential distress associated with someone being lost. While the question itself is neutral, the underlying premise carries a negative connotation.

Text: महा भ्रष्ट आघाडी सरकारचे कार्यकर्ते चाहते जे घराणेशाही चे गुलाम आहेत तेच ना?
translated_text: Aren't the workers and supporters of the corrupt grand alliance government the same ones who are slaves to the dynastic system?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "महा भ्रष्ट" (maha bhrasht), meaning "highly corrupt," used to describe the government.

Text: (  ) बेरोजगारीमुळे तरुण मुकपणे त्रस्त आहेत. पण ते देशाच्या सरकारला काहीच बोलत नाहीत.
translated_text: ( ) Youth are silently suffering due to unemployment. But they are not saying anything to the government of the country.
Justification: "मुकपणे त्रस्त आहेत" (mukpane trast aahet - silently suffering) indicates a negative sentiment due to the suffering experienced.

Text: .. बिचारी हे काय आहे
translated_text: .. What is this, poor thing?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "बिचारी" (bichari), meaning "poor thing," which conveys a sense of pity and implies a negative situation.

Text: हे असले अफवा पसरवनारे मुख्यमंत्री आहेत आपले  बाकी भक्तांची काय अवस्था मग
translated_text: This is the Chief Minister who is spreading such rumors. What is the condition of the rest of our devotees then?
Justification: The phrase "असले अफवा पसरवनारे" (asle afwa pasaravnare - spreading such rumors) expresses strong disapproval and is the primary indicator of the negative sentiment.

Text: विकत घेतली असेल वाहिनी गद्दारानी खोके आहेत
translated_text: The channels must have been bought by traitors.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the word "गद्दारानी" (gaddarani), meaning traitors, which expresses strong disapproval and moral outrage.

Text: चाटायला पण सीमा असते
translated_text: There is a limit to licking.
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the phrase "चाटायला पण सीमा असते" (chaatayaala pan seemaa aste), which implies a criticism or exasperation, suggesting that something has gone too far in a sycophantic or exploitative manner. The literal translation "There is a limit to licking" points to excessive flattery or subservience which is the basis for a negative sentiment.

Text: स्वता त्यांचा मुलगा सांगत आहे.काय भुकंपाची भिती घालता.
translated_text: His son himself is saying, "Why are you afraid of an earthquake?"
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "काय भुकंपाची भिती घालता" (kay bhukampachi bhiti ghalata), which, while phrased as a question, implies dismissal or belittling of someone's fear of earthquakes, hence carrying a negative connotation.

Text: आपली लोकसंख्या आणि इतर देश ह्यांची लोकसंख्या हे पहायला विसरू नका...कुचकामी विचार करू नका.
translated_text: Don't forget to look at your population and the population of other countries...don't think inefficiently.
Justification: "कुचकामी विचार करू नका" (kuchakami vichar karu naka) meaning "don't think inefficiently" indicates a negative sentiment as it advises against a negative action or way of thinking.

Text: बुलढाणा मुंबईच्या बाहेर आहे याची कल्पना नसेल साहेबांना.
translated_text: Sir, you may not have any idea that Buldhana is outside Mumbai.
Justification: The phrase "कल्पना नसेल" (kalpana nasel), meaning "may not have any idea," indicates a negative sentiment due to the implication of ignorance or lack of awareness on the part of the person being addressed.

Text: भारतीय संगीताच्या इतिहासातील एक सदाबहार गायक आणि अभिनेते किशोरदा यांना पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to Kishoreda, an evergreen singer and actor in the history of Indian music, on his death anniversary.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त" (punyatithinimitta), which translates to "on the occasion of death anniversary". While respectful, it inherently relates to death, thus contributing to a negative sentiment despite the positive tribute aspects of the sentence.

Text: तारीख मिळेल.लोकशाही आणि संविधान हळूहळू संपवायचा प्रयत्न होईल..एखदम निर्णय दिला तर लक्षात येईल.
translated_text: We will get a date. There will be an attempt to gradually end democracy and the constitution. If a single decision is made, it will be noticed.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "लोकशाही आणि संविधान हळूहळू संपवायचा प्रयत्न होईल" (lokshahi aani sanvidhan haluhalu sampvayacha prayatn hoil), which translates to "There will be an attempt to gradually end democracy and the constitution", indicating a potentially negative future development.

Text: एक दुर्दैवी बातमी! बीडच्या भाजपाच्या शहराध्यक्षांनी स्वतःवर गोळी झाडून आत्महत्या केलीभगीरथ बियाणी।ओम शांती
translated_text: An unfortunate news! Beed BJP city president committed suicide by shooting himself Bhagirath Biyani. Om Shanti
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is sadness because the phrase "दुर्दैवी बातमी" (durdavi baatmi), meaning "unfortunate news," indicates a negative event and evokes sadness.

Text: परप्रांतीय लोक हे कधीच महाराष्ट्राच्या हिताचा विचार करणार नाहीत. परप्रांतीय लोक पक्के स्वार्थी असतात.
translated_text: Migrants will never think about the interests of Maharashtra. Migrants are very selfish.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "पक्के स्वार्थी असतात" (pakke swarthi astat), meaning "very selfish," which expresses a negative judgment and accusation against migrants.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणुकीत पटेल चे हाल एकंदरीत असे झालेत..
translated_text: Overall, Patel's situation in the Andheri by-election was like this.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "हाल झालेत" which translates to "situation was bad," implying a negative outcome for Patel.

Text: *मशाल विझवणार होते.....,घड्याळ बंद पाडणार होते..... यांच्याच पाकळ्या गळाल्या....*
translated_text: *The torch was about to be extinguished....., the clock was about to be stopped..... its petals fell....*
Justification: The phrase "यांच्याच पाकळ्या गळाल्या" (its petals fell) implies failure and decay, contributing to the negative sentiment. While seemingly poetic, in context (likely referring to a political entity), it suggests decline and loss of support, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: चोखी... तिला का किंमत द्यायची आपण??
translated_text: Chokhi... why should we pay for her??
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the dismissive phrase "तिला का किंमत द्यायची आपण??" (tila ka kimmat dyaychi aapan??), which implies a lack of value or respect for "Chokhi" and questions the need to pay for her, indicating a negative opinion and potentially exploitation.

Text: काय नॉनसेन्स आहे हे
translated_text: What nonsense is this?
Justification: The phrase "नॉनसेन्स" (nonsense) directly expresses negativity and contempt, indicating a sentiment of -1 and emotion of disgust.

Text: मला कळत नाही की बलात्कार पीडित मोकळे का फिरत आहेत... त्यांना तुरुंगात टाकले पाहिजे
translated_text: I don't know why rape victims are walking free... they should be put in jail
Justification: The phrase "बलात्कार पीडित मोकळे का फिरत आहेत... त्यांना तुरुंगात टाकले पाहिजे" (rape victims are walking free... they should be put in jail) expresses anger and negativity. Specifically, the phrase "तुरुंगात टाकले पाहिजे" (they should be put in jail) directed towards rape victims reveals the anger and negative sentiment.

Text: छगन जसं तुझ्या घरात तुझ्या बापाचा फोटो आहे तसाच कळलं का येड्या भोकाच्या
translated_text: Chhagan, just like you have your father's photo in your house, did you know about Yedya Bhoka?
Justification: The phrase "येड्या भोकाच्या" (yedya bhokachya), meaning "idiot," contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: ज्या शेनिकांनी दर्ग्याचं रक्षण केलं त्यांच्यासाठी हा दसरा मेळावा आहे !!
translated_text: This Dussehra gathering is for the soldiers who protected the Dargah!!
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the likely sarcastic or ironic usage of "ज्या शेनिकांनी दर्ग्याचं रक्षण केलं त्यांच्यासाठी हा दसरा मेळावा आहे !!" (This Dussehra gathering is for the soldiers who protected the Dargah!!). In this context, it expresses doubt about the ability of the said people which creates a negative sentiment, despite the positive emotion of joy being present.

Text: आणि तुमचं भाषण महाराष्ट्र एकतोय हा तुमचा भ्रम आहे
translated_text: And your speech that Maharashtra is united is your illusion.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment (-1) because the phrase "भ्रम आहे" (bhram aahe), meaning "is an illusion," expresses disbelief and undermines the perceived unity, thus negating any positive feeling.

Text: लिहून ठेवलेल्याना सांग आता पक्षाची फाटली होती म्हणून माघार घेतली
translated_text: Tell those who wrote it down that the party was now split, so I withdrew.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the phrase "पक्षाची फाटली होती" (pakshachi phatali hoti), which idiomatically means "the party was split" or "the party was in disarray." This indicates a negative situation.

Text: पाकिस्तानच्या समर्थनार्थ घोषणा देणाऱ्या लांडयांचा कडेलोट करा. ही अवलाद आपल्या देशात नकोच.
translated_text: Get rid of the scoundrels who raise slogans in support of Pakistan. We don't want this kind of thing in our country.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment driven by disgust. The phrase "लांडयांचा कडेलोट करा" (get rid of the scoundrels) indicates extreme aversion and a desire for elimination, while "अवलाद आपल्या देशात नकोच" (we don't want this kind of thing in our country) reinforces the strong negative feeling and rejection, both contributing to a disgust emotion.

Text: नाहीतर हल्ली राष्ट्रीय पक्षाच्या निवडणुका कधी होतात हे कार्यकर्त्यांना माहिती पन होत नाही.
translated_text: Otherwise, activists are not even aware of when the national party elections are being held these days.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "माहिती पन होत नाही" (mahiti pan hot nahi) which translates to "are not even aware," indicating a lack of knowledge and a negative perception of the party's communication or organizational structure.

Text: माने यांचा घटस्फोट झाला आहे तर मोहितेने नुकतेच प्रियकराशी ब्रेकअप केले आहे
translated_text: Mane is divorced while Mohite has recently broken up with her boyfriend.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the words "घटस्फोट झाला" (ghataspot jhala), meaning "divorced happened/divorced", and "ब्रेकअप केले" (breakup kele), meaning "broke up," indicating relationship endings. These signify loss and sadness.

Text: संकलन आणि छाया दिग्दर्शन अधिक उत्तम झालं असतं तर चित्रपट आणखी चांगला होऊ शकला असता असं वाटून जातं
translated_text: I feel like the film could have been even better if the editing and cinematography had been better.
Justification: The phrase "अधिक उत्तम झालं असतं तर चित्रपट आणखी चांगला होऊ शकला असता असं वाटून जातं" implies that the film wasn't as good as it could have been, indicating a negative sentiment. The phrase expresses a feeling of lacking or potential not being met, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: आपल्याच विचारातील विसंगती लक्षात आणून देत डोळ्यात झणझणीत अंजन टाकतो
translated_text: It brings to mind the inconsistencies in our own thinking, making us feel a stinging sensation in our eyes.
Justification: The phrase "झणझणीत अंजन टाकतो" (zanzanit anjan takato) which literally translates to "puts a stinging medicine in the eyes" implies a harsh and uncomfortable realization, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: विनोद देखील अगदी क्लिक केलेला असतो आणि अधूनमधून हसतो
translated_text: The humor is also quite clicked and occasionally laughable.
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the mention of humor and laughter ("हसतो") because the phrase "अगदी क्लिक केलेला असतो" (literally "very clicked") in this context suggests that the humor feels forced or unnatural, rather than genuinely funny. This implies a negative experience even though the subject is humor.

Text: कारण ट्रेलरच्या पलीकडे सिनेमात सांगण्यासारखं फार काही उरलेलंच नाही
translated_text: Because there's not much left to say about the movie beyond the trailer.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फार काही उरलेलंच नाही" (far kahi urlelach nahi), meaning "not much left," implying the movie lacks substance beyond the trailer.

Text: डोंगरा जवळील या छोट्यशा गावात गावकरी छोट्या छोट्या गोष्टींवरुन सतत भांडत असतात
translated_text: In this small village near Dongra, villagers constantly fight over small things.
Justification: The phrase "सतत भांडत असतात" (satat bhandat astat - constantly fight) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: आणखी एक दोष म्हणजे गहाळ घटक
translated_text: Another flaw is the missing component.
Justification: "दोष" (dosh), meaning flaw, indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्याचे गुंतागुंतीचे पात्र हाताळण्यासाठी अभिनेत्याची धडपड दिसून येते आणि तो केवळ पुरेसे काम करू शकत नाही.
translated_text: The actor struggles to handle his complex character and he simply can't do enough.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "पुरेसे काम करू शकत नाही" (purese kaam karu shakat nahi), which translates to "can't do enough" implying a lack of capability and performance.

Text: उत्तरप्रदेश आणि परिसरात त्यावेळी प्राप्तिकर अधिकाऱ्यांवरचे हल्ले, त्यांना मारहाण हे प्रकार राजरोसपणे होत होते आणि त्याचे चित्रण दिग्दर्शकाने तितक्याच वाईट पध्दतीने केले आहे
translated_text: Attacks and beatings on income tax officials were rampant in Uttar Pradesh and the surrounding areas at that time, and the director has depicted it in an equally bad manner.
Justification: The phrase "वाईट पध्दतीने केले आहे" (waiit paddhatine kele aahe - depicted in a bad manner) indicates a negative sentiment and disgust, as it signifies a negative portrayal of already negative events.

Text: शर्ट आणि चेहरा मलिन झाल्यावरही सम्राट भिकाऱ्यासारखा दिसत नाही
translated_text: Even when his shirt and face are dirty, the emperor does not look like a beggar.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the comparison to a "भिकाऱ्यासारखा" (bhikaryasarkha - like a beggar), which evokes a sense of disdain and negatively impacts the overall perception of the emperor's state. This implies a low and undesirable status.

Text: म्हणजे पडायला तर पाहिजेच ना नेहमीप्रमाणे या दोघांना बिरासदार कुटुंबाचा विरोध होतो
translated_text: So, they have to fall, right? As usual, these two are opposed by the Birasdar family.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "विरोध होतो" (virodh hoto), meaning "are opposed," which indicates conflict and negativity.

Text: आणि यामुळेच ते अनेकांसाठी भयानक आणि क्लेशकारक बनले
translated_text: And that's what made it so terrifying and traumatic for so many.
Justification: "भयानक" (bhayanak), meaning terrifying, directly contributes to the negative sentiment and the emotion of fear.

Text: दुर्दैवाने तसे होत नाही
translated_text: Unfortunately, that doesn't happen.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैवाने" (durdhaivane), meaning "unfortunately," indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: तांत्रिक बाबींमध्येही चित्रपटाने फार मोठी कामगिरी केली आहे असे म्हणता येणार नाही
translated_text: It cannot be said that the film has achieved much in terms of technical aspects either.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "far mothi kamgiri keli aahe ase mhanta yenar nahi" which translates to "cannot be said to have achieved much," indicating a lack of accomplishment and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: एका मॉडेलची हत्या झाली आहे, संशयित बिल्डरचे नाव माहिती आहे, मात्र त्याला अटक होणार नाही हेच आजवरचा अनुभव सांगत असतो
translated_text: A model has been murdered, the name of the suspected builder is known, but experience so far suggests that he will not be arrested.
Justification: "अटक होणार नाही हेच आजवरचा अनुभव सांगत असतो" indicates a sense of resignation and frustration stemming from past experiences, implying injustice and lack of accountability, thus contributing to the anger sentiment.

Text: बॉलिवूडमध्ये काही मोजकेच सिनेमे आहेत ज्यात आपल्या सैन्यदलाच्या शौर्यगाथा मांडण्यात आल्या आहेत
translated_text: There are only a few movies in Bollywood that depict the heroic stories of our armed forces.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "काही मोजकेच" (kahi mojakech), meaning "only a few". This implies a lack or deficiency, suggesting that more movies about the armed forces' bravery should be made.

Text: सिनेमातील काळकामवेगाचं गणित काहीसं चुकलेलं आहे
translated_text: The math for the speed of the black hole in the movie is a bit off.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "चुकलेलं" (chukleलं), which translates to "off" or "mistaken". It indicates a flaw or error in the movie's depiction, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: कुठलाही वाद निर्माण केल्याशिवाय आपले काम होत नाही
translated_text: Our work doesn't get done without creating any controversy.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "वाद निर्माण केल्याशिवाय" (vaad nirmaan kelyashivaay), which means "without creating controversy." This implies a problematic and undesirable situation, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र क्रिकेटच्या सिलेक्शन कमिटीचं राजकारण विशिष्ट खेळाडूंना मिळणारं झुकतं माप याबद्दल काही ठोस भाष्य आढळत नाही
translated_text: However, there is no concrete comment on the politics of cricket's selection committee regarding the bias towards certain players.
Justification: "झुकतं माप" (jhukta maap) meaning "biased treatment" implies unfairness, driving the negative sentiment.

Text: पण, तिने प्रेक्षकांना निराश केले आहे
translated_text: But, she has disappointed the audience.
Justification: "निराश केले" (nirash kele), meaning "disappointed," clearly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: ‘फुकरे रिटर्न्स’मध्ये पहिल्या चित्रपटात अनुभवायला मिळालेली दिल्लीतील चार तरुणांच्या फुकरेगिरीची मात्रा या वेळी अंमळ कमी पडली आहे
translated_text: In 'Fukrey Returns', the level of fukreyism experienced by four young men from Delhi in the first film is drastically reduced this time around.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "अंमळ कमी पडली आहे" (amall kami padali aahe), meaning "drastically reduced," indicating a decline in the enjoyable "fukreyism" and hence a negative experience compared to the first film.

Text: भारतात बँक फ्रॉड करून हजारो कोटी लुटून तो विदेशात राहत असून त्याला पुन्हा भारताच्या हवाली करायचं आहे
translated_text: He has committed bank fraud in India and looted thousands of crores, but is living abroad and wants to be extradited to India again.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "लुटून" (lutun), meaning "looted," which evokes a strong sense of anger and disgust at the act of financial exploitation. The phrase points toward wrongdoing by the accused.

Text: विद्यापुढे हे नवं आव्हान आहे मात्र जंगल आणि वन्यप्राणी टिकले पाहिजेत या विद्याच्या मानसिकतेला खिंडार पाडणारेही तिच्याच विभागातले वरिष्ठ आहेत
translated_text: This is a new challenge for Vidya, but the ones who are disrupting Vidya's mindset that the forest and wildlife must survive are also seniors in her own department.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "खिंडार पाडणारेही" (khiNDaar paaDnaarehee), which translates to "disrupting" or "undermining." This indicates that someone is actively working against Vidya's positive goals, causing a negative situation.

Text: बेहजादने सिनेमाची गती उत्तम ठेवल्यामुळे हा सिनेमा बघतांना बोर होत नाही, पण सिनेमातील बऱ्याच गोष्टी अनाकलनीय वाटतात
translated_text: Behzad keeps the pace of the film well, so it doesn't get boring while watching it, but many things in the film seem incomprehensible.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "अनाकलनीय वाटतात" (anakalaniya vatatat), which means "seem incomprehensible," indicating confusion and a negative experience with understanding the film.

Text: काही भाग ताणले जातात आणि पुनरावृत्ती होते आणि पार्श्वभूमी संगीत बर्याच दृश्यांच्या प्रभावापासून दूर जाते
translated_text: Some parts are tense and repetitive, and the background music takes away from the impact of many scenes.
Justification: The sentence is negative because "प्रभावापासून दूर जाते" (prabhavapasun dur jate) implies that the background music detracts from the scenes' impact.

Text: पण त्याला त्याच्या आवाजात बदल करण्याची गरज नव्हती
translated_text: But he didn't need to change his voice.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the implied criticism in "गरज नव्हती" (garaj navhati), meaning "didn't need," suggesting that he should have or was considering changing his voice, which is perceived as unnecessary and therefore undesirable. This conveys a subtle disapproval or lack of support.

Text: सुमारे लाखभर सैनिकांच्या गराड्यात असलेल्या महालात घुसून शाहिस्तेखानावर हल्ला करणे ही केवळ लष्करीच नव्हे तर राजकीय कारवाईही होती
translated_text: Entering the palace, which was surrounded by about a lakh soldiers, and attacking Shahiste Khan was not only a military but also a political action.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the description of a daring and aggressive action - attacking Shahiste Khan. The phrase "हल्ला करणे" (halla karne - to attack) indicates aggression, contributing to the negative sentiment in this otherwise factual statement.

Text: या साऱ्यामध्ये सिद्धांत कपूर याच्या वाट्याला म्हणावी तशी दमदार भूमिका न आल्यामुळे त्याचे प्रयत्न सरासरी असल्याचं पाहायला मिळत आहे
translated_text: Siddhant Kapoor's efforts are seen as average as he doesn't get a strong role in all this.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "सरासरी असल्याचं पाहायला मिळत आहे" (sarasari aslyacha pahayla milat aahe), which translates to "seen as average," indicating a lack of strong performance and contributing to a negative assessment.

Text: त्याच्या बहिणीच्या आत्महत्येनंतर तो एकटाच शहरात कसा आला, जुहू समुद्रकिनाऱ्यावर पाकीट चोरणे आणि उदरनिर्वाहासाठी ड्रग्स विकणे याकडे तो कसा वळतो हे पुढील क्रम दाखवतात.
translated_text: The following sequences show how he comes to the city alone after his sister's suicide, how he turns to stealing wallets on Juhu beach and selling drugs to make ends meet.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "आत्महत्येनंतर" (aatmahatyenantar), meaning "after suicide," indicating a tragic event.

Text: मधुराला तिच्या कुटुंबाच्या गरजा इतक्या खपल्या आहेत की तिने स्वतःला गमावले आहे हे सत्य मांडणे
translated_text: To present the truth that Madhura is so consumed by the needs of her family that she has lost herself.
Justification: "गमावले आहे" (gamavale aahe - has lost) indicates a loss of self, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: काहीवेळा, दिग्दर्शक जातिभेद दाखवण्याच्या त्याच्या ध्यासाने ओलांडतो
translated_text: Sometimes, the director goes overboard with his obsession with showing casteism.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "जातिभेद दाखवण्याच्या त्याच्या ध्यासाने ओलांडतो" (jatibhed dakhavnyachya tyachya dhyasane olandato), which implies an excessive and potentially problematic focus on casteism.

Text: सिनेमा दिसायला चकचकीत आणि कलरफुल झाला असला तरी कथेत जीव नाही
translated_text: Although the movie looks flashy and colorful, the story lacks life.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कथेत जीव नाही" (kathet jeev nahi), which translates to "the story lacks life," indicating a deficiency in the core narrative.

Text: तिच्या त्वचेवर पांढरे ठिपके आहेत, जे तिला अंतर्मुख बनवतात जी इतरांसोबत सहजपणे मिसळत नाही
translated_text: She has white spots on her skin, which makes her an introvert who doesn't blend in easily with others.
Justification: "अंतर्मुख बनवतात" (antarmukh banavtat - makes her an introvert) indicates a negative sentiment because it describes a socially isolating effect stemming from the skin condition.

Text: जेव्हा संत्या जिल्हा कार्यालयात पोहोचतो तेव्हा त्याला सांगितले जाते की त्याचे वडील कधीच जन्मलेले नव्हते! आणि मग ते असल्याचा पुरावा मिळवण्यासाठी त्याला प्रचंड रक्कम भरावी लागते.
translated_text: When Santya reaches the district office, he is told that his father was never born! And then he has to pay a huge amount of money to get proof that he was.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कधीच जन्मलेले नव्हते!" (kadhich janmalele navhate!), meaning "never born," which expresses disbelief and a problematic situation.

Text: त्याच दृश्यात जेव्हा कॅमेरा परत फिरतो, तेव्हा इन्स्पेक्टर छाटलेली दाढी आणि मिशा खेळत असतो! अशी स्पष्ट चूक प्रॉडक्शन टीमच्या लक्षात आली असावी
translated_text: When the camera pans back to the same scene, the inspector is sporting a trimmed beard and moustache! This is a glaring mistake that the production team must have noticed.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "अशी स्पष्ट चूक" (ashi spasht chuk), meaning "such a glaring mistake," which expresses disapproval and highlights a flaw. The surprise element is also present because the user is highlighting how such an obvious mistake would be made.

Text: या बाबतीत सिरीज थोडी मागे पडली आहे, असं वाटतं
translated_text: I think the series has fallen behind a bit in this regard.
Justification: "मागे पडली आहे" (mage padli aahe - fallen behind) indicates a negative aspect, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: हा त्याचा या दशकातील सर्वात वाईट चित्रपट आहे आणि कदाचित त्याच्या कारकिर्दीतील आतापर्यंतचा सर्वात वाईट चित्रपट आहे.
translated_text: This is his worst film of the decade and probably the worst film of his career so far.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "सर्वात वाईट चित्रपट" (sarvat vait chitrapat), which means "worst film".

Text: मग, जर त्याला कोणताही खेळ शिकण्याची आणि खेळण्याची संधी मिळाली नाही, तर तो प्रशिक्षक कसा झाला? राज्य संघाच्या प्रशिक्षकपदासाठी पात्र होण्यासाठी तुम्हाला किमान राष्ट्रीय स्तरावरील खेळाडू असण्याची गरज नाही का? चित्रपट तुमच्या मनात अशा प्रश्नांनी गुंजत राहतो ज्यांची उत्तरे नाहीत
translated_text: So, if he didn't get a chance to learn and play any sport, how did he become a coach? Don't you need to be at least a national level player to be eligible for the post of state team coach? The film keeps buzzing in your mind with questions that have no answers
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उत्तरे नाहीत" (uttare nahit), meaning "no answers," indicating a lack of resolution and leaving a negative impression.

Text: पण राजकारण की प्रेमकथा यामध्ये मकरंदची गफलत झाल्यामुळे ;कागर; विस्कळीत झाल्यासारखा वाटतो
translated_text: But it seems like ;Kagar; is disrupted due to Makarand's blunder between politics and love story.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "विस्कळीत" (viskalit), which means "disrupted."

Text: तिचा नवरा मामा (नागराज मंजुळे) एक निर्दयी पत्नीला मारहाण करणारा तर आहेच, पण त्याच्या बांधकामाच्या ठिकाणी त्याच्या हाताखाली काम करणाऱ्या महिलांशी जवळीक साधण्याची संधी शोधण्याइतपत लबाडही आहे.
translated_text: Her husband, Mama (Nagraj Manjule), is not only a ruthless wife beater, but also deceitful enough to find opportunities to get intimate with the women who work under him at his construction site.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "निर्दयी पत्नीला मारहाण करणारा" (nirdai patnila marhaan karnara), meaning "ruthless wife beater," which indicates violence and cruelty.

Text: त्याच वेळी तिला तिच्या भूतकाळाच्या एका गुप्ततेमुळे पछाडले आहे
translated_text: At the same time, she is haunted by a secret from her past.
Justification: "पछाडले आहे" (pachhadle aahe - is haunted) indicates a negative experience, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण त्याचा काडीभरही परिणाम मुळातच नीरस असलेल्या चित्रपटावर होत नाही
translated_text: But it doesn't have the slightest impact on the film, which is basically boring.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "काडीभरही परिणाम ... होत नाही" (kadibharahi parinaam... hot nahi) which translates to "not the slightest impact" and the word "नीरस" (neeras) meaning "boring". These indicate a strongly negative reaction to the film, overriding any potential neutrality.

Text: मुक्ता एका अध्यात्मिक नेत्याने (स्वप्नील राजशेखर) चालवलेल्या शाळेत शिकते, जो गावकऱ्यांच्या नजरेत महात्मा आहे पण प्रत्यक्षात त्याला स्वतःला सैतानाचा अवतार म्हणता येईल.
translated_text: Mukta studies in a school run by a spiritual leader (Swapnil Rajasekhar), who is a Mahatma in the eyes of the villagers but in reality he himself could be called the incarnation of Satan.
Justification: The phrase "सैतानाचा अवतार" (Saitanacha Avatar), meaning "incarnation of Satan," is strongly negative, indicating a very negative portrayal of the spiritual leader, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: , तथापि, याच्या विपरीत सामग्री खराब आहे आणि तो संदेश देण्यासही अयशस्वी ठरतो
translated_text: However, the content is poor and it also fails to convey the message.
Justification: "खराब आहे" (kharab aahe) meaning "is poor" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: आणि त्यातून जे काही उरले नूरले ते अलीकडे व्हाट्सएपच्या व्हायरसने मारले आहे
translated_text: And what was left of it, Nurle, has recently been killed by the WhatsApp virus.
Justification: The phrase "व्हायरसने मारले आहे" (virusne marle aahe) meaning "killed by the virus" indicates a negative sentiment, specifically implying destruction or loss.

Text: काही लांब विराम आणि एक अप्रिय पार्श्वभूमी स्कोअर वारंवार वापरला जातो
translated_text: Some long pauses and an unpleasant background score are frequently used.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "अप्रिय" (apriya), which translates to "unpleasant" or "disagreeable." This word directly expresses a negative quality about the background score.

Text: अहो, त्यांच्या हातात सत्तेचा रिमोट कंट्रोल असतो असंच म्हणा ना! राजकारणात येणारे बरेच तरुण गुरुजींना आपला आदर्श मानतात
translated_text: Hey, don't you think he has the remote control of power in his hands? Many young people entering politics consider Guruji as their role model.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment due to the phrase "सत्तेचा रिमोट कंट्रोल असतो असंच म्हणा ना!", which implies that someone has undue control or influence ("remote control of power"), suggesting manipulation or a lack of genuine democracy. This creates a negative connotation.

Text: मात्र आता त्यांच्या नात्यात प्रेम उरत नाही
translated_text: But now there is no love left in their relationship.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "प्रेम उरत नाही" (prem urat nahi) which translates to "love is not left," indicating a lack of love and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: पण दिग्दर्शकाला हे सगळं अचूक हेरता आलेलं नाही
translated_text: But the director couldn't see it all clearly.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "आलेलं नाही" (aalele nahi), which translates to "couldn't" or "did not manage to," indicating a lack or failure.

Text: मुलाच्या चेहऱ्याला काळं फासतात
translated_text: The child's face is covered in black.
Justification: The phrase "काळं फासतात" (kaala faastat) which means "cover in black," implies defilement or shaming, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: म्हणून जेव्हा दोन डॅडीज विश्वासू सहाय्यक मारले जातात आणि असे दिसते की स्वत: त्या माणसाला धोक्यात आले आहे आता सूर्याला परत बोलावले जाते
translated_text: So when two of Daddy's trusted assistants are killed and it seems the man himself is in danger, the sun is called back.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "मारले जातात" (marle jatat), which translates to "are killed," indicating a violent event.

Text: सोप्या भाषेत सांगायचे तर, दिग्दर्शक चंद्रकांत दुधगावकरांचा धिंगाणा हा मराठीतील आणखी एक विनाशकारी चित्रपट आहे.
translated_text: Simply put, director Chandrakant Dudhgaonkar's Dhingana is another disastrous Marathi film.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "विनाशकारी" (vinashkari), which translates to "disastrous". This word strongly indicates a negative assessment of the film.

Text: पण, त्याच्या या प्रयत्नांना पूर्णपणे यश मिळालं असं म्हणता येणार नाही
translated_text: However, it cannot be said that his efforts were completely successful.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "यश मिळालं असं म्हणता येणार नाही" (yash milala asa mhanta yenar nahi), which translates to "it cannot be said that success was achieved." This phrase indicates a lack of success, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: आपल्या आईंमध्ये वैर आहे म्हटल्यावर त्यांना देखील एकमेकांचे वैरी असल्याचं नाटक करावं लागत
translated_text: When they say there is enmity between their mothers, they also have to pretend to be enemies with each other.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the Marathi word "वैर" (vair), meaning enmity or animosity, which indicates a negative relationship between the mothers. Although the emotion is neutral, the existence of "वैर" fundamentally introduces negativity.

Text: शमशेरा आपल्या साथीदारांना सोडवण्याच्या प्रयत्नात आपला जीव देतो
translated_text: Shamshera gives his life in an attempt to rescue his comrades.
Justification: "जीव देतो" (gives his life) indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a death, despite being in a heroic context.

Text: लल्लोला तिच्या आयुष्यातील प्रेमाची कमतरता भरून काढता येत नाही
translated_text: Lallo can't make up for the lack of love in her life.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "प्रेमाची कमतरता" (premachi kamtarata), which translates to "lack of love," indicating a deficiency and contributing to the overall sadness.

Text: खालच्या पार उत्पादन कौशल्याने मधले सूर आणि सबपार अभिनयासह तो चित्रपट म्हणून सहज पात्र ठरतो ज्याकडे दुर्लक्ष केले जाऊ शकते आणि केले पाहिजे
translated_text: With below-par production skills, mediocre tunes, and subpar acting, it easily qualifies as a film that can and should be ignored.
Justification: "खालच्या पार" (khalchya paar - below par) indicates poor quality and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: पहिल्या सहामाहीत चित्रपटांची गती कोठेही नसलेल्या प्रेमकथेवर महत्त्वपूर्ण स्क्रीन टाइम वाया घालविण्यामुळे अत्यंत धीमे आहे
translated_text: The pace of the film is extremely slow in the first half, wasting significant screen time on a love story that goes nowhere.
Justification: "वाया घालविण्यामुळे" (wasting) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a detrimental and unproductive use of screen time.

Text: तो असाही आहे की ज्याने आपल्या विद्यार्थ्याच्या मृत्यूची धक्कादायक बातमी ऐकून केळीच्या कातडीवर उतरल्यावर मुल घसरल्यासारखी प्रतिक्रिया दिली.
translated_text: He is also the one who, upon hearing the shocking news of his student's death, reacted like a child slipping on a banana skin.
Justification: "केळीच्या कातडीवर उतरल्यावर मुल घसरल्यासारखी प्रतिक्रिया दिली" (reacted like a child slipping on a banana skin) implies a dismissive, inappropriate, and unempathetic response to a tragic event, driving the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: तिच्या अस्तित्वासाठी तिला आजही झगडावं लागतंय
translated_text: She still has to fight for her existence.
Justification: "झगडावं लागतंय" (zhagdaav lagtay - has to fight) indicates a struggle and hardship, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: प्रवासादरम्यान अश्विनीच्या वागण्याने आलोक चिडतो
translated_text: Alok gets irritated by Ashwini's behavior during the trip.
Justification: The phrase "चिडतो" (chidto) signifies irritation, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: आपल्या वयाच्या दुप्पट वयाची भूमिका अभिनेत्री तापसी पन्नू आणि भूमी पेडणेकर यांनी साकारल्यामुळे काहींच्या भुवया उंचावल्या होत्या
translated_text: Some raised eyebrows when actresses Taapsee Pannu and Bhumi Pednekar played roles twice their age.
Justification: The phrase "भुवया उंचावल्या होत्या" (bhuvaya unchavalya hotya - eyebrows were raised) indicates disapproval or skepticism, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मोठमोठ्या समस्या काही मिनिटांत सोडवल्या जातात, ज्या चित्रपटात काही वेळा अवास्तव वाटतात.
translated_text: Big problems are solved in a matter of minutes, which at times feels unrealistic in the film.
Justification: The phrase "अवास्तव वाटतात" (avastav vatatat), meaning "feels unrealistic," indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a disbelief or criticism of the film's portrayal of problem-solving.

Text: प्रसंग मुद्दाम खेचल्यासारखे जाणवतात
translated_text: The events seem to be deliberately drawn out.
Justification: "खेचल्यासारखे" (khechlyasarkhe), meaning "drawn out" or "protracted," implies an artificial and potentially negative extension of the events, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The context suggests manipulation rather than a natural progression.

Text: काही दृश्ये अपूर्ण वाटतात, जिथे पाहताना प्रेक्षकांना आश्चर्य वाटते की, या नंतर पुढे काय होणार आणि काय घडणे आवश्यक होते
translated_text: Some scenes feel incomplete, leaving the audience wondering what will happen next and what needs to happen.
Justification: "अपूर्ण वाटतात" (apurn vatatat) meaning "feel incomplete" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: तिच्या अंतर्गत संघर्षांचा अधिक शोध घ्यायला हवा होता
translated_text: Her internal conflicts should have been explored more.
Justification: "संघर्षांचा" (sangharshancha - conflicts) indicates a negative situation, even though the overall tone is neutral, as it describes an unresolved issue. This word contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: नव्याने आलेला त्याचा केसरी सुद्धा अपेक्षित उंची गाठत नाही
translated_text: Even his newly arrived saffron does not reach the expected height.
Justification: "अपेक्षित उंची गाठत नाही" (does not reach the expected height) expresses a lack of fulfillment or falling short of expectations, indicating a negative sentiment. While the sentence is neutral in emotion, the negative sentiment stems from this shortfall.

Text: या दाव्याचे समर्थन करण्यासाठी येथे काही मुद्दे आहेत:- मंदिराच्या वादाचा मुख्य मुद्दा वेगवेगळ्या लोकांद्वारे आळशी रीतीने समोर आणला जातो ज्याबद्दल फक्त फोनवर बोलतो.
translated_text: Here are some points to support this claim:- The main issue of the temple controversy is lazily brought up by different people who only talk about it on the phone.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "आळशी रीतीने" (aalshi reetine), which translates to "lazily." This word indicates a lack of effort or seriousness, contributing to a negative tone.

Text: त्याचप्रमाणे, तो त्याच्या पालकांना विभक्त होण्याचे कारण सांगण्यासाठी धडपडतो
translated_text: Similarly, he struggles to explain the reason for the separation to his parents.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "धडपडतो" (dhadpadto), which translates to "struggles". This implies difficulty and a potentially negative outcome, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: रेट्रोग्रेड अॅम्नेशिया सारखी स्थिती गंभीर आहे यात शंका नाही
translated_text: There is no doubt that a condition like retrograde amnesia is serious.
Justification: The phrase "गंभीर आहे" (gambhir aahe) meaning "is serious" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: भाटिया गरीब आणि अनाथांसाठी समानतेचा उपदेश करतात तर तितक्याच विचित्र पार्श्वभूमीचा स्कोअर तुम्हाला खिळवून ठेवतो
translated_text: Bhatia preaches equality for the poor and orphans while the equally bizarre background score keeps you hooked.
Justification: The sentence is slightly negative because it uses the word "विचित्र" (vichitra), meaning "bizarre," to describe the background score. While "खिळवून ठेवतो" (khilvun thevto - keeps you hooked) is positive, the "विचित्र" element introduces a sense of unease or strangeness, leading to the overall slightly negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या आयुष्यात अनपेक्षित वळण येते जेव्हा त्यांना त्यांच्या प्रगतीचा मत्सर करणाऱ्या दुष्ट बाबाचा सामना करावा लागतो
translated_text: Their lives take an unexpected turn when they face an evil father who is jealous of their progress.
Justification: "दुष्ट बाबा" (dusht baba) meaning "evil father" indicates a negative connotation, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कोचीवर विमान लँड होण्यापूर्वी कोचीचे हवामान खराब असल्याची वार्ता वैमानिकांना मिळते आणि पर्यायी लँडिंगचा शोध सुरू होतो
translated_text: Before the plane lands at Kochi, the pilots receive a report of bad weather at Kochi and a search for an alternative landing begins.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "हवामान खराब असल्याची वार्ता" (havamaan kharab aslyachi vaarta), which translates to "report of bad weather." "खराब" (kharab) specifically means "bad" or "poor," indicating an undesirable condition.

Text: मध्यंतरानंतरचा दुसरा हाफ जरा चांगला नसता तर "विशू" हा चित्रपट आपत्ती ठरला असता.
translated_text: "Vishoo" would have been a disaster if the second half after the interval had not been a bit better.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily due to the phrase "आपत्ती ठरला असता" (aapatti tharala asta), which translates to "would have been a disaster". This indicates a negative potential outcome for the film.

Text: गिरीश ओक यांनी आपल्या भूमिका उत्तम पद्धतीनं निभावण्याचा प्रयत्न केला असला तरी दिग्दर्शकीय पातळीवर प्रसंग जमून आले नाहीत
translated_text: Although Girish Oak tried to play his role in the best possible way, the directorial aspects did not come together.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) because of the phrase "प्रसंग जमून आले नाहीत" (prasang jamun aale nahit), which translates to "the scenes did not come together," indicating a failure or lack of success in the directorial execution.

Text: पण एक साधी सरळ गोष्ट सांगताना त्याला विनाकारण फाटे फोडत गेल्यामुळे उत्तरार्धात सिनेमा पाहण्याचा उत्साह निघून जातो
translated_text: But when telling a simple story, he keeps breaking it down unnecessarily, which makes the excitement of watching the movie disappear in the second half.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "उत्साह निघून जातो" (utsah nighun jato), which translates to "excitement disappears" indicating a loss of positive feeling.

Text: अर्थात या बांधून ठेवण्यासाठी ‘सिनेमॅटिक लिबर्टी’ नावाची गोंडस संकल्पना आपल्याकडं तयार असल्याने म्हणजे आपणच ती ‘विकसित’ केली असल्याने त्याच्या नावाखाली सारं काही चालून जातं आणि मग इतिहासाची तोडफोड करून एक व्यावसायिक सिनेमा साकारला जातो
translated_text: Of course, since we have a cute concept called 'cinematic liberty' ready to build this, meaning we have 'developed' it ourselves, everything goes on under its name and then a commercial cinema is made by sabotaging history.
Justification: The phrase "तोडफोड करून" (todfod karun), meaning "sabotaging," indicates a negative action, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्याच्या जन्मानंतर लगेचच, त्याची मत्सर काकू त्याला मारण्याचा प्रयत्न करते कारण ती निपुत्रिक आहे
translated_text: Soon after his birth, his jealous aunt tries to kill him because she is childless.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "मारण्याचा प्रयत्न करते" (maranyacha prayatna karte), which translates to "tries to kill," indicating a harmful action.

Text: पतीला उशीर झाल्यावर ती फोन करते, पण त्याच्या मोबाईलवर कॉल करण्याऐवजी तिने नंदन लुटायला निघालेल्या घराच्या लँडलाईनवर कॉल करणे पसंत करते.
translated_text: She calls her husband when he is late, but instead of calling his mobile, she prefers to call the landline of the house where she is going to rob Nandan.
Justification: The sentence describes a situation where someone chooses to call the landline of a house being robbed rather than the husband's mobile, implying malicious intent and a negative situation. The phrase "नंदन लुटायला निघालेल्या घराच्या लँडलाईनवर कॉल करणे पसंत करते" (prefers to call the landline of the house where she is going to rob Nandan) indicates a negative and potentially criminal act, driving the negative sentiment.

Text: आनंद असो, दुःख असो, निराशा असो किंवा राग असो, तो भावनांवर प्रभुत्व मिळवत नाही
translated_text: Whether it is happiness, sadness, disappointment or anger, he does not control his emotions.
Justification: The sentence exhibits a negative sentiment because it indicates a lack of control over emotions, implied by "प्रभुत्व मिळवत नाही" (prabhutva milvat nahi), which means "does not gain mastery/control." This lack of control is associated with negative experiences such as sadness, disappointment, and anger mentioned in the sentence, hence driving a negative sentiment.

Text: थोडा वेळ टाइमपास झाल्याचा ‘फील’ येतो पण या ‘फील’पेक्षा वेळ गेल्याची ‘फॅक्ट’ जास्त त्रासदायक ठरते
translated_text: It feels like time has passed for a while, but the fact that time has passed is more disturbing than this feeling.
Justification: The phrase "जास्त त्रासदायक ठरते" (jasta trasdayak tharte) which means "more disturbing" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: मुळात तत्त्वाच्या नाहीच, पण तर्काच्या कसोटीवरही या चित्रपटाची गोष्ट ताडून पाहिली तरी ती कोणालाच पटणार नाही
translated_text: Even if you examine the story of this film not only on principle, but also on the test of logic, no one will be convinced by it.
Justification: The phrase "कोणालाच पटणार नाही" (konalahi patnar nahi), meaning "no one will be convinced," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पूजाचे बळजबरीने लग्न लावून देण्यात येणार असते
translated_text: Pooja is being forcibly married off.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "बळजबरीने" (balajabarine), which means forcibly or by force, indicating a lack of consent and coercion in the marriage.

Text: भूषण प्रधान हा धावपटूसारखा दिसतो, पण प्रशिक्षकाची नोकरी सांभाळत असलेल्या बहुतांश भागात तो संघर्ष करतो
translated_text: Bhushan Pradhan looks like a runner, but he struggles in most areas of the coaching job.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "संघर्ष करतो" (sangharsh karto), which translates to "struggles".

Text: अर्थात, आम्हाला माहित आहे की हा एक गंभीर चित्रपट नाही, परंतु किमान काळजी किंवा भीतीचा इशारा आहे?
translated_text: Of course, we know this isn't a serious film, but is there at least a hint of worry or fear?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "काळजी किंवा भीतीचा इशारा" (kaalji kinvaa bhiticha ishaara), which translates to "a hint of worry or fear," implying a negative or undesirable element being present.

Text: चित्रपट अजून रंगवता आला असता पण दिग्दर्शक चित्रपट रंगवण्यात अयशस्वी ठरलाय
translated_text: The film could have still been made, but the director has failed to make it.
Justification: "अयशस्वी ठरलाय" (ayashasvi tharlaay) meaning "has failed" indicates a negative outcome and disappointment, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: येथे, मूल आणि त्याचे एकल वडील यांच्यातील कडू-गोड बंधनावर लक्ष केंद्रित केले आहे
translated_text: Here, the focus is on the bittersweet bond between a child and his single father.
Justification: The phrase "कडू-गोड" (kadu-god), meaning "bittersweet," indicates a negative sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral. Bittersweet implies a mix of pleasant and unpleasant experiences, leaning towards the negative due to the inherent "bitter" aspect.

Text: मात्र ‘सस्पेन्स थ्रिलर’चा हा खेळ म्हणावासा रंगत नाही
translated_text: But this game of 'suspense thriller' doesn't work out.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily due to the phrase "रंगत नाही" (rangat nahi), which translates to "doesn't work out" or "not engaging," indicating a lack of enjoyment or success.

Text: पण तिच्यासमोर अक्षय खन्ना सारखा मुरलेला कलाकार असल्यामुळे ती फिकी पडली आहे
translated_text: But she is left feeling pale because she has a twisted actor like Akshaye Khanna in front of her.
Justification: The phrase "फिकी पडली आहे" (phiki padli aahe), meaning "left feeling pale," indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests she was overshadowed and diminished in comparison, despite the neutral emotion.

Text: सिनेमातील संवाददेखील फार लक्षवेधी नाहीत
translated_text: The dialogues in the movie are also not very interesting.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "लक्षवेधी नाहीत" (lakshavedhi nahit), which translates to "not interesting/not attention-grabbing."

Text: ठाकरे यांचा चरित्रपट म्हणून सगळे लक्ष केवळ बाळासाहेबांवर दिल्याने त्या वेळची परिस्थिती बदलत्या समाज आणि अर्थकरणाने घडत जाणारी मुंबई याचे दर्शन घडत नाही
translated_text: As a biography of Thackeray, all the focus is on Balasaheb, which does not reflect the changing social and economic conditions of that time in Mumbai.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "दर्शन घडत नाही" (darshan ghadat nahi), meaning "it does not reflect/show," indicating a lack or absence of something desired or expected, hence a negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही चित्रपटाच्या अभिनयाचा आनंद घेऊ शकता परंतु जर सस्पेन्स थ्रिलर्स तुमची जाम असतील तर तुम्हाला फसवणूक वाटू शकते
translated_text: You may enjoy the film's acting but if suspense thrillers are your jam, you may feel cheated.
Justification: The word "फसवणूक" (fasanvook) meaning "cheated" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र गणेशोत्सवात फक्त गणपतीच असायला हवा येशू ख्रिस्त येता कामा नये अशी दमदाटी सोसायटीच्या बाहेरचे गुंड येऊन धमकावतात तेव्हा सोसायटीच्या मिटिंगमध्ये कशाला वाद म्हणून नाटक रद्द करण्याचे ठरते
translated_text: However, when goons from outside the society come and threaten that only Ganesha should be present during Ganeshotsav and that Jesus Christ should not be present, why is it decided to cancel the play as an argument in the society meeting?
Justification: The phrase "दमदाटी सोसायटीच्या बाहेरचे गुंड येऊन धमकावतात" (goons from outside the society come and threaten) indicates a threatening and aggressive action, triggering anger and a negative sentiment. The word "धमकावतात" (threaten) is the primary indicator of this negative sentiment.

Text: राजकुमारला निरुत्साही चित्रण आणि अपर्याप्तपणे विकसित भूमिका, विशेषतः राणी आणि तिच्या वडिलांच्या भूमिकांमुळे त्रास होतो.
translated_text: The prince suffers from uninspiring portrayals and inadequately developed roles, particularly those of the queen and her father.
Justification: "निरुत्साही" (nirutsaahi - uninspiring) indicates a lack of positive qualities, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: श्रीपती कर्जात बुडाला आहे, त्याने विहीर खोदण्यासाठी आपले नम्र घर निर्दयी सावकार रघू साहुकर (मनोज जोशी) यांच्याकडे गहाण ठेवले आहे.
translated_text: Shripati is deep in debt, having mortgaged his humble house to the ruthless moneylender Raghu Sahukar (Manoj Joshi) to dig a well.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "कर्जात बुडाला आहे" (karjat budala aahe), meaning "deep in debt," which indicates financial distress and hardship. Additionally, the description of the moneylender as "निर्दयी" (nirdai), meaning "ruthless," further contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण मूळ कथेच्या तुलनेत ही गोष्ट जिथे पाहिजे तिथे फारशी हिट होत नाही
translated_text: But compared to the original story, this one doesn't quite hit the mark.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "फारशी हिट होत नाही" (pharshi hit hot nahi), which indicates that the story doesn't quite hit the mark or resonate as well as the original, implying a deficiency or failure to meet expectations.

Text: परंतु मोठ्या झोयाला आता या लक फॅक्टरचा त्रास होऊ लागलाय
translated_text: But older Zoya is now starting to suffer from this luck factor.
Justification: The phrase "त्रास होऊ लागलाय" (tras hou laglay), meaning "starting to suffer," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: परिणामी तो खिळवून ठेवण्यात अयशस्वी झाला आहे
translated_text: As a result, he has failed to impress.
Justification: The phrase "अयशस्वी झाला आहे" (ayashasvi zhala aahe), meaning "has failed," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कंत्राटदार आरके हा एक लबाड माणूस आहे आणि झोपडपट्टीतील बहुतेक महिलांवर त्याची नजर आहे
translated_text: Contractor RK is a deceitful man and has his eye on most of the women in the slum.
Justification: "लबाड माणूस" (labaad manus) meaning "deceitful man" indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the emotion of disgust.

Text: मात्र महापालिका असो की पोलिस या आवाहनाचे रूपांतर संतापजनक वादात होते
translated_text: However, whether it is the municipal corporation or the police, this appeal turns into a furious debate.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "संतापजनक वादात" (santapjanak vadaat), which translates to "furious debate," indicating anger and negativity.

Text: दोघंही वेगळ्या जातीतले असल्यानं पालकांचा विरोध आहे
translated_text: Parents are opposed as both are from different castes
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विरोध आहे" (virodh aahe), which translates to "opposition is there," indicating a negative situation.

Text: अनेक प्रसंगांमध्ये विषयाचं गांभीर्य लेखकदिग्दर्शकाला राखता आलं नाही
translated_text: In many instances, the writer-director was unable to maintain the seriousness of the subject matter.
Justification: The phrase "गांभीर्य राखता आलं नाही" (gaambhirya rakhta aala nahi - unable to maintain the seriousness) indicates a failure to maintain a desired quality, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.
